overview_en: 100% Pascal-sensei is a Japanese gag comedy manga series written and illustrated by Yūji Nagai. it was serialized in Shogakukan's CoroCoro Comic magazine from January 15, 2015, to October 15, 2018. The story centers around a mole elementary school teacher called Pascal who is so dumb that he cannot even write his own name correctly. Pascal is whimsical and he does whatever he wants in his classroom.
overview_zh: 《100% 帕斯卡老師》是由永井雄二創作並插畫的日本搞笑喜劇漫畫系列。作品於2015年1月15日至2018年10月15日在小學館的《CoroCoro漫畫》雜誌上連載。故事圍繞著一位名叫帕斯卡的鼴鼠小學老師展開，他笨到連自己的名字都寫不好。帕斯卡是個異想天開的人，他在教室裡為所欲為。

overview_en: Based on the manga by Nao Maita. It depicts the everyday life of Ayase Hanabi, a 12-year-old in the peak of puberty, and her views on school, friendship and love.
overview_zh: 改編自舞田奈緒的漫畫。講述了正值青春期的12歲女孩綾瀨花火的日常生活，以及她對學校、友誼和愛情的看法。

overview_en: Enjoy 2048, the most addictive number sliding puzzle. Move all tiles in one direction, double up tiles of the same number. Reach the 2048 tile before the board fills up. Try different games modes with 1024, 2048 and 4096 goals for extra challenges. There are 20 achievements to unlock for hours and hours of puzzle fun. Can you reach a new highscore? With intuitive controls you will enjoy 2048 more than ever. Try 2048 today and see why this is one of the greatest puzzle games of all time. The original 2048 was created by by Gabriele Cirulli.
overview_zh: 享受 2048，最令人上癮的數字滑動謎題。朝一個方向移動所有磁磚，將相同數量的磁磚加倍。在棋盤填滿之前到達 2048 塊。嘗試不同的遊戲模式，目標為 1024、2048 和 4096，以獲得額外的挑戰。有 20 項成就可供解鎖，讓您享受數小時的解謎樂趣。你能達到新的高分嗎？透過直覺的控制，您將比以往更加享受 2048。立即嘗試 2048，瞭解為什麼它是有史以來最偉大的益智遊戲之一。原版 2048 由 Gabriele Cirulli 創作。

title_en: 2in1 - Life with Horses 3D + My Baby Pet Hotel 3D

no_intro_name: 2in1 Horses 3D Vol.2 - Rivals in the Saddle and Jumping for the Team 3D (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_en: 2in1 Horses 3D Vol.3 - My Riding Stables 3D - Jumping for the Team and My Western Horse 3D
no_intro_name: 2in1 Horses 3D Vol.3 - My Riding Stables 3D - Jumping for the Team and My Western Horse 3D (Europe) (En,Fr,De,It,Nl)

title_zh: 星之卡比 夢之泉物語
overview_en:
Delve into the land of dreams-turned-nightmares as Kirby™ flies with the stars in 3D.

3D Classics: Kirby's Adventure offers you a chance to explore the world of Dream Land in a whole new way. The landscape comes to life as Kirby™ crosses land, sea, and sky in his quest to restore the Star Rod. After waking from a dreamless sleep, Kirby goes to investigate the Dream Spring only to find that its source of energy has been stolen by King Dedede. Broken and divided across seven worlds, Kirby will need to use his unique ability to steal enemies' powers as he battles and to restore the pieces of the Star Rod. Without it, how can a hero fight another day if he can't get a good night's sleep? Embark on this adventure as the beloved pink character tries to save the citizens of Dream Land from a lifetime of terrible nightmares.
overview_zh:
隨著星之卡比™ 與 3D 星星一起飛行，深入探索夢想變成噩夢的土地。

3D 經典：卡比冒險為您提供了以全新方式探索夢境世界的機會。當星之卡比穿越陸地、海洋和天空尋找恢復星棒時，場景變得栩栩如生。從無夢的睡眠中醒來後，卡比前往調查夢之泉，卻發現其能量之源已被帝帝帝王偷走了。卡比破碎並分裂在七個世界中，他需要利用他獨特的能力在戰鬥中竊取敵人的力量並恢復星棒的碎片。沒有它，英雄連睡不好覺怎麼再戰一天？踏上這場冒險，扮演受人喜愛的粉紅色角色，試圖將夢境之地的居民從一生的可怕噩夢中拯救出來。

overview_en:
After a mysterious storm sweeps your family from the sea, its up to you to find them and uncover the mystery behind the forces that took them.

The search to find them will take you through vast underwater realms of treachery, beauty and adventure. Use your sonar to discover hidden caverns and unlock the secrets of crystal glyphs, but beware of packs of bloodthirsty sharks that search the ocean for unwitting prey!

In your quest, youll discover that more than your familys safety is at stake. The fate of the whole world rests on your wits and fins.

In addition to its all-new 3D presentation, 3D Ecco the Dolphin also features Super Dolphin Mode where your health and breath never deplete!
overview_zh:
一場神秘風暴將你的家人從海上席捲而出後，你需要找到他們並揭開帶走他們的力量背後的秘密。

尋找它們的過程將帶你穿越充滿背叛、美麗和冒險的廣闊水下王國。使用聲納發現隱藏的洞穴並解開水晶符號的秘密，但要小心成群的嗜血鯊魚，它們在海洋中尋找不知情的獵物！

在你的探索中，你會發現受到威脅的不僅僅是家人的安全。整個世界的命運取決於你的智慧和鰭。

除了全新的3D呈現之外，3D Ecco the Dolphin還具有超級海豚模式，讓你的健康和呼吸永不枯竭！

overview_en: The ancient kingdom is in trouble! The magic of the four elements that kept it running for centuries has been corrupted by evil powers and the altars no longer yield the energy of life. It is up to you to unlock the 4 ancient books of magic and collect 16 mysterious cards that will help you restore the kingdom to life. An adorable little fairy will be your aide in this perilous journey as you encounter elementals, dragons, knights, and various magic creatures. Using a mix of classic addictive game play ideas but taking them to a new level with innovative twists, explosive bonuses, spectacular visual effects, and fascinating storyline in amazing animation, this game is a load of fun.
overview_zh: 古老的王國有麻煩了！幾個世紀以來維持其運作的四種元素的魔法已被邪惡力量腐蝕，祭壇不再產生生命能量。你需要解鎖 4 本古老的魔法書並收集 16 張神秘卡牌，幫助你恢復王國的生機。當你遇到元素、龍、騎士和各種魔法生物時，可愛的小仙女將在這段危險的旅程中成為你的助手。遊戲融合了經典的令人上癮的遊戲創意，但透過創新的曲折、爆炸性的獎金、壯觀的視覺效果以及令人驚嘆的動畫中引人入勝的故事情節將它們提升到一個新的水平，這款遊戲充滿樂趣。

overview_en: Whether you want to play a quick, challenging game or a white-knuckle adventure, hours of fun and entertainment await you. There's something for everyone in this collection of classic games including Chess, Mahjongg, Sudoku, Backgammon, Texas Hold Em Poker, Solitaire and more.
overview_zh: 無論您想玩快速、具有挑戰性的遊戲還是緊張刺激的冒險，數小時的樂趣和娛樂都在等著您。這個經典遊戲合輯適合每個人，包括西洋棋、麻將、數獨、雙陸棋、德州撲克、紙牌等等。

overview_en:
In the year 2100, dragons have descended upon earth and humanity is at the mercy of these terrifying beasts. However, not all is lost. As the protagonist, the player will team up with Nodens Enterprises-a video game company dedicated to stopping the dragon menace-to become a dragon hunter and eventual savior of the universe. Although times are bleak, Nodens Enterprises has found a way to tip the scales in favor of mankind: By traveling through time to three different eras, the protagonist can upset the balance of the dragons' power. This will give them the edge to defeat the True Dragons, and stand a chance against the most powerful one of them all... the 7th Dragon: VFD.

Also Available
7th Dragon III Code: VFD Launch Edition
The Launch Edition includes a 28 page art book.
overview_zh:
2100年，龍降臨地球，人類受到這些可怕野獸的擺佈。然而，並非一切都失去了。作為主角，玩家將與 Nodens Enterprises（一家致力於阻止龍威脅的電玩公司）合作，成為龍獵人和宇宙的最終救世主。儘管時局慘淡，諾登斯企業還是找到了一種讓天平向有利於人類的方向傾斜的方法：透過穿越時空到三個不同的時代，主角可以打破龍族力量的平衡。這將使他們有擊敗真龍的優勢，並有機會對抗其中最強大的一條…第七條龍：VFD。

還提供
第七龍III代號：VFD首發版
首發版包括一本 28 頁的藝術書。

title_jp: エースコンバット2#エースコンバット3D クロスランブル
title_zh: 皇牌空戰 突擊地平線 遺產
overview_en:
Control the skies with complete freedom in 3D The critically acclaimed aerial combat series flies onto the Nintendo 3DS! ACE COMBAT Assault Horizon Legacy + delivers supersonic flying, exciting dogfights and high-altitude acrobatics all in enhanced 3D! 

Features: 
- Intense and engaging battles in the sky - The fast-paced action of the ACE COMBAT series is even more immersive with the addition of 3D gameplay.
- Touch screen targeting - Lock-on to enemies and fire at will using the touch screen. 
- Edge-of-your-seat controls - Experience the exhilaration of becoming an ace pilot with added control mechanics that enable split-second counter-maneuvers, dynamic dogfight action and satisfying enemy takedowns. 
- Missions & Aircrafts - Full variety of real-world aircrafts to fly and diverse range of missions to enjoy.
overview_zh:
完全自由地以 3D 方式掌控天空廣受好評的空戰系列現已登陸 Nintendo 3DS！ ACE COMBAT Assault Horizo​​n Legacy + 以增強的 3D 方式呈現超音速飛行、激動人心的纏鬥和高空特技！ 

特點：
- 激烈而引人入勝的空中戰鬥 - ACE COMBAT 系列的快節奏動作在 3D 遊戲玩法的加入下更加身臨其境。
- 觸控螢幕瞄準 - 使用觸控螢幕鎖定敵人並隨意開火。 
- 令人驚嘆的控制 - 體驗成為王牌飛行員的興奮，增加控制機制，實現瞬間反機動、動態纏鬥動作和令人滿意的擊倒敵人。 
- 任務和飛機 - 可以駕駛各種真實世界的飛機，並享受各種各樣的任務。

title_zh: 皇牌空戰 突擊地平線 遺產

overview_en:
Adventure Bar Story is an RPG set in a fantasy world in which you go on adventures with party members and manage a bar.
Your Bar is facing a hostile take over by a rich Restaurant Owner - Gustav. Gustav is a powerful man and he will try to drive you out of business and force you to sell the bar!
Best way to defend the take over? WIN THE CROWD!
Become the most popular bar in town, so even Gustav can't touch you!
Collect mats to make dishes by visiting other towns and dungeons. Levels are gained in this game by eating.
Raise your bar's rank via sales at the bar and by performing well in the cooking contest held at the castle.
Work hard to become the top place to eat in the kingdom!
overview_zh:
《冒險酒吧物語》是一款以奇幻世界為背景的角色扮演遊戲，您將與隊友一起冒險並管理酒吧。
您的酒吧正面臨著富有的餐廳老闆古斯塔夫的敵意接管。古斯塔夫是一個有權有勢的人，他會試圖讓你破產並強迫你賣掉酒吧！
捍衛接管的最佳方式？贏得人群！
成為鎮上最受歡迎的酒吧，所以即使古斯塔夫也無法碰你！
參觀其他城鎮和地牢，收集墊子來製作菜餚。在這個遊戲中，等級是透過吃來獲得的。
透過酒吧的銷售以及在城堡舉辦的烹飪比賽中表現出色來提高酒吧的排名。
努力成為王國頂級的吃貨吧！

overview_en: Adventure Labyrinth Story is a rogue-like RPG that challenges the unknown dungeon. To bring back the legendary treasure, you need to enter the depth of the dungeon, find weapon and shield, use magic rod and potion to fight against monster and raise your level. Every time the dungeon you enter is different in structure. The obtainable items and encounterable monsters also change. You can challenge it again and again even it is cleared. If you are defeated, the obtained items will be all lost. The level will reset to 1. The ingredients you collect from the dungeon can be cooked in the bar to make food, which can grant positive effect and EXP for the next adventure. Fully use the items to deal with the monsters, find rare treasure to reveal the mystery of the labyrinth!
overview_zh: 冒險迷宮物語是一款挑戰未知地牢的rogue-like RPG。為了帶回傳說中的寶藏，你需要進入地牢深處，找到武器和盾牌，並使用魔法棒和藥劑對抗怪物，並提升等級。每次進入的地牢結構都不同。可獲得的物品和遇到的怪物也會改變。即使通關了也可以反覆挑戰。如果失敗，獲得的物品將全部遺失。等級將重設為1級。從地牢中收集的食材可以在酒吧中烹飪來製作食物，這可以為下次冒險提供積極的效果和經驗。充分利用物品對付怪物，尋找稀有寶藏，揭開迷宮之謎！

title_en: Adventure Time - Explore the Dungeon because I DON'T KNOW!
title_jp: アドベンチャー・タイム
overview_en:
Princess Bubblegum summons Finn and Jake to the Candy Kingdom to investigate a rash of thefts and kidnappings that have plagued her kingdom. She thinks the cause lies within her Secret Royal Dungeon, where only the nastiest monsters and criminals are locked up. If they've found a way to escape, the Land of Ooo will be in danger!

Also Available
Adventure Time: Explore the Dungeon Because I Don't Know Collector's Edition
overview_zh:
泡泡糖公主召喚芬恩和傑克前往糖果王國，調查困擾她王國的一系列竊盜和綁架事件。她認為原因在於她的秘密皇家地牢，那裡只關著最邪惡的怪物和罪犯。如果他們找到了逃跑的辦法，噢噢大陸就會陷入危險！

還提供
冒險時光：探索地牢因為我不知道珍藏版
no_intro_name: Adventure Time - Explore the Dungeon because I DON'T KNOW! (USA)

title_jp: アドベンチャー・タイム

title_en: Adventure Time - Hey Ice King! Why'd You Steal Our Garbage!!
title_jp: アドベンチャー・タイム
overview_en:
Adventure Time: Hey Ice King! Why'd you steal our garbage?! is the first video game based on the radical, Emmy nominated Cartoon Network show about two close friends - Jake, a wise old dog with a big kind heart, and Finn, a silly kid who wants more than anything else to become a great hero. Players will explore the Land of Ooo and set out on heroic quests, as their favorite characters Finn and Jake, in a unique action adventure experience. Adventure Time show creator Pendleton Ward is also heavily involved with the game creation, including the design of a brand new storyline, concept, and quests.

Finn and Jake wake up one morning to find their trash stolen by the Ice King! Jake couldn't care less about half-eaten bananas, crumpled up math notes, and old chicken diapers - but when the Ice King uses these stolen goods to construct a Garbage Princess, our heroes embark on a fantastical adventure and teach him a lesson! Journey through the Land of Ooo in an offbeat adventure and discover perilous dungeons, unimaginable treasures, the true meaning of friendship, and never-ending fun!

Also Available
Adventure Time: Hey Ice King! Why'd You Steal Our Garbage?! (Collector's Edition)
Collector's Edition featuring the game in an Enchiridion steelbook case, a stylus shaped like Finn's sword, a book of beasts, and a fold-out map.
overview_zh:
冒險時光：嘿冰王！為什麼偷我們的垃圾？是第一個基於激進的、獲得艾美獎提名的卡通網路節目的影片遊戲，講述了兩個親密的朋友 - 傑克，一隻聰明的老狗，心地善良；芬恩，一個傻孩子，一心想成為一名偉大的英雄。玩家將扮演他們最喜歡的角色芬恩和傑克，在獨特的動作冒險體驗中探索 Ooo 之地並開始英雄任務。 《探險活寶》節目創作者彭德爾頓·沃德也積極參與了遊戲創作，包括設計全新的故事情節、概念和任務。

有一天早上，芬恩和傑克醒來，發現他們的垃圾被冰王偷走了！傑克根本不在乎吃了一半的香蕉、皺巴巴的數學筆記和舊的雞尿布 - 但當冰王用這些偷來的東西建造了一個垃圾公主時，我們的英雄們開始了一場奇幻的冒險並給他一個教訓！在另類冒險中穿越 Ooo 大陸，發現危險的地牢、難以想像的寶藏、友誼的真正意義和永無止境的樂趣！

還提供
冒險時光：嘿冰王！為什麼偷我們的垃圾？ ！ （珍藏版）
珍藏版包含裝在 Enchiridion 鋼盒中的遊戲、芬恩劍形狀的手寫筆、一本野獸之書和一張折疊地圖。
no_intro_name: Adventure Time - Hey Ice King! Why'd You Steal Our Garbage!! (USA)

title_en: Adventure Time - Nameless Oukoku no Sannin no Princess
title_jp: Adventure Time - Nameless Oukoku no Sannin no Princess
no_intro_name: Adventure Time - Nameless Oukoku no Sannin no Princess (Japan)

title_en: Adventure Time - The Secret of the Nameless Kingdom
overview_en: "Oh my glob! All three princesses of the Nameless Kingdom have disappeared! Finn (the human) and his best bro Jake (the shape-shifting dog) embark on an original heroic adventure created exclusively for the video game. Players journey through the Nameless Kingdom, an unexplored realm in the Land of Ooo, to rescue princesses and choose the one princess who commands the Nameless inhabitants. After all, every kingdom needs a princess who rules."
overview_zh: 「哎呀，無名王國的三位公主都消失了！芬恩（人類）和他最好的兄弟傑克（變形狗）開始了專門為電子遊戲創作的原創英雄冒險。玩家穿越無名王國（ Ooo之地未被探索的領域）來拯救公主，並選擇唯一指揮無名居民的公主。畢竟，每個王國都需要一位掌權的公主。」
no_intro_name: Adventure Time - The Secret of the Nameless Kingdom (USA)

title_en: Adventures of Tintin, The - The Game
no_intro_name: Adventures of Tintin, The - The Game (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt)

title_en: Adventures of Tintin, The - The Secret of the Unicorn
no_intro_name: Adventures of Tintin, The - The Secret of the Unicorn (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Sv,No,Da,Fi,Ca)

overview_en: LEVEL-5 and Yoot Saito, from VIVARIUM Inc., team up to bring you AERO PORTER, an airport simulation and puzzle game that will have you sorting luggage, expanding your airport's operations, and avoiding security mishaps!
overview_zh: LEVEL-5 和 VIVARIUM Inc. 的 Yoot Saito 聯手為您帶來 AERO PORTER，這是一款機場模擬和益智遊戲，可讓您分類行李、擴大機場運營並避免安全事故！

overview_en:
In the region of Awelsia, vengeful Freya travels with an unknown weapon called "AeternoBlade" to take revenge from Beladim, the Lord of the Mist who destroyed her village, Ridgerode, and killed her tribe. Her vengence is helped by Vernia , who has as much merit as Beladim. Vernia taught Freya about the ablility of AeternoBlade.

Freya has to venture in many world dimensions to find how to annihilate Beladim.

What is AeternoBlade? and How can Freya take revenge from Beladim ? Solve tons ton of mysteries in her adventure!
overview_zh:
在阿維爾西亞地區，復仇心切的芙蕾雅帶著一把名為「永恆之刃」的未知武器前往向霧之王貝拉迪姆報仇，貝拉迪姆摧毀了她的村莊裡奇羅德並殺死了她的部落。她的復仇得到了維爾尼亞的幫助，維爾尼亞與貝拉迪姆有著同樣多的成就。維爾尼亞向芙蕾雅傳授了永恆之刃的能力。

芙蕾雅必須在多個世界維度中冒險，尋找消滅貝拉迪姆的方法。

什麼是永恆之刃？芙蕾雅如何向貝拉迪姆復仇？在她的冒險中解開無數的謎團！

overview_en: A lowly janitor must defend the planet from evil animal robots in this side-scrolling shooter from Swedish developer Ludosity Interactive. An enhanced follow-up to the developer's indie game for Xbox Live Arcade, Mama & Son: Clean House, the game has you guiding a bandana-clad hero while using his machine gun to blast an assortment of comical enemies, ranging from mechanical birds to armadillos. Your objective is to rescue your beloved mama, but you'll also have to clean up the mess you make while saving the world. Use the game's StreetPass feature to challenge friends.
overview_zh: 在瑞典開發商 Ludosity Interactive 推出的這款橫向捲軸射擊遊戲中，卑微的看門人必須保衛地球免受邪惡動物機器人的侵害。作為 Xbox Live Arcade 開發者獨立遊戲《媽媽與兒子：清潔屋》的增強版，這款遊戲讓你引導一位頭戴頭巾的英雄，同時使用他的機槍射擊各種滑稽的敵人，從機械鳥到犰狳。你的目標是拯救你心愛的媽媽，但你也必須清理你在拯救世界的同時造成的混亂。使用遊戲的 StreetPass 功能來挑戰朋友。

overview_en: American Mensa Academy is a brain training game that will give player's minds the ultimate cerebral workout. Created in direct collaboration with Mensa, American Mensa Academy is packed with 100+ replayable levels of fun and stimulating mini-games and challenges for everyone, plus for those really looking to test their grey matter, there is a rigorous test designed to calculate your Mensa score, directly inspired by questions faced by those attempting to join the renowned global high IQ society.
overview_zh: 美國門薩學院是一款大腦訓練遊戲，將為玩家的大腦提供終極的大腦鍛鍊。美國門薩學院是與門薩直接合作建立的，為每個人提供了 100 多個可重玩的有趣且刺激的迷你遊戲和挑戰，此外，對於那些真正想要測試自己腦灰質的人來說，還有一項嚴格的測試旨在計算您的門薩分數，該測試的靈感直接來自那些試圖加入全球著名高智商協會的人所面臨的問題。

title_zh: 憤怒的小鳥星球大戰版
overview_en: Join an epic adventure with the Angry Birds in the legendary Star Wars universe, re-mastered for gaming systems! Use the Force, wield your Lightsaber, and blast away Pigtroopers on an intergalactic journey from the deserts of Tatooine to the depths of the Pig Star! Can you become a Jedi Master and restore freedom to the galaxy?
overview_zh: 與憤怒的小鳥一起在傳奇的星球大戰宇宙中加入史詩般的冒險，並為遊戲系統重新製作！運用原力，揮舞你的光劍，在從塔圖因沙漠到豬星深處的星際之旅中炸掉豬兵！你能成為絕地大師並恢復銀河系的自由嗎？

overview_en: Rovio's monstrously popular game about foul-tempered fowl migrates from the mobile platform to consoles for the first time with Angry Birds Trilogy. As always, players load a variety of uniquely skilled birds into a slingshot and fire them at green, egg-stealing pigs in an attempt to knock the thieving swine off their pedestals, or crush them beneath falling debris.
overview_zh: Rovio 廣受歡迎的脾氣暴躁小鳥遊戲憑藉《憤怒的小鳥三部曲》首次從行動平臺遷移至遊戲機。像往常一樣，玩家將各種技能獨特的小鳥裝進彈弓，然後向偷蛋的綠色豬射擊，試圖將偷竊的豬從基座上撞下來，或將它們壓在掉落的碎片下。

title_jp: どうぶつの森 ハッピーホームデザイナー
title_zh: 動物森友會 快樂之家設計師
overview_en:
Show off your style by designing homes for all of your favorite Animal Crossing villagers! Use your creativity to design the perfect houses - inside and out - for both old and new friends. With the new amiibo cards, you can call your favorite villagers into the game.

Features:

Design the interior and exterior of hundreds of homes for animal villagers
Leave your decorative touch on the school, hospital and other public facilities
Collect and Connect - Collect and share amiibo cards of your favorite villagers, and invite them into your game,

Tap amiibo cards to invite up to four characters into a room to hang out
Tap the amiibo cards of special characters to call in animals that would otherwise not appear in your game with requests

Also Available
Animal Crossing: Happy Home Designer Bundle
overview_zh:
為所有你最喜歡的《動物之森》村民設計家園，展現你的風格！發揮您的創造力，為新老朋友設計從內到外的完美房屋。使用新的 amiibo 卡，您可以召喚您最喜歡的村民進入遊戲。

特點：

為動物村民設計數百棟房屋的內部和外部
為學校、醫院和其他公共設施留下您的裝飾風格
收集並連結 - 收集並分享您最喜歡的村民的 amiibo 卡，並邀請他們加入您的遊戲，

點選 amiibo 卡可邀請最多四個角色進入房間閒逛
點選特殊角色的 amiibo 卡來召喚那些不會出現在遊戲中的動物

還提供
動物森友會：快樂家居設計師組合包

title_jp: とびだせ どうぶつの森
overview_en: Animal Crossing: New Leaf is a social simulation game. You take on the role as the new mayor in a small village populated by animals. Game play consists of improving the village with new buildings and decorations, collecting furniture and items for your own house as well as donating fossils, fish, insects and art to the local museum.
overview_zh: 《動物之森：新葉》是一款社交模擬遊戲。你在一個充滿動物的小村莊裡擔任新村長。遊戲包括用新的建築和裝飾來改善村莊，為自己的房子收集傢俱和物品，以及向當地博物館捐贈化石、魚類、昆蟲和藝術品。

title_en: Animal Crossing - New Leaf - Welcome Amiibo
title_jp: どうぶつの森シリーズ
overview_en:
Expand your virtual world with Animal Crossing: New Leaf - Welcome amiibo for the Nintendo 3DS. This updated version of New Leaf works with all Animal Crossing amiibo figures and cards for a new in-game experience. A new card included with the game makes Animal Crossing: New Leaf - Welcome amiibo a must for any fan of the series.

This updated version of Animal Crossing: New Leaf adds in support for all Animal Crossing series amiibo figures and cards.
It's not just a game...it's a way of life - there are no points or levels, just an amazing array of sights and sounds, places and activities...all yours to explore
Totally unique...just like you - your game is what you make it - and personalizing your world is part of the fun
Customize your character, your house, and your town as you create your ideal world
New day, new discoveries - time passes in the world of Animal Crossing just as it does in real life
Contains a brand-new RV campsite where you can interact with villagers
For 1 to 4 players
overview_zh:
透過任天堂 3DS 版《動物森友會：新葉 - 歡迎 amiibo》擴充套件您的虛擬世界。 New Leaf 的更新版本可與所有《動物之森》amiibo 人物和卡片搭配使用，帶來全新的遊戲體驗。遊戲中包含的一張新卡使《動物之森：新葉 - 歡迎 amiibo》成為該系列粉絲的必備品。

《動物之森：新葉》的更新版本增加了對所有《動物之森》系列 amiibo 人物和卡片的支援。
這不僅僅是一款遊戲……它是一種生活方式 - 沒有分數或關卡，只有一系列令人驚嘆的景象和聲音、地點和活動……一切都由您來探索
完全獨特...就像您一樣 - 您的遊戲就是您製作的 - 個性化您的世界是樂趣的一部分
自訂你的角色、你的房子和你的城鎮，創造你的理想世界
新的一天，新的發現——時間在《動物森友會》的世界裡流逝，就像在現實生活中一樣
包含一個全新的房車露營地，您可以在那裡與村民互動
適合 1 至 4 名玩家
no_intro_name: Animal Crossing - New Leaf - Welcome Amiibo (USA)

overview_en: The best veterinary clinic game on the 3DS™ The best veterinary clinic game on the 3DS™! Hamsters, birds, cats, dogs, horses… become a real veterinarian and take care of your favourite animals! Dr Robert’s clinic is going through difficult times and needs your skills to develop and expand. Examinations, diagnostics and treatments: heal your patients and unlock new veterinary health centres so you can receive all patients furred and feathered. Features : Dwarf Rabbit, Holland Lop, Parakeet, Cockatoo, Cat, Labrador, Terrier, Guinea Pig, Hamster, Horse 23 treatments and operations!
overview_zh: 3DS™ 上最好的獸醫診所遊戲 3DS™ 上最好的獸醫診所遊戲！倉鼠、鳥、貓、狗、馬…成為真正的獸醫，照顧你最喜歡的動物！羅伯特醫生的診所正在經歷困難時期，需要您的技能來發展和擴大。檢查、診斷和治療：治癒你的病人並解鎖新的獸醫保健中心，這樣你就可以接收所有有毛和羽毛的病人。特色：侏儒兔、荷蘭垂耳兔、長尾小鸚鵡、鳳頭鸚鵡、貓、拉布拉多犬、梗犬、豚鼠、倉鼠、馬 23 種治療和手術！

title_en: Anpanman to Asobo - New Aiueo Kyoushitsu
title_jp: Anpanman to Asobo - New Aiueo Kyoushitsu
no_intro_name: Anpanman to Asobo - New Aiueo Kyoushitsu (Japan)

title_en: Anpanman to Touch de Waku Waku Training
title_jp: Anpanman to Touch de Waku Waku Training
no_intro_name: Anpanman to Touch de Waku Waku Training (Japan)

overview_en: Six all time classic games
overview_zh: 六大經典遊戲

title_en: Are You Smarter than a 5th Grader
overview_en: "Join Jeff Foxworthy and the 5th grade students for an ALL NEW version of “Are You Smarter Than A 5th Grader?” as you compete for a private elementary school on stage and answer an all new set of over 3,000 questions to raise money for renovations and upgrades! The game's core gameplay is complimented with a compelling meta-game that involves upgrading the 5th graders' school and unlocking over 30 new Classmates!"
overview_zh: 「與 Jeff Foxworthy 和五年級學生一起觀看全新版本的『你比五年級學生聰明嗎？ 「當您在舞臺上競爭一所私立小學並回答 3,000 多個全新問題時，即可籌集翻修和升級的資金！該遊戲的核心遊戲玩法與引人入勝的元遊戲相得益彰，其中包括升級五年級學生的學校並解鎖超過 30 名新同學！”
no_intro_name: Are You Smarter than a 5th Grader (USA)

title_en: Around the World with Hello Kitty _ Friends
no_intro_name: Around the World with Hello Kitty _ Friends (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_en: Asonde Shogi ga Tsuyokunaru! Ginsei Shogi DX
title_jp: Asonde Shogi ga Tsuyokunaru! Ginsei Shogi DX
no_intro_name: Asonde Shogi ga Tsuyokunaru! Ginsei Shogi DX (Japan)

overview_en:
Asphalt 3D is a racing game, in which the player must maneuver an automobile to compete against computer-controlled drivers on various race tracks. Players earn rewards such as car upgrades and XP points for winning races throughout the game, and reaching higher levels allows them to use better sports cars to unlock. The game features 17 tracks based on real-life locations including San Francisco and Paris. The games also features over 40 licensed sports cars and motorcycles, from companies like Ferrari, Lamborghini, Aston Martin, Bentley, Maserati, BMW, Nissan, Audi and Ducati.

The game features eight game modes, including "Career Mode"; "Vigilante", an elimination mode; a Need for Speed-inspired "High Speed Chase" mode, in which the player must outrun police cars; and a multiplayer option for up to six players using local wireless play. The game makes use of the 3DS system's accelerometer, which is similar to the Asphalt titles on Apple iOS platforms, and allows the player to control the vehicle by moving the game console like a steering wheel.
overview_zh:
Asphalt 3D 是一款賽車遊戲，玩家必須操縱汽車在不同的賽道上與電腦控制的車手競爭。玩家在整個遊戲中贏得比賽即可獲得汽車升級和 XP 積分等獎勵，達到更高的等級可以讓他們使用更好的跑車來解鎖。遊戲有 17 條基於現實生活地點的賽道，包括舊金山和巴黎。比賽還有 40 多輛獲得許可的跑車和摩托車，來自法拉利、蘭博基尼、阿斯頓馬丁、賓利、瑪莎拉蒂、寶馬、日產、奧迪和杜卡迪等公司。

遊戲具有八種遊戲模式，包括“職業模式”； “Vigilante”，消除模式；受《極品飛車》啟發的“高速追逐”模式，玩家必須跑贏警車；以及最多可容納六名玩家的多人遊戲選項，使用本地無線遊戲。遊戲利用了3DS系統的加速計，類似蘋果iOS平臺上的《狂野飆車》遊戲，玩家可以像移動方向盤一樣透過移動遊戲機來控制車輛。

title_en: Asterix - The Mansions of the Gods
title_jp: アステリックス 神々の邸宅
overview_en:
Play as Asterix, Obelix and Dogmatix in their quest to save the forest.

Prepare the magic potion so you can give the crazy Romans lots of smacks!

Walk through the village, hunt wild boar, make the bard stop singing and prepare the final victory banquet!
overview_zh:
扮演 Asterix、Obelix 和 Dogmatix 踏上拯救森林的旅程。

準備好魔法藥水，這樣你就可以狠狠地打瘋狂的羅馬人了！

穿過村莊，獵殺野豬，讓吟遊詩人停止歌唱，準備最後的勝利盛宴！
no_intro_name: Asterix - The Mansions of the Gods (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)

title_en: Atelier Rorona no Atelier Hajimari no Monogatari - Arland no Renkinjutsushi
title_jp: Atelier Rorona no Atelier Hajimari no Monogatari - Arland no Renkinjutsushi
no_intro_name: Atelier Rorona no Atelier Hajimari no Monogatari - Arland no Renkinjutsushi (Japan)

overview_en: Includes the following titles: Mutant Mudds, Bomb Monkey, Xeodrifter, Mutant Mudds Super Challenge, and Chicken Wiggle.
overview_zh: 包括以下遊戲：Mutant Mudds、Bomb Monkey、Xeodrifter、Mutant Mudds Super Challenge 和 Chicken Wiggle。

title_en: Attack of the Friday Monsters! A Tokyo Tale
overview_en:
Step into the life of Sohta, the young son of a family that has just set up a dry cleaners shop in the idyllic town of Fuji no Hana. In his interactions with the town's unique residents, episodic mysteries are revealed that portend to the strange events surrounding the appearance of a giant monster every Friday. And finally, when Friday evening falls, the giant monster will appear right before your eyes!

Collect the "Monster Glims" scattered around town to form Monster Cards, and once you've collected five cards, Sohta can battle his friends for dominance. Winning at Monster Cards gives you the chance to collect useful information, more Monster Glims, and even to cast a secret spell on your friends that will make them fall down at your whim. Why? Because that's the rules!

A touching drama about family, friendship, and the innocence of being a child unfolds against hand-drawn backgrounds, charming music, and memorable characters.
overview_zh:
走進 Sohta 的生活，他是一個家庭的小兒子，剛剛在田園詩般的富士之花小鎮開設了一家乾洗店。在他與小鎮獨特居民的互動中，一系列神秘事件被揭開，這些謎團預示著每週五都會出現一個巨型怪物，周圍會發生奇怪的事件。最後，當週五晚上來臨的時候，巨大的怪物就會出現在你的眼前！

收集散落在城鎮各處的“怪物光芒”，形成怪物卡牌，一旦收集到五張卡牌，索塔就可以與他的朋友們爭奪統治地位。贏得怪物卡讓你有機會收集有用的資訊、更多的怪物光芒，甚至對你的朋友施展秘密咒語，讓他們在你的心血來潮中倒下。為什麼？因為這就是規則！

一部關於家庭、友誼和童年純真的感人戲劇在手繪背景、迷人的音樂和令人難忘的角色中展開。
no_intro_name: Attack of the Friday Monsters! A Tokyo Tale (USA)

title_en: Attack on Titan - Humanity in Chains
title_zh: 進擊的巨人 人類最後之翼
overview_en: The game casts players in role of characters from the Attack on Titan series, or a character they created, as they take hold of three-dimensional maneuver gear to attack Titans, giants that hunt and devour humans. The game's most recent iteration features a single player story mode, local and online multiplayer, and Circle Pad Pro support
overview_zh: 該遊戲讓玩家扮演《進擊的巨人》系列中的角色，或者他們創造的角色，他們手持三維機動裝備來攻擊泰坦，這是一種狩獵和吞噬人類的巨人。遊戲的最新版本具有單人故事模式、本地和線上多人遊戲以及 Circle Pad Pro 支援
no_intro_name: Attack on Titan - Humanity in Chains (USA)

overview_en: Azada is an adventure-puzzle casual game developed by Big Fish Studios Europe, and distributed by Big Fish Games
overview_zh: Azada是一款由Big Fish Studios Europe開發、Big Fish Games發行的冒險解謎休閒遊戲

title_jp: 蒼き雷霆 ガンヴォルト 爪
overview_en:
Get ready for high-speed 2D side-scrolling action combined with deep storytelling!

Gunvolt's supercharged saga strikes onto the Nintendo Switch!

Azure Striker Gunvolt Striker Pack brings the electrifying 2D side-scrolling action games "Azure Striker Gunvolt" and "Azure Striker Gunvolt 2", which previously made their home on the Nintendo 3DS, onto the Nintendo Switch in one single package.

In "Azure Striker Gunvolt", you take control of Gunvolt's high-speed mobility and repertoire of electrical attacks to make short work of your enemies. As an "adept" who possesses supernatural "septimal powers," Gunvolt fights for the freedom of the nation from the tyrannical rule of the massive conglomerate known as the Sumeragi Group and the invasion of a super-powerful group of adepts known as Eden.

Azure Striker Gunvolt's deep storyline plays out both during breaks in the action and in the thick of battle too! Featuring a robust cast of characters that are fully voiced (in Japanese) and over 25 vocal tracks performed by characters in the game, the world of Gunvolt provides excitement at every turn.

The Nintendo Switch version also features a slew of upgrades from the 3DS version, including a 60 FPS upgrade, upgraded UI, high-resolution event graphics, the entire DLC catalog from the 3DS version pre-loaded into the game, a brand new vocal track from the character Lumen, AKA "The Muse," HD Rumble compatibility, and more!
overview_zh:
準備好迎接高速 2D 橫向捲軸動作與深度故事敘述的結合吧！

Gunvolt 的超強傳奇登陸 Nintendo Switch！

Azure Striker Gunvolt Striker Pack 將之前在 Nintendo 3DS 上亮相的激動人心的 2D 橫向捲軸動作遊戲“Azure Striker Gunvolt”和“Azure Striker Gunvolt 2”以一個包的形式帶到了 Nintendo Switch 上。

在「Azure Striker Gunvolt」中，您可以控制 Gunvolt 的高速機動性和電攻擊的全部技能，從而在短時間內消滅敵人。作為一名擁有超自然“七神力量”的“巫師”，岡伏特為國家的自由而戰，免受皇集團這個龐大集團的殘暴統治和伊甸園超強巫師團體的入侵。

《Azure Striker Gunvolt》的深刻故事情節在行動間隙和激烈戰鬥中都會上演！ Gunvolt 的世界擁有強大的全配音角色陣容（日語）以及遊戲中角色演奏的超過 25 首聲樂曲目，每個轉折點都令人興奮不已。

Nintendo Switch 版本也對 3DS 版本進行了一系列升級，包括 60 FPS 升級、升級的 UI、高解析度事件圖形、預先載入到遊戲中的 3DS 版本的整個 DLC 目錄、角色 Lumen 的全新聲樂、又名「繆斯」、HD Rumble 相容性等等！

overview_en: Think outside the box to save a world in peril! Traverse tricky landscapes by creating boxes to help Qbby navigate more than 20 puzzling worlds. Just watch outtons of obstacles stand in your way, so fortify yourself with a Shielding Afro or other boxy defenses. Then beat some more stages to earn sweet square costumes, like a superhero outfit! After snaking your way through a plethora of levels, try taking on some challenges. Time attack will have you puzzle-solving your way through an assortment of levels as quickly as possible, giving you the chance to test your skills at creating box-shaped defenses. If thats not enough, Score Attack has you collecting as many tokens as possible within the time limit while using boxes to lift yourself up and maneuver around a huge stage. All the worlds a puzzle and youre the only box boy boxy enough to save it!
overview_zh: 跳出框框思考，拯救陷入危險的世界！透過建立盒子來穿越棘手的風景，幫助 Qbby 探索 20 多個令人費解的世界。只是要注意大量的障礙擋在你的路上，所以用盾牌爆炸頭或其他四方形的防禦來加強自己。然後透過更多關卡即可獲得甜美的方形服裝，例如超級英雄服​​裝！蜿蜒透過眾多關卡後，試著接受一些挑戰。時間攻擊將讓你盡快解決各種關卡中的謎題，讓你有機會測試你創造盒子狀防禦的技能。如果這還不夠，得分攻擊會讓你在限定時間內收集盡可能多的代幣，同時使用盒子來提升自己並在巨大的舞臺上移動。所有的世界都是一個謎題，而你是唯一一個四四方方足以拯救它的盒子男孩！

title_en: Bandai Namco Games Presents J Legend Retsuden
title_jp: Bandai Namco Games Presents J Legend Retsuden
overview_en: J Legend Retsuden is a Miscellaneous game, developed and published by Bandai Namco Games, which was released in Japan in 2013.
overview_zh: J Legend Retsuden是一款雜項遊戲，由Bandai Namco Games開發並發行，於2013年在日本發行。
no_intro_name: Bandai Namco Games Presents J Legend Retsuden (Japan)

overview_en: "Barbie Groom and Glam Pups is an all-new Barbie video game, set in a fashion-oriented environment, that lets players choose a pup from one of six adorable breeds, then groom it, train it, dress it up and show it using the game's built-in economy. Throughout the game, Barbie herself serves as a mentor for players, providing instruction and tips. Players will groom their pet with realistic techniques including bathing and brushing before teaching the pup fun tricks like jump, kiss and spin. Players can also customize the look of their dog with fabulous clothing, collars and costumes."
overview_zh: 「《Barbie Groom and Glam Pups》是一款全新的芭比影片遊戲，以時尚為導向的環境中，玩家可以從六個可愛品種中選擇一隻小狗，然後使用遊戲的內建經濟來梳理、訓練、裝扮並展示它。

overview_en: "Join Barbie and her friends for an adventure that will take fans behind pink doors into the fantastic world of the Dreamhouse. Based on the popular Barbie Life in the Dreamhouse web series, dolls everywhere will get a chance to explore the Dreamhouse and play fabulous mini games."
overview_zh: “與芭比和她的朋友們一起踏上冒險之旅，將粉紅色的門後的粉絲帶入夢想屋的奇幻世界。根據流行的芭比夢想屋生活網路系列，世界各地的娃娃將有機會探索夢想屋並玩精彩的迷你遊戲。”

overview_en:
Taking place before the rise of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals, villains and assassins, players will meet many important characters for the first time. The game showcases a young, raw, unrefined Batman as he faces a defining moment in his early career as a crime fighter that sets his path to becoming the Dark Knight. As the story unfolds, witness identities being formed and key relationships being forged.
Features:

    Become the Batman - Uncover the sinister plots inside Blackgate Prison. Use stealth, Bat gadgets or brute force to take down your rivals.
    Investigate the Scene - Employ Batman's unprecedented detective skills to scrub a crime scene clean with an all-new environment analysis system.
    Continue the Story - See what happens after the events of the Arkham Origins console game, told in an innovative 2D presentation and comic-style cut scenes.
overview_zh:
故事發生在哥譚市最危險的罪犯、惡棍和刺客崛起之前，玩家將第一次遇到許多重要角色。遊戲展現了一個年輕、原始、未經雕琢的蝙蝠俠，他作為一名犯罪鬥士，面臨著他早期職業生涯的決定性時刻，這也為他成為黑闇騎士鋪平了道路。隨著故事的展開，目擊者身分逐漸形成，關鍵關係也逐漸建立。
特點：

    成為蝙蝠俠 - 揭開布萊克蓋特監獄內的險惡陰謀。使用潛行、蝙蝠裝置或蠻力來打倒你的對手。
    調查現場 - 利用蝙蝠俠前所未有的偵探技能，透過全新的環境分析系統將犯罪現場清理乾淨。
    繼續故事 - 看看《阿卡漢起源》主機遊戲的事件發生後會發生什麼，以創新的 2D 演示和漫畫風格的過場動畫講述。

overview_en: Combining naval strategy simulation with first-person shooter gameplay, players fend off the enemy beachside while ordering attacks against their marine counterparts. Seamlessly switching between battlefield and overview "Battle Command" map, the Hasbro game is brought to life as carriers, frigates, cruisers, destroyers, submarines and the legendary USS Missouri Battleship pummel the enemy in a race to strategic points that turn the tide of battle. The Battleship videogame is a next-gen marvel perfectly suited to turn nostalgic game junkies into battle-hardened admirals.
overview_zh: 將海軍策略模擬與第一人稱射擊遊戲結合，玩家在海邊擊退敵人，同時下令攻擊他們的海軍對手。孩之寶遊戲可在戰場和概覽“戰鬥指揮”地圖之間無縫切換，航母、護衛艦、巡洋艦、驅逐艦、潛艇和傳奇的密蘇里號戰列艦在爭奪戰略要點的過程中猛擊敵人，扭轉戰局。 《戰艦》電玩遊戲是一款下一代奇蹟遊戲，非常適合將懷舊遊戲迷變成身經百戰的海軍上將。

title_en: Bella Sara - The Magical Horse Adventures
no_intro_name: Bella Sara - The Magical Horse Adventures (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Pt,Sv,No,Da,Fi)

overview_en: BEN 10 Galactic Racing presents the ultimate racing experience! While Ben makes use of his Ultimatrix to transform into his alien forms mid-race, every other character utilizes their unique special abilities, based on powers straight out of the television series, to affect the outcome of each race. All characters can pick up special Omni-Node Power-Ups with varying alien-based abilities, including an Ultimate move that unleashes a super-charged, race-changing boost of speed and power that is themed to that character's abilities. Players will race with or against friends in any of the various game modes. They can also win trophies in each of the Galactic Grand Prix circuits, or they can race their favorite tracks in an attempt to set record-breaking times in Time Trials mode.
overview_zh: BEN 10銀河賽車呈現終極賽車體驗！當本在比賽中利用他的終極矩陣變身為外星形態時，其他每個角色都利用他們獨特的特殊能力（基於電視劇中的力量）來影響每場比賽的結果。所有角色都可以拾取具有各種基於外星人的能力的特殊全節點加電，包括以該角色的能力為主題的終極移動，該終極移動可以釋放超強的、改變種族的速度和力量。玩家可以在各種遊戲模式中與朋友一起比賽或與朋友競爭。他們還可以在每個銀河大獎賽賽道上贏得獎杯，或者他們可以在自己最喜歡的賽道上比賽，試圖在計時賽模式中創造破紀錄的時間。

title_jp: ベン10 オムニバース
overview_en:
Ben 10: Omniverse is the only video game based on the highly-anticipated, Cartoon Network TV series, Ben 10: Omniverse. The brand-new show spans two time periods between Young and Teen Ben Tennyson, and introduces a hero sidekick, Rook.

 In the new action game, players can play as both Young and Teen Ben, switch forms between 13 playable alien heroes, including new aliens like Bloxx and Gravattack, and fight in an assortment of action-packed levels throughout the subterranean alien city of Undertown and other show-inspired locales. In Ben: 10 Omniverse, Rook will also star in the game come equipped with a Proto-Tool, a swiss army knife of the future, that can transform into a variety of weapons that will bring a whole new dimension to combat
overview_zh:
Ben 10: Omniverse 是唯一一款基於備受期待的卡通網路電視劇 Ben 10: Omniverse 改編的電玩遊戲。這部全新的劇集跨越了年輕和青少年本·丁尼生之間的兩個時期，並介紹了一位英雄夥伴魯克。

 在這款新動作遊戲中，玩家可以扮演 Young 和 Teen Ben，在 13 名可玩的外星英雄之間切換形態，包括 Bloxx 和 Gravattack 等新外星人，並在地下外星城市 Undertown 和其他受劇集啟發的地點中，在各種充滿動作的關卡中進行戰鬥。在《Ben: 10 Omniverse》中，Rook 還將在遊戲中扮演主角，他配備了 Proto-Tool，這是一把未來的瑞士軍刀，可以轉變為各種武器，為戰鬥帶來全新的維度

overview_en: "Ben 10 Omniverse 2 has everything fans love about the hit series: Aliens, Action, and an all-new Adventure! The fastest Ben 10 game ever puts Ben in a race against the clock to make every alien transformation count in his battle against the all-new Incursean invaders. Set off on an all-new adventure with Ben as he infiltrates Incursean battleships to save the resistance fighters. Face off against new enemies featuring authentic voices in an all-new story written by the writers of the actual Ben 10 Omniverse TV series. All-new free-running chase and brawl sequences and fast paced alien switching action make this the most intense Ben 10 game yet!"
overview_zh: 「Ben 10 Omniverse 2 擁有粉絲喜愛熱門系列的一切：外星人、動作和全新的冒險！有史以來最快的 Ben 10 遊戲讓 Ben 與時間賽跑，讓每一次外星人轉變都在他與全新 Incursean 戰士的戰鬥中發揮作用。與 Ben 一起開始全新的冒險，滲透 Incursean 戰列艦拯救入侵者。電視劇的編劇全新的自由奔跑追逐和打鬥序列以及快節奏的外星人切換動作使這款遊戲成為迄今為止最激烈的 Ben 10 遊戲！

overview_en:
Developed to take advantage of the unique capabilities of the Nintendo 3DS, BEYBLADE: Evolution lets players launch their in-game BEYBLADE, using the gyro and motion sensors and manipulating the viewing angle with the Augmented Reality camera for precise control and adjustment. 

Players engage in real-time multiplayer battles or follow the Story Mode campaign unlocking new parts and information to fine-tune their tops in the Bey Factory. Expected to spin into retail this fall, the game will be available in two versions: a standalone Nintendo 3DS edition, and in collaboration with Hasbro, a collector's edition, which includes an exclusive, six-piece BEYBLADE Wing Pegasus 90WF toy previously unavailable outside of Japan.
overview_zh:
《BEYBLADE: Evolution》的開發是為了利用 Nintendo 3DS 的獨特功能，玩家可以使用陀螺儀和運動感應器啟動遊戲中的 BEYBLADE，並使用擴增實境攝影機操縱視角以進行精確控制和調整。 

玩家參與即時多人戰鬥或按照故事模式活動解鎖新零件和訊息，以微調他們在 Bey Factory 中的上衣。該遊戲預計將於今年秋天進入零售市場，將有兩個版本：獨立的 Nintendo 3DS 版本，以及與 Hasbro 合作的收藏版，其中包括一款獨家的六件套 BEYBLADE Wing Pegasus 90WF 玩具，此前在日本以外地區無法購買。

no_intro_name: Bibi _ Tina - Das Spiel zum Kinofilm (Germany)

no_intro_name: Big Hero 6 - Battle in the Bay (USA)

title_en: Bikkuriman Kanjuku Haou - Sanmi Douran Sensouki
title_jp: Bikkuriman Kanjuku Haou - Sanmi Douran Sensouki
no_intro_name: Bikkuriman Kanjuku Haou - Sanmi Douran Sensouki (Japan)

overview_en:
Revealing a brand new storyline for the Resident Evil series, Resident Evil®: Revelations sees the return to survival horror, offering a tense and intriguing gameplay experience. Built from the ground up to take advantage of the Nintendo 3DS features, Resident Evil®: Revelations delivers outstanding visuals that bring the fear to life.The story is set principally on board a supposedly abandoned cruise ship in the Mediterranean. Far from being empty, the ship hides danger around every corner as Jill Valentine explores the confined space of the ship, facing menacing horrors that emerge from the darkness. 

UID: CTR-P-ABRJ (JPN)
        TSA-CTR-ABRJ (JPN)

Japanese edition. Pre-ordered copies came with the Revelations Report DVD. Also included with the e-Capcom limited edition bundle which came with the game and a BSAA bag. It came in a jewelcase with a front insert, inside a cardboard slipcase.

It contains Jessica's Report, Official Trailers, Creators Interview, and Special Movie (Edge Artists Meet Biohazard Revelations). The trailers are E3 2010, E3 2011, Gamescon 2011, TGS 2011, and Gamers Day 2011. The first is only available in English, while the rest are also available in Japanese.
Matrix

    CAP-120111BH  IFPI LB75 11120128N
    IFPI 2N91 (bottom)
    IFPI 2N92 (top)
overview_zh:
《生化危機®：啟示錄》揭示了生化危機系列的全新故事情節，回歸了生存恐怖，提供緊張而有趣的遊戲體驗。 《生化危機®：啟示錄》充分利用了 Nintendo 3DS 的功能，從頭開始打造，提供了出色的視覺效果，將恐懼帶入生活。故事主要發生在地中海一艘據稱廢棄的遊輪上。吉爾·瓦倫丁探索船上的密閉空間，面對從黑暗中出現的威脅，這艘船遠非空無一人，而是在每個角落都隱藏著危險。 

UID：CTR-P-ABRJ（日本）
        TSA-CTR-ABRJ (日本)

日文版。預購版附有《啟示錄報告》DVD。還包含遊戲附帶的 e-Capcom 限量版套裝和 BSAA 包。它裝在一個帶有正面插入物的珠寶盒中，放在一個紙板書套內。

它包含傑西卡的報告、官方預告片、創作者訪談和特別電影（邊緣藝術家遇見生化危機啟示錄）。預告片分別為 E3 2010、E3 2011、Gamescon 2011、TGS 2011 和 Gamers Day 2011。第一個預告片僅提供英文版，其餘預告片也提供日文版。
矩陣

    CAP-120111BH IFPI LB75 11120128N
    IFPI 2N91（下）
    IFPI 2N92（上）

overview_en:
Resident Evil The Mercenaries 3D delivers the intense Mercenaries gameplay experience on a handheld console. Featuring re-mastered stages from Resident Evil 4 and Resident Evil 5, it’s a race against time as players try to defeat as many enemies as possible before the countdown reaches zero. The fast-paced, combat intensive action of Resident Evil The Mercenaries 3D is available both as a solo experience or gamers across the world can team up and enjoy two-player co-op via network play.Gamers will have the opportunity to tackle the game’s missions with legendary Resident Evil characters from past and present. These include Chris Redfield, Krauser, Hunk and, making her debut in a Mercenaries game, Claire Redfield.While the gameplay will be familiar to those who have previously played Mercenaries, changes have been implemented to the stages and characters have been transformed to full 3D, the addition of the ability to move and shoot adds new gameplay tactics, and the addition of touch screen functionality improves access to the inventory and game map.

UID: CTR-P-ABMJ (JPN)
        TSA-CTR-ABMJ (JPN)
overview_zh:
Resident Evil The Mercenaries 3D 在手持遊戲機上提供了激烈的傭兵遊戲體驗。重製了《生化危機 4》和《生化危機 5》的關卡，這是一場與時間的賽跑，玩家要在倒數歸零之前擊敗盡可能多的敵人。 《生化危機僱傭兵 3D》的快節奏、戰鬥密集型動作既可以作為單人體驗，也可以讓世界各地的玩家透過網路組隊並享受兩人合作遊戲的樂趣。玩家將有機會與過去和現在的傳奇生化危機角色一起完成遊戲的任務。其中包括克里斯·雷德菲爾德 (Chris Redfield)、克勞瑟 (Krauser)、洪克 (Hunk) 以及在《傭兵》遊戲中首次亮相的克萊爾·雷德菲爾德 (Claire Redfield)。雖然遊戲玩法對於以前玩過《僱傭兵》的玩家來說很熟悉，但對階段進行了更改，角色也已轉變為全 3D，增加了移動和射擊的能力，增加了新的遊戲策略，並且增加了觸控式螢幕功能，改善了對庫存和遊戲地圖的訪問。

UID：CTR-P-ABMJ（日本）
        TSA-CTR-ABMJ (日本)

overview_en: All six BIT.TRIP games are transformed into 3D, morphing into a single entity called /BIT.TRIP SAGA/. Experience the crushing difficulty of the rhythmic galaxies and ride along the long journey with CommanderVideo as he completes his mission and returns...home.
overview_zh: 六款 BIT.TRIP 遊戲都轉換成 3D，變成一個名為 /BIT.TRIP SAGA/ 的實體。體驗有節奏的星系的巨大困難，並與 CommanderVideo 一起踏上漫長的旅程，因為他完成了任務並返回…家園。

title_en: Biyoushi Debut Monogatari - Top Sutairisuto o Mezasou!
title_jp: Biyoushi Debut Monogatari - Top Sutairisuto o Mezasou!
no_intro_name: Biyoushi Debut Monogatari - Top Sutairisuto o Mezasou! (Japan)

overview_en: BlazBlue: Continuum Shift II contains the complete set of single player features from the console version, such as Arcade, Story Attack, Training, and Story mode, and also has an ad-hoc Network mode for multiplayer play. This impressive list of features is topped off with new content created solely for the handheld version, including extra story material and brand new modes such as Legion 1.5 and Abyss Mode.
overview_zh: BlazBlue: Continuum Shift II 包含主機版本中的全套單人遊戲功能，例如街機、故事攻擊、訓練和故事模式，並且還具有用於多人遊戲的臨時網路模式。這份令人印象深刻的功能清單還包括專為掌機版本建立的新內容，包括額外的故事材料和全新模式，例如軍團 1.5 和深淵模式。

overview_en: Bloody Vampire is a side-scrolling action-adventure game in which the player controls Latis as she finds her way through a vast, maze-like castle. She fights enemies in similar fashion to Hydlide or Ys, bumping into enemies with her body and either inflicting or taking damage depending on her strength and position. She will collect coins by defeating enemies that can then be used to buy equipment from shops. In order to progress deeper into the castle, she will need to acquire certain special items that grant her new abilities and allow her to traverse obstacles.
overview_zh: 《血腥吸血鬼》是一款橫向捲軸動作冒險遊戲，玩家控制拉蒂斯穿越一座巨大的迷宮般的城堡。她以與 Hydlide 或 Ys 類似的方式與敵人戰鬥，用她的身體撞擊敵人，並根據她的力量和位置造成或受到傷害。她將透過擊敗敵人來收集硬幣，然後可以用這些硬幣從商店購買裝備。為了深入城堡，她需要獲得某些特殊物品來賦予她新的能力並允許她穿越障礙物。

title_jp: Boku no Hero Academia - Battle for All
overview_en: Boku no Hero Academia: Battle for All is an Action game, developed by Dimps Corporation and published by Bandai Namco Games, which was released in Japan in 2016.

overview_en:
In this the sequel to the 1984 classic action-puzzler, players set forth as Rockford or Crystal and mine their way through a variety of hazardous, yet stunning, three dimensional caves while avoiding crushing boulders and an eerie menagerie of killer creatures.
Features:
- Dazzling 3D Graphics glisten on Nintendo 3DS
- 4 Varied Gaming Worlds (Ice, Ancient, Reactor, Space)
- 5 Game Modes (Arcade, Puzzle, Zen, Score Attack and Retro)
- Over 150 All New and Exciting Caves to Conquer
- New Scoring mechanics provide an exciting challenge for high score hunters.
- Share unlocks and high score with your friends via StreetPass
overview_zh:
在這款 1984 年經典動作益智遊戲的續作中，玩家扮演羅克福德或克里斯托，在各種危險但令人驚嘆的三維洞穴中挖掘出一條路，同時避開壓碎的巨石和可怕的殺手生物動物園。
特點：
- 令人眼花繚亂的 3D 圖形在 Nintendo 3DS 上閃閃發光
- 4 個不同的遊戲世界（冰雪世界、古代世界、反應爐世界、太空世界）
- 5 種遊戲模式（街機、益智、禪宗、得分攻擊和復古）
- 超過 150 個全新且令人興奮的洞穴等待征服
- 新的計分機制為高分獵人提供了令人興奮的挑戰。
- 透過 StreetPass 與您的朋友分享解鎖內容和高分

title_jp: ものすごく脳を鍛える5分間の鬼トレーニング
overview_en: Brain Age is back with all-new devilishly difficult brain-training exercises designed by world-famous brain researcher Dr. Ryuta Kawashima. The modern mind has numerous devices to stay connected (e.g. laptops, smart phones, tablets), and these distractions have led to an information overload making it difficult to stay focused on specific tasks. Brain Age: Concentration Training offers newly designed training exercises to combat this information addiction. By spending at least five minutes a day, these exercises will challenge players with activities to help improve their concentration skills and the ability to access their short term memory. The new Devilish Training exercises dynamically increase or decrease in difficulty based on your real-time results to help consistently train players at the limit of their abilities. Beyond the Devilish Training, there are additional new and classic puzzles for every purpose, whether to challenge one's concentration or math skills or provide relaxation activities to give the brain a break.
overview_zh: 《大腦時代》帶著由世界著名大腦研究員川島龍太博士設計的全新極其困難的大腦訓練練習回來了。現代人有許多裝置可以保持聯絡（例如筆記型電腦、智慧型手機、平板電腦），而這些幹擾導致資訊過載，使其難以專注於特定任務。 《大腦時代：專注力訓練》提供了新設計的訓練練習來對抗這種資訊成癮。透過每天至少花五分鐘，這些練習將挑戰玩家的活動，以幫助提高他們的注意力技能和訪問短期記憶的能力。新的惡魔訓練練習會根據您的即時結果動態增加或減少難度，以幫助持續訓練玩家達到其能力的極限。除了惡魔訓練之外，還有針對各種目的的額外新的和經典的謎題，無論是挑戰一個人的注意力或數學技能，還是提供放鬆活動讓大腦休息一下。

overview_en: Stylesville is in fear of losing their local mall and they need the Bratz help to stop this fashion faux pas! In the all-new Bratz: Fashion Boutique video game, players will become one of the Bratz divas on a mission to run and decorate chic boutiques to help start the latest fashion trends. Girls with a passion for fashion will create fabulous outfits in designer mini-games and sell these must-have creations to new customers to earn money and stardom. Once the perfect outfit has been created, hit the runway and organize stunning fashion shows to model these stylish collections. With more than 100 fashion clothes and accessory combinations, girls will design and create their way to becoming the ultimate fashionista!
overview_zh: Stylesville 擔心失去當地的購物中心，他們需要 Bratz 的幫助來阻止這種時尚失禮！在全新的《Bratz：時尚精品店》電玩遊戲中，玩家將成為 Bratz 女主角之一，肩負經營和裝飾別緻精品店的使命，幫助引領最新的時尚潮流。對時尚充滿熱情的女孩將在設計師迷你遊戲中打造精美的服裝，並將這些必備作品出售給新客戶，以賺取金錢和明星地位。一旦打造出完美的服裝，就可以登上T臺並組織令人驚嘆的時裝秀來塑造這些時尚系列。超過 100 種時尚服裝和配件組合，女孩們將設計和創造自己的方式，成為終極時尚達人！

title_jp: ブレイブリーデフォルト
overview_en:
After a Great Chasm suddenly tears the earth apart, the world of Luxendarc is plunged into darkness. The four elemental crystals which bring light to the world – fire and water, wind and earth – are consumed by an overwhelming force, disrupting the very balance of nature. Once-dormant volcanoes erupt once more; oceans grow murky and perilous.

Agnès Oblige, the vestal of the Wind Crystal, is spared when the resident acolytes of her temple sacrifice their lives to shield her from the horror that besets the Wind Crystal. Guided by a cryst-fairy called Airy, Agnès sets out on a journey to awaken the crystals and bring light back to Luxendarc.

Amid this catastrophe Norende Village is completely engulfed by the Great Chasm, leaving Tiz Arrior behind as its sole survivor. Determined to rebuild his home and right the wrongs that the darkness has brought to Luxendarc, Tiz joins Agnès on her quest. 

In Bravely Default, quest through Luxendarc to awaken the crystals in a unique and innovative RPG experience, only on Nintendo 3DS family systems. Meet mysterious allies and terrible foes from all corners of the world, and best your enemies in instantly accessible turn-based battles. The new “Brave and Default” and “Bravely Second” systems set the stage for even more strategies, allowing you to disrupt the flow of traditional turn-based battles by attacking multiple times in a single turn – or even freezing time.
overview_zh:
大裂縫突然將大地撕裂後，盧森達爾克的世界陷入了黑暗。為世界帶來光明的四種元素晶體——火和水、風和土——被一股壓倒性的力量吞噬，破壞了自然的平衡。曾經休眠的火山再次噴發；海洋變得渾濁而危險。

艾格妮絲·奧布利格（Agnès Oblige）是風水晶的女祭司，她的神殿常駐侍僧犧牲自己的生命來保護她免受困擾風水晶的恐懼，她因此得以倖免。在水晶仙子艾裡的引導下，阿涅斯踏上了喚醒水晶並將光明帶回盧森達爾克的旅程。

在這場災難中，諾倫德村完全被大峽谷吞沒，蒂茲·阿里爾成為唯一的倖存者。蒂茲決心重建自己的家園並糾正黑暗給盧森達爾克帶來的錯誤，並與阿涅斯一起踏上她的旅程。 

在《勇敢預設》中，透過 Luxendarc 進行任務，以喚醒水晶，享受獨特且創新的 RPG 體驗，僅限 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統。結識來自世界各地的神秘盟友和可怕的敵人，並在即時的回合製戰鬥中打敗你的敵人。新的「Brave and Default」和「Bravely Second」系統為更多策略奠定了基礎，讓您可以透過在一個回合中多次攻擊甚至凍結時間來擾亂傳統回合製戰鬥的流程。

title_zh: 勇氣默示錄2 終結次元
overview_en:
It's your job to save the land of Luxendarc in Bravely Second™: End Layer, only on Nintendo 3DS family systems. In this deep RPG, continue the adventure that began in Bravely Default and explore an enormous fantasy world, filled with exciting new locations, and face enemies in action-packed turn-based battles.

Use a pair of unique battle systems to disrupt the flow of combat and defeat foes. With the Brave and Default system, characters can go all-out and make multiple moves in a single turn, or hold back to bolster their defences and prepare for future moves. It’s also possible to freeze foes in their tracks entirely with Bravely Second, a time-stopping system that can give you the chance to launch devastating special attacks or heal up in the heat of battle.

Put your skill and your nerve to the ultimate test with 'Bring it on!' After winning a battle in a single turn, brave warriors can immediately start another, more difficult encounter for the chance to earn increasing rewards. Chaining these battles together is a swift way to level up characters and jobs, but defeat means losing everything earned during those battles, so discretion should always be the better part of valour.

To conquer these tougher battles and devastatingly powerful enemies, you will need to make good use of the 30 character classes, known as jobs, to equip your characters with the skills necessary to survive. As characters gain job experience by battling, they learn new skills and abilities, giving players totally new tactical possibilities. For example, the new Patissier enfeebles foes with delicious desserts, while the Catmancer uses a deep understanding of felines to increase the team’s abilities and find useful items. Experiment with jobs and abilities to find the perfect battle style for you, and outfit your team with complementary positions to build a well-rounded party that’s ready for any opponent!

You don’t have to stick to one strategy, though. Now you can save different sets of your party’s jobs, commands, abilities and equipment, allowing you to switch between your favourite combinations with ease. Once you’ve set up your favourites, you can even instruct your party to battle on automatically until you intervene. With this new streamlined approach, building up your team is easier than ever!

You can also connect with other players in several ways using Nintendo 3DS family systems’ unique communication features. Exchange profiles with other players via StreetPass, Local Play and the internet* to rebuild your moon base, team up to defeat fearsome monsters and borrow abilities from other players to give you an edge!

With a vast world to explore, a deep tactical battle system to master and much more, embark on a unique RPG adventure with Bravely Second: End Layer, only on Nintendo 3DS family systems.
overview_zh:
在《Bravely Second™：End Layer》中，您的任務是拯救 Luxendarc 的土地，僅限 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統。在這款深度角色扮演遊戲中，繼續《勇敢預設》中開始的冒險，探索充滿令人興奮的新地點的巨大奇幻世界，並在充滿動作的回合製戰鬥中面對敵人。

使用一對獨特的戰鬥系統來擾亂戰鬥流程並擊敗敵人。藉助“勇敢和預設”系統，角色可以全力以赴並在一個回合中進行多次移動，或者保留以加強防禦並為未來的移動做好準備。還可以使用“Bravely Second”將敵人完全凍結，這是一種時間停止系統，可以讓您有機會發動毀滅性的特殊攻擊或在激烈的戰鬥中治癒。

用「來吧！」來對你的技巧和勇氣進行終極考驗。在單回合贏得一場戰鬥後，勇敢的戰士可以立即開始另一場更困難的戰鬥，以獲得越來越多的獎勵。將這些戰鬥連結在一起是升級角色和工作的快速方法，但失敗意味著失去在這些戰鬥中獲得的一切，因此謹慎應該始終是勇氣的更好部分。

為了征服這些更艱難的戰鬥和毀滅性的強大敵人，您需要充分利用 30 個角色類別（稱為工作），為您的角色配備生存所需的技能。當角色透過戰鬥獲得工作經驗時，他們會學習新的技能和能力，為玩家提供全新的戰術可能性。例如，新的糕點師用美味的甜點削弱敵人，而貓術士則利用對貓科動物的深入瞭解來提高團隊的能力並找到有用的物品。嘗試不同的職業和能力，找到最適合你的戰鬥風格，並為你的團隊配備互補的位置，打造一支全面的隊伍，為任何對手做好準備！

不過，您不必堅持一種策略。現在，您可以儲存不同組的隊伍工作、命令、能力和裝備，讓您可以輕鬆地在自己喜歡的組合之間切換。一旦你設定了你最喜歡的，你甚至可以指示你的隊伍自動戰鬥，直到你介入。透過這種新的簡化方法，組建您的團隊比以往更容易！

您還可以使用 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統獨特的通訊功能以多種方式與其他玩家聯絡。透過 StreetPass、Local Play 和網際網路* 與其他玩家交換個人資料，重建您的月球基地，組隊擊敗可怕的怪物，並借用其他玩家的能力來為您帶來優勢！

廣闊的世界等待探索，深入的戰術戰鬥系統等待掌握，還有更多內容，在《Bravely Second: End Layer》中開始一場獨特的 RPG 冒險，僅限 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統。

overview_en: "Brunswick Pro Bowling is the only game to feature a realistic and authentic bowling experience while showcasing jaw-dropping ball and pin physics. Strap on the wrist guard and roll on accurate oil patterns, earn tons of trophies, and unlock hidden items on your way to winning the world championship. Customize your bowler with genuine Brunswick equipment from bowling balls, shoes, and clothing. Whether you're a casual player or a bowling fanatic, Brunswick Pro Bowling is fun for all ages and provides hours of entertainment for the whole family!"
overview_zh: 「Brunswick Pro Bowling 是唯一一款提供逼真而真實的保齡球體驗，同時展示令人瞠目結舌的球和球瓶物理原理的遊戲。帶上護腕，在精確的油紋上滾動，贏取大量獎杯，並在贏得世界冠軍的道路上解鎖隱藏物品。用保齡球、鞋子和服裝等正品 Brunswick 裝備您的保齡球玩家定時的保齡球玩家。都適合所有年齡段，並提供數小時的樂趣適合全家人一起娛樂！ ”

title_jp: とびだす!パズルボブル 3D
overview_en:
Puzzle Bobble Universe is an arcade-style puzzle game in the Bust-A-Move series, in which the player aims and fires bubbles at an onslaught of slowly falling bubbles to clear a group of three or more bubbles the same colour as the one fired and prevent the bubbles from falling to the bottom of the screen.

The gameplay modes include: Puzzle mode, which consists of eight worlds comprising of ten stages and a boss fight each, with keys in each level unlocking a dragon which provides the player with a rapid fire ability, and Challenge mode, where players can set their own time limit, if they so please, and play solely to achieve a high score.
overview_zh:
Puzzle Bobble Universe 是 Bust-A-Move 系列中的街機風格益智遊戲，在遊戲中，玩家瞄準緩慢下落的氣泡並發射氣泡，以清除一組三個或更多與發射的氣泡顏色相同的氣泡，並防止氣泡落到螢幕底部。

遊戲模式包括：謎題模式，由八個世界組成，每個世界包含十個階段，每個階段都有一場 Boss 戰，每個關卡中都有鑰匙解鎖一條龍，為玩家提供快速射擊能力；以及挑戰模式，玩家可以根據自己的喜好設定自己的時間限制，並只為了獲得高分而玩。

title_en: Cake-ya San Monogatari - Oishii Sweets o Tsukurou!
title_jp: Cake-ya San Monogatari - Oishii Sweets o Tsukurou!
no_intro_name: Cake-ya San Monogatari - Oishii Sweets o Tsukurou! (Japan)

overview_en: Captain America: Super Soldier combines a highly athletic combat system with fluid platforming and a highly tuned suite of shield attacks, as Cap explores a massive castle turned military installation. His shield can be employed in numerous ways: taking out multiple enemies at once, deflecting incoming fire back at enemies, solving puzzles, and scaling walls. Players will be able to launch shield-first into the fray with the superior force of the world's first Super-Soldier at their fingertips and they'll need every bit of that strength to overcome a castle that's both an acrobatic playground for the Captain's physical prowess and a house of mystery with enemies and danger at every turn.
overview_zh: 《美國隊長：超級士兵》將高度運動的戰鬥系統與流暢的平臺和高度調整的盾牌攻擊套件相結合，讓美國隊長探索一座巨大的城堡改造的軍事設施。他的盾牌有多種用途：同時消滅多個敵人、將來襲的火力偏轉回敵人身上、解決謎題、攀爬牆壁。玩家將能夠利用世界上第一位超級士兵的超強力量，以盾牌先行的方式投入戰鬥，他們需要充分利用這種力量來攻克一座城堡，這座城堡既是發揮隊長體力的雜技遊樂場，又是一座處處充滿敵人和危險的神秘之屋。

title_jp: 進め! キノピオ隊長
overview_en:
Captain Toad stars in his own puzzling quest on the Nintendo 3DS family of systems!

Our stubby hero must dodge dangers and track treasures across many trap-filled courses. Survive smoldering volcanoes, hazardous steam engines, haunted houses, and even new courses based on the Super Mario Odyssey game! Watch them come to life in stereoscopic 3D using the touch-controlled game camera.

Super Gems and Power Stars are hidden across each puzzling course you'll explore. As you reclaim the treasure stolen by the monstrous, greedy bird, Wingo, you'll eventually be able to play as Toadette! These tiny heroes will have to waddle, hide, pluck, chuck, and power-up through enemy-infested locales like towers, wild-west shanties, and Goomba waterparks—all bursting with goodies to find and secrets to unearth. It's all in the name of treasure! Aim your head-mounted flashlight at adventure!
overview_zh:
蟾蜍船長在 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統上展開他自己的令人費解的任務！

我們粗壯的英雄必須躲避危險，並在許多充滿陷阱的賽道上追蹤寶藏。在悶燒的火山、危險的蒸汽機、鬼屋，甚至基於《超級瑪利歐奧德賽》遊戲的新課程中生存！使用觸控的遊戲相機觀看它們以立體 3D 方式栩栩如生。

超級寶石和力量之星隱藏在您將探索的每個令人費解的球場中。當你奪回被怪物、貪婪的鳥 Wingo 偷走的寶藏時，你最終將能夠扮演 Toadette！這些小英雄將不得不在敵人出沒的地點（如塔樓、狂野西部棚屋和 Goomba 水上樂園）搖搖晃晃、隱藏、拔毛、拋擲和增強力量，所有這些地方都充滿了要尋找的好東西和需要挖掘的秘密。這一切都是以寶藏之名！將頭戴式手電筒瞄準冒險！

title_en: CardFight!! Vanguard G - Stride to Victory!!
title_jp: CardFight!! Vanguard G - Stride to Victory!!
overview_en:
"Cardfight!! Vanguard G: Stride to Victory!!" is the third Cardfight!! Vanguard video game to be released on Nintendo 3DS. Includes all cards and events from the Legion Mate season and Vanguard G Season 1 (excluding Touken Ranbu).  Play as the either 10 unique characters, the Cardfight Vanguard G Cast, or mainstays from the original Cardfight!! Vanguard series!  

Features 2 story modes, where you get to spend time with the Vanguard G Cast, and a special commemorative mode celebrating the end of Cardfight!! Vanguard 

You can also play online or with friends locally with Nintendo Wifi Connection
overview_zh:
「卡牌戰鬥！！先鋒G：邁向勝利！！」第三次卡牌大戰！ ！ 《Vanguard》電玩遊戲將在任天堂 3DS 上發布。包括 Legion Mate 賽季和 Vanguard G 第 1 季的所有卡片和活動（刀劍亂舞除外）。  扮演 10 個獨特的角色，Cardfight Vanguard G Cast，或原始 Cardfight 的中流砥柱！先鋒系列！  

具有 2 種故事模式，您可以在其中與 Vanguard G Cast 一起度過時光，還有一種慶祝 Cardfight 結束的特殊紀念模式！先鋒

您也可以透過任天堂 Wifi 連線線上或與本地朋友一起玩
no_intro_name: CardFight!! Vanguard G - Stride to Victory!! (Japan)

overview_en:
"Cardfight!! Vanguard: Lock on Victory!!" is the second Cardfight!! Vanguard video game to be released on the Nintendo 3DS. Featuring all cards up to the end of the Link Joker Arc. Play as 10 unique characters across the storyline of Cardfight!! Vanguard: Link Joker, through a new perspective as you can choose 1 of the 3 schools to join, experiencing new scenarios and fights.

Play online or with friends with Nintendo WiFi Connection to fight with other players.
overview_zh:
「卡牌戰鬥！！先鋒隊：鎖定勝利！！」第二次卡牌大戰！ ！ 《Vanguard》電玩遊戲將在任天堂 3DS 上發布。包含連線小丑篇結束之前的所有卡片。在 Cardfight 的故事情節中扮演 10 個獨特的角色！先鋒：連結小丑，全新視角，3個流派中選擇1個加入，體驗新的場景和戰鬥。

線上上玩遊戲或透過任天堂 WiFi 連線與朋友一起玩，與其他玩家對戰。

overview_en: Cardfight!! Vanguard: Ride to Victory!! is the first game of Cardfight!! Vanguard for the Nintendo 3DS produced by FuRyu.
overview_zh: 卡牌大戰！ ！先鋒：奔向勝利！ ！這是 Cardfight 的第一款遊戲！ ！ FuRyu 為 Nintendo 3DS 製作的 Vanguard。

overview_en: "Howdy partner!  It’s time to switch on your swagger and step right up to Carnival Games Wild West 3D! You’re in for a rootin’ tootin’ good time as 25 Wild West games and attractions, built from the ground up for the Nintendo 3DS, come to life in eye poppin’ 3D and take full advantage of the motion sensor and gyro sensor system capabilities."
overview_zh: 「你好，夥伴！是時候開啟你的大搖大擺，直接進入嘉年華遊戲狂野西部 3D 了！你將享受一段非常美好的時光，因為專為 Nintendo 3DS 全新打造的 25 個狂野西部遊戲和景點，在令人眼花繚亂的 3D 中栩栩如生，並充分利用了運動感應器和陀螺狂野西部遊戲系統功能。”

overview_en:
"When Uncle Grandpa accidentally drives the UG-RV through multiple dimensions, he picks up some surprise passengers in the form of Gumball, Steven Universe, Finn, Mordecai and Clarence! Now they'll have to band together to defeat the evil shard creatures and set things right. Use each character's unique attacks and special moves to conquer the elements, fight your way through all the levels and beat some brutal boss battles. Replay maps with special modifiers to switch up the fun, and unlock bonus rooms along the way. Take on the single-player challenge in this crazy interdimensional adventure."

(3DS Version does not have multiplayer)
overview_zh:
「當叔叔爺爺意外地駕駛 UG-RV 穿過多個維度時，他接上了一些令人驚訝的乘客，包括岡布奧、史蒂文宇宙、芬恩、莫迪凱和克拉倫斯！現在他們必須聯合起來打敗邪惡的碎片生物並糾正一切。使用每個角色獨特的攻擊和特殊動作來征服元素，在所有關卡中殺出一條血路，並擊敗一些殘酷的 Boss戰。

（3DS版沒有多人遊戲）

overview_en: This Cartoon Network Fighter is a crossover fighting game featuring the stars of Ben 10, Dexter's Laboratory, PowerPuff Girls, and more.
overview_zh: 這款卡通網路戰鬥機是一款跨界格鬥遊戲，由《Ben 10》、《Dexter實驗室》、《飛天小女警》等明星主演。

title_en: Castlevania - Lords of Shadow - Mirror of Fate
title_jp: キャッスルヴァニア ロード オブ シャドウ 宿命の魔鏡
title_zh: 惡魔城 闇影主宰-命運之鏡
overview_en:
Initially set 25 years after the events of Castlevania: Lords of Shadow, Mirror of Fate will reveal the story of Gabriel's descendants, as they battle their own destiny in each era only to discover their true, shocking fate.

Trevor Belmont, a knight of the Brotherhood of Light sets out to avenge the death of his mother, at the hands of his own father, who has now returned from years of exile to take up residence in a mysterious castle. What was once Gabriel Belmont now stands a powerful vampire called Dracula. Dracula has declared war upon the Brotherhood and thus the scene is set for a cataclysmic showdown between Father and Son!
overview_zh:
《命運之鏡》的故事背景設定在《惡魔城：暗影之王》事件發生 25 年後，將講述加百列的後代的故事，他們在每個時代與自己的命運作鬥爭，卻發現了自己真正的、令人震驚的命運。

光明兄弟會的騎士特雷弗·貝爾蒙特 (Trevor Belmont) 著手為他母親的死報仇，而他的父親現在已經從多年的流放歸來，定居在一座神秘的城堡裡。曾經的加布裡埃爾貝爾蒙特現在站著一個強大的吸血鬼，名叫德古拉。德古拉向兄弟會宣戰，父子之間的災難性對決就此拉開序幕！
no_intro_name: Castlevania - Lords of Shadow - Mirror of Fate (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: Castlevania - Lords of Shadow - Sadame no Makyou
title_jp: Castlevania - Lords of Shadow - Sadame no Makyou
no_intro_name: Castlevania - Lords of Shadow - Sadame no Makyou (Japan)

maker: dtp young entertainment GmbH & Co. KG
publisher: dtp young entertainment GmbH & Co. KG
developer: dtp young entertainment GmbH & Co. KG
overview_en:
Pick from a wide range of both cats and dogs. Take care of them and watch them grow and develop into fully trained pets. At playtime use one of the various toys to keep them entertained and healthy. Teach them new tricks so they can compete in competitions.
- Various breeds: Golden Retriever, Dalmatian, German Shepherd, Husky, Siamese, Maine Coon, British Shorthair, Tabby
- 16 Mini-games: Obstacle course, Frisbee, Ball games and lots more!
- Take them for a walk and visit shops to buy new accessories
overview_zh:
從各種貓和狗中進行選擇。照顧它們，看著它們成長並發展成為訓練有素的寵物。在玩耍時，使用各種玩具之一來讓他們保持娛樂和健康。教他們新技巧，以便他們能夠參加比賽。
- 各種品種：黃金獵犬、達爾馬提亞犬、德國牧羊犬、哈士奇犬、暹羅犬、緬因貓、英國短毛貓、虎斑貓
- 16 個迷你遊戲：障礙賽、飛盤、球遊戲等等！
- 帶他們去散步並參觀商店購買新配件

overview_en:
Take control! Stop the delusional villain!

Cave Story takes you into a rare world where a curious race of innocent rabbit-like creatures, called Mimiga, run free.

You wake up in a dark cave with no memory of who you are, where you came from or why you're in such a place. Uncovering Mimiga Village you discover that the once-carefree Mimiga are in danger at the hands of a maniacal scientist.

Their only hope rest squarely on the shoulders of a quiet, amnesiac boy who can't remember his own name. Take control and learn the origins of this world’s power, stop the delusional villain and save the Mimiga!
overview_zh:
控制住！阻止這個妄想的惡棍！

《洞穴物語》帶您進入一個罕見的世界，那裡有一群好奇的無辜兔子般的生物，名叫米米加，自由奔跑。

你在一個黑暗的洞穴中醒來，不記得自己是誰，從哪裡來，也不記得為什麼會在這個地方。揭開米米加村的面紗，你會發現曾經無憂無慮的米米加正處於瘋狂科學家手中的危險之中。

他們唯一的希望完全寄託在一個安靜、失憶的男孩身上，他已經不記得自己的名字了。掌控並瞭解這個世界力量的起源，阻止妄想的惡棍並拯救米米加！

overview_en: Having received tremendous acclaim in its previous releases on PC and WiiWare, Cave Story, an indie side scrolling 2D action game, now makes its way into an all new dimension with Cave Story 3D for Nintendo 3DS. At once both a throwback to classic 2D action platformers and also the potential future of the genre, Cave Story 3D blends tight controls, superb level design, and excellent story and presentation to deliver a memorable, addicting retro experience!
overview_zh: 《Cave Story》是一款獨立橫向捲軸 2D 動作遊戲，在之前的 PC 和 WiiWare 版本中獲得了巨大好評，現在憑藉適用於 Nintendo 3DS 的《Cave Story 3D》進入了一個全新的維度。 Cave Story 3D 既是對經典 2D 動作平臺遊戲的回歸，也是該型別的潛在未來，它融合了嚴格的控制、精湛的關卡設計以及出色的故事和演示，帶來令人難忘、令人上癮的複古體驗！

overview_en: Centipede: Infestation is a post-apocalyptic action experience that features run-n-gun shooting style gameplay with tower defense-style objects, paying homage to the original Centipede while bringing the brand into the 21st century. Players assume the role of an orphaned teenager hero named Max as he trudges through the wasteland, fighting off giant bugs. As Max travels he encounters a young teen named Maisy who possesses a collection of seeds that hold the secret to bringing plant life back to the wasteland. Max and Maisy join forces to grow these gardens and protect the last natural resources on earth.

title_en: Chibi Devi! 2 - Mahou no Yume Ehon
title_jp: Chibi Devi! 2 - Mahou no Yume Ehon
no_intro_name: Chibi Devi! 2 - Mahou no Yume Ehon (Japan)

title_jp: なげなわアクション!ぐるぐる!ちびロボ!
overview_en:
Chibi-Robo! Zip Lash comes to the Nintendo 3DS system with a fresh, new take on the franchise. In this side-scrolling game, Chibi-Robo uses his plug and cord to whip enemies, grapple onto ledges, and swing across chasms. Power-up the plug and cord to search for collectables and explore previously out of reach areas.

Also Available
Chibi-Robo! Zip Lash with amiibo
