title_en: Classic Games Overload - Card _ Puzzle Edition
overview_en:
The most comprehensive card games collection for Nintendo 3DS…plus you get over 1,000 unique puzzle challenges!

You get almost limitless gameplay:

● Classic Card Games - Bridge, Hearts, Spades, Euchre, Cribbage, Canasta, Gin Rummy, Crazy 8's, Go Fish, Skat, Romme
● Casino Card Games - Poker (7 variations of Draw, Stud, and Hold 'em), Video Poker (5 variations), BlackJack (1 to 5 players)
● Other Games and Puzzles - Mahjong (404 layouts), Solitaire (202 variations), Tangram (505 puzzles), Picture Puzzle (101 puzzles)
no_intro_name: Classic Games Overload - Card _ Puzzle Edition (USA)

title_en: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
title_jp: くもりときどきミートボール2 フード・アニマル誕生の秘密
overview_en: "Following the events of Sony Pictures Animation's original culinary comedy, Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 continues the exciting journey of inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends as they rush to save the world from his most infamous machine that is now creating food-animal hybrids- "Foodimals"! This action-adventure title, starring a dazzling cast of characters, art, and environments from the animated feature, is ideal for young gamers and fans of the film of all ages. Complete with a suite of unlockable levels, unique character abilities and power-ups, and bonus Challenge and Survival gameplay modes in addition to the main story, Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 is a game you'll savor with every play."
no_intro_name: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 (USA)

overview_en:
Club Nintendo Picross, known as Picross Nintendo Special in South Korea, is a Japan and South Korea-only Nintendo 3DS eShop Picross title. The game is much similar in style to Mario's Picross, as its made by the same developer, Jupiter. Rather than focusing on Super Mario themes, the game is themed around various Nintendo series. There are a total of 88 puzzles for players to solve, and four modes: Easy, Normal, Free Picross, and Micross.

In Japan, the game could only be downloaded through the Club Nintendo rewards program, requiring 80 Club Nintendo Points to download. In South Korea, the game is exclusive for ones who either accessed to Nintendo eShop from April 28 to December 5, 2012, or purchased New Super Mario Bros. 2 Gold Edition. A sequel was released in Japan in 2014 titled Club Nintendo Picross+.

title_jp: Code Name: S.T.E.A.M. リンカーンVSエイリアン
overview_en: Launch S.T.E.A.M., an elite team of steam-powered special-forces soldiers, to save the world from an alien menace. In this new blend of action and strategy, our commandos use steam power stored in special backpacks to move into position and fire an arsenal of distinct weapons. Pick your team members and load out, then use strategy to decide the best way to approach this steampunk-inspired battlefield.

title_en: Code Name - S.T.E.A.M. - Lincoln VS Alien
title_jp: Code Name - S.T.E.A.M. - Lincoln VS Alien
no_intro_name: Code Name - S.T.E.A.M. - Lincoln VS Alien (Japan)

overview_en: The Kingdom of Deluxia is under siege, over-run with monsters on one end and an invading army on the other. The princess flees for her life, relying on the holy blade to return her beloved land back to it's former glory. Customize your characters to become the ultimate warrior. Battle against onslaughts of foes and help restore the once prosperous Kingdom to its peaceful days. Call upon the different powers of your allies to assist you on your quest. Who will you choose to aid you in this dangerous journey? Whether you choose to fight alone or travel in a group,the future of Deluxia is now in your hands.
overview_zh: 德盧西亞王國正被圍困，一端被怪物佔領，另一端被入侵軍隊佔領。公主逃命，依靠聖劍讓她心愛的土地恢復昔日的光彩。自訂你的角色，成為終極戰士。對抗敵人的進攻，幫助曾經繁榮的王國恢復和平。召喚盟友的不同力量來協助你完成任務。在這段危險的旅程中，你會選擇誰來幫助你呢？無論你選擇單打獨鬥，還是組隊出行，Deluxia的未來都在你的手中。

overview_en: 150 million years ago, Nature's fury was unleashed, forcing Dinosaurs to fight for their survival. Dive into spectacular battles and deal powerful blows to your worst enemies. Master your fierce dinosaur and rule the cataclysmic Jurassic world!
overview_zh: 1.5億年前，大自然的憤怒被釋放，迫使恐龍為生存而戰。投入壯觀的戰鬥中，對最可怕的敵人造成強大的打擊。駕馭你兇猛的恐龍，統治災難性的侏羅紀世界！

title_en: Combo Pack - Madagascar 3 - Europe's Most Wanted + Croods, The - Prehistoric Party!
no_intro_name: Combo Pack - Madagascar 3 - Europe's Most Wanted + Croods, The - Prehistoric Party! (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_en: Conception II - Children of the Seven Stars
title_jp: CONCEPTIONII 七星の導きとマズルの悪夢
overview_en:
Monsters have invaded the world of Aterra, and only a few special individuals, imbued with the power of the Star God, are equipped to fight it. With only a small group of warriors and a narrow window of time in which their powers are at their peak, the solution is clear: combine your Star power to make magical Star Children to boost up your forces in battle. The life of a student can be complicated when youre exploring dungeons, fighting monsters, AND trying to maintain a high school lifestyle. Learn to balance your activities because the deeper the bond you have with your classmates, the stronger the Star Children youll make! In this stimulating JRPG, youll be able to create bonds with 7 different female Disciples and create 24 classes of Star Children, so you must learn how to create the perfect Star Children for any situation. In no time, youll have dozens of powerful kids with different skills that can take on everything the monsters throw at you.

-Combine Star power to make magical Star Children
-Create bonds with 7 different female Disciples
-Save Aterra, venture through dungeons & defeat monsters
overview_zh:
怪物入侵了阿特拉世界，只有少數擁有星神的力量的特殊個體有能力對抗。由於只有一小群戰士，而且他們的力量達到巔峰的時間很短，解決方案很明確：結合你的星星力量來製造神奇的星星孩子，以增強你在戰鬥中的力量。當你探索地牢、與怪物戰鬥並試圖維持高中生活方式時，學生的生活可能會很複雜。學會平衡你的活動，因為你與同學的連結越深，你的星星孩子就越強大！在這款刺激的日式角色扮演遊戲中，您將能夠與 7 位不同的女性弟子建立聯絡，並建立 24 個類別的星之子，因此您必須學習如何建立適合任何情況的完美星之子。很快，你就會擁有數十個擁有不同技能的強大孩子，他們可以承受怪物向你扔來的一切。

-結合星星之力，創造神奇的星星之子
- 與 7 位不同的女性門徒建立聯絡
-拯救阿特拉，冒險穿越地下城並擊敗怪物
no_intro_name: Conception II - Children of the Seven Stars (USA)

title_en: Conception II - Shichisei no Michibiki to Mazuru no Akumu
title_jp: Conception II - Shichisei no Michibiki to Mazuru no Akumu
no_intro_name: Conception II - Shichisei no Michibiki to Mazuru no Akumu (Japan)

overview_en:
Making puddings and sweets is lots of fun in Cooking Mama: Sweet Shop! Making puddings and sweets is lots of fun in Cooking Mama: Sweet Shop! Players make and create a wide assortment of delicious looking sweets and puddings, then serve customers in the shop to keep them happy. Create 60 different recipes by taking part in over 160 different mini-games, using the Nintendo 3DS stylus and even the microphone to cool, slice, stir, bake and decorate their creations. And just like always, dont worry if you make a mistake - Mama will fix it for you! Sweets can be arranged and displayed in the sweet shop, then given to your customers to bring happiness to them all. The more sweets you create and complete, the more recipes you discover and the more your shop expands. Better yet, take on your friends in a competitive cook-off for up to four players, seeing who can make the tastiest treats of all!

-Join Mama in the kitchen and help her create many different delicious sweets and puddings! -Create 60 different recipes in over 160 mini-games by using the Nintendo 3DS stylus and even the microphone.
-Arrange and display your sweet creations in your very own sweet shop to keep your customers happy.
-Expand your sweet shop and trigger special events by making as many recipes as you can!
overview_zh:
在《烹飪媽媽：甜點店》中製作布丁和糖果非常有趣！在《烹飪媽媽：甜點店》中製作布丁和糖果非常有趣！玩家製作各種看起來美味的糖果和布丁，然後為商店裡的顧客服務，讓他們開心。參與 160 多個不同的迷你遊戲，使用 Nintendo 3DS 手寫筆甚至麥克風來冷卻、切片、攪拌、烘烤和裝飾他們的作品，創造 60 種不同的食譜。就像往常一樣，如果您犯了錯誤，請不要擔心 - 媽媽會為您解決的！可以在甜點店佈置並展示糖果，然後送給您的顧客，給他們帶來快樂。您製作和完成的糖果越多，您發現的食譜就越多，您的商店就越擴大。更好的是，與您的朋友一起參加最多四名玩家的競爭性烹飪比賽，看看誰能做出最美味的食物！

- 和媽媽一起在廚房裡，幫助她製作許多不同的美味糖果和布丁！ - 使用 Nintendo 3DS 手寫筆甚至麥克風在 160 多個迷你遊戲中建立 60 種不同的食譜。
- 在您自己的甜點店佈置並展示您的甜點作品，讓您的顧客滿意。
- 製作盡可能多的食譜，擴大你的甜點店並觸發特殊事件！

title_en: Cooking Mama - Watashi no Sweets Shop
title_jp: Cooking Mama - Watashi no Sweets Shop
no_intro_name: Cooking Mama - Watashi no Sweets Shop (Japan)

overview_en: Join the original digital chef as she makes her debut on Nintendo 3DS with Cooking Mama 4: Kitchen Magic! From new recipes and ways to play to fresh kitchen activities and dish combinations, the iconic kitchen cutie has some tricks up her sleeve that will magically transform kitchen newbies into master culinary artists! Slice, dice, knead, toss and flip your way through more than 200 unique Touch Screen mini-games as you cook in brand new ways with the Nintendo 3DS gyroscope: crack eggs, flip pans, balance plates and much more. Earn bronze, silver and gold medals while mixing up over 60 recipes that range from side dishes to full meals. Organize, decorate and clean your kitchen while watching surprising 3D events unfold as you prepare each meal.
overview_zh: 與原始數位廚師一起在 Nintendo 3DS 上首次亮相《烹飪媽媽 4：廚房魔法》！從新的食譜和玩法到新鮮的廚房活動和菜餚組合，這位標誌性的廚房小可愛有一些妙招，可以神奇地將廚房新手變成烹飪大師！當您使用 Nintendo 3DS 陀螺儀以全新方式烹飪時，您可以透過 200 多種獨特的觸控螢幕迷你遊戲進行切片、切丁、揉捏、拋擲和翻轉：打碎雞蛋、翻轉平底鍋、平衡盤等等。混合 60 多種食譜（從配菜到正餐），贏得銅牌、銀牌和金牌。整理、裝飾和清潔您的廚房，同時觀看令人驚奇的 3D 事件在您準備每頓飯時展開。

overview_en: Join the original digital chef as she makes her debut on Nintendo 3DS with Cooking Mama 4: Kitchen Magic! From new recipes and ways to play to fresh kitchen activities and dish combinations, the iconic kitchen cutie has some tricks up her sleeve that will magically transform kitchen newbies into master culinary artists! Slice, dice, knead, toss and flip your way through more than 200 unique Touch Screen mini-games as you cook in brand new ways with the Nintendo 3DS gyroscope: crack eggs, flip pans, balance plates and much more. Earn bronze, silver and gold medals while mixing up over 60 recipes that range from side dishes to full meals. Organize, decorate and clean your kitchen while watching surprising 3D events unfold as you prepare each meal.
overview_zh: 與原始數位廚師一起在 Nintendo 3DS 上首次亮相《烹飪媽媽 4：廚房魔法》！從新的食譜和玩法到新鮮的廚房活動和菜餚組合，這位標誌性的廚房小可愛有一些妙招，可以神奇地將廚房新手變成烹飪大師！當您使用 Nintendo 3DS 陀螺儀以全新方式烹飪時，您可以透過 200 多種獨特的觸控螢幕迷你遊戲進行切片、切丁、揉捏、拋擲和翻轉：打碎雞蛋、翻轉平底鍋、平衡盤等等。混合 60 多種食譜（從配菜到正餐），贏得銅牌、銀牌和金牌。整理、裝飾和清潔您的廚房，同時觀看令人驚奇的 3D 事件在您準備每頓飯時展開。

overview_en: Cooking Mama 5: Bon Appétit! (クッキングママ５ Kukkingu Mama 5) is the sequel to the Nintendo 3DS video game Cooking Mama 4: Kitchen Magic and is the fifth installment to the Cooking Mama series on the Nintendo 3DS. It was released in Japan on November 21, 2013, on September 16, 2014 in North America and on March 6, 2015 in Europe. It contains over 60 recipes and new household activities/games.
overview_zh: 烹飪媽媽5：祝你胃口好！ （クッキngグママ５ Kukkingu Mama 5）是任天堂 3DS 電玩遊戲《烹飪媽媽 4：廚房魔法》的續作，也是任天堂 3DS 上烹飪媽媽系列的第五部。該片於2013年11月21日在日本發行，2014年9月16日在北美發行，2015年3月6日在歐洲發行。它包含 60 多種食譜和新的家庭活動/遊戲。

overview_en:
Kisaragi Academy student Mayu Suzumoto is transferring to a new high school, leaving behind a sizable group of friends and countless lovely memories. To help her cope with this move, her friend Ayumi has devised a seemingly innocent plan: the whole group will come together to perform a charm she found on the internet called “Sachiko Ever After,” which is supposed to bind all of its participants together as friends to the end. This does not go as expected. Following an intense earthquake, the group awakens to find themselves separated and trapped in an alternate reality version of Heavenly Host Elementary School, a tragedy-stricken institution that once stood on the site of their own school but was torn down long ago. Here, the vengeful spirits of elementary-aged children threaten their lives and their sanity, and the only hope of survival - much less escape - is to uncover the chilling details surrounding the murders of those trapped before them. Having previously gained a considerable fan base when released digitally on the PSP system, this reimagining on the Nintendo 3DS system represents the first time the original cult classic horror title that spawned a new indie sub-genre will see a physical release in North America. Exclusive new features include 3D art stills, Touch Screen menus, four additional Extra Chapters, expanded story scenes, an in-game character encyclopedia, redrawn character sprites, and newly arranged music tracks. This is the definitive version of the classic horror tale that spans over 50 years of tragedy, where player choices determine both how the story ends and who lives to see it through.

Also Available
Corpse Party: Back to School Edition
overview_zh:
如月學園的學生鈴本麻友即將轉學到一所新高中，留下了一大群朋友和無數美好的回憶。為了幫助她應對這一舉動，她的朋友步美製定了一個看似無辜的計劃：整個小組將齊聚一堂，表演她在網際網路上找到的一個名為“Sachiko Ever After”的咒語，該咒語應該將所有參與者以朋友的身份聯絡到最後。這並沒有如預期進行。一場強烈地震後，一行人醒來，發現自己失散並被困在另一個現實版的天主小學裡，這是一所遭受悲劇的機構，曾經位於他們自己學校的舊址上，但很久以前就被拆除了。在這裡，小學生的復仇之魂威脅著他們的生命和理智，生存的唯一希望——更不用說逃跑——就是揭露那些被困在他們面前的人被謀殺的令人毛骨悚然的細節。先前在 PSP 系統上以數位方式發行時已經贏得了相當多的粉絲基礎，這次在 Nintendo 3DS 系統上的重新設計代表了這款衍生出新的獨立子型別的原創經典恐怖遊戲將首次在北美實體發行。獨家新功能包括 3D 藝術劇照、觸控螢幕選單、四個額外的額外章節、擴充套件的故事場景、遊戲內角色百科全書、重新繪製的角色精靈和新編排的音樂曲目。這是經典恐怖故事的最終版本，跨越了 50 多年的悲劇，玩家的選擇決定了故事的結局以及誰能活著看到故事。

還提供
屍體派對：重返校園版

title_en: Corpse Party - Blood Covered - Repeated Fear
title_jp: Corpse Party - Blood Covered - Repeated Fear
no_intro_name: Corpse Party - Blood Covered - Repeated Fear (Japan)

overview_en:
"Fasten your seatbelts and take a thrill ride through Crash City, causing mayhem wherever your tires take you! You are an undercover spy working for a top secret agency; you never know who to trust! Race down the streets earning points for destroying anything that gets in your way while completing missions that will challenge your skill behind the wheel.

Chase down traitors, steal important items from the embassy, and collect data scattered around the city in 36 action packed missions!

Unlock and drive 15 different vehicles ranging from Monster Trucks to F1 racers!

Collect hidden coins in each mission to unlock different items to equip your vehicle with, from bus horns to nitros and jumping devices!

Try to beat the Legendary setting or play Free Run mode where you can run wild throughout the level without receiving any damage to your vehicle.

Destroy everything that gets in your way to earn the high score. There are thousands of destructible objects so don't hold back!"
overview_zh:
「繫好安全帶，在崩潰之城中進行一次驚險刺激的旅程，無論輪胎帶你到哪裡，都會造成混亂！你是一名為絕密機構工作的臥底間諜；你永遠不知道該信任誰！在街上奔跑，摧毀任何阻礙你的東西，同時完成挑戰你駕駛技巧的任務，從而獲得積分。

在 36 個動作豐富的任務中追捕叛徒、竊取大使館的重要物品並收集散佈在城市各處的資料！

解鎖並駕駛 15 種不同的車輛，從怪物卡車到 F1 賽車！

在每個任務中收集隱藏的硬幣來解鎖不同的物品來裝備您的車輛，從巴士喇叭到硝基和跳躍裝置！

嘗試擊敗傳奇設定或玩自由奔跑模式，您可以在整個關卡中瘋狂奔跑，而不會對您的車輛造成任何損壞。

摧毀一切阻礙你獲得高分的東西。有數以千計的可破壞物體，所以不要退縮！ 」

title_en: Crayon Shin-chan - Arashi wo Yobu Kasukabe Eiga Stars!
title_jp: Crayon Shin-chan - Arashi wo Yobu Kasukabe Eiga Stars!
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan - Arashi wo Yobu Kasukabe Eiga Stars! (Japan)

title_en: Crayon Shin-chan - Gekiatsu! Oden wa Rudo Dai Konran!!
title_jp: Crayon Shin-chan - Gekiatsu! Oden wa Rudo Dai Konran!!
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan - Gekiatsu! Oden wa Rudo Dai Konran!! (Japan)

title_en: Crayon Shin-chan - Uchuu de Achoo! - Yuujou no Oba-Karate!!
title_jp: Crayon Shin-chan - Uchuu de Achoo! - Yuujou no Oba-Karate!!
overview_en: When Kasukabe has been sent into space by a mysterious titan and three sisters, Shinnosuke, with the help of his sister Himawari, his dog Shiro and a karate master to bring the town back to earth and stop the masterminds behind it.
overview_zh: 當春日部被神秘泰坦和三姐妹送入太空時，新之助在妹妹向日葵、狗四郎和空手道大師的幫助下，將小鎮帶回地球並阻止其幕後主使。
no_intro_name: Crayon Shin-chan - Uchuu de Achoo! - Yuujou no Oba-Karate!! (Japan)

overview_en:
Build a tower higher and higher by stacking objects of all shapes and sizes together in any way you can. Balance telephone boxes, road cones, televisions, desks, chairs, curling stones - more than 100 in total - in a giant pile to reach the goal line. Build past mutant birds, hurricane winds and black holes sent by the evil Crash Construction Company as they try to bring your tower crashing down.

Pile household objects high enough to reach the goal line and hold it for three seconds without it collapsing to complete each floor. If your construction is too weak it'll topple over and come crashing to the ground.

Follow the story of the Haruno Construction company and their sky-high construction project to build a tower to the moon in the name of justice!
overview_zh:
以任何可能的方式將各種形狀和大小的物體堆疊在一起，建造越來越高的塔。平衡電話亭、路錐、電視、書桌、椅子、冰壺石（總共 100 多個），以到達終點線。當邪惡的 Crash Construction Company 試圖摧毀你的塔時，他們會派出變異鳥類、颶風和黑洞來建造建築。

將家用物品堆得足夠高，以到達球門線，並保持三秒鐘而不倒塌，以完成每一層。如果你的建築太弱，它就會傾倒並墜落到地面上。

跟隨春野建設公司和他們的天價建築專案的故事，以正義的名義建造一座通往月球的塔！

overview_en:
The Crosswords Plus game is chock full of puzzles to help you exercise your word power. The professionally designed crossword puzzles cover all difficulty levels-from Easy to Expert.

Discover fun ways to work your wordsmithing skills beyond typical crossword puzzles with epic Giant Crosswords, and other modes like Word of the Day, Wordsearch, and Anagrams. Download a constant flow of new puzzles via SpotPass at no additional charge, and share bonus puzzles with other players via StreetPass.
overview_zh: Crosswords Plus遊戲充滿了幫助您運用文字能力的謎題。專業設計的填字遊戲涵蓋從Easy到Expert的所有難度等級。 使用史詩巨型填字遊戲和其他模式（如每日詞、Wordsearch和Anagrams ） ，探索超越典型填字遊戲的有趣方法來運用你的詞彙技巧。透過SpotPass免費下載不斷流動的新謎題，並透過StreetPass與其他玩家分享額外謎題。

overview_en:
Introducing Cubic Ninja, the Nintendo 3DS title that lets you play without ever touching a button. Simply tilt and turn your Nintendo 3DS to solve challenging puzzles, outwit devious enemies, and escape intricate traps.

Cubic Ninja places you in the role of CC, a brave little ninja with a distinctly cubic shape. The princess of your beloved kingdom plus a few of your ninja friends -- has been abducted. And its up to you to save them. To do so, you must tilt and turn your way through over 100 eye-opening levels, defeating adversaries such as Woofbot, Scorchbot, and more. From gravity distortions to raging infernos to elemental forces of wind and water, your enemies will do whatever it takes to stop you.

But you wont be stopped. If you have to tumble till youre dizzy, or survive raging waters just to rescue the princess, then you will. Because youre Cubic Ninja. And thats how you roll.
overview_zh:
隆重介紹《Cubic Ninja》，這款 Nintendo 3DS 遊戲讓您無需觸控按鈕即可暢玩。只需傾斜並轉動您的 Nintendo 3DS 即可解決具有挑戰性的謎題、智取狡猾的敵人並逃離錯綜複雜的陷阱。

立方忍者讓你扮演CC的角色，一個勇敢的小忍者，有著明顯的立方體形狀。你心愛的王國的公主和你的一些忍者朋友 - 被綁架了。拯救他們就靠你了。為此，您必須透過 100 多個令人大開眼界的關卡，擊敗 Woofbot、Scorchbot 等對手。從重力扭曲到熊熊烈火，再到風和水的元素力量，你的敵人會不惜一切代價阻止你。

但你不會被阻止。如果你必須翻滾直到頭暈，或者為了拯救公主而在洶湧的海水中生存，那麼你會的。因為你是立方忍者。這就是你滾動的方式。

overview_en:
A hardcore platforming musical experience

Cubit The Hardcore Platformer Robot is an action-packed platform game, where music plays a very important role.

With only one button to jump, you must help Cubit to go from platform to platform, while you avoid obstacles and enemies through the different scenes of the game.

Perhaps you think this makes this game not difficult, right? Well, you are right; this game is not difficult... this game is Hardcore!

Choose the path you want to do in each game and reach each of the 3 endings available!!

Features:

Beware: This videogame has guest characters from other videogames.

3 different endings!

2 game modes: for all types of gamers, as well as Hardcore gamers.

A soundtrack that will send you back to the dance floor.

24 challenges to enrol.

A videogame fully created by just one person!

Will you reach the end?
overview_zh:
硬派平臺音樂體驗

Cubit The Hardcore Platformer Robot 是一款動作豐富的平臺遊戲，其中音樂扮演著非常重要的角色。

只需一鍵跳躍，你必須幫助 Cubit 從一個平臺走到另一個平臺，同時在遊戲的不同場景中躲避障礙物和敵人。

也許你認為這使得這個遊戲並不困難，對吧？嗯，你是對的；這個遊戲並不難...這個遊戲是Hardcore！

在每場遊戲中選擇你想要走的路，並達到 3 個可用結局中的每一個！

特點：

請注意：該影片遊戲有來自其他影片遊戲的客串角色。

3個不同的結局！

2 種遊戲模式：適合所有型別的遊戲玩家以及硬派遊戲玩家。

一段將您帶回舞池的配樂。

24 項挑戰等待報名。

一款完全由一個人製作的電玩遊戲！

你會到達終點嗎？

overview_en:
As the Culdcept series celebrates its 20th Anniversary, the addictive card-meets-board game is back, bigger and better than ever with hundreds of new cards, inventive boards, and exciting multiplayer gameplay! Follow Allen, a new recruit for the rebel Free Bat forces as you fight for freedom from the tyranny of Count Kraniss. Build your deck, create new strategies, and dominate the board in Culdcept Revolt! With all the classic elements veterans love yet a gentle learning curve for newcomers, Culdcept Revolt is the best Culdcept yet!

    Addictive Fantasy Gameplay - Jump into a match and lose yourself in a world of monsters, magic, and strategy as you navigate the board and summon monsters on your way to victory in this fast-paced, card-collecting fantasy!
    Near Endless Strategy - Collect over 400 unique cards and develop your skills as you test your deck on new boards with new conditions, or return to favorites to hone your strategies.
    Play Solo or Online - Discover the story of Culdcept with an engaging Quest mode, or practice with your decks in Solo Match. Once you’ve nailed down your strategies, challenge friends and strangers with up to 4-player Local Play or Online Play to discover new strategies, climb the leaderboards, and enjoy the excitement of unpredictable and fun matchups!
    Customize Your Experience - Make your gaming personal by developing a deck to fit your gameplay style, and choose the perfect avatar and deck to represent your playstyle and personality!
overview_zh:
在 Culdcept 系列慶祝其 20 週年之際，這款令人上癮的卡牌棋盤遊戲又回來了，而且比以往任何時候都更大、更好，擁有數百張新卡牌、創意棋盤和令人興奮的多人遊戲！跟隨艾倫，自由蝙蝠叛軍的新兵，為擺脫克蘭尼斯伯爵的暴政而戰，爭取自由。在 Culdcept Revolt 中組成你的牌組、制定新策略並稱霸棋盤！憑藉退伍軍人喜愛的所有經典元素，同時為新人提供溫和的學習曲線，Culdcept Revolt 是迄今為止最好的 Culdcept！

    令人上癮的奇幻遊戲 - 跳入一場比賽，迷失在怪物、魔法和策略的世界中，在這個快節奏的卡牌收集奇幻遊戲中，在棋盤上導航並召喚怪物，取得勝利！
    近乎無盡的策略 - 收集超過 400 張獨特的卡牌，並在新條件下的新棋盤上測試你的套牌時培養你的技能，或者返回收藏夾來磨練你的策略。
    單人或線上玩 - 透過引人入勝的任務模式探索 Culdcept 的故事，或在單人比賽中練習你的牌組。一旦你確定了你的策略，就可以透過最多 4 人的本地遊戲或線上遊戲挑戰朋友和陌生人，探索新策略，攀登排行榜，並享受不可預測的有趣對決的刺激！
    客製化您的體驗 - 透過開發適合您遊戲風格的牌組，讓您的遊戲變得個性化，並選擇完美的頭像和牌組來代表您的遊戲風格和個性！

overview_en:
Top Screen

On the top screen on the 3DS, it shows a 3D Om Nom (when playing Time Travel it will show two 3D Om Noms) that copies the 2D Om Nom on the bottom. When you get the candy to Om Nom it will also show the 3D Om Nom getting the candy.
Bottom Screen

On the bottom screen on the 3DS, it shows the actual gameplay. You use the stylus to cut the ropes, like how you cut them using your finger on the iOS version.
overview_zh:
頂部螢幕

在 3DS 的頂部螢幕上，它會顯示一個 3D Om Nom（玩《時間旅行》時會顯示兩個 3D Om Nom），它複製了底部的 2D Om Nom。當你把糖果交給 Om Nom 時，它也會顯示 3D Om Nom 得到了糖果。
底部螢幕

在 3DS 的底部螢幕上，它顯示了實際的遊戲玩法。你可以使用手寫筆來切割繩索，就像在 iOS 版本上用手指切割繩索一樣。

title_en: Dangerous Jiisan to 1000 nin no Otomodachi Ja
title_jp: Dangerous Jiisan to 1000 nin no Otomodachi Ja
no_intro_name: Dangerous Jiisan to 1000 nin no Otomodachi Ja (Japan)

overview_en: DEAD OR ALIVE Dimensions takes the vivacious characters and locales that have made the DOA franchise a hit with gamers everywhere and presents them in eye-popping 3D. All of the punches, kicks, counters and holds that have defined the series as a top-tier fighter are present for the first time on a portable gaming system - the Nintendo 3DS. DEAD OR ALIVE Dimensions features some of the best content from the series spanning all of the titles from the original DOA up to DOA 4.
overview_zh: 《DEAD OR ALIVE Dimensions》採用了 DOA 系列深受世界各地玩家歡迎的活潑角色和場景，並以令人瞠目結舌的 3D 方式呈現。將該系列定義為頂級格鬥遊戲的所有拳擊、踢腿、反擊和握持動作均首次出現在行動式遊戲系統 - 任天堂 3DS 上。 DEAD OR ALIVE Dimensions 收錄了該系列的一些最佳內容，涵蓋從最初的《DOA》到《DOA 4》的所有遊戲。

overview_en: DECA SPORTS, the hit sports compilation series that has over 4 million units sold through worldwide, is coming to the Nintendo 3DS with 10 complete 3D sporting events in DECA SPORTS EXTREME! Kick, shoot, and bounce your way to the top across all of the included events: Soccer, Tennis, Basketball, Ice Hockey, Bowling, Snowball Fight, Sumo Wrestling, Snowmobile Racing, Blowguns, and Trampoline! This all-new handheld version includes several features never seen before in a DECA SPORTS game, like power-ups & un-lockable equipment! Of course, as always, it still features multiplayer and customizable teams. With 10 sports entirely in 3D, DECA SPORTS EXTREME will take sports to a whole new dimension!
overview_zh: DECA SPORTS 是全球銷量超過 400 萬套的熱門體育合集系列，即將登陸 Nintendo 3DS，在 DECA SPORTS EXTREME 中提供 10 場完整的 3D 體育賽事！踢球、射門和彈跳，在所有包含的專案中登頂：足球、網球、籃球、冰球、保齡球、打雪仗、相撲、雪地摩托車賽車、吹氣槍和蹦床！這款全新手持版本包含 DECA SPORTS 遊戲中從未見過的多項功能，例如能量提升和可解鎖裝置！當然，一如既往，它仍然具有多人遊戲和可自訂團隊的特點。 DECA SPORTS EXTREME 擁有 10 項完全 3D 的運動，將把運動帶入一個全新的維度！

overview_en:
Bounce to the beat as the king of Dream Land!

Bounce to the beat as Kirby’s longtime rival in King Dedede’s rhythm action game! Jump on drums collecting coins and avoiding enemies while tapping buttons in sync with catchy Kirby tunes! This standalone deluxe game includes content not found in Kirby™: Triple Deluxe, including all-new stages, new obstacles and more!
overview_zh:
跟著節奏彈跳，成為夢想之地之王！

在 King Dedede 的節奏動作遊戲中，扮演卡比的長期對手，跟上節奏！跳上鼓收集硬幣並避開敵人，同時與朗朗上口的卡比音樂同步點選按鈕！這款獨立的豪華遊戲包含《星之卡比™：三重豪華》中沒有的內容，包括全新的關卡、新的障礙等等！

overview_en: "Go for the ultimate trophy! Deer Drive: Legends takes you to the far corners of the earth where you will go after wild animals rarely seen by the human eye, some even believed to be extinct! Captured in rich, 3D environments, these animals are both elusive and quick! Stalk different species of elk, deer, big cats and more in the most exciting and realistic game available for Nintendo 3DS!"
overview_zh: 「爭奪終極獎盃！Deer Drive: Legends 帶您前往地球的遙遠角落，在那裡您將追捕肉眼罕見的野生動物，有些甚至被認為已經滅絕！在豐富的 3D 環境中捕獲，這些動物既難以捉摸又敏捷！在任天堂 3DS 上最激動人心、最真實的遊戲中追蹤不同種類的麋鹿、麋鹿、大型貓科動物等！」

title_jp: 名探偵ピカチュウ (曖昧さ回避)
overview_en: As Tim Goodman, you will partner with a self-proclaimed "great detective" Pikachu to solve strange occurrences all over Ryme City. Together you must investigate, take notes, and meet up with other Pokémon to unravel the city's greatest mysteries. Tim is searching for his missing father in Ryme City, but instead encounters a witty, tough-talking Pikachu! Along the way, experience over 150 fun-filled animated cutscenes starring this unique Pikachu, providing helpful hints or talking up a storm. You can also tap the extra-large Detective Pikachu amiibo™ figure to access all cutscenes up until the current chapter played. As you investigate crime scenes, gather testimonies, uncover information, and interact with Pokémon to solve cases. You’ll have to put your detective skills to the test to foil the mastermind behind the disturbances in Ryme City. All in a day's work for detective Pikachu.
overview_zh: 身為提姆古德曼，你將與自稱「大偵探」的皮卡丘搭檔，解決萊姆市各地發生的奇怪事件。你們必須一起調查、記筆記並與其他神奇寶貝會面，以解開這座城市最大的謎團。提姆在萊姆市尋找失蹤的父親，卻遇見了機智、強硬的皮卡丘！一路上，體驗超過 150 個充滿樂趣的動畫過場動畫，由這只獨特的皮卡丘主演，提供有用的提示或引發風暴。您也可以點選超大名偵探皮卡丘 amiibo™ 人物來存取播放目前章節之前的所有過場動畫。當你調查犯罪現場、收集證詞、發現資訊並與神奇寶貝互動來偵破案件。你必須考驗你的偵探技巧，挫敗萊姆市騷亂的幕後黑手。這是偵探皮卡丘一天的工作。

title_zh: 女神異聞錄 惡魔倖存者

title_en: Die drei Fragezeichen Kids - Jagd auf das Phantom
no_intro_name: Die drei Fragezeichen Kids - Jagd auf das Phantom (Germany)

overview_en:
This is an updated version of the game, originally released on Sony PlayStation Portable. This version adds
a brand new Decode -campaign and bunch of new Digimon to collect, such as Veemon.
overview_zh:
這是遊戲的更新版本，最初在索尼 PlayStation Portable 上發布。這個版本增加了
全新的解碼活動和一堆新的數碼寶貝可供收集，例如 Veemon。

overview_en: Showdown in the post-apocalyptic frontier As a team, defend a post-apocalyptic wild west from an invasion of transforming rock monsters alongside your Mii character, Dillon the armadillo, and his squirrel engineer, Russ. Recruit hired gunners to back you up in battle, and then roll into fights and high-speed chases and take down waves of enemies as Dillonthe "Red Flash" himself! Eighty years ago, a cataclysmic event devastated the world. Holed up in "The City" and outlying frontier towns, no survivor is safe now that a mysterious ship has unleashed an army of supercharged monsters. So, prepare for battle: gather resources by helping local businesses and winning races. Then stock up, man the towers, and strengthen barricades to protect each village's livestock! Discover new strategies to take out over 30 different types of enemies: some swim, some dig, some are electrified, poisonous, armoredeven flying. Monsters transform into wheeled forms, racing into action-packed, high-speed chases!
overview_zh: 後世界末日邊境的對決作為一個團隊，與你的 Mii 角色犰狳狄龍和他的松鼠工程師魯斯一起，保衛後世界末日的狂野西部免受變形岩石怪物的入侵。新兵僱傭槍手在戰鬥中為你提供支援，然後像「紅色閃電」狄龍一樣投入戰鬥和高速追逐，擊倒一波又一波的敵人！八十年前，一場災難性事件摧毀了世界。一艘神秘的船釋放了一支強大的怪物大軍，躲藏在「城市」和邊遠邊境城鎮的倖存者無一倖免。因此，做好戰鬥準備：透過幫助當地企業和贏得比賽來收集資源。然後儲備物資，守衛塔樓，加固路障來保護每個村莊的牲畜！探索新策略來消滅 30 多種不同型別的敵人：有些是游泳的，有些是挖掘的，有些是帶電的、有毒的、裝甲的，甚至是飛行的。怪物變身為輪子，展開充滿動感的高速追逐！

title_en: Disney 2-Pack - Frozen - Olaf's Quest + Big Hero 6 - Battle in the Bay
no_intro_name: Disney 2-Pack - Frozen - Olaf's Quest + Big Hero 6 - Battle in the Bay (USA)

title_en: Disney Anna to Yuki no Joou - Olaf no Okurimono
title_jp: Disney Anna to Yuki no Joou - Olaf no Okurimono
no_intro_name: Disney Anna to Yuki no Joou - Olaf no Okurimono (Japan)

overview_en:
"Master the art of drawing beloved Disney and Pixar characters!

Step-by-step lessons can teach anyone how to draw.

Add some magic to your art! The Magic Brush makes it easy to add patterns, such as sparkles or stars, to any work of art.

Go from amateur to expert with over 80 characters to draw!"
overview_zh:
「掌握繪製深受喜愛的迪士尼和皮克斯角色的藝術！

分步課程可以教任何人如何繪畫。

為您的藝術增添一些魔力！魔法畫筆可以輕鬆地在任何藝術作品中新增圖案，例如閃光或星星。

從業餘愛好者到專家，有超過 80 個角色可供繪製！ 」

title_en: Disney Epic Mickey - Mickey no Fushigi na Bouken
title_jp: Disney Epic Mickey - Mickey no Fushigi na Bouken
no_intro_name: Disney Epic Mickey - Mickey no Fushigi na Bouken (Japan)

title_en: Disney Epic Mickey - Power of Illusion
title_jp: ディズニー エピックミッキー 〜ミッキーマウスと魔法の筆〜
no_intro_name: Disney Epic Mickey - Power of Illusion (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt)

overview_en:
Every day is a snow day with Disney Frozen: Olaf's Quest, the new, puzzle platformer video game based on the animated movie of the same name from Walt Disney Animation Studios and Walt Disney Pictures! Following the events of the film this original adventure throws the focus to Olaf, the happy-go-lucky snowman, as he tries to hold himself together through all the perilous situations he stumbles into.

An Icy (and Dicey) Adventure - Players must guide Olaf across 60 imaginative levels inspired by the mythical kingdom of Arendelle, navigating stimulating but accessible challenges, icy hazards and encountering mischievous natives while discovering hidden collectibles and unlockable accessories along the way.
overview_zh:
《迪士尼冰雪奇緣：奧拉夫的任務》每天都是下雪天，這款全新益智平臺遊戲基於華特迪士尼動畫工作室和華特迪士尼影業的同名動畫電影！繼電影中的事件之後，這段原創冒險將焦點轉移到了無憂無慮的雪人奧拉夫身上，他試圖在遇到的所有危險情況中保持鎮定。

冰冷（和冒險）冒險 - 玩家必須引導奧拉夫跨越 60 個富有想像力的關卡（其靈感源自阿倫黛爾神話王國），應對刺激但容易上手的挑戰、冰冷危險並遇到頑皮的當地人，同時沿途發現隱藏的收藏品和可解鎖的配件。

overview_en: Disney Infinity: Toy Box Challenge is a 3DS game where you can compete in your own Toy Box game board! Race, jump, climb or shoot -- test our your skills in over 50 mini-games!
overview_zh: Disney Infinity: Toy Box Challenge 是一款 3DS 遊戲，您可以在自己的 Toy Box 遊戲板上進行比賽！競賽、跳躍、攀爬或射擊—在 50 多個迷你遊戲中測試您的技能！

title_en: Disney Magic Castle - My Happy Life
title_jp: Disney Magic Castle - My Happy Life
no_intro_name: Disney Magic Castle - My Happy Life (Japan)

title_en: Disney Magic Castle - My Happy Life 2
title_jp: Disney Magic Castle - My Happy Life 2
no_intro_name: Disney Magic Castle - My Happy Life 2 (Japan)

overview_en: Disney Magical World features dozens of Disney characters in a variety of Disney-themed worlds. Players can customize their characters with hundreds of Disney-themed outfits and accessories, all while managing a café, planting crops and collecting Disney character cards. Players help different characters solve problems or find missing items.
overview_zh: 迪士尼魔法世界在各種迪士尼主題世界中擁有數十名迪士尼角色。玩家可以使用數百種迪士尼主題的服裝和配件來自訂自己的角色，同時管理咖啡館、種植農作物和收集迪士尼角色卡。玩家幫助不同的角色解決問題或找到遺失的物品。

overview_en:
"Live your dream life in Disney Magical World 2 alongside fan-favorite Disney characters! Adventure with Elsa and Olaf from Disney Frozen, dance with Disney Princesses, soar with Mickey in Magical Dream parades, and more, while snapping photos to share your memories. The magic is in your hands, so use your wand to solve a ghostly mystery along the way!

Explore six different Disney-themed worlds from classics like Disney Frozen, Disney The Little Mermaid, and Walt Disney Lilo & Stitch. You can harvest a field with Winnie the Pooh, fish with Donald Duck, mine with the Seven Dwarves, explore ghost-filled dungeons for treasures, and more! On your journey, youll discover the magical town of Castleton, where youll live amongst classic Disney characters. Shop with Daisy, Minnie, and others to build and buy hundreds of Disney-themed items. You can customize amazing outfits and even decorate your dream home and Cafe. Ready to make a memory? Then dance at the Enchanted Ball or throw a Cafe Party with your new Disney friends!

Live the life of your dreams on an adventure in the world of beloved Disney characters
Discover more than 100 Disney characters!
Explore 6 connected Disney-themed worlds from classics like Disney Frozen, Disney The Little Mermaid, and Walt Disney Lilo & Stitch
Snap photos anytime to collect and share memories of your Disney life and adventure!
Harvest a field with Winnie the Pooh, explore ghost filled dungeons for treasures, fish with Donald Duck, mine with the Seven Dwarves, and more to find materials to create thousands of amazing items!

Invite Disney Princesses to the Enchanted Ball and dance with them

Experience Magical Dreamsspecial parade-like Disney-inspired events

Customize your look from hundreds of Disney-themed outfits

Decorate your dream home and Cafe with hundreds of different items and furniture

Invite Disney friends to be part of your Cafe Party dance shows

Celebrate birthdays and seasonal events with your Disney friends"
overview_zh:
「在迪士尼魔法世界 2 中與粉絲最喜歡的迪士尼角色一起過上你的夢想生活！與迪士尼《冰雪奇緣》中的艾莎和奧拉夫一起冒險，與迪士尼公主一起跳舞，在魔法夢幻遊行中與米奇一起翱翔等等，同時拍照分享你的回憶。魔法就在你手中，所以一路上用你的魔杖解開一個幽靈之謎吧！

探索迪士尼《冰雪奇緣》、《迪士尼小美人魚》和《華特迪士尼星際寶貝》等經典作品中的六個不同迪士尼主題世界。您可以與小熊維尼一起收割田地，與唐老鴨一起釣魚，與七個小矮人一起採礦，探索充滿幽靈的地牢尋找寶藏等等！在您的旅程中，您將發現神奇的卡斯爾頓小鎮，在那裡您將與經典的迪士尼人物一起生活。與黛西、米妮和其他人一起購物，拼搭和購買數百件迪士尼主題物品。您可以訂製令人驚嘆的服裝，甚至裝飾您夢想的家和咖啡館。準備好留下回憶了嗎？然後在魔法舞會上跳舞或與您的新迪士尼朋友一起舉辦咖啡館派對！

在深受喜愛的迪士尼角色的世界中冒險，過著夢想的生活
發現 100 多個迪士尼角色！
探索迪士尼《冰雪奇緣》、迪士尼《小美人魚》和華特迪士尼《星際寶貝》等經典作品中的 6 個相互關聯的迪士尼主題世界
隨時拍攝照片，收集和分享您的迪士尼生活和冒險回憶！
與小熊維尼一起收割田地，探索充滿幽靈的地牢尋找寶藏，與唐老鴨一起釣魚，與七個小矮人一起採礦等等，尋找材料來創造數千件令人驚嘆的物品！

邀請迪士尼公主參加魔法舞會並與她們共舞

體驗神奇的夢想類似迪士尼主題的特別遊行活動

從數百種迪士尼主題服裝中訂製您的造型

用數百種不同的物品和傢俱裝飾您夢想的家和咖啡館

邀請迪士尼朋友參加您的咖啡館派對舞蹈表演

與您的迪士尼朋友一起慶祝生日和季節性活動”

overview_en:
At a Glance
Play as one of six cast of characters from the film
Travel through six breathtaking environments inspired by the movie
Go on over 40 challenges and missions, including racing missions
Try three exciting modes of play: Story, Challenge and Balloon Popping
Take on over 40 challenges and missions
overview_zh:
概覽
扮演電影中六名角色之一
穿越六個受電影啟發的令人驚嘆的環境
完成 40 多項挑戰和任務，包括賽車任務
嘗試三種令人興奮的遊戲模式：故事、挑戰和氣球爆破
接受 40 多項挑戰和任務

overview_en:
Description
In the new video game Disney Planes Fire & Rescue, It's once again fire season in Piston Peak Park! Due to all the emergency calls, this job is just too big for one crew member to handle. You will need to work as a team to keep the park safe for all of the visitors, hikers and wildlife. Dusty and his elite firefighter friends need your help to fight these raging wildfires as they're radioed in by scooping up water, hoisting up boulders, calling in the smoke jumpers to bulldoze debris! Disney and Little Orbit have teamed up to create "Disney Planes Fire & Rescue" where kids can play will be able to switch between 8 different firefighting or rescue characters to save Piston Park! Master your skills in 30 different Training Academy missions to help protect the park and keep it safe for everyone! Respond to 12 different emergency calls to earn your wings and save the day!
overview_zh:
描述
在新電玩遊戲《迪士尼飛機消防救援》中，活塞峰公園再次迎來火災季節！由於所有緊急呼叫，這項工作對於一名機組人員來說太大了，無法處理。您需要團隊合作，確保公園對所有遊客、徒步旅行者和野生動物的安全。達斯蒂和他的精英消防隊員朋友需要你的幫助來撲滅這些肆虐的野火，因為他們透過無線電舀水、舉起巨石、呼叫消防員來推平廢墟！迪士尼和 Little Orbit 聯手打造了“迪士尼飛機消防與救援”，孩子們可以在遊戲中切換 8 個不同的消防或救援角色來拯救活塞公園！在 30 個不同的訓練學院任務中掌握技能，幫助保護公園並確保每個人的安全！回應 12 個不同的緊急呼叫，贏得翅膀並拯救世界！
genre_raw: Action / Racing / Life Simulation / Flight Simulator

overview_en: In "Disney Princess: My Fairytale Adventure," players will enter the enchanting worlds of Cinderella, Rapunzel, Ariel, Belle and Tiana, and use their magic wand to help undo a spell that's been cast over the kingdoms. Fans of all ages will be able to play as an apprentice to the Fairy Godmother and explore each of the Princess worlds. They'll be able to interact with familiar characters, such as Lumiere, Pascal, Flounder, Gus and other fan favorites who will help guide them through missions and progress though the game.
overview_zh: 在《迪士尼公主：我的童話冒險》中，玩家將進入灰姑娘、長髮公主、愛麗兒、貝兒和蒂安娜的迷人世界，並使用魔杖幫助解除王國上的咒語。所有年齡層的粉絲都可以扮演仙女教母的學徒，探索每個公主世界。他們將能夠與熟悉的角色互動，例如盧米埃爾、帕斯卡、比目魚、格斯和其他粉絲最喜愛的角色，這些角色將幫助指導他們完成任務並在遊戲中取得進展。

title_en: Doctor Lautrec and the Forgotten Knights
title_jp: ドクターロートレックと忘却の騎士団
overview_en: Enter 19th century Europe and the world of Doctor Jean-Pierre Lautrec. He's a brilliant, eccentric, sarcastic professor with few friends but a healthy obsession for solving mysteries. One day, a woman named Marie visits Lautrec bearing a curious gadget. The mysterious map that the gadget displayed seemed to point the way to a fantastic hidden treasure belonging to Louis XIV of the House of Bourbon, a dynasty that had collapsed a century earlier. As they search for the treasure, they find themselves targeted by a mysterious man named Vidocq. They are blocked at every turn by the Knights of the Iron Mask, a mysterious group of men with iron masks and claws. Work as Doctor Lautrec, aided by his perky and emotional sidekick Sophie, to unlock the mysteries within and search for the lost treasure of Louis XIV. Search for clues, solve puzzles to unlock new mysteries and gain more information as the quest continues. The story is told in both 2D and uses the power of the Nintendo 3DS in 3D to enhance game play giving gamers the ability to look around for clues like they're in the game. Immerse yourself in the world of Doctor Lautrec where mystery and adventure can be found around every corner.
overview_zh: 進入 19 世紀的歐洲和 Jean-Pierre Lautrec 博士的世界。他是一位才華洋溢、古怪、愛諷刺的教授，朋友很少，但對解開謎團有著濃厚的執著。有一天，一位名叫瑪莉的女士帶著一件奇怪的小玩意拜訪了勞特累克。這個小工具顯示的神秘地圖似乎指出了通往波旁王朝路易十四的神奇寶藏的道路，這個王朝在一個世紀前就崩潰了。當他們尋找寶藏時，他們發現自己成為了一個名叫維多克的神秘人的目標。他們每次都遭到鐵面騎士團的阻擊，這是一群帶著鐵面和利爪的神秘男子。飾演勞特累克博士，在活潑而情緒化的夥伴蘇菲的幫助下，解開其中的謎團，尋找路易十四失落的寶藏。隨著任務的繼續，尋找線索、解決謎題以解開新的謎團並獲得更多資訊。故事以 2D 方式講述，並利用 Nintendo 3DS 的 3D 功能來增強遊戲玩法，讓玩家能夠像在遊戲中一樣四處尋找線索。沉浸在勞特累克博士的世界中，每個角落都充滿神秘和冒險。
no_intro_name: Doctor Lautrec and the Forgotten Knights (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

overview_en:
Go ape with the swingin' king of the jungle! Donkey Kong and his simian sidekick Diddy Kong are back for more action-packed platforming antics in Donkey Kong Country Returns 3D, an enhanced version of Wii adventure Donkey Kong Country Returns, only on Nintendo 3DS and Nintendo 3DS XL!

Australian Classification: G
overview_zh:
與搖擺的叢林之王一起變猿吧！大金剛和他的猿猴搭檔 Diddy Kong 回歸，在《Donkey Kong Country Returns 3D》中帶來更多動感十足的平臺滑稽動作，這是 Wii 冒險遊戲《Donkey Kong Country Returns》的增強版，僅在 Nintendo 3DS 和 Nintendo 3DS XL 上推出！

澳洲分類：G

overview_en: "Take the "adventure of a lifetime" with Doodle Jump Adventures on the Nintendo 3DS with exclusive new content. Journey up, up, up a sheet of graph paper, picking up jet packs, avoiding black holes, and blasting baddies with nose balls along the way. Visit cool locations in the jungle, space, and ninja worlds This game is INSANELY addictive with diabolical boss levels in each world As an added twist, there are collectibles placed throughout the levels to give you another reason to push the Doodler a little higher. Simple controls and great new locations make this game hard to put down."
overview_zh: “在任天堂 3DS 上的《塗鴉跳躍冒險》中享受“一生難忘的冒險”，並提供獨家新內容。一路向上、向上、拿起一張方格紙、拿起噴氣揹包、躲避黑洞，並用鼻球炸毀沿途的壞人。參觀叢林、太空和忍者世界中的酷炫地點。這款遊戲在每個世界中都有惡魔般的亮點關卡，讓人著迷Doodler 推向更高水平的另一個原因是，簡單的控制和出色的新地點讓這款遊戲難以放下。

overview_en:
The movie "Doraemon: Nobita and the Island of Miracles ~Animal Adventure~" is now available as an adventure game! Let's go on an adventure with Doraemon!

Take pictures of extinct animals and insects with a virtual camera that uses the gyro sensor of the Nintendo 3DS. There are a total of 132 kinds of animals you can meet!

As the story progresses, you will be able to play 7 kinds of mini-games using your voice and touch pen. If you use StreetPass, you can exchange beetle bugs with your friends.
overview_zh:
電影《哆啦A夢：大雄與奇蹟之島～動物大冒險～》冒險遊戲登場！和哆啦A夢一起去冒險吧！

使用使用 Nintendo 3DS 陀螺儀感應器的虛擬相機拍攝已滅絕的動物和昆蟲的照片。總共有132種動物可供您遇見！

隨著故事的進展，您將可以使用語音和觸控筆玩 7 種小遊戲。如果您使用 StreetPass，您可以與朋友交換甲蟲。

title_en: Doubutsu no Mori - Happy Home Designer
title_jp: Doubutsu no Mori - Happy Home Designer
no_intro_name: Doubutsu no Mori - Happy Home Designer (Japan)

overview_en:
Big Trouble in River City!

Mystery is afoot once again for Kunio and his River City pals! One night, Kunio is attacked by two mysterious individuals. On top of that, Riki's girlfriend has disappeared, and it's up to Kunio to find out the truth! Kunio has just 3 days to unravel the mystery, and he'll need your help to take down all who stand in his way!

Different Story Paths and Different Endings!
Bonus Double Dragon Fighting Game Included!
2 Player Local Co-Op Play! Grab a friend and team up together!
overview_zh:
河城大麻煩！

國夫和他的河城夥伴們的謎團再次上演！一天晚上，國夫遭到兩個神秘人的攻擊。最重要的是，Riki 的女朋友失蹤了，國男必須找出真相！國夫只有 3 天的時間來解開這個謎團，他需要你的幫助來消滅所有阻擋他的人！

不同的故事路徑和不同的結局！
附贈雙龍格鬥遊戲！
2 人本地合作遊戲！找個朋友一起組隊吧！

title_en: Downtown no Gaki no Tsukai ya Arahen de!! Zettai ni Tsukamatteha Ikenai Gasu Kurobikari Land
title_jp: Downtown no Gaki no Tsukai ya Arahen de!! Zettai ni Tsukamatteha Ikenai Gasu Kurobikari Land
no_intro_name: Downtown no Gaki no Tsukai ya Arahen de!! Zettai ni Tsukamatteha Ikenai Gasu Kurobikari Land (Japan)

title_en: Dr. Kawashima's Devilish Brain Training - Can You Stay Focused
overview_en:
Dr. Kawashima's Devilish Brain Training: Can You Stay Focused?, is an educational puzzle video game developed and published by Nintendo. It is the fourth major entry in the Brain Age series and the first made specifically for the Nintendo 3DS.  Dr. Kawashima presents the game's purpose as being to counter prevalent subpar concentration skills onset by social media and other aspects of modern life.

Brain Age: Concentration Training features a selection of activities and minigames that are designed to stimulate and improve the player's concentration and working memory interspersed with brief lectures by Dr. Kawashima. Improvements to mental strength supposedly happen as the player advances to levels of higher challenge reflective of the player's current concentration subskill. 
 Amidst training activities, Dr. Kawashima mentors the player.
overview_zh:
川島博士的惡魔腦訓練：你能保持專注嗎？ ，是一款由任天堂開發發行的教育益智電玩遊戲。這是 Brain Age 系列的第四款主要作品，也是第一款專為 Nintendo 3DS 製作的遊戲。  川島博士表示，這款遊戲的目的是應對社群媒體和現代生活其他方面普遍存在的注意力不集中問題。

《大腦時代：專注力訓練》包含一系列旨在刺激和提高玩家注意力和工作記憶的活動和小遊戲，其中穿插著川島博士的簡短講座。據推測，當玩家提升到更高的挑戰等級時，精神力量就會提高，這反映了玩家目前的專注技能。 
 在訓練活動中，川島博士對選手進行指導。
no_intro_name: Dr. Kawashima's Devilish Brain Training - Can You Stay Focused (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl) (Rev 1)

overview_en: Dr. Mario: Miracle Cure is a falling block tile-matching video game and offers five distinct game modes with the option to use power-ups in each mode. The first mode, "Dr. Mario", is played using the traditional rules of the Dr. Mario series. In "Dr. Luigi", two different capsules joined together to create L-shaped configurations are dropped into the playing field at a time (The same mechanic was used in the "Operation L" mode of the video game of the same name). Both of these modes are each available in single player and competitive multiplayer modes. "Virus Buster", a game mode that was featured in Dr. Mario Online Rx and Dr. Luigi, is played by holding the Nintendo 3DS vertically and using the touchscreen to drag the capsules via a drag and drop interface. There is also an online mode that utilizes the Nintendo Network service. Finally, there is the debuting "Miracle Cure Laboratory" mode, which features a number of set challenges to complete.
overview_zh: 《瑪利歐博士：奇蹟療癒》是一款下落塊方塊匹配電玩遊戲，提供五種不同的遊戲模式，並且可以選擇在每種模式下使用強化道具。第一個模式「馬裡奧博士」是使用馬裡奧博士系列的傳統規則進行的。在《路易吉博士》中，兩個不同的膠囊連線在一起形成 L 形結構，一次被扔進比賽場地（在同名影片遊戲的“L 行動”模式中使用了相同的機制）。這兩種模式都可以在單人遊戲和競爭性多人遊戲模式中使用。 「病毒剋星」是《瑪利歐博士 Online Rx》和《路易吉博士》中的一種遊戲模式，透過垂直握住任天堂 3DS 並使用觸控螢幕透過拖放介面拖曳膠囊來玩。還有一種利用任天堂網路服務的線上模式。最後，還有首次亮相的「奇蹟治癒實驗室」模式，其中包含許多需要完成的挑戰。

overview_en:
"Power Up for Maximum Fusion!

Dragon Ball Fusions is the latest Dragon Ball experience for Nintendo 3DS! Its an RPG action game that combines fighting, customization, and collection elements to bring Dragon Ball to the next level. In this new world, players will discover powerful items, find warriors who can become their allies, and build teams to bring into battle to see who the best fighters are.

* Create your own avatar and participate in a totally new experience in the Dragon Ball universe.
* Fly to the Dragon Ball flying island to progress through the story and discover new missions.
* Gather the strongest fighters to fuse them together and get powerful new characters; hundreds of different combinations are possible.
* The gameplay is based on a "Rock-Scissors-Paper" RPG system getting deeper the more you progress into the story.
* Take pictures with your friends and fuse into a Dragon Ball character."
overview_zh:
「加強力量以達到最大程度的融合！

Dragon Ball Fusions 是任天堂 3DS 的最新七龍珠體驗！它是一款結合了戰鬥、自訂和收集元素的 RPG 動作遊戲，將《七龍珠》提升到了一個新的水平。在這個新世界中，玩家將發現強大的物品，尋找可以成為盟友的戰士，並組成團隊參加戰鬥，看看誰是最好的戰士。

* 創造自己的化身並參與七龍珠宇宙的全新體驗。
* 飛往七龍珠飛行島，推進故事情節並發現新任務。
* 聚集最強大的戰士，將他們融合在一起，獲得強大的新角色；數百種不同的組合是可能的。
* 遊戲玩法基於「石頭剪刀布」的角色扮演遊戲系統，故事進展越深入，遊戲就越深入。
* 與朋友合照並融入七龍珠角色。 」

overview_en: Dragon Ball Heroes: Ultimate Mission (ドラゴンボール ヒーローズ アルティメットミッション Doragon Bōru Hīrōzu Arutimetto Missyon) is a card-based fighting game that is a portable-port of the arcade game Dragon Ball Heroes. It was released in Japan for the Nintendo 3DS handheld gaming console on February 28, 2013.
overview_zh: 《七龍珠英雄：終極使命》（ドラゴンボールヒーローズ arutiメットミッション Doragon Bōru Hīrō HzuAzuo​​yy鏈 A分析機版的遊戲版主機版：遊戲版：遊戲版：遊戲版：遊戲版的遊戲機版：一款遊戲機版的遊戲機版型遊戲機版的遊戲機版型遊戲機。該遊戲於 2013 年 2 月 28 日在日本發布，適用於任天堂 3DS 手持遊戲機。

overview_en: Dragon Ball Heroes: Ultimate Mission 2 (ドラゴンボール ヒーローズ アルティメットミッション２ Doragon Bōru Hīrōzu Arutimetto Missyon Tsū) is a card-based fighting game that is a portable-port of the arcade game Dragon Ball Heroes, and the sequel to Dragon Ball Heroes: Ultimate Mission. The game was released in Japan for the Nintendo 3DS handheld gaming console on August 7, 2014. Its sequel, Dragon Ball Heroes: Ultimate Mission X, was released in 2017.
overview_zh: 《七龍珠英雄：終極使命 2》（ドラゴンボールヒーローズ arutetiメットミッション２ DorBōruōruaミッショagonン２ DorBōru. Tsū）是一款卡牌格鬥遊戲，是街機遊戲《七龍珠英雄》的隨身移植版，也是《七龍珠英雄：終極使命》的續作。該遊戲於 2014 年 8 月 7 日在日本對任天堂 3DS 掌上型遊戲機發售。其續作《七龍珠英雄：終極使命 X》於 2017 年發行。

title_en: Dragon Ball Heroes - Ultimate Mission X
title_jp: Dragon Ball Heroes - Ultimate Mission X
overview_en: Dragon Ball Heroes: Ultimate Mission X (ドラゴンボールヒーローズ アルティメットミッションＸ Doragon Bōru Hīrōzu Arutimetto Misshon Ekkusu) is a card-based fighting game that is a portable-port of Dragon Ball Heroes. It was released in Japan for the Nintendo 3DS handheld gaming console on April 27, 2017.
overview_zh: 《七龍珠英雄：終極任務 X》（ドラゴンボールヒーローズ arutiiメttoミsショns Doragon Bōru Hīrōzu Arutimetto Misshon Eckku）是一款牌龍格鬥版的卡龍格鬥版。它於 2017 年 4 月 27 日在日本針對任天堂 3DS 手持遊戲機發布。
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Heroes - Ultimate Mission X (Japan)

title_jp: ドラゴンボールZ 超究極武闘伝
overview_en:
Dragon Ball Z: Extreme Butōden (ドラゴンボールZ 超究極武闘伝, Doragon Bōru Z Chō Kyūkyoku Butōden, lit. "Dragon Ball Z Super Ultimate Fighter") is an fighting game released on the Nintendo 3DS.

The game was first announced on the April issue of Shueisha's magazine on Saturday that the 2D fighting game will arrive on the 3DS this summer.

The game features over 100 fighters in both one-on-one and team battles. It will have a story mode where you go through sagas as either the heros or villains. A demo has been released for Japanese 3DS's with the help of a code. In the demo you can play as Goku, Vegeta, Teen Gohan, and Buu. You can play on 5 stages.

It was released on June 11, 2015 in Japan. On June 9, 2015, two days before the Japanese release, there were reports that the game was classified on June 4th, on the Australian ratings board, which hinted the localization of the game. It was confirmed by Bandai Namco on June 23 that the game will be released in the West in mid to late October.
overview_zh:
《七龍珠Z：Extreme Butōden》（ドラゴンボールZ超究極武閔伝，Doragon Bōru Z Chō Kyūkyoku Butōden，字面意思「七龍珠Z超級終極戰士」）是任天堂3DS上發布的格鬥遊戲。

該遊戲於週六的集英社雜誌四月號上首次宣佈，這款2D格鬥遊戲將於今年夏天登陸3DS。

該遊戲有超過 100 名戰士進行一對一和團隊戰鬥。它將有一個故事模式，你可以作為英雄或惡棍經歷傳奇。在程式碼的幫助下，日本 3DS 的試用版已經發布。在演示中，您可以扮演悟空、貝吉塔、少年悟飯和佈歐。您可以在 5 個階段進行遊戲。

該片於2015年6月11日在日本上映。 2015年6月9日，即日本發行前兩天，有報道稱該遊戲於6月4日在澳大利亞分級委員會進行分級，這暗示了該遊戲的本地化。萬代南夢宮6月23日確認，遊戲將於10月中下旬在西方發售。

overview_en:
Dragon Quest Monsters: Joker 3 (ドラゴンクエストモンスターズ ジョーカー3) is a Nintendo 3DS console role-playing game published by Square Enix. It was released in Japan on the 24th March 2016. It was not localised for English-speaking audiences, but a fan-translation for Professional is avaliable online.

Joker 3's gameplay follows after the previous two entries in the franchise, with players exploring the Break World and its component parts, creating a team of monsters that will eventually unravel the mystery behind the protagonist. This entry marks the first game in the Joker series to contain platforming elements, as well as a fourth monster slot, monster riding, and more. With over five hundred monsters to collect, DQMJ3 has one of the most diverse monster sets of any Dragon Quest Monsters game.
overview_zh:
《勇者鬥惡龍怪獸：小丑 3》（ドラゴンクエストモンスターズ ジョーカー3）是史克威爾艾尼克斯角色發行的 3DS 任天堂角色。它於 2016 年 3 月 24 日在日本發行。它沒有針對英語觀眾進行在地化，但可以在網路上找到 Professional 的粉絲翻譯。

《小丑 3》的遊戲玩法延續了該系列的前兩部作品，玩家探索破碎世界及其組成部分，創造一支怪物團隊，最終揭開主角背後的謎團。作品標誌著《小丑》系列中第一款包含平臺元素的遊戲，以及第四個怪物老虎機、怪物騎乘等。 DQMJ3 擁有超過 500 種怪物可供收集，是《勇者鬥惡龍》怪物遊戲中怪物組最多樣化的之一。

overview_en:
Dragon Quest Monsters: Joker 3 (ドラゴンクエストモンスターズ ジョーカー3) is a 2016 Nintendo 3DS console role-playing game published by Square Enix in Japan. As of now, the game has not been localized for the west. It is the sequel to 2010's Dragon Quest Monsters: Joker 2.

Like with Joker 2, a revamped version of the game titled Dragon Quest Monsters: Joker 3 Professional was released on February 7th, 2017 in Japan with new monsters and characters returning from the first two games in the series.
overview_zh:
《勇者鬥惡龍怪獸：小丑 3》（ドラゴンクエストモンスターズ ジョーカー3）是由 Square Enix 在日本發行的主機遊戲 2016 年。截至目前，該遊戲尚未針對西方進行在地化。這是 2010 年《勇者鬥惡龍怪獸：小丑 2》的續作。

與《小丑 2》一樣，遊戲的改版名為《勇者鬥惡龍怪獸：小丑 3 Professional》於 2017 年 2 月 7 日在日本發行，其中包含該系列前兩部遊戲中的新怪獸和角色。

title_en: Dragon Quest Monsters - Terry no Wonderland 3D
title_jp: Dragon Quest Monsters - Terry no Wonderland 3D
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍怪獸篇 特瑞仙境
overview_en: Dragon Quest Monsters: Terry's Wonderland 3D (ドラゴンクエストモンスターズ テリーのワンダーランド3D) - is the Nintendo 3DS 2012 remake of the 1999 Dragon Quest Monsters. Just as in the original before it, it stars a young Terry from Dragon Quest VI as the hero. While it was never released outside of Japan, it has a fan translation available online.
overview_zh: 《勇者鬥惡龍怪獸：特里的仙境 3D》（ドラゴンクエストモンスターズ ンリースリモンスターズ テリーのワン龍ダーヂ2012 重製版。與之前的原作一樣，主角是《勇者鬥惡龍 VI》中的年輕特里。雖然它從未在日本以外的地區發行，但網路上有粉絲翻譯。
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters - Terry no Wonderland 3D (Japan)

title_en: Dragon Quest Monsters 2 - Iru to Ruka no Fushigi na Fushigi na Kagi
title_jp: Dragon Quest Monsters 2 - Iru to Ruka no Fushigi na Fushigi na Kagi
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍怪獸篇2 瑪魯塔的不可思議鑰匙

title_en: Dragon Quest VII - Eden no Senshi-tachi
title_jp: Dragon Quest VII - Eden no Senshi-tachi
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍VII 伊甸的戰士們
