title_en: Dragon Quest VII - Fragments of the Forgotten Past
title_jp: ドラゴンクエストVII エデンの戦士たち
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍VII 伊甸的戰士們
overview_en: Travel to the past to save the present in this classic Dragon Quest adventure that has been completely remade from the ground up for Nintendo 3DS. The world has been rebuilt, the characters have new 3D models and the story has been completely re-localized. Even customize your party with over 30 classes and rank up in turn-based battles to learn new spells and abilities.
overview_zh: 在這款經典勇者鬥惡龍冒險遊戲中穿越到過去拯救現在，該冒險遊戲已針對 Nintendo 3DS 進行了徹底重製。世界已經重建，角色有了新的 3D 模型，故事也完全重新在地化。甚至可以用 30 多個類別來定製您的隊伍，並在回合製戰鬥中升級以學習新的咒語和能力。
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest VII - Fragments of the Forgotten Past (USA)

title_en: Dragon Quest VIII - Journey of the Cursed King
title_jp: ドラゴンクエストVIII 空と海と大地と呪われし姫君
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍VIII 天空、碧海、大地與被詛咒的公主
overview_en: "The most selling Dragon Quest game on the PS2 now makes its debut on the Nintendo 3DS. You can play as a young guardsman who must fight against a curse that he is mysteriously immune to. Characters in the game are designed by the creator of the Dragonball characters and are cel-shaded to provide an "anime" feel. The game is set in a large 3D world ravaged by the effects of the curse."
overview_zh: 「PS2 上最暢銷的《勇者鬥惡龍》遊戲現已在任天堂 3DS 上首次亮相。你可以扮演一名年輕的守衛，必須與他神秘免疫的詛咒作鬥爭。遊戲中的角色由《龍珠》角色的創作者設計，並採用卡通著色以提供「動漫」感覺。遊戲設定在一個被詛咒影響蹂躪的大型 3D 世界中蹂躪。
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest VIII - Journey of the Cursed King (USA)

title_en: Dragon Quest VIII - Sora to Umi to Daichi to Norowareshi Himegimi
title_jp: Dragon Quest VIII - Sora to Umi to Daichi to Norowareshi Himegimi
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍VIII 天空、碧海、大地與被詛咒的公主
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest VIII - Sora to Umi to Daichi to Norowareshi Himegimi (Japan)

title_en: Dragon Quest XI - Sugi Sarishi Toki o Motomete
title_jp: Dragon Quest XI - Sugi Sarishi Toki o Motomete
title_zh: 勇者鬥惡龍XI 尋覓逝去的時光
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest XI - Sugi Sarishi Toki o Motomete (Japan)

overview_en: Dream Trigger 3D showcases the wow factor of the 3DS like no other game. A stunning mixture of explosive graphics and nonstop action, it is a signature shooter for the system. Play as a fixer of dreams', turning nightmare landscapes into gorgeous dreamscapes in this must-have visual masterpiece for new 3DS owners.
overview_zh: Dream Trigger 3D 展示了 3DS 的令人驚嘆的因素，這是其他遊戲所無法比擬的。它是爆炸性圖形和不間斷動作的驚人組合，是該系統的標誌性射擊遊戲。在這款 3DS 新使用者必備的視覺傑作中，扮演夢想的修復者，將噩夢般的風景變成華麗的夢境。

title_jp: ハイインパクトゲームズ
overview_en: In the game, players race as their favorite DreamWorks Animation characters as they speed, jump, power-up and boost through wacky, wild and wondrous kart courses and compete to be the first to cross the finish line. Amazing stunts, awesome tricks and unique weaponry lets players outrace and outwit their opponents all while enjoying hilarious commentary by King Julien, the game’s announcer. Racers can put the pedal to the metal with multiple game modes including Battle, Circuit and Time Trial. Friends are invited to compete with up to 4 player split screen capabilities on consoles.
overview_zh: 在遊戲中，玩家扮演他們最喜歡的夢工廠動畫角色，在古怪、狂野和奇妙的卡丁車賽道上加速、跳躍、增強力量和加速，並競爭成為第一個衝過終點線的人。驚人的特技、絕妙的技巧和獨特的武器讓玩家能夠在比賽中超越並智取對手，同時享受遊戲播音員朱利安國王的搞笑評論。賽車手可以在戰鬥、巡迴賽和計時賽等多種遊戲模式中全力以赴。邀請朋友在遊戲機上使用最多 4 名玩家的分割畫面功能進行競賽。

title_jp: ドライバー:レネゲイド3D
overview_en: Tanner is back and full of rage in the new Driver Renegade for the Nintendo 3DS. Driver Renegade takes place between the stories of Driver 1 and Driver 2. After years of undercover work for the NYPD, John Tanner leaves his badge and takes protection under Senator Ballard to take care of crime in his own way. As a renegade, Tanner cleans up the New York streets and punishes those that oppose him. Driver Renegade brings non- stop 3D car chases to the Nintendo 3DS system.
overview_zh: 坦納 (Tanner) 在任天堂 3DS 的新《變換車道司機》中回歸並充滿憤怒。 《司機叛徒》發生在《司機 1》和《司機 2》的故事之間。在紐約警察局做了多年的臥底工作後，約翰·坦納 (John Tanner) 放棄了警徽，接受參議員巴拉德 (Ballard) 的保護，以自己的方式打擊犯罪。作為一個叛徒，坦納清理紐約街道並懲罰那些反對他的人。 《Driver Renegade》為 Nintendo 3DS 系統帶來了不間斷的 3D 賽車追逐戰。

title_jp: タッチ!ダブルペンスポーツ
overview_en: The first ever dual touch action sports game, DualPenSports provides a fresh gameplay experience that allows consumers to feel more like they're playing real sports with the use of up to two styluses. Fun, exciting, and accessible to everyone, DualPenSports' two hand coordination challenges players in new ways, providing an instant edge in the handheld and casual gaming markets! With 7 unique sports mini-games and a host of other challenges, DualPenSports delivers addicting moments of glory every athlete wants to play again and again! Players create and customize their own Personal Characters and then face off against the computer or friends in various sports mini-games!
overview_zh: 作為首款雙觸控動作遊戲，DualPenSports 提供了全新的遊戲體驗，讓消費者感覺更像是使用最多兩支觸控筆進行真正的運動。 DualPenSports 有趣、刺激且適合每個人，其兩隻手協調性以新的方式挑戰玩家，在手持和休閒遊戲市場提供即時優勢！ DualPenSports 擁有 7 個獨特的運動迷你遊戲和一系列其他挑戰，為每個運動員帶來令人上癮的榮耀時刻，讓每個運動員都想一次又一次地玩！玩家建立並自訂自己的個性角色，然後在各種體育迷你遊戲中與電腦或朋友對抗！

overview_en: "Learn to become a Robertson! Interact with Willie, Uncle Si, and the rest of the family from the hit TV show. Engage in a variety of mini games and 50+ quests that include Duck Huntin, Fishin, Froggin and Shootin as you explore the town of Duckville and the wilderness that surrounds it in this community simulator!"
overview_zh: 「學習成為羅伯遜！與威利、Si 叔叔以及熱門電視節目中的其他家人互動。在這個社群模擬器中探索達克維爾鎮及其周圍的荒野時，參與各種迷你遊戲和 50 多個任務，其中包括獵鴨、釣魚、青蛙和射擊！”

overview_en: An offshoot of the Lost Planet franchise, EX Troopers is an action game focused as much on character dynamics in a pilot school as it is on alien-blasting action.
overview_zh: EX Troopers 是《失落的星球》系列的一個分支，是一款動作遊戲，既注重飛行員學校中的角色動態，又注重外星人爆破動作。

title_en: Elminage Gothic 3D Remix - Ulm Zakir to Yami no Gishiki
title_jp: Elminage Gothic 3D Remix - Ulm Zakir to Yami no Gishiki
no_intro_name: Elminage Gothic 3D Remix - Ulm Zakir to Yami no Gishiki (Japan)

title_en: Elminage Ibun - Ame no Mihashira Kai
title_jp: Elminage Ibun - Ame no Mihashira Kai
no_intro_name: Elminage Ibun - Ame no Mihashira Kai (Japan) (Rev 1)

title_jp: 世界樹と不思議のダンジョン
title_zh: 世界樹與不思議的迷宮
overview_en: Far off in the mountains, the small village Aslarga becomes a hub for adventurers looking for fame and fortune from the Mystery Dungeons. But dire challenges await even the most stalwart adventurers in Etrian Mystery Dungeon, a turn-based action RPG rogue like developed by ATLUS and Spike Chunsoft. The Nintendo 3DS exclusive mixes Etrian Odyssey's vast RPG party and skill customization aspects, and Mystery Dungeon's infinitely random dungeon adventures. There's no hand-holding in Etrian Mystery Dungeon. The action/turn based combat means that battling monsters is not just about using the right skills, but becomes an elegant Pas de Quatre of strategic positioning. Players form their parties with familiar Etrian Odyssey classes, such as Landsknecht and Runemaster, customize individuals using Etrian-style skill trees, and then take up to four members into the dungeons. Always randomized with various levels and paths, the dungeons require plenty of exploration, not to mention the incredible loot rewards -- just be wary of what waits among the deepest depths.
overview_zh: 在遙遠的山脈中，阿斯拉加小村莊成為冒險家在神秘地下城中尋求名譽和財富的中心。但在 Etrian Mystery Dungeon 中，即使是最堅定的冒險家也面臨著嚴峻的挑戰，這是一款由 ATLUS 和 Spike Chunsoft 開發的回合製動作角色扮演遊戲。任天堂 3DS 獨佔遊戲融合了《Etrian Odyssey》的龐大 RPG 派對和技能定製方面，以及《Mystery Dungeon》的無限隨機地牢冒險。 Etrian Mystery Dungeon 中沒有手把手的操作。基於動作/回合製的戰鬥意味著與怪物的戰鬥不僅僅是使用正確的技能，而是成為戰略定位的優雅四人舞。玩家用熟悉的 Etrian Odyssey 職業（例如 Landsknecht 和 Runemaster）組建自己的隊伍，使用 Etrian 風格的技能樹定製個人，然後帶最多四名成員進入地下城。地牢總是隨機分佈著不同的關卡和路徑，需要大量的探索，更不用說令人難以置信的戰利品獎勵了——只是要警惕最深處等待著的東西。

title_en: Etrian Odyssey 2 Untold - The Fafnir Knight
title_jp: 新・世界樹の迷宮2 ファフニールの騎士
overview_en: The next entry of the Etrian Odyssey Untold series is essentially two games in one - the first, a Nintendo 3DS update to Etrian Odyssey 2: Heroes of Laggard (released on Nintendo DS) with new dungeon layouts, new graphics, and system improvements from the recent Etrian Odyssey Untold. The second is the Untold portion - a brand new story mode with a fixed party, voiced dialogue, and animated cut scenes that follows the bittersweet tale of the Fafnir Knight and Princess Arianna. Like Persona Q, the Untold portion of the game has a strong focus on characters and their interactions as the story about the Fafnir Knight and Princess Arianna unfolds as they adventure forth into the ruins of Ginnungagap and the Yggdrasil Labyrinth with the hero Flavio and the two mysterious adventurers, Bertrand and Chloe.
overview_zh: Etrian Odyssey Untold 系列的下一款遊戲本質上是兩款遊戲合二為一 - 第一款是 Nintendo 3DS 對 Etrian Odyssey 2: Heroes of Laggard（在 Nintendo DS 上發布）的更新，其中包含新的地牢佈局、新的圖形和最近的 Etrian Odyssey Untold 的改進系統改進系統改進系統。第二個是不為人知的部分——一種全新的故事模式，有固定的派對、有聲對話和動畫過場動畫，講述法夫尼爾騎士和阿里安娜公主苦樂參半的故事。與《女神異聞錄 Q》一樣，遊戲的「不為人知」部分也非常注重角色及其互動，法夫尼爾騎士和阿里安娜公主的故事隨著英雄弗拉維奧和兩位神秘冒險家貝特朗和克洛伊一起冒險進入吉農加普的廢墟和世界樹迷宮而展開。
no_intro_name: Etrian Odyssey 2 Untold - The Fafnir Knight (USA)

title_en: Etrian Odyssey IV - Legends of the Titan
title_jp: 世界樹の迷宮IV 伝承の巨神
overview_en:
The Count of Tharsis has issued a challenge: uncover the truth behind an ancient legend. His challenge has drawn adventurers from far and wide, including you. Can you solve the riddle of Yggdrasil, a tree which grows deep in the uncharted territory outside the city of Tharsis? The legend says that something sleeps within Yggdrasil… something that calls people to eternal paradise. Discover the secret for yourself in Etrian Odyssey IV: Legends of the Titan, a role-playing adventure exclusively available on Nintendo 3DS.

Assemble your guild and set off to explore this strange, unexplored land. Choose from ten different character types, and even add a secondary class to your characters for even more customisation options. Different classes all have vastly different skills and abilities, so how you develop your guild of adventurers will drastically affect your battle strategies. Perform Burst Skills to gain beneficial stat increases or inflict devastating damage and other effects on monsters.

As you explore dungeons and fly through the skies in your airship, use the Nintendo 3DS Touch Screen to create your own maps, just like the explorers of old. Mistakes can prove costly, especially if you need to escape a dangerous situation in a hurry, so pay close attention: you’ll succeed or fail in your quest by the quality of your map-making.

If the going ever gets too tough, switch to an easier difficulty and continue enjoying the adventure. With exciting battles, a unique mapping system, customisable characters and more, experience an immersive RPG only on Nintendo 3DS.
overview_zh:
塔爾西斯伯爵發出了一項挑戰：揭開古老傳說背後的真相。他的挑戰吸引了來自四面八方的冒險家，包括你。你能解開 Yggdrasil 之謎嗎？ Yggdrasil 是一棵生長在塔爾西斯城外未知領域深處的樹？傳說中，有某種東西沉睡在 Yggdrasil 之中……某些東西可以召喚人們進入永恆的天堂。在《Etrian Odyssey IV: Legends of the Titan》中親自探索這個秘密，這是一款任天堂 3DS 獨有的角色扮演冒險遊戲。

召集你的公會，出發去探索這片陌生的、未開發的土地。從十種不同的角色型別中進行選擇，甚至為您的角色新增輔助類別以獲得更多自訂選項。不同的職業都有著截然不同的技能和能力，所以你如何發展你的冒險家公會將極大地影響你的戰鬥策略。執行爆發技能以獲得有益的統計增加或對怪物造成毀滅性傷害和其他效果。

當您探索地下城並駕駛飛艇在天空中飛行時，可以使用 Nintendo 3DS 觸控螢幕建立自己的地圖，就像古代的探險家一樣。錯誤可能會付出高昂的代價，尤其是當您需要匆忙逃離危險情況時，因此請密切注意：您的任務成功或失敗取決於地圖製作的品質。

如果事情變得太困難，請切換到更簡單的難度並繼續享受冒險。激動人心的戰鬥、獨特的地圖系統、可自訂的角色等等，讓您在 Nintendo 3DS 上體驗身臨其境的角色扮演遊戲。
no_intro_name: Etrian Odyssey IV - Legends of the Titan (USA)

overview_en: A royal decree from Princess Persephone has prompted the gathering of the realm's greatest explorers to the floating city of Maginia. Their goal - uncovering the mysteries of the archipelago of Lemuria, home to a great Yggdrasil Tree. Recruit explorers from 19 classes spanning the entire Etrian series, including the brand new "Hero" class, before setting out to Lemuria in search of treasure and glory!
overview_zh: 珀耳塞福涅公主頒布的一項皇家法令促使王國最偉大的探險家聚集到漂浮城市馬吉尼亞。他們的目標是揭開利穆裡亞群島的神秘面紗，這裡是一顆偉大的世界之樹的所在地。從涵蓋整個 Etrian 系列的 19 個職業中招募探險家，包括全新的「英雄」職業，然後出發前往利莫里亞尋找寶藏和榮耀！

title_en: Etrian Odyssey Untold - The Millennium Girl
title_jp: 新・世界樹の迷宮 ミレニアムの少女
overview_en:
Etrian Odyssey Untold is a game in two parts: the first part is a story-driven first person adventure into the world of Etria. Appropriate for players new to the series and veterans alike, the Story mode gives players five pre-made characters, each with their own personalities and dialogue to explore a side of Etria not seen in the first game. Adventurers must brave new dungeon layouts, floors, and enemies to find out the truth of the Yggdrasil Tree and the mysterious girl, Frederica.

For series veterans, Classic mode offers the traditional Etrian Odyssey gameplay, updated to the latest conveniences found in Etrian Odyssey IV, including full 3-D graphics. The game also includes animated opening and story cutscenes by MADHOUSE Inc. and voiceovers for the story and battle scenes, plus the option for orchestrated background music.
overview_zh:
Etrian Odyssey Untold 是一款由兩部分組成的遊戲：第一部分是故事驅動的第一人稱冒險，進入 Etria 世界。故事模式適合該系列的新玩家和老玩家，為玩家提供五個預製角色，每個角色都有自己的個性和對話，以探索第一款遊戲中未見的 Etria 的一面。冒險者必須勇敢面對新的地牢佈局、樓層和敵人，找出世界之樹和神秘女孩弗雷德麗卡的真相。

對於系列老手來說，經典模式提供了傳統的 Etrian Odyssey 遊戲玩法，並更新為 Etrian Odyssey IV 中的最新便利設施，包括全 3D 圖形。遊戲還包括由 MADHOUSE Inc. 製作的動畫開場和故事過場動畫以及故事和戰鬥場景的畫外音，以及精心編排的背景音樂選項。
no_intro_name: Etrian Odyssey Untold - The Millennium Girl (USA)

title_en: Etrian Odyssey V - Beyond the Myth
title_jp: 世界樹の迷宮V 長き神話の果て
title_zh: 世界樹迷宮V 漫長神話的盡頭
overview_en:
Journey beyond the myth and discover what awaits you at the top of the Yggdrasil Tree!

 
Etrian Odyssey V chronicles the quest of a new adventurer as he or she attempts to reach the crown of the towering Yggdrasil Tree. For it is said that whoever braves the dangers of the dreaded Yggdrasil Labyrinth and reaches the summit will have their greatest wish fulfilled. Each culture has their own myth, some say great power will be granted, others believe the great mysteries will be solved. Some believe the ultimate techniques can be mastered there, and a number believe the lost treasures can be found at the top of the Yggdrasil Tree's boughs.

There's a reason why no one has ever reached the top. Dangerous creatures and terrifying FOEs roam the labyrinth on every floor, so prepare to test your mettle with challenging turn-based battles. Form your own party and partner up to unleash devastating attacks

Personalize your party to work to your advantage! With endless character customization, adventurers will cast and create their own party from four unique races and ten different classes to explore the uncharted labyrinth.

By utilizing the bottom screen of the Nintendo 3DS™, you will become your own cartographer. Fill your map and mark the locations of treasures, doors, enemies, environmental obstructions, and other important landmarks you find while traversing the many strata of the perilous dungeon.
overview_zh:
超越神話的旅程，發現世界之樹頂端等待著您的是什麼！

 
《Etrian Odyssey V》記錄了一位新冒險家試圖到達高聳的 Yggdrasil 樹頂的探索之旅。因為據說，無論誰勇敢地面對可怕的世界迷宮的危險並到達山頂，都將實現他們最大的願望。每種文化都有自己的神話，有些人說將被授予強大的力量，有些人則相信偉大的謎團將被解開。有些人相信在那裡可以掌握終極技術，有些人相信可以在世界之樹的樹枝頂部找到失落的寶藏。

沒有人到達頂峰是有原因的。危險的生物和可怕的敵人在迷宮的每一層中游盪，所以準備好透過具有挑戰性的回合製戰鬥來測試你的勇氣。組成自己的隊伍和夥伴，發動毀滅性的攻擊

個性化您的派對，為您帶來優勢！透過無盡的角色定製，冒險家將從四個獨特的種族和十個不同的類別中鑄造和建立自己的隊伍，探索未知的迷宮。

透過利用 Nintendo 3DS™ 的底部螢幕，您將成為自己的製圖師。填滿你的地圖並標記你在穿越危險地牢的許多層時發現的寶藏、門、敵人、環境障礙物和其他重要地標的位置。
no_intro_name: Etrian Odyssey V - Beyond the Myth (USA)

title_jp: Ever Oasis 精霊とタネビトの蜃気楼
overview_en:
Ever Oasis is an action-adventure role-playing video game developed by Grezzo and published by Nintendo for the Nintendo 3DS video game console.

Ever Oasis tells the story of Tethu, a young seedling who must create a village in the middle of the desert to serve as a launching point for a quest to find their older brother, who has been spirited away by the forces of Chaos. Eventually, Tethu meets Miura and Roto to help complete the quest. Tethu may be male or female.
overview_zh:
Ever Oasis 是一款由 Grezzo 開發並由 Nintendo 為 Nintendo 3DS 電玩遊戲發行的動作冒險角色扮演電玩遊戲。

《永恆綠洲》講述了特圖的故事，特圖是一棵幼苗，他必須在沙漠中央建立一個村莊，作為尋找被混沌力量偷走的哥哥的出發點。最終，特圖遇見了三浦和羅託，幫忙完成任務。 Tethu 可以是男性或女性。

title_en: Ever Oasis - Seirei to Tanebito no Mirage
title_jp: Ever Oasis - Seirei to Tanebito no Mirage
no_intro_name: Ever Oasis - Seirei to Tanebito no Mirage (Japan)

overview_en: "F1 2011 is the sequel to the BAFTA-winning F1 2010 video game from Codemasters. F1 2011 will feature all the official drivers, teams, and circuits in the 2011 FIA Formula One World Championship. Multiplayer has been revamped from the options available in F1 2010. You can race split-screen for the first time in a high-definition Formula One title. Two new additional circuits have been added to the race calendar to extend the number of circuits to 19. Become the driver and live life in this all-new experience of Formula One racing. Renowned drivers from the 2011 FIA Formula One World Championship include Sebastian Vettel, Lewis Hamilton, Michael Schumacher, Fernando Alonso, and Jenson Button. You can race all day, with full day to night transitions that re-create the special atmosphere of the unique track Ethiad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix."
overview_zh: 「2011年F1是Codemasters贏得BAFTA的2010年F1電子遊戲的續集。F1 2011將在2011年FIA一級方程式世界錦標賽中展示所有官方車手、車隊和賽道。多人遊戲已從F1 2010中提供的選項中進行改進。您可以首次以高畫質晰度的一級方程式賽車標題進行分屏比賽。比賽日曆中新增了兩條賽道，將賽道數量擴充套件到19條。在這個全新的一級方程式賽車體驗中成為車手並享受生活。2011年FIA一級方程式世界錦標賽的知名車手包括Sebastian Vettel、Lewis Hamilton、Michael Schumacher、Fernando Alonso和Jenson Button。您可以全天參加比賽，全天夜間轉換，重新創造獨特賽道Ethiad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix的特殊氛圍。」

overview_en:
"Fuelled by EA SPORTS IGNITE, FIFA 14 will feel alive with players who think, move, and behave like world-class footballers, and dynamic stadiums that come to life. Players have four times the decision making ability and feel alive with human-like reactions, anticipation, and instincts. With 10 times more animation depth and detail than previous consoles, FIFA 14 delivers the dynamic movements and biomechanics of the worlds best footballers. Players are agile and athletic as they plant, pivot and cut, and explode out of each step. The increased fidelity has a game-changing effect on gameplay. Plus, the artistry and athleticism of footballers will come to life with the addition of hundreds of new types of skills and hundreds of new behaviors. And for the first time ever, fans will feel the electricity of a living stadium as the emotions of new 3D crowds rise and fall around the stories on the pitch."

(3DS port is functionally the same title as FIFA 13 for 3DS but with updated rosters and kits.)
overview_zh:
"Fuelled by EA SPORTS IGNITE, FIFA 14 will feel alive with players who think, move, and behave like world-class footballers, and dynamic stadiums that come to life. Players have four times the decision making and hucision 和 hulyman and huem. instincts. With 10 times more animation depth and detail than previous consoles, FIFA 14 delivers the dynamic movements and biomechanics of the worlds best footballers. Players are agile and athletic as they plant, piv and the planed, piv. game-changing effect on gameplay. Plus, the artistry and athleticism of footballers will come to life with the addition of hundreds of new types of skills and dreds of new behaviors. And for the first time , fanss will el the leat the em​​d s, fansions of el the 3 a coy 3, fans 顏色 3000 y fel the fem. crowds rise and fall around the stories on the pitch."

（3DS 移植版在功能上與 3DS 版 FIFA 13 相同，但更新了陣容和套件。）

overview_en: "FIFA Soccer 12 is the most innovative, feature-rich, and authentic 3D soccer experience on Nintendo 3DS. Become a true marksman with all-new optional touch screen controls. Pick a spot precisely from the player's viewpoint using the lower touch screen and then direct a shot with pinpoint accuracy. Whether fans choose to compete as a real-world superstar or re-create themselves in the first-ever 3D Street Soccer Mode, the environment will come alive through an innovative curved pitch that maximizes full 3D effects. FIFA Soccer 12 features over 500 officially licensed clubs and eight different game modes, including authentic 11 versus 11, head-to-head online, Be A Pro, Tournament Mode with over 50 real-world competitions, and a full in-depth Career Mode."
overview_zh: 「《FIFA足球12》是任天堂3DS上最創新、功能最豐富、最真實的3D足球體驗。透過全新的可選觸控式螢幕控制，成為真正的射手。使用較低的觸控式螢幕從玩家的角度精確地選擇一個點，然後以精確的準確度導向拍攝。無論球迷選擇以真實世界的超級巨星身份競爭，還是在有史以來第一個3D街頭足球模式中重新創造自己，環境都將透過創新的弧形球場活躍起來，最大限度地發揮完整的3D效果。《FIFA足球12》擁有超過500個官方授權的俱樂部和8種不同的遊戲模式，包括真實的11對11、線上對決、專業級、錦標賽模式，超過50場真實世界的比賽，以及全面深入的職業模式。」

overview_en: "FIFA 13 captures all the drama and unpredictability of real-world soccer, and is driven by five game-changing innovations which revolutionize artificial intelligence, dribbling, ball control and physical play. It is the largest and deepest feature set in the history of the franchise. These innovations create a true battle for possession across the entire pitch, deliver freedom and creativity in attack, and capture all the drama and unpredictability of the real-world game."
overview_zh: 「《FIFA 13》捕捉了現實世界足球的所有戲劇性和不可預測性，並由五項改變遊戲規則的創新驅動，這些創新徹底改變了人工智慧、運球、控球和體能比賽。這是該系列歷史上最大、最深入的功能集。這些創新在整個球場上創造了一場真正的控球之戰，提供了進攻的現實和世界自由度，並預測了世界性比賽的所有戲劇性和不可預測性比賽。

overview_en: "Developed by Renegade Kid, Face Kart: Photo Finish lets players tilt and turn the Nintendo 3DS to steer their photo customized speedsters through 20 unique race tracks, as they drift around corners, soar over chasms and speed past the competition. Players use the Nintendo 3DS camera to snap their own picture and then map it onto their avatar, the landscape or even a turbo boost so they can pick up their very own power-ups as they race. Each avatar offers up to one hundred choices in hair, clothing and eyewear, plus cars can also be customized by tuning and tweaking to create the ultimate personalized racer."
overview_zh: 「由 Renegade Kid 開發的《Face Kart: Photo Finish》讓玩家傾斜和轉動 Nintendo 3DS，駕駛照片定製的極速賽車穿過 20 條獨特的賽道，在彎道上漂移、翱翔在峽谷中並超越競爭對手。玩家使用 Nintendo 3DS 相機拍攝自己的照片，然後將其對映到峽谷中並超越競爭對手。玩家使用 Nintendo 3DS 相機拍攝自己的照片，然後將其對映到自己的風景。 100 種選擇頭髮、服裝和眼鏡，此外汽車也可以透過調整和調整來定製，以創造終極的個性化賽車手。

overview_en:
An action-puzzler RPG with a retro feel!

The scourge is back with a vengeance! Seal him off for good! Collect the three Spirit Icons to lead the way to victory!

- How to play -

* Use the D-Pad to move and select items.
* Open the inventory window with the right button.
* The left button brings up the pause/save menu.
overview_zh:
一款復古風格的動作解謎角色扮演遊戲！

禍害捲土重來！永遠封印他！收集三個靈魂圖示，引領勝利之路！

- 玩法 -

* 使用方向鍵移動並選擇專案。
* 用右鍵開啟庫存視窗。
* 左側按鈕調出暫停/儲存選單。

overview_en: Fairune2 is a fantasy puzzle-solving adventure RPG. Which has you explore the map by solving puzzles, tricks and beating monsters. You are requested by the mysterious book that can say where to find the lost fairy. In this adventure, you encounter the wonderful girl that may lead you to the truth of the world. With much greater content than the prequel game, the power-up 8-bit taste graphics and sounds will bring forth the new reminiscent game-play.
overview_zh: Fairune2 是一款奇幻解謎冒險角色扮演遊戲。您可以透過解決謎題、技巧和擊敗怪物來探索地圖。一本神秘的書向你發出請求，它可以告訴你在哪裡可以找到失蹤的仙女。在這次冒險中，你遇到了一位美妙的女孩，她可能會引導你走向世界的真相。內容比前傳遊戲豐富得多，增強的 8 位元味道圖形和聲音將帶來新的懷舊遊戲玩法。

overview_en:
Welcome to the world of Fallblox! Get ready to push your brain to the limit with 140 new levels, 90 training exercises and a unique addition to the puzzling gameplay: gravity!

It’s a wonderful sunny day over in Fallblox Park and everyone’s getting ready to have some fun. Unfortunately, Mallo has accidentally scared all the brightly coloured Carrier Birds of Fallblox Park away! There’s only one thing for it – he’ll have to bring them all back! And so begins Mallo’s latest adventure, packed with all the pulling, jumping, climbing and falling you could ever want from a puzzle game…

Fallblox might look familiar if you’ve already played its predecessor, Pullblox, but don’t be fooled! New gameplay elements help make Fallblox a totally new experience and one that’ll have you scratching your head for a long time to come!

As in Pullblox, the objective of each level is to reach the top of the structure – where he previously rescued children, Mallo now has to collect the colourful birds that are perched at the top of each stage. But while the coloured blocks of Pullblox could only be pulled outwards or pushed inwards, Fallblox adds a third dimension and a whole new layer of challenge to the puzzle experience!
overview_zh:
歡迎來到 Fallblox 的世界！準備好透過 140 個新關卡、90 個訓練練習以及令人費解的遊戲中的獨特補充：重力，將您的大腦推向極限！

這是 Fallblox 公園陽光明媚的一天，每個人都準備好享受樂趣。不幸的是，馬洛不小心嚇跑了法爾布洛克斯公園裡所有色彩鮮豔的信鳥！只有一件事──他必須把他們全部帶回來！馬洛的最新冒險就這樣開始了，充滿了益智遊戲中你想要的所有拉、跳、攀爬和墜落…

如果您已經玩過 Fallblox 的前身 Pullblox，那麼您可能會覺得很熟悉，但不要被愚弄了！新的遊戲元素讓 Fallblox 成為一種全新的體驗，讓你在未來很長一段時間內摸不著頭緒！

就像《Pullblox》一樣，每個關卡的目標都是到達建築物的頂部——他之前在那裡拯救了孩子們，現在馬洛必須收集棲息在每個關卡頂部的彩色鳥類。但是，雖然 Pullblox 的彩色塊只能向外拉或向內推，但 Fallblox 為解謎體驗新增了第三維度和全新的挑戰層！

overview_en:
FANTASY LIFE* is an original RPG for the Nintendo 3DS from LEVEL-5, featuring music by Nobuo Uematsu and image illustration by Yoshitaka Amano. 
Set in a beautiful and vast open world, players create their own avatars and take up a vocation of their choosing, living out their lives as they see fit. You can set out on an adventure to save the world, or spend your days in leisurely pursuits such as cooking or fishing. Find the meaning of your new life in the limitless possibilities that reside in FANTASY LIFE* on the Nintendo 3DS
overview_zh:
FANTASY LIFE* 是任天堂 3DS 的原創角色扮演遊戲，從 LEVEL-5 開始，由植松伸夫 (Nobuo Uematsu) 創作音樂，天野喜孝 (Yoshitaka Amano) 繪製插畫。 
以美麗而廣闊的開放世界為背景，玩家建立自己的化身並從事自己選擇的職業，過著自己認為合適的生活。您可以踏上拯救世界的冒險之旅，也可以享受烹飪或釣魚等休閒活動。在 Nintendo 3DS 上的 FANTASY LIFE* 的無限可能中找到新生活的意義

overview_en:
"With a new refined look and twice the available equipment as its predecessor, Farming Simulator 14 gives you control of an extensive range of authentic farm machines from agricultural manufacturers, including Case IH, Deutz-Fahr, Lamborghini, Kuhn, Amazone and Krone. 

Assign your team of agricultural workers to grow, harvest crops and generate virtual revenue from corn, canola, and wheat. Turn a profit on your harvest and invest it in new tools available in the machinery store."
overview_zh:
「Farming Simulator 14 具有全新的精緻外觀和兩倍於其前身的可用裝置，讓您可以控制來自農業製造商的各種真實農業機械，包括 Case IH、Deutz-Fahr、Lamborghini、Kuhn、Amazone 和 Krone。

分配您的農業工人團隊種植、收割作物並從玉米、油菜和小麥中產生虛擬收入。從你的收成中賺取利潤，並將其投資於機械商店中可用的新工具。 」

overview_en:
"BECOME A PART OF THE CREW! Strap in and get ready for an intense ride as you team up to take down a dangerous international gang that can only be stopped by you and the rest of the Fast & Furious crew. 

Key Game Features 

Team Action Racing: Get behind the wheel of some of the world's most intense rides and take on high-stakes driving missions cooperatively with a friend or computer A.I. 

Choose the Experience: Put skills to the test in Challenge Mode, an over-the-top game mode offering addictive objectives and high re-playability 

Diverse and customizable cars: Build your dream car and modify it with more than 50 awesome upgrades and performance perks 

Storyline that spans the franchise and travels the globe: Heists, hijacks and mayhem combine across 8 epic global locations, from Rio to LA to Moscow, in an original storyline that spans the entire Fast & Furious film franchise."
overview_zh:
「成為劇組的一員！繫好安全帶，準備好踏上緊張的旅程，組隊消滅一個危險的國際幫派，只有你和《速度與激情》劇組的其他成員才能阻止這個團夥。

主要遊戲特色

團隊動作賽車：駕駛一些世界上最激烈的遊樂設施，並與朋友或電腦人工智慧合作執行高風險的駕駛任務。 

選擇體驗：在挑戰模式中測試技能，這是一種提供令人上癮的目標和高可重玩性的頂級遊戲模式

多樣化且可自訂的汽車：打造您的夢想汽車，並透過 50 多種令人驚嘆的升級和效能優勢對其進行改裝

故事情節貫穿整個系列並環遊全球：從裡約熱內盧到洛杉磯再到莫斯科，搶劫、劫持和混亂在全球 8 個史詩般的地點結合在一起，形成了貫穿整個《速度與激情》電影系列的原創故事情節。

title_zh: Fate/kaleid liner 魔法少女☆伊莉雅
最終幻想 探險者們
overview_en: Final Fantasy Explorers focuses on cooperative play with friends, utilizing a refined party system allowing Explorers to master over twenty jobs, each offering unique ways to defeat or even recruit the realm’s mightiest monsters. Players have the ability to call upon the powers of eidolons like Ifrit and Bahamut, as well as to transform into legendary characters from the Final Fantasy series via the Trance ability. Multiplayer functionality is enabled through the Nintendo 3DS wireless communication.
overview_zh: 《最終幻想探險家》專注於與朋友合作遊戲，利用精緻的派對系統讓探險家掌握二十多種工作，每項工作都提供獨特的方式來擊敗甚至招募王國中最強大的怪物。玩家可以召喚伊夫利特和巴哈姆特等幻靈的力量，也可以透過 Trance 能力轉變成《最終幻想》系列中的傳奇人物。多人遊戲功能透過 Nintendo 3DS 無線通訊啟用。

title_en: Finding Nemo - Escape to the Big Blue - Special Edition
title_jp: ファインディング・ニモ
no_intro_name: Finding Nemo - Escape to the Big Blue - Special Edition (USA)

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレム 覚醒
overview_en:
In a world ruled by two mighty dragons, dark forces rise and threaten to destroy the Kingdom. Set out on an exciting adventure and experience battles packed with action, strategy and danger as Fire Emblem: Awakening comes to Nintendo 3DS.

As Prince Chrom struggles to stop skirmishes between the kingdoms of Ylisse and Plegia turning into all-out war, a plague of undead soldiers known as The Risen infect the land. Trapped between a warmongering kingdom, an unimaginable evil and a masked stranger claiming to be a legendary figure from centuries past, Chrom's fight to survive may be greater than he ever imagined. Thankfully, he has the Shepherds – his own personal militia – and you, a warrior with no memory of your past, to fight beside him. But as you're drawn further into the conflict, events occur that will change the world forever...

Building on a variety of elements from previous Fire Emblem games, Fire Emblem: Awakening offers an experience that both dedicated fans and newcomers to the series will enjoy. Traditional turn-based combat sees you requiring both skill and strategy to complete stages successfully, while the new 3D visuals see each battle come to life like never before on Nintendo 3DS. Playing to the strength of your units is key, as positioning on the battlefield, the types of weapons used, the range of classes and even co-operative attacks all play a part in ensuring victory.

The more you have characters fight together in battle and interact, the closer their bond will grow; stronger bonds mean better co-operative abilities, so it's worth putting effort into having your characters get along. Outside of bonds, you'll also see your characters gain experience as they battle, increasing both their level and statistics, and a huge range of additional characters – covering a wide variety of different classes and weapon proficiencies – are just waiting to be recruited to your army. What's more, Fire Emblem: Awakening features multiple difficulty levels including Newcomer Mode, where heroes defeated on the battlefield can be brought back for later stages instead of being lost forever.

And there's more beyond the main story of Fire Emblem: Awakening! Join up with a friend and work together to defeat the enemy via Local Play in Double Duel mode, or enhance your army with characters from the forces of other players with StreetPass. Add-on content offering downloadable maps and characters will also be available to purchase following the game's release.

--> Turn-based combat meets rich 3D visuals in a game that combines a range of elements from previous Fire Emblem titles.
--> Use skill and strategy to win battles, with gameplay that's deep for fans of the series, but also accessible for newcomers.
--> Create bonds between your characters by having them fight together on the battlefield, increasing their co-operative power.
--> Enhance your army with new characters via StreetPass or join forces with a friend over Local Play.
overview_zh:
在兩條強大的龍統治的世界中，黑暗勢力崛起並威脅要摧毀王國。 《火焰之紋章：覺醒》登陸 Nintendo 3DS，踏上激動人心的冒險之旅，體驗充滿動作、策略和危險的戰鬥。

當克羅姆王子努力阻止伊利斯和普雷吉亞王國之間的小衝突演變成全面戰爭時，一場被稱為「復活者」的不死士兵瘟疫感染了這片土地。克羅姆被困在一個好戰的王國、一個難以想像的邪惡勢力和一個自稱是幾個世紀前傳奇人物的蒙面陌生人之間，克羅姆為生存而進行的鬥爭可能比他想像的還要艱鉅。值得慶幸的是，他有牧羊人——他自己的私人民兵——和你，一個對過去沒有記憶的戰士，與他並肩作戰。但當你進一步陷入衝突時，發生的事件將永遠改變世界...

《火焰紋章：覺醒》以先前《火焰紋章》遊戲中的各種元素為基礎，為該系列的忠實粉絲和新玩家提供了一種享受的體驗。傳統的回合製戰鬥需要技巧和策略才能成功完成關卡，而新的 3D 視覺效果讓每場戰鬥在 Nintendo 3DS 上都栩栩如生。發揮單位的力量是關鍵，因為戰場上的定位、使用的武器型別、職業範圍甚至合作攻擊都對確保勝利起著重要作用。

角色在戰鬥中一起戰鬥和互動越多，他們的連結就會越緊密；更強的連結意味著更好的合作能力，所以值得付出努力讓你的角色相處。除了束縛之外，你還會看到你的角色在戰鬥中獲得經驗，提高他們的等級和統計資料，並且大量的額外角色 - 涵蓋各種不同的類別和武器熟練程度 - 正等待著被招募到你的軍隊中。更重要的是，《火焰紋章：覺醒》具有多種難度級別，包括新人模式，在戰場上被擊敗的英雄可以在後期階段被帶回來，而不是永遠消失。

除了《火焰之紋章：覺醒》的主要故事之外，還有更多內容！與朋友一起在雙人決鬥模式下透過本地遊戲共同擊敗敵人，或透過 StreetPass 與其他玩家部隊中的角色一起增強您的軍隊。遊戲發布後，還可以購買提供可下載地圖和角色的附加內容。

--> 遊戲中的回合製戰鬥與豐富的 3D 視覺效果相結合，融合了先前《火焰之紋章》遊戲中的一系列元素。
--> 使用技巧和策略贏得戰鬥，遊戲玩法對於該系列的粉絲來說很深入，但對於新手來說也很容易上手。
--> 讓你的角色在戰場上一起戰鬥，在他們之間建立聯絡，增強他們的合作能力。
--> 透過 StreetPass 使用新角色增強您的軍隊，或透過 Local Play 與朋友聯手。

title_en: Fire Emblem Echoes - Mou Hitori no Eiyuu Ou
title_jp: Fire Emblem Echoes - Mou Hitori no Eiyuu Ou
title_zh: 火焰之紋章 回聲 另一位英雄王
no_intro_name: Fire Emblem Echoes - Mou Hitori no Eiyuu Ou (Japan) (Ja,Zh) (Rev 1)

title_en: Fire Emblem Echoes - Shadows of Valentia
title_jp: ファイアーエムブレム Echoes もうひとりの英雄王
title_zh: 火焰之紋章 回聲 另一位英雄王
overview_en:
In a continent that was divided by warring gods, guide legions of soldiers through tactical battles—as this reimagined RPG epic invades the West!

Uncover the intertwining tales of heroes Alm and Celica, engage foes, fend off monsters, and explore 3D dungeons. Your prowess will grow as you master this melding of modern and legacy Fire Emblem gameplay.

Also Available
Fire Emblem Echoes: Shadows of Valentia Limited Edition
Limited Edition contains the game, an artbook, metal pixel pin badges of Alm, Celica, and Marth, a double-sided titlesheet, the "Sounds of Echoes" soundtrack selection CD, and Alm and Celica amiibo (EU version only; NA version Amiibo sold separately).
overview_zh:
在一個被戰神分割的大陸上，引導軍團士兵進行戰術戰鬥－這款重新構想的角色扮演史詩入侵了西方！

揭開英雄阿爾姆和塞莉卡錯綜複雜的故事，與敵人交戰，擊退怪物，並探索 3D 地下城。當您掌握現代與傳統《火焰之紋章》遊戲玩法的融合時，您的能力將會不斷增強。

還提供
火焰之紋章迴響：瓦倫西亞之影限量版
限量版包含遊戲、藝術書、Alm、Celica 和 Marth 的金屬畫素徽章、雙面標題頁、「Sounds of Echoes」原聲帶選擇 CD 以及 Alm 和 Celica amiibo（僅限歐盟版；NA 版 Amiibo 單獨出售）。
no_intro_name: Fire Emblem Echoes - Shadows of Valentia (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレム Echoes もうひとりの英雄王
title_zh: 火焰之紋章 回聲 另一位英雄王

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレムif
overview_en:
Developed by the same team that created Fire Emblem Awakening, the new adventure adds challenges never before seen in the series and asks players to make decisions that will affect the game’s world in new ways. For the first time in the series, players take on the role of the main character and command an army, while struggling to decide which path to follow: helping blood relatives or the family that raised him or her.

Fire Emblem Fates is available in two separate chapters: Birthright and Conquest. Each version of the game offers a different path to play, posing to players an unprecedented choice: fight an opposing force or join the other side and try to make changes from within.
overview_zh:
這款新冒險遊戲由《火焰紋章覺醒》的同一團隊開發，增加了該系列中前所未有的挑戰，並要求玩家做出將以新方式影響遊戲世界的決定。在該系列中，玩家第一次扮演主角並指揮一支軍隊，同時努力決定走哪條路：幫助血親或撫養他或她的家庭。

《火焰紋章：命運》分為兩個獨立的章節：與生俱來的權利和征服。遊戲的每個版本都提供了不同的遊戲路徑，為玩家提供了前所未有的選擇：與敵對勢力作戰或加入對手並嘗試從內部做出改變。

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレムif

Developed by the same team that created Fire Emblem Awakening, the new adventure adds challenges never before seen in the series and asks players to make decisions that will affect the game’s world in new ways. For the first time in the series, players take on the role of the main character and command an army, while struggling to decide which path to follow: helping blood relatives or the family that raised him or her.

Fire Emblem Fates is available in two separate chapters: Birthright and Conquest. Each version of the game offers a different path to play, posing to players an unprecedented choice: fight an opposing force or join the other side and try to make changes from within.
