title_jp: ファイアーエムブレムif
overview_en: The collector's Special Edition of Fire Emblem: Fates includes all three chapters of the FE Fates saga -- the Birthright, Conquest, and Revelation story quests are all featured in one massive collection (*Revelation game content may be accessed via an included eShop download voucher in some territory,) as well as an artbook and a Nintendo 3DS XL pouch.
overview_zh: 收藏家的《火焰之紋章：命運》特別版包括《FE 命運》傳奇的所有三個章節 - 出生權、征服和啟示錄故事任務都包含在一個龐大的收藏中（*在某些地區，可以透過隨附的 eShop 下載優惠券訪問啟示錄遊戲內容），以及一本藝術書和一個 Nintendo 3DS XL 袋。

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレムif
overview_en:
All Three Versions of Fire Emblem: Fates (Birthright, Conquest, Revelation*)

ABOUT FIRE EMBLEM FATES: BIRTHRIGHT:
Two kingdoms are on the brink of war. Whose side will you choose? Torn between two families, you're an heir of Hoshido, raised by Nohrian royals. If you walk the path of Birthright, you'll battle the corrupted king of Nohr beside a family of strangers. Command them expertly and forge deep relationships to master this turn-based strategy game.

A brand new Fire Emblem™ experience is on its way for the Nintendo 3DS™ family of systems. For the first time ever, your customized avatar is the main hero. An army of knights, mages, archers and more are at your command in the most tactical battles in series history. Each unit and weapon has strengths and weaknesses you must consider for every foe you face. Partner allies on the battlefield so they can support each other in combat. Building relationships is key—the closer your allies become, the better they'll fight together. Their future is at your command, but first you must make the most important decision in the history of Fire Emblem.

For the first time in the Fire Emblem™ series, your customized avatar is the main character (Prince or Princess of Hoshido Kingdom)
Epic storyline centered on your avatar, forced to choose between bloodline and family who raised you.
New “My Castle” area to interact with your allies and build stronger relationships
Have StreetPass™ encounters with other players to visit their My Castle
Tap in corresponding Fire Emblem amiibo™ figures and Marth, Ike, Lucina, and Robin will appear in your game, ready for you to battle and recruit
ABOUT FIRE EMBLEM FATES: CONQUEST
Two kingdoms are on the brink of war. Whose side will you choose? Torn between two families, you're an heir of Hoshido, raised by Nohrian royals. If you walk the path of Conquest, you must fight to change your misguided kingdom from within. Command warriors with expert precision and forge deep relationships to master this turn-based strategy game.

A brand new Fire Emblem™ experience is on its way for the Nintendo 3DS™ family of systems. For the first time ever, your customized avatar is the main hero. An army of knights, mages, archers and more are at your command in the most tactical battles in series history. Each unit and weapon has strengths and weaknesses you must consider for every foe you face. Partner allies on the battlefield so they can support each other in combat. Building relationships is key—the closer your allies become, the better they'll fight together. Their future is at your command, but first you must make the most important decision in the history of Fire Emblem.

For the first time in the Fire Emblem™ series, your customized avatar is the main character.
Epic storyline centered on your avatar, forced to choose between bloodline and family who raised you.
New “My Castle” area to interact with your allies and build stronger relationships
Have StreetPass™ encounters with other players to visit their My Castle
Tap in corresponding Fire Emblem amiibo™ figures and Marth, Ike, Lucina, and Robin will appear in your game, ready for you to battle and recruit
overview_zh:
《火焰之紋章：命運》的所有三個版本（與生俱來、征服、啟示*）

關於《火焰紋章：命運：與生俱來的權利》：
兩個王國正處於戰爭邊緣。你會選擇哪一邊呢？你是星戶的繼承人，由諾裡王室成員撫養長大，夾在兩個家庭之間。如果你走與生俱來的權利之路，你將與一群陌生人一起對抗腐敗的諾爾國王。熟練地指揮他們並建立深厚的關係，以掌握這款回合製策略遊戲。

Nintendo 3DS™ 系列系統即將推出全新的 Fire Emblem™ 體驗。有史以來第一次，你的客製化化身成為主角。一支由騎士、法師、弓箭手等組成的軍隊將在系列歷史上最具戰術性的戰鬥中聽候您的指揮。每個單位和武器都有其優點和缺點，你必須針對你面對的每個敵人進行考慮。在戰場上結成盟友，這樣他們就可以在戰鬥中互相支援。建立關係是關鍵——你的盟友越親密，他們在一起戰鬥的效果就越好。他們的未來由你掌控，但首先你必須做出《火焰之紋章》史上最重要的決定。

《火焰之紋章™》系列首次以您的客製化化身為主角（星堂王國的王子或公主）
史詩般的故事情節以你的化身為中心，被迫在血統和養育你的家庭之間做出選擇。
新的「我的城堡」區域可與您的盟友互動並建立更牢固的關係
透過 StreetPass™ 與其他玩家相遇，參觀他們的“我的城堡”
Tap in corresponding Fire Emblem amiibo™ figures and Marth, Ike, Lucina, and Robin will appear in your game, ready for you to battle and recruit
關於《火焰紋章：命運：征服》
兩個王國正處於戰爭邊緣。你會選擇哪一邊呢？你是星戶的繼承人，由諾裡王室成員撫養長大，夾在兩個家庭之間。如果你走征服之路，你必須努力從內部改變你被誤導的王國。以專業的精確度指揮戰士並建立深厚的關係，以掌握這款回合製策略遊戲。

Nintendo 3DS™ 系列系統即將推出全新的 Fire Emblem™ 體驗。有史以來第一次，你的客製化化身成為主角。一支由騎士、法師、弓箭手等組成的軍隊將在系列歷史上最具戰術性的戰鬥中聽候您的指揮。每個單位和武器都有其優點和缺點，你必須針對你面對的每個敵人進行考慮。在戰場上結成盟友，這樣他們就可以在戰鬥中互相支援。建立關係是關鍵——你的盟友越親密，他們在一起戰鬥的效果就越好。他們的未來由你掌控，但首先你必須做出《火焰之紋章》史上最重要的決定。

在《火焰之紋章™》系列中，您的客製化化身首次成為主角。
史詩般的故事情節以你的化身為中心，被迫在血統和養育你的家庭之間做出選擇。
新的「我的城堡」區域可與您的盟友互動並建立更牢固的關係
透過 StreetPass™ 與其他玩家相遇，參觀他們的“我的城堡”
Tap in corresponding Fire Emblem amiibo™ figures and Marth, Ike, Lucina, and Robin will appear in your game, ready for you to battle and recruit

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレムif

overview_en:
Developed by the same team that created Fire Emblem Awakening, the new adventure adds challenges never before seen in the series and asks players to make decisions that will affect the game’s world in new ways. For the first time in the series, players take on the role of the main character and command an army, while struggling to decide which path to follow: helping blood relatives or the family that raised him or her.

Fire Emblem Fates is available in two separate chapters: Birthright and Conquest. Each version of the game offers a different path to play, posing to players an unprecedented choice: fight an opposing force or join the other side and try to make changes from within.
overview_zh:
這款新冒險遊戲由《火焰紋章覺醒》的同一團隊開發，增加了該系列中前所未有的挑戰，並要求玩家做出將以新方式影響遊戲世界的決定。在該系列中，玩家第一次扮演主角並指揮一支軍隊，同時努力決定走哪條路：幫助血親或撫養他或她的家庭。

《火焰紋章：命運》分為兩個獨立的章節：與生俱來的權利和征服。遊戲的每個版本都提供了不同的遊戲路徑，為玩家提供了前所未有的選擇：與敵對勢力作戰或加入對手並嘗試從內部做出改變。

overview_en:
Developed by the same team that created Fire Emblem Awakening, the new adventure adds challenges never before seen in the series and asks players to make decisions that will affect the game’s world in new ways. For the first time in the series, players take on the role of the main character and command an army, while struggling to decide which path to follow: helping blood relatives or the family that raised him or her.

Fire Emblem Fates is available in two separate chapters: Birthright and Conquest. Each version of the game offers a different path to play, posing to players an unprecedented choice: fight an opposing force or join the other side and try to make changes from within.
overview_zh:
這款新冒險遊戲由《火焰紋章覺醒》的同一團隊開發，增加了該系列中前所未有的挑戰，並要求玩家做出將以新方式影響遊戲世界的決定。在該系列中，玩家第一次扮演主角並指揮一支軍隊，同時努力決定走哪條路：幫助血親或撫養他或她的家庭。

《火焰紋章：命運》分為兩個獨立的章節：與生俱來的權利和征服。遊戲的每個版本都提供了不同的遊戲路徑，為玩家提供了前所未有的選擇：與敵對勢力作戰或加入對手並嘗試從內部做出改變。

title_jp: ファイアーエムブレム無双
overview_en: Clash with legions of soldiers and fierce monsters as Marth, Xander, Corrin, and other Fire Emblem heroes unleashing over-the-top-powerful Dynasty Warriors-style moves. Take direct control of known and original Fire Emblem characters, issue them strategic commands in the midst of battle, pair up heroes to unleash stunning attacks, and more. Unlock new playable heroes, each with their own unique moves, special attacks, weapon types, and voiced dialogue in this large-scale action game from the Hyrule Warriors team.
overview_zh: 飾演 Marth、Xander、Corrin 和其他《火焰之紋章》英雄，釋放出超強的真三國無雙風格招式，與大批士兵和兇猛的怪物發生衝突。直接控制已知的原創火焰紋章角色，在戰鬥中向他們發出戰略命令，配對英雄以發動驚人的攻擊等等。在這款由海拉爾勇士團隊打造的大型動作遊戲中，解鎖新的可玩英雄，每個英雄都有自己獨特的動作、特殊攻擊、武器型別和語音對話。

title_jp: ぐるっとスプラッシュ!
カセキホリダー ムゲンギア
overview_en: Fossil Fighters: Frontier adds to the excitement of the Fossil Fighters series with a unique first: players can now hop into their vehicles and drive around exotic locations to excavate fossils, which transform into real-life dinosaurs known as Vivosaurs. Players battle their Vivosaur with wild Vivosaurs they encounter on digging adventures.
overview_zh: 《化石戰士：前沿》以獨特的第一方式增添了《化石戰士》系列的刺激性：玩家現在可以跳上自己的車輛，在奇異的地點行駛以挖掘化石，這些化石會變成現實生活中的恐龍，稱為活龍。玩家在挖掘冒險中與他們遇到的野生活龍戰鬥。

title_jp: いきものづくり クリエイトーイ
overview_en: Players can create their own creatures and use them to explore a planet that they customize. Freakyforms Deluxe: Your Creations, Alive! contains new features not found in the original downloadable title, such as dungeons to explore, enhanced creating capabilities with more parts to choose from and new special powers that can be used to further personalize the creatures. The game also features Download Play, which allows players to share the creative experience with friends who do not have a copy of the game.
overview_zh: 玩家可以創造自己的生物並使用它們探索他們定製的星球。 Freakyforms Deluxe：你的創作，活著！包含原始可下載遊戲中未發現的新功能，例如探索地下城、增強的創造能力（有更多部件可供選擇）以及可用於進一步個性化生物的新特殊能力。遊戲還提供下載遊戲功能，讓玩家可以與沒有遊戲副本的朋友分享創作體驗。

overview_en: Frogger is back, and he's bringing a whole new dimension with him! Just in time for his 30th anniversary, Frogger is back, crossing streets, taking names and coming at you in 3D! The excitement of Frogger's timeless run-and-dodge gameplay is arriving at a Nintendo 3DS near you, with fun new graphics, novel level twists, and new friends to help Frogger make it across the way!
overview_zh: 青蛙過河回來了，他帶來了一個全新的維度！正好趕上他的 30 週年紀念日，青蛙過河，記下名字，以 3D 形式向你襲來！青蛙過時的奔跑和躲避遊戲的刺激即將登陸您附近的 Nintendo 3DS，其中包含有趣的新圖形、新穎的關卡轉折以及幫助青蛙過關的新朋友！

title_en: Fujiko F. Fujio Characters Daishuugou! SF Dotabata Party!!
title_jp: Fujiko F. Fujio Characters Daishuugou! SF Dotabata Party!!
no_intro_name: Fujiko F. Fujio Characters Daishuugou! SF Dotabata Party!! (Japan)

overview_en:
Experience all the fun of the fair with this collection of 11 classic funfair party games!

Test your skills against up to 4 other players using the fun, motion-sensor and gyroscope controls. With all-time favourites including: Tin Can Alley, Shooting Gallery, Hook a Duck, Ball Roll, Electro Loop, Balloon Burst, Claw Crane, Camel Derby, Ball-in-the-Glass, Slam Dunk and Strike the Bell; there’s hours of carnival fun for all the family!

11 All-time Favourite Funfair games.

Supports Mii characters.

4 games modes; single player, hotseat and with up to 4 players via local play and on the internet.
overview_zh:
透過這 11 款經典遊樂場派對遊戲合輯，體驗遊樂場的所有樂趣！

使用有趣的運動感應器和陀螺儀控制與最多 4 名其他玩家測試您的技能。最受歡迎的遊戲包括：罐頭巷、射擊場、鉤鴨、滾球、電動環、氣球爆裂、爪形起重機、駱駝德比、玻璃球、灌籃高手和敲鐘；全家都可以享受數小時的狂歡樂趣！

11 款最受喜愛的 Funfair 遊戲。

支援 Mii 角色。

4種遊戲模式；單人遊戲、熱座遊戲以及最多 4 名玩家透過本地遊戲和網路進行遊戲。

title_jp: ハッピー☆アニマル牧場
overview_en: Run your own 3D funky and frenzied farm! Ready to make some wool? Pop your sheep into The Shearing Machine and he will hilariously cannonball out, surprised but shorn. Ready to harvest your crops? Hook up the Flying FruitBox-Haybale-Copter that flies around crazily picking up boxes of fruit and grain. With tons of wacky contraptions and goofy animals, Funky Barn 3D, the first farm simulation game for Nintendo 3DS, is not your average farm game.
overview_zh: 經營你自己的 3D 時髦而瘋狂的農場！準備好製作羊毛了嗎？把你的羊放進剪毛機裡，他就會滑稽地用砲彈射出來，驚訝但被剪毛。準備好收割莊稼了嗎？連線上飛行水果箱-乾草直升機，它會瘋狂地飛來飛去，撿起一箱箱水果和穀物。 Funky Barn 3D 是任天堂 3DS 上的第一款農場模擬遊戲，擁有大量古怪的裝置和傻乎乎的動物，它不是一般的農場遊戲。

title_en: Future Card Buddyfight - Mezase! Buddy Champion!
title_jp: Future Card Buddyfight - Mezase! Buddy Champion!
title_zh: 未來卡片 戰鬥夥伴
no_intro_name: Future Card Buddyfight - Mezase! Buddy Champion! (Japan)

title_en: Future Card Buddyfight - Yuujou no Bakunetsu Fight!
title_jp: Future Card Buddyfight - Yuujou no Bakunetsu Fight!
title_zh: 未來卡片 戰鬥夥伴
no_intro_name: Future Card Buddyfight - Yuujou no Bakunetsu Fight! (Japan)

overview_en: There's trouble in Monster Town! Vlad the vampire's loyal zombies have disappeared. Gabrielle and all her monster friends will have to bust some serious moves on the dance floor in order to lure them back. Along the way, maybe they can uncover the identity of the mysterious creature that's terrorizing Monster Town's zombies!
overview_zh: 怪物鎮有麻煩了！吸血鬼弗拉德的忠實殭屍消失了。加布裡埃爾和她所有的怪物朋友必須在舞池上做出一些嚴肅的動作才能吸引他們回來。一路上，也許他們可以揭開威脅怪物鎮殭屍的神秘生物的身份！

overview_en: Games Festival 2 is a misc game developed by Bigben Interactive and released on Nintendo 3DS. Games Festival is back and better than ever! Incredible and fun attractions for young and old, bowling, skeet shooting, games of skill and the famous Whack-a-Mole!
overview_zh: Games Festival 2 是一款由 Bigben Interactive 開發並在 Nintendo 3DS 上發行的雜項遊戲。遊戲節又回來了，而且比以往任何時候都更好！適合年輕人和老年人的令人難以置信和有趣的景點，保齡球、雙向飛碟射擊、技巧遊戲和著名的打地鼠遊戲！

title_en: Gardening Mama - Mama to Mori no Nakama-tachi
title_jp: Gardening Mama - Mama to Mori no Nakama-tachi
no_intro_name: Gardening Mama - Mama to Mori no Nakama-tachi (Japan)

overview_en: Mama is back in her gardening gloves planting the seeds of friendship! Make your animal friends happy by growing flowers, fruits and vegetables they can sell in their forest shops. With intuitive, stylus based-activities, customization and tons of fun rewards, Garden Mama 2: Forest Friends will get you growing in no time!
overview_zh: 媽媽又戴上了園藝手套，播種友誼的種子！種植鮮花、水果和蔬菜，讓你的動物朋友開心，然後在森林商店裡販售。憑藉直覺的、基於手寫筆的活動、定製和大量有趣的獎勵，花園媽媽 2：森林朋友將讓您立即成長！

overview_en:
Your grandfather's once beautiful garden has decayed. And you don't have any money. His old house's many rooms are crammed with all sorts of odds and ends, though. So you get to work, selling the stuff.

News of your project spreads fast, and soon it's even in the paper.

Will you manage to restore the garden to its original splendor?

- The chart topper - now for Nintendo 3DS
- Exclusive, gorgeous 3D garden
- Hidden objects + building strategy
- Lovingly drawn with elaborate animation
overview_zh:
你祖父曾經美麗的花園已經腐爛了。而且你沒有錢。不過，他的老房子的許多房間都塞滿了各種各樣的雜物。所以你開始工作，賣東西。

您的專案的訊息傳播得很快，很快甚至登上了報紙。

你能設法讓花園恢復原來的輝煌嗎？

- 排行榜冠軍 - 現在適用於 Nintendo 3DS
- 獨特、華麗的3D花園
- 隱藏物品+建築策略
- 精心繪製的動畫

overview_en:
The laziest cat in the world gets a serious speed boost! Three difficulties and four game modes await you. Quick race, championship, time trial and daily challenge. Up to four friends can play against each other via the local wifi network. It's time to burn rubber and eat lasagne!

Garfield burns up the road with a new racing game from Anuman Interactive. Garfield Kart is a no holds barred cross-country race with the world's most famous cat at the steering wheel.
overview_zh:
世界上最懶的貓的速度得到了顯著提升！三種難度和四種遊戲模式都等著您。快速比賽、錦標賽、計時賽和每日挑戰。最多四個朋友可以透過本地 WiFi 網路互相對戰。是時候燒橡膠吃烤寬麵了！

加菲貓透過 Anuman Interactive 推出的一款新賽車遊戲在公路上大放異彩。加菲貓卡丁車是一場沒有任何限制的越野比賽，方向盤上有世界上最著名的貓。

overview_en: Many ages ago. The Earth was populated by beings that lived in peace and harmony until a fearsome scientist named IMBU and his henchmen arrived to steal earth's energy, capture all the inhabitants and lock them up in crystal cells. Miraculously, three creatures escaped: BAU, BAM and BOM. They became Gem Smashers, traveling the world to spring, spin, and smash the crystal cells where their friends are imprisoned. It's up to you to help our little heroes survive!
overview_zh: 許多年前。地球上居住著和平與和諧的生物，直到一位名叫 IMBU 的可怕科學家和他的追隨者到來竊取地球能量，捕獲所有居民並將他們鎖在水晶細胞中。奇蹟般地，三個生物逃脫了：BAU、BAM 和 BOM。他們成為寶石粉碎者，週遊世界，跳躍、旋轉並粉碎囚禁他們朋友的水晶牢房。你需要幫助我們的小英雄生存！

title_jp: ジェネレーター・レックス
overview_en: Based on Cartoon Network's top-rated animated series, the Generator Rex: Agent of Providence video game lets players take control of Rex, a teenager who has harnessed nanites within his body to become the ultimate weapon. In the game, Rex is in a race against time to prevent Van Kleiss and his minions from gaining unprecedented powers that could destroy the earth!
overview_zh: 雷克斯發電機：普羅​​維登斯特工電玩遊戲以卡通網路的頂級動畫系列為基礎，讓玩家控制雷克斯，一個利用體內奈米機器人成為終極武器的青少年。在遊戲中，雷克斯正在與時間賽跑，阻止範克萊斯和他的爪牙獲得可能毀滅地球的前所未有的力量！

overview_en:
Make the World of Fashion your Own

Explore the City

Hit the streets in your most stylish digs to meet new friends, clients, and local celebs.

Make Your Mark

Dominate the city's fashion scene as a Boutique Manager, Hair Stylist, Make-up Artist, Designer, and Model. Try them all on for size!

Get the Look

Combine clothing types and in-game brands to create a style all your own.

Share Your Style

Exchange showrooms, visit other players' cities, and enter in-game fashion contests.
overview_zh:
讓時尚世界成為您自己的

探索城市

在您最時尚的住宿走上街頭，結識新朋友、客戶和當地名人。

留下你的印記

身為精品店經理、髮型師、化妝師、設計師和模特，主宰城市的時尚界。全部試穿尺寸！

看看

結合服裝型別和遊戲內品牌來創造自己的風格。

分享你的風格

交換陳列室，參觀其他玩家的城市，並參加遊戲中的時尚比賽。

overview_en:
Enter the world of fashion and begin your career as the next top model and editor in Girls Fashion Shoot. Take the reins at a popular fashion magazine, become a model yourself and aim for the top by creating stylish articles to get yourself noticed.

Hundreds of customization options when you start the game thousands more the further you progress! Be the model you have always wanted to be.

Pick your choice of clothing and style from the hundreds available to start your modeling career.

Decide what look you're going for with your choice of hairstyle.

Go on fashion shoots to increase your fame and cash. Decide on poses, facial expressions and even backgrounds and effects.

Start work at a fashion magazine and edit your own articles.

Paint your nails with every color, pattern or art from the massive palette, then choose how to pose to get the best attention.

Finish off your style and add a touch of glamour with hundred of style options.

Succeed at not only being the next top model, but also as a powerful magazine editor.
overview_zh:
進入時尚世界，在《Girls Fashion Shoot》中作為下一位頂級模特兒和編輯開始您的職業生涯。掌管一本流行時尚雜誌，自己成為一名模特，並透過創作時尚文章來吸引自己的關注，力爭成為頂尖人物。

當您開始遊戲時，有數百個自訂選項，隨著您的進步，更多的自訂選項也會越來越多！成為您一直想成為的模特兒。

從數百種服裝和風格中選擇您喜歡的服裝和風格，開始您的模特兒生涯。

根據您選擇的髮型來決定您想要的外觀。

進行時尚拍攝以增加您的名氣和金錢。決定姿勢、臉部表情，甚至背景和效果。

開始在時尚雜誌工作並編輯自己的文章。

從巨大的調色盤中選擇各種顏色、圖案或藝術來塗上你的指甲，然後選擇如何擺姿勢以獲得最佳的關注。

透過數百種風格選擇來完成您的風格並增添一絲魅力。

不僅成功成為下一個頂級模特，而且成為一名強大的雜誌編輯。

title_en: Go! Princess PreCure - Sugar Oukoku to 6-nin no Princess!
title_jp: Go! Princess PreCure - Sugar Oukoku to 6-nin no Princess!
no_intro_name: Go! Princess PreCure - Sugar Oukoku to 6-nin no Princess! (Japan)

overview_en: The walk home from school today is going to be a lot spookier than usual Your sleepy neighborhoods been overrun by monsters! Werewolves prowl the woods, Gnomes roam underfoot, and scarecrows walk at midnight. But these aren't ordinary monstersthey're R.L. Stine's famous Goosebumps monsters, released from their books and looking to wreak havoc! You'll need to use your wits to investigate the surroundings, puzzle out clues, and outsmart the monsters before it's too late! Survive a trek through your neighborhood, unravel the mysteries of the Dead House, and sneak through the mall after hours; only then can you confront Slappy and stop his plans for revenge! Players beware you're in for a scare in the exciting Goosebumps video game, a prequel to the major motion picture in theaters October 16th!
overview_zh: 今天放學回家的路會比平常更恐怖，你沉睡的街區已經被怪物佔領了！狼人在樹林裡徘徊，侏儒在腳下漫步，稻草人在午夜。但這些並不是普通的怪物，它們是 R.L. Stine 著名的雞皮疙瘩怪物，它們從書中被釋放出來，想要造成嚴重破壞！你需要運用你的智慧來調查周圍的環境，找出線索，並在為時已晚之前智勝怪物！在你的鄰居中長途跋涉生存，解開死亡之家的神秘面紗，並在下班後潛入商場；只有這樣你才能對抗Slappy並阻止他的復仇計劃！玩家請注意，激動人心的 Goosebumps 影片遊戲將讓您感到害怕，該遊戲是 10 月 16 日上映的大型電影的前傳！

title_en: Gotouchi Tetsudou - Gotouchi Chara to Nihon Zenkoku no Tabi
title_jp: Gotouchi Tetsudou - Gotouchi Chara to Nihon Zenkoku no Tabi
no_intro_name: Gotouchi Tetsudou - Gotouchi Chara to Nihon Zenkoku no Tabi (Japan)

title_en: Grande LEGO Aventure - Le Jeu Video, La
no_intro_name: Grande LEGO Aventure - Le Jeu Video, La (France) (En,Fr,Es,It,Nl,Da)

title_en: Gravity Falls - Legend of the Gnome Gemulets
overview_en: Gravity Falls: Legend of the Gnome Gemulets is a side-scrolling platform game. Players assume control of Dipper and Mabel, and they can freely switch between them at any moment during the game. The two characters have different abilities. Dipper can combat enemies with a close-ranged weapon called Gnome Battle Cuffs and look for clues using a flashlight, while Mabel can utilize a grappling hook to reach high grounds, and combat enemies with ranged attacks by her "Fleece of Bedazzlement-enhanced sweater sleeves". Players can purchase new items from vendors, and return to the regions they have previously explored, similar to a metroidvania.
overview_zh: 《重力瀑布：侏儒寶石傳奇》是一款橫向捲軸平臺遊戲。玩家控制迪普和梅布林，並且可以在遊戲過程中隨時在他們之間自由切換。這兩個角色擁有不同的能力。迪普可以使用名為侏儒戰鬥袖口的近距離武器與敵人作戰，並使用手電筒尋找線索，而梅布林可以使用抓鉤到達高地，並透過她的「迷惑之羊毛增強毛衣袖」與遠端攻擊作戰。玩家可以從供應商購買新物品，然後返回他們之前探索過的地區，類似於銀河惡魔城。
no_intro_name: Gravity Falls - Legend of the Gnome Gemulets (USA)

title_en: Green Lantern - Rise of the Manhunters
overview_en: Green Lantern: Rise of the Manhunters is inspired by the feature film, which brings the enduringly popular DC Comics super hero to the big screen for the first time and which stars Ryan Reynolds in the title role as Hal Jordan, the newest member of the Green Lantern Corps. In the videogame players will utilize over a dozen constructs and take flight across the deepest parts of the Universe to restore intergalactic order by wielding the ultimate weapon: the Green Lantern power ring.
overview_zh: 《綠燈俠：獵人崛起》的靈感來自於這部長片，該電影將經久不衰的 DC 漫畫超級英雄首次搬上大銀幕，並由瑞安雷諾茲主演，飾演綠燈俠軍團的最新成員哈爾喬丹。在電玩遊戲中，玩家將利用十多個構造體並飛越宇宙最深處，透過揮舞終極武器：綠燈俠能量戒指來恢復星際秩序。
no_intro_name: Green Lantern - Rise of the Manhunters (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

overview_en: This is an exclusive 3DS title in the Gundam series, with new gameplay systems designed for the stereogram technology.
overview_zh: 這是高達系列中的獨家 3DS 遊戲，具有專為立體圖技術設計的新遊戲系統。

overview_en: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney Trilogy, known in Japan as Gyakuten Saiban 123: Naruhodō Selection, is a compilation video game of the first 3 games in the Ace Attorney series, Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney, Justice for All, and Trials and Tribulations.
overview_zh: 《逆轉裁判》三部曲，在日本被稱為《逆轉裁判 123：成步堂精選》，是《逆轉裁判》系列前 3 款遊戲《逆轉裁判》、《正義》和《審判與磨難》的合輯。

overview_en: This is the fourth game in the series and the first developed specifically for Nintendo DS and sees a change of direction for the story line with the introduction of new defense attorney Apollo Justice and a host of new characters. Players star as rookie defense attorney Apollo Justice as he visits crime scenes, questions key witnesses and collects vital evidence before stepping into the courtroom to prove his clients' innocence. Facing Apollo across the courtroom is the highly talented and flamboyant prosecutor Klavier Gavin who, in addition to being a legal genius, is also lead singer with Gavinners, a highly successful rock band with a string of hits to their name.
overview_zh: 這是該系列的第四款遊戲，也是第一款專為 Nintendo DS 開發的遊戲，隨著新辯護律師阿波羅正義和許多新角色的引入，故事情節的方向發生了變化。玩家扮演新秀辯護律師阿波羅正義 (Apollo Justice)，他將走訪犯罪現場、詢問關鍵證人並收集重要證據，然後進入法庭證明客戶的清白。法庭對面的阿波羅是才華橫溢、個性張揚的檢察官克拉維爾·加文 (Klavier Gavin)，他不僅是一位法律天才，還是 Gavinners 的主唱，Gavinners 是一支非常成功的搖滾樂隊，擁有一系列熱門歌曲。

overview_en: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney − Dual Destinies, known in Japan as Gyakuten Saiban 5, is a visual novel adventure video game developed and published by Capcom. It is the fifth main entry in the Ace Attorney series, and was originally released for the Nintendo 3DS in 2013, with iOS and Android versions following in 2014 and 2017.
overview_zh: 菲尼克斯·賴特：逆轉裁判 - 雙重命運，在日本被稱為“逆轉裁判 5”，是一款由 Capcom 開發和發行的視覺小說冒險影片遊戲。它是逆轉裁判系列的第五部主要作品，最初於 2013 年針對 Nintendo 3DS 發布，隨後於 2014 年和 2017 年推出 iOS 和 Android 版本。

overview_en: Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney − Spirit of Justice, known in Japan as Gyakuten Saiban 6, is a visual novel adventure video game developed and published by Capcom, and the sixth main entry in the Ace Attorney series. The game was released for Nintendo 3DS in Japan in June 2016, and in North America and Europe the following September. Versions for iOS and Android were released a year later in September 2017.
overview_zh: 《逆轉裁判：正義之魂》（在日本被稱為《逆轉裁判 6》）是一款由 Capcom 開發和發行的視覺小說冒險遊戲，也是《逆轉裁判》系列的第六部主作。該遊戲於 2016 年 6 月在日本面向任天堂 3DS 發布，並於隔年 9 月在北美和歐洲發布。 iOS 和 Android 版本於一年後的 2017 年 9 月發布。

overview_en:
Haikyu!! Tsunage! Itadaki no Keshiki!! is a Nintendo 3DS by Bandai Namco based on the volleyball anime and manga series, Haikyu!!.

The game has the player control the protagonists of the series in a RPG manner. The player trains the team and coordinates the team's actions in a RPG battle like when the point is to get the higher score against the opposing team.

Also include is a mode called Haikyu Quest which takes the characters and puts them in a classic rpg like Dragon Quest. The characters adopt appearances similar to classic RPG classes instead of their uniform.
overview_zh:
海奎！ ！綱！板瀧之殲！ ！是 Bandai Namco 出品的任天堂 3DS，以排球動畫和漫畫系列 Haikyu!!為基礎。

遊戲讓玩家以角色扮演遊戲的方式控制該系列的主角。玩家在 RPG 戰鬥中訓練隊伍並協調隊伍的行動，就像在對抗對手隊伍時獲得更高的分數一樣。

還包括一種名為 Haikyu Quest 的模式，將角色放入像勇者鬥惡龍這樣的經典角色扮演遊戲中。角色採用類似於經典 RPG 職業的外觀，而不是製服。

overview_en: At a time when shogunate and imperial forces clashed for supremacy over Japan, Chizuru travels to Kyoto in search of her missing father. She runs into the Shinsengumi, a band of samurai warriors sworn to protect the shogun. Chizuru soon learns that they, too, are looking for her father. What awaits them is more than just your typical missing person's case, as they face off against imperial soldiers and the supernatural! But in the midst of all this madness, will sweet and innocent Chizuru find love?
overview_zh: 幕府與帝國軍隊爭奪日本霸權之際，千鶴前往京都尋找失蹤的父親。她遇到了新選組，一群發誓要保護將軍的武士。千鶴很快得知他們也在尋找她的父親。等待他們的不僅是典型的失蹤案，他們還要面對帝國士兵和超自然力量！但在這一切瘋狂之中，甜蜜天真的千鶴能找到愛情嗎？

title_jp: ハッピー フィート2 踊るペンギンレスキュー隊
overview_en: Happy Feet Two - The Videogame is a 3D musical adventure game for the entire family inspired by the whimsical Antarctic world of the animated film Happy Feet Two. The upbeat game is scored by the three time Grammy Award winning band Ozomatli to get players into the penguin groove.
overview_zh: Happy Feet Two - The Videogame 是一款適合全家大小一起玩的 3D 音樂冒險遊戲，靈感源自動畫電影《Happy Feet Two》中異想天開的南極世界。三屆葛萊美獎得主樂團 Ozomatli 為這款歡快的遊戲配樂，讓玩家進入企鵝狀態。

title_jp: リズムハンター ハーモナイト
overview_en: HarmoKnight is an action packed rhythm game where you use Tempo's Music Note Staff to beat drums, crash cymbals, and smack enemies through more than 50 levels with unique boss fights.
overview_zh: HarmoKnight 是一款動作豐富的節奏遊戲，您可以使用 Tempo 的音符棒敲鼓、敲鈸，並透過 50 多個關卡以及獨特的 Boss 戰鬥來打擊敵人。

overview_en: Revive the Land, Save a Village. Many people used to live in Skytree Village, and the land was lush and green. However, the power of the Harvest Goddess gradually began to wane, and the land became parched and dry. It's up to you revive the seven Skytrees to bring life back to this desolate land. With user-friendly tutorials, you will immediately be able to jump into the thick of things, customizing your farm by raising and lowering the land, creating rivers, ponds, and more. Upgraded tools will assist you shaping the land more efficiently, and afterwards you can kick back and relax in your boat to do a spot of fishing. Play as a boy or a girl, woo bachelors and bachelorettes, and start a family.
overview_zh: 復興土地，拯救村莊。晴空塔村以前住過很多人，土地鬱鬱蔥蔥。然而，豐收女神的力量逐漸減弱，大地變得乾燥。你要復興七棵晴空塔，讓這片荒涼的土地重獲生機。透過使用者友好的教程，您將立即能夠深入瞭解，透過升高和降低土地、建立河流、池塘等來客製化您的農場。升級後的工具將幫助您更有效地塑造土地，然後您可以在船上放鬆身心去釣魚。扮演男孩或女孩，追求單身漢和單身女子，並建立家庭。

title_jp: 牧場物語 はじまりの大地
title_zh: 牧場物語 起源的大地
overview_en: Once a thriving town, Echo Village is almost empty after the inhabitants lost everything in a poor economy. Your parents recently offered you a chance to renovate the abandoned family farm, but reviving a successful ranch requires rebuilding the town. Can you find the materials and blueprints that allow you to create the best community in the land?
overview_zh: 迴聲村曾經是一個繁榮的小鎮，由於經濟不景氣，居民失去了一切，現在幾乎空無一人。你的父母最近為你提供了一個翻新廢棄家庭農場的機會，但要復興一個成功的牧場需要重建城鎮。你能找到材料和藍圖來創造這片土地上最好的社群嗎？

title_jp: 牧場物語 ふたごの村
title_zh: 牧場物語 雙子之村
overview_en: In Harvest Moon 3D: The Lost Valley, players will experience the role-playing farm simulation in a three-dimensional setting for the first time. The game has a fully customizable world, and players can customize their field in any way they see fit: from a field full of tulips to a valley filled with water, the choice is up to you. You've never played a Harvest Moon game quite like this!
overview_zh: 在《Harvest Moon 3D：失落的山谷》中，玩家將首次在三維環境中體驗角色扮演農場模擬。遊戲擁有一個完全可自訂的世界，玩家可以按照自己認為合適的方式自訂自己的場地：從長滿鬱金香的場地到充滿水的山谷，選擇權取決於你。您從未玩過這樣的 Harvest Moon 遊戲！

title_en: Harvest Moon 3D - The Tale of Two Towns
title_jp: 牧場物語 ふたごの村
title_zh: 牧場物語 雙子之村
overview_en:
Long ago the towns of Bluebell and Konohana were friendly neighbors, joined together by a tunnel underneath the mountain that separates the towns. Eventually the towns started to disagree with each other on whose town had the best cooking cuisine. As the villagers became more obnoxious with each other, the Harvest Goddess became more annoyed with them. One day she finally put her foot down and collapsed the tunnel between the towns, cutting them off from each other. Now the only interaction the towns have with each other is at their cooking festival, where their cooking conflict continues four times per season. 

As a new farmer, you are eager to start your new life at one of the towns but a freak travel accident makes you to forget what town you originally were going to live in! Listen to each mayor's story, hear about each town, and then decide where you want to start your new farm life.
overview_zh:
很久以前，風信子鎮和木花鎮是友善的鄰居，山下的一條隧道將兩個鎮分開。最終，各個城鎮開始就哪個城鎮的烹飪最好吃而產生分歧。隨著村民們彼此之間的厭惡程度加深，豐收女神也對他們更加惱火。有一天，她終於下定決心，炸毀了城鎮之間的隧道，切斷了城鎮之間的連結。現在，城鎮之間唯一的互動是在烹飪節上，每個季節他們的烹飪衝突會持續四次。 

作為一個新農民，你渴望在其中一個城鎮開始新的生活，但一場奇怪的旅行事故讓你忘記了你原本要住在哪個城鎮！聽聽每位市長的故事，瞭解每個城鎮，然後決定您想在哪裡開始新的農場生活。
no_intro_name: Harvest Moon 3D - The Tale of Two Towns (USA)

overview_en: Hatsune Miku: Project Mirai DX is a 3D rhythm action game starring the world's most famous virtual singer Hatsune Miku. Project Mirai DX features 48 full length versions of fan-favorite songs with multiple play styles and game modes that people of any age or skill level can enjoy. Players can challenge themselves by trying to match the rhythm in "Tap Mode" and "Button Mode," each with multiple difficulty levels, which can be further augmented with challenge and support items. Join the Miku phenomenon by expressing yourself through fun creative tools, sharing your cute customizations, and experiencing some of the best music from the world's favorite digital diva!
overview_zh: 《初音未來：Project Mirai DX》是一款 3D 節奏動作遊戲，由世界上最著名的虛擬歌手初音未來主演。 Project Mirai DX 包含 48 首粉絲喜愛的歌曲的完整版本，具有多種遊戲風格和遊戲模式，任何年齡或技能水平的人都可以享受。玩家可以透過嘗試匹配「點選模式」和「按鈕模式」中的節奏來挑戰自己，每種模式都有多個難度級別，並且可以透過挑戰和支援專案進一步增強難度。加入 Miku 現象，透過有趣的創意工具表達自己，分享您可愛的定製，並體驗世界上最受歡迎的數位天后的一些最佳音樂！

title_en: Hatsune Miku and Future Stars - Project Mirai
title_jp: Hatsune Miku and Future Stars - Project Mirai
title_zh: 初音未來與未來之星 未來計劃
overview_en: Hatsune Miku and Future Stars: Project Mirai is a 2012 rhythm game created by Sega and Crypton Future Media for the Nintendo 3DS. The game is a spin-off of the Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA series of Vocaloid rhythm games and was first released on March 8, 2012 in Japan with no international release.
overview_zh: 《初音未來與未來之星：未來計畫》是一款由世嘉和 Crypton Future Media 於 2012 年為任天堂 3DS 打造的節奏遊戲。該遊戲是 Vocaloid 節奏遊戲《初音未來：Project DIVA》系列的衍生作品，於 2012 年 3 月 8 日在日本首次發行，並未在國際上發行。
no_intro_name: Hatsune Miku and Future Stars - Project Mirai (Japan)

overview_en: Stay sharp in this blisteringly fast-paced modern day shooter. Protect your team as you move from cover to cover, eliminating threats as they appear! Fight on foot or in a variety of vehicles including tanks, helicopters, and APCs. Utilize weapons ranging from handguns to mounted cannons and grenades to stay alive, keep fighting, and complete your mission.
overview_zh: 在這款快節奏的現代射擊遊戲中保持敏銳。當你從一個掩體移動到另一個掩體時保護你的團隊，消除出現的威脅！步行或乘坐各種車輛（包括坦克、直升機和裝甲運兵車）進行戰鬥。使用手槍、加農砲和手榴彈等武器來維持生命、繼續戰鬥並完成任務。

overview_en:
Play with Kitty and her entire family.

Learn while having fun with 25 entertaining workshops.

Collect hundreds of images and disguises for Kitty and Mimmy!
overview_zh:
與凱蒂和她的全家人一起玩耍。

透過 25 個有趣的研討會，邊學習邊享受樂趣。

為凱蒂和咪咪收集數百張影象和偽裝！

title_en: Hello Kitty Picnic with Sanrio Characters
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty Picnic with Sanrio Characters (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_en: Hello Kitty Picnic with Sanrio Friends
overview_en: Hello Kitty Picnic with Sanrio Friends invites players to join Hello Kitty and Sanrio friends as they prepare for a picnic adventure. Play 10 mini-games including Hidden Object, Spot the Difference, and Picnic Blanket Checkers to collect goodies for the party. Explore and decorate whimsical environments including Hello Kitty's bedroom, kitchen and more. Along the way earn apples to receive special outfits and accessories for Hello Kitty. Interact directly with Hello Kitty using the 3DS touch screen and listen as the game guides you along. Invite your friends to join the fun in a variety of multiplayer modes as you play with your favorite Sanrio characters including My Melody, Keroppi, Chococat, Badtz-Maru, Little Twin Stars, and many more!
overview_zh: Hello Kitty 與三麗鷗朋友一起野餐邀請玩家與 Hello Kitty 和三麗鷗朋友一起準備野餐冒險。玩 10 個迷你遊戲，包括隱藏物體、找茬和野餐毯子跳棋，為派對收集好東西。探索和裝飾異想天開的環境，包括 Hello Kitty 的臥室、廚房等。一路上賺取蘋果即可獲得 Hello Kitty 的特殊服裝和配件。使用 3DS 觸控螢幕直接與 Hello Kitty 互動，並聆聽遊戲的引導。邀請您的朋友加入各種多人遊戲模式，與您最喜歡的 Sanrio 角色一起玩，包括 My Melody、Keroppi、Chococat、Badtz-Maru、Little Twin Stars 等等！
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty Picnic with Sanrio Friends (USA)

title_en: Hello Kitty _ Friends - Rock n' World Tour
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty _ Friends - Rock n' World Tour (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_en: Hello Kitty and Sanrio Friends 3D Racing
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty and Sanrio Friends 3D Racing (USA)

title_en: Hello Kitty and the Apron of Magic - Rhythm Cooking
title_jp: ハローキティとまほうのエプロン 〜サンリオキャラクター大集合!〜
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty and the Apron of Magic - Rhythm Cooking (Europe)

title_en: Hello Kitty to Issho! Block Crash Z
title_jp: Hello Kitty to Issho! Block Crash Z
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty to Issho! Block Crash Z (Japan)

title_en: Hello Kitty to Mahou no Apron - Rhythm Cooking
title_jp: Hello Kitty to Mahou no Apron - Rhythm Cooking
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty to Mahou no Apron - Rhythm Cooking (Japan)

title_en: Hello Kitty to Sanrio Characters - World Rock Tour
title_jp: Hello Kitty to Sanrio Characters - World Rock Tour
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty to Sanrio Characters - World Rock Tour (Japan)

title_en: Hello Kitty to Sekai Ryokou! Iron na Kuni e Odekake Shimasho
title_jp: Hello Kitty to Sekai Ryokou! Iron na Kuni e Odekake Shimasho
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty to Sekai Ryokou! Iron na Kuni e Odekake Shimasho (Japan)

overview_en: HEROES OF RUIN uses StreetPass to create an inventive in-game 'Traders' Network' where players can buy and sell rare and powerful items picked up in battle. With an ever-changing inventory updated from each player passed in public, character strengths and abilities can be greatly enhanced by accessing items from other players' games. Outside of the game, HEROES OF RUIN makes use of SpotPass to reward players with rare items or unique challenges through local Wi-Fi hotspots. The official HEROES OF RUIN community website will reward players further with daily challenges and quests available to complete in-game. With social media functionality, the site will also give players a platform to meet other gamers, swap ideas and items, and team up in-game.
overview_zh: HEROES OF RUIN 使用 StreetPass 建立了一個創造性的遊戲內“交易者網路”，玩家可以在其中買賣在戰鬥中拾取的稀有而強大的物品。隨著每個玩家公開更新的不斷變化的庫存，透過存取其他玩家遊戲中的物品可以大大增強角色的優勢和能力。在遊戲之外，《HEROES OF RUIN》利用 SpotPass 透過當地 Wi-Fi 熱點獎勵玩家稀有物品或獨特挑戰。 HEROES OF RUIN 官方社群網站將進一步獎勵玩家在遊戲中完成的每日挑戰和任務。藉助社交媒體功能，該網站還將為玩家提供一個結識其他玩家、交換想法和物品以及在遊戲中組隊的平臺。

overview_en:
Captain Olimar has crashed on an unknown planet inhabited by Pikmin!

And his first 2D platformer will give you a new perspective on his adorably fierce partners. Touch the screen to throw Pikmin into action: swim with Blue Pikmin, fly with Winged Pikmin, and more to survive hostile wildlife, solve ecological puzzles, and escape!
overview_zh:
奧利馬爾船長墜毀在皮克敏居住的未知星球上！

他的第一款 2D 平臺遊戲將為您提供瞭解他可愛而兇猛的夥伴的新視角。觸控螢幕讓皮克敏投入行動：與藍色皮克敏一起游泳，與有翼皮克敏一起飛行等等，以在敵對的野生動物中生存，解決生態難題並逃脫！

overview_en: As part of the Hidden Expedition Adventure League, it's your job to explore the wreckage of this once-majestic ship.
overview_zh: 身為隱藏探險冒險聯盟的一員，你的任務就是探索這艘曾經雄偉的船隻的殘骸。

overview_en: High School DxD is a visual novel from Kadokawa Games, based on the events of the first season of the anime.
overview_zh: 高校 DxD 是角川遊戲出品的視覺小說，根據動畫第一季的事件改編。

title_en: Hime Girl Paradise - Mechikawa! Agemori Sensation!
title_jp: Hime Girl Paradise - Mechikawa! Agemori Sensation!
overview_en: Hime Girl Paradise: Mechikawa! Agemori Sensation! is an Action game, developed and published by Nippon Columbia, which was released in Japan in 2012.
overview_zh: Hime Girl Paradise: Mechikawa!上森感覺！是一款動作遊戲，由Nippon Columbia開發發行，於2012年在日本發行。
no_intro_name: Hime Girl Paradise - Mechikawa! Agemori Sensation! (Japan)

overview_en:
Discover an exciting plot behind the scenes of Hollywood and fight your way to stardom.

Hundreds of hidden objects to find and puzzles to solve.
overview_zh:
探索好萊塢幕後激動人心的情節，並為成為明星而奮鬥。

數百個隱藏物品等待尋找，謎題等待解決。

overview_en: A Tale of Life, Love, and Friendship. Hometown Story takes you to a lush, green village tucked away in the countryside. The shop you inherited has brought you back to your hometown. However, the shop has become run down, and no one wants to even window shop there anymore. Can you turn the shop around and even expand it, or is it destined to stay in the red forever? You won't have to go it alone, though. You'll get help from a magical sprite named Pochica, who will help you get the store back up and running, and introduce you to all of the unique characters who reside in the town. The villagers will all change and grow throughout the game, and that person who you thought might be up to no good when you first met them just might have a heart of gold! Your experiences will be completely different from anyone else's. You'll never know what to expect in Hometown Story.
overview_zh: 一個關於生活、愛和友誼的故事。 《家鄉故事》將帶您來到一個鬱鬱蔥蔥、綠色的鄉村。你繼承的店鋪帶你回到了故鄉。然而，這家商店已經破敗不堪，甚至沒有人願意去那裡逛逛。你能否扭轉局面，甚至擴大規模，還是註定永遠虧損？不過，您不必孤軍奮戰。你會得到一個名叫波奇卡的神奇精靈的幫助，他會幫助你恢復商店並正常運營，並向你介紹居住在鎮上的所有獨特角色。村民都會在遊戲中改變和成長，而你第一次見到他們時認為可能不懷好意的人可能有一顆金子般的心！您的經驗將與其他人完全不同。你永遠不知道《故鄉故事》會發生什麼事。

title_en: Hoppe-chan - Minna de Odekake! Waku Waku Hoppe Land!!
title_jp: Hoppe-chan - Minna de Odekake! Waku Waku Hoppe Land!!
no_intro_name: Hoppe-chan - Minna de Odekake! Waku Waku Hoppe Land!! (Japan)

title_en: Horrid Henry - The Good, the Bad _ the Bugly
no_intro_name: Horrid Henry - The Good, the Bad _ the Bugly (Europe)

overview_en: The first authentic horse game for the Nintendo 3DS system, Horses 3D invites players to care for more than 15 realistic horses, ride them and train them for world-class performance. Horses 3D fully leverages the Nintendo 3DS features with the most realistic visuals for a horse game yet, including 3D horses, textures and beautiful environments, as well as StreetPass sharing and more.
overview_zh: 《Horses 3D》是 Nintendo 3DS 系統的首款真實馬匹遊戲，邀請玩家照顧超過 15 匹真實的馬匹，騎乘它們並訓練它們以達到世界一流的表現。 Horses 3D 充分利用了 Nintendo 3DS 的功能，為賽馬遊戲提供了迄今為止最真實的視覺效果，包括 3D 馬匹、紋理和美麗的環境，以及 StreetPass 共享等。

title_zh: 星之卡比 三重豪華版

overview_en:
Do you have what it takes to be the World's Best Driver?

Gear up for the most intense challenges only Hot Wheels® can deliver! Pick your team, choose your ride and go for it! Get behind the wheel of thrilling Hot Wheels vehicles while joining the elite ranks of Team Hot Wheels™. Compete in dozens of unique, fast-paced, re-playable challenges all highlighting the different driving styles of Team Hot Wheels: the speed record-breaking Green Team, the show-stopping stunts of the Red Team, the high-tech precision of the Blue Team and the world record-breaking jumps of the Yellow Team. Do you have what it takes to be the World's Best Driver?
overview_zh:
您有成為世界最佳車手的特質嗎？

做好準備迎接只有 Hot Wheels® 才能提供的最激烈的挑戰！選擇你的團隊，選擇你的騎行，然後出發吧！駕駛令人興奮的 Hot Wheels 車輛，同時加入 Team Hot Wheels™ 的精英行列。參與數十個獨特、快節奏、可重複玩的挑戰，這些挑戰都凸顯了 Team Hot Wheels 的不同駕駛風格：綠隊破紀錄的速度、紅隊令人驚嘆的特技、藍隊的高科技精準度以及黃隊破世界紀錄的跳躍。您有成為世界最佳車手的特質嗎？

title_jp: モンスター・ホテルシリーズ
overview_en: Hotel Transylvania: where monsters and their families can live it up, free to be the monsters that they are with no humans around to bother them. Dracula's beloved daughter Mavis is turning 118 and Dracula has invited a few of his closest friends: Frankenstein and his wife, the Mummy, the Invisible Man, and the Werewolf family to Hotel Transylvania to celebrate her special day. Catering to these monsters is a delight for Dracula, but everything could change for the overprotective father when one ordinary guy stumbles through the hotel and takes a shine to Mavis. Play through a wide variety of spooky locations, solving tons of puzzles and battling tough bosses in this side-scrolling, action-packed adventure!
overview_zh: 精靈旅社：怪物和他們的家人可以在這裡盡情享受，自由地做怪物，周圍沒有人類打擾他們。德古拉深愛的女兒梅維斯即將迎來 118 歲生日，德古拉邀請了他的幾位最親密的朋友：弗蘭肯斯坦和他的妻子、木乃伊、隱形人以及狼人一家來到特蘭西瓦尼亞酒店慶祝她的特殊日子。對德古拉來說，迎合這些怪物是一種樂趣，但當一個普通人偶然闖入酒店並迷上了梅維斯時，對於這位過度保護的父親來說，一切都可能發生變化。在這款橫向捲軸、動感十足的冒險中，穿越各種詭異地點，解決大量謎題並與強硬的頭目戰鬥！

overview_en:
Fly and Race With All Your Favorite Characters From the Movie!


Become the Ultimate Dragon Racer!

Return to the epic Island of Berk, where The Dragon Races have become the awesome new sport for Viking adrenaline junkies. Hiccup, Astrid, Snotlout, Fishlegs, Tuffnut & Ruffnut and their Dragons are now competing in fierce tournaments to determine the ultimate Dragon Rider.

Choose your Dragon Racer, soar through clouds, and explore new unmapped territories. Discover hidden locations, unlock mysterious Dragon Riders, and join in epic races across the beautiful yet treacherous Island of Berk.

KEY FEATURES:

Choose your Rider and Dragon to train and compete in fierce races and tournaments
Explore the vast and mysterious Island of Berk to discover hidden quests
Unlock awesome new Dragon abilities
overview_zh:
與電影中所有您最喜歡的角色一起飛行和比賽！


成為終極龍族賽車手！

回到史詩般的伯克島，龍族競賽已經成為維京刺激愛好者們的一項令人敬畏的新運動。小嗝嗝、阿斯特麗德、鼻涕粗、魚腳司、粗毛納特和拉夫納特以及他們的龍現在正在激烈的錦標賽中競爭，以確定最終的龍騎士。

選擇你的龍族賽車手，翱翔雲端，探索新的未繪製領土。發現隱藏的地點，解鎖神秘的龍騎士，並參加穿越美麗而危險的伯克島的史詩比賽。

主要特點：

選擇你的騎手和龍來訓練並參加激烈的比賽和錦標賽
探索廣闊而神秘的博克島，發現隱藏的任務
解鎖令人敬畏的新龍能力

title_en: Hyakumasu Dora-Zan - Nobita no Time Battle
title_jp: Hyakumasu Dora-Zan - Nobita no Time Battle
no_intro_name: Hyakumasu Dora-Zan - Nobita no Time Battle (Japan)

overview_en: Fluidity: Spin Cycle arrives on Dec. 27, letting players tilt, turn and even rotate their Nintendo 3DS system 360 degrees to maneuver a puddle of water named Eddy through a maze-like, magical world. Change from liquid to a block of ice or a steam cloud to solve fun, gravity-defying puzzles and defeat Goop monsters. Fluidity: Spin Cycle features a new storybook setting to explore that spans the ages, from a lost world full of dinosaurs to the modern world and beyond.
overview_zh: Fluidity: Spin Cycle 將於 12 月 27 日推出，讓玩家傾斜、轉動甚至 360 度旋轉他們的 Nintendo 3DS 系統，以操縱名為 Eddy 的水坑穿過迷宮般的魔法世界。從液體變成冰塊或蒸氣雲，解決有趣的、反重力的謎題並擊敗黏液怪物。 Fluidity: Spin Cycle 具有全新的故事書背景，可探索跨越各個時代的內容，從充滿恐龍的失落世界到現代世界及更遠的世界。

overview_en:
Cut down entire legions of enemies as fan-favorite Legend of Zelda characters using powerful moves as Hyrule Warriors comes to the Nintendo 3DS system. Control multiple characters to enhance your strategies and enjoy new story elements with playable characters from The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker, such as Tetra, King Daphnes, and more.

War rages as the delicate balance of the Triforce is disrupted. The kingdom of Hyrule is once again being torn apart by a dark power, this time lead by Sorceress Cia. Now it's up to the legendary hero Link to face hordes of enemies and find the missing Princess Zelda. Advance the story to unlock new playable characters, each with unique moves and weapon types. Collect Rupees and other useful items to upgrade weapons and craft badges, which you can use to bolster each warrior's abilities.

Battle the fiercest Legend of Zelda enemies across Hyrule's most famous locales
Play as fan-favorite characters like Tetra, Skull Kid, and the King Daphnes for the first time in the series!
New characters and story elements based on The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker
New character-switching feature lets you change and command characters on the fly
Includes a download code for a Nintendo 3DS HOME theme of Hyrule Warriors Legends**
Includes a download code that allows you to play as Linkle, Tetra, Toon Link, Skull Kid, and King Daphnes in the Hyrule Warriors game for the Wii U console** (Hyrule Warriors Legends game and Wii U console sold separately)
Contains content from the original the Hyrule Warriors game, released on the Wii U console
Game is only playable in 3D with a New Nintendo 3DS or New Nintendo 3DS XL system.

Also Available
Hyrule Warriors: Legends Limited Edition
overview_zh:
在 Nintendo 3DS 系統中，海拉魯無雙 (Hyrule Warriors) 登場，扮演深受粉絲喜愛的《薩爾達傳說》角色，使用強大的招式消滅大批敵人。控制多個角色來增強你的策略，並透過《薩爾達傳說：風之杖》中的可玩角色（例如 Tetra、King Daphnes 等）享受新的故事元素。

三角力量的微妙平衡被破壞，戰爭愈演愈烈。海拉魯王國再次被黑暗力量撕裂，這次由女巫西亞領導。現在，傳奇英雄林克需要面對成群的敵人並找到失蹤的薩爾達公主。推動故事發展，解鎖新的可玩角色，每個角色都有獨特的動作和武器型別。收集盧比和其他有用的物品來升級武器和製作徽章，您可以用它們來增強每個戰士的能力。

在海拉爾最著名的地點與最兇猛的《薩爾達傳說》敵人作戰
在系列中首次扮演粉絲最喜愛的角色，如 Tetra、骷髏小子和達芙妮國王！
基於《薩爾達傳說：風之杖》的新角色與故事元素
新的角色切換功能可讓您即時變更和命令角色
包括 Hyrule Warriors Legends 的 Nintendo 3DS HOME 主題的下載程式碼**
包含下載程式碼，可讓您在 Wii U 主機的 Hyrule Warriors 遊戲中扮演 Linkle、Tetra、Toon Link、Skull Kid 和 King Daphnes**（Hyrule Warriors Legends 遊戲和 Wii U 主機單獨出售）
包含在 Wii U 主機上發布的原版《海拉魯無雙》遊戲的內容
遊戲只能在 New Nintendo 3DS 或 New Nintendo 3DS XL 系統上以 3D 模式運作。

還提供
海拉爾無雙：傳奇限量版

overview_en:
Raise your horse and win all the competitions!

Open your own horse resort, then raise and train your horse to win the agility, racing and show-jumping competitions. Can you train the greatest champion?

Look after the horses placed in your care, and keep them happy and in good health through a variety of available activities. Feed them, brush them, care for them and pet them!
overview_zh:
舉起你的馬並贏得所有比賽！

開設您自己的馬術度假村，然後飼養和訓練您的馬匹，以贏得敏捷性、賽馬和馬術障礙賽的勝利。你能培養出最偉大的冠軍嗎？

照顧您照顧的馬匹，並透過各種可用的活動讓它們保持快樂和健康。餵牠們、為牠們梳理毛髮、照顧牠們並撫摸它們！

overview_en:
Play with the baby of your dreams!

Hair, face, clothes... Choose the baby of your dreams and discover lots of ways to look after him the way you want: preparing meals, dressing up in different outfits, bathing, playing, going for walks

-Unlock new, even more adorable outfits for your toddler.
-Cute and colourful graphics with 3D babies
-Your baby laughs and cries just like a real one!
overview_zh:
和你夢想中的寶寶一起玩耍！

頭髮、臉型、衣服......選擇你夢想中的寶寶，並發現多種方法來按照你想要的方式照顧他：準備飯菜、穿不同的衣服、洗澡、玩耍、散步

- 為您的孩子解鎖新的、更可愛的服裝。
- 可愛多彩的圖形與 3D 嬰兒
-您的寶寶就像真人一樣笑、哭！

overview_en:
Play with the baby of your dreams!

Hair, face, clothes... Choose the baby of your dreams and discover lots of ways to look after her the way you want: preparing meals, dressing up in different outfits, bathing, playing, going for walks…

Unlock new, even more adorable outfits for your toddler.
Cute and colourful graphics with 3D babies
Your baby laughs and cries just like a real one!
overview_zh:
和你夢想中的寶寶一起玩耍！

頭髮、臉型、衣服......選擇你夢想中的寶寶，並發現多種方法來按照你想要的方式照顧她：準備飯菜、穿不同的衣服、洗澡、玩耍、散步......

為您的孩子解鎖新的、更可愛的服裝。
可愛多彩的圖形與 3D 嬰兒
您的寶寶會像真人一樣笑、哭！

overview_en:
Become the manager of a hotel for cats and dogs and take care of your pets. Take your puppy out for a walk in the park, teach them to jump over a skipping rope, pet them and play frisbee with them. Brush your cat, teach them to hunt, train them for an obstacle course... and make them purr!

Choose between 16 breeds of cats and dogs: Dalmatian, Labrador, Husky, Siamese, tabby and more... and play hide-and-seek with your pet with the AR Cards which came with your Nintendo 3DS!
overview_zh:
成為貓狗酒店的經理，照顧你的寵物。帶你的小狗去公園散步，教它們跳跳繩，撫摸它們，和它們玩飛盤。為你的貓梳理毛髮、教它們狩獵、訓練它們進行障礙訓練……並讓它們發出咕嚕聲！

從 16 種貓狗中進行選擇：達爾馬提亞犬、拉布拉多犬、哈士奇犬、暹羅犬、虎斑犬等等...並使用 Nintendo 3DS 附帶的 AR 卡與您的寵物玩捉迷藏！

title_en: Ice Age - Continental Drift - Arctic Games
overview_en: When their island is set adrift in the midst of continental upheaval, Manny and the herd encounter a ragtag menagerie of seafaring pirates with a secret treasure. Having trouble deciding on how to split the treasure evenly, they collectively decide to settle the problem through a series of off-the-wall sporting events including ski jumping, ice smashing, and glacial hopping. Ultimately, the winner of the most events will be entitled to the prize. As the prehistoric games begin, players must side with Manny and the herd, or the seafaring pirates to determine the fate of the riches.
overview_zh: 當他們的島嶼在大陸劇變中漂流時，曼尼和羊群遇到了一群擁有秘密寶藏的烏合之眾的航海海盜。由於難以決定如何平均分配寶藏，他們集體決定透過一系列瘋狂的體育賽事來解決這個問題，包括跳臺滑雪、破冰和冰川跳躍。最終，最多賽事的獲勝者將有資格獲得獎品。隨著史前遊戲的開始，玩家必須站在曼尼和獸群或海盜這邊來決定財富的命運。
no_intro_name: Ice Age - Continental Drift - Arctic Games (USA) (En,Fr)

title_en: Ice Age 4 - Continental Drift - Arctic Games
title_jp: アイス・エイジ4/パイレーツ大冒険
no_intro_name: Ice Age 4 - Continental Drift - Arctic Games (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,Nl,Sv)

title_en: Idol Time PriPara - Yume All-Star Live
title_jp: Idol Time PriPara - Yume All-Star Live
no_intro_name: Idol Time PriPara - Yume All-Star Live (Japan)

overview_en: In Imagine Babyz, experience the life of a popular babysitter with incredibly lifelike 3D visual animation! Travel the world caring for babies and helping them grow, keeping both the babies and their parents happy in order to build your reputation as a babysitter and ultimately open your own dream day care business.
overview_zh: 在 Imagine Babyz 中，透過極其逼真的 3D 視覺動畫體驗受歡迎的保姆的生活！環遊世界，照顧嬰兒並幫助他們成長，讓嬰兒和他們的父母都開心，以建立你作為保姆的聲譽，並最終開啟你自己夢想的日託業務。

overview_en: Imagine Fashion Life introduces a brand-new ultra-realistic fashion game on the Nintendo 3DS system where players can experience three fabulous fashion careers: fashion design, modeling and mall owner! The 3D game features high-quality, realistic graphics and allows players with a love of all things fashion to truly unleash their creativity and business savvy. Players can create original outfits and organize fashion shows as a fashion designer. As a top model, players can pose for glamorous photo shoots and set the catwalks ablaze with perfect runway walks. As a successful mall owner, players can open and arrange stores, decorate the mall, promote the trendiest cosmetics and fashion brands in stores, and manage their budget to create a world-class mall.
overview_zh: 《想像時尚生活》在任天堂 3DS 系統上推出了一款全新的超現實時尚遊戲，玩家可以體驗三種精彩的時尚職業：時裝設計、模特兒和商場老闆！這款 3D 遊戲具有高品質、逼真的圖形，讓熱愛時尚的玩家真正釋放他們的創造力和商業頭腦。玩家可以作為時裝設計師打造原創服裝並組織時裝秀。作為一名頂級模特，玩家可以擺出迷人的姿勢拍攝迷人的照片，並以完美的走秀讓秀場熠熠生輝。作為一名成功的商場老闆，玩家可以開設和佈置商店，裝飾商場，在商店中推廣最受歡迎的化妝品和時尚品牌，並管理預算來建立世界一流的商場。

overview_en: Become a famous Too Model, Fashion Designer or Mall Manager and explore your fashion creativity in 3D!
overview_zh: 成為著名的 Too Model、時裝設計師或商場經理，並在 3D 中探索你的時尚創意！

overview_en:
3 games on one Nintendo 3DS Game Card. Pick the life of your dreams!
- Fashion World 3D: Become a famous top model, fashion designer or mall manager.
- Babies 3D: Travel the world to care for cute babies and help them grow.
- Fashion Designer 3D: Create unique outfits and share them with your friends.
overview_zh:
一張 Nintendo 3DS 遊戲卡可玩 3 款遊戲。選擇你夢想的生活！
- 時尚世界3D：成為著名的頂級模特兒、時裝設計師或商場經理。
- 嬰兒 3D：環遊世界，照顧可愛的嬰兒並幫助他們成長。
- 時裝設計師 3D：創造獨特的服裝並與你的朋友分享。

title_jp: イナズマイレブン3 世界への挑戦!!
title_zh: 閃電十一人3 挑戰世界！！
overview_en:
Several months have passed after saving Earth from Alius Academy’s attack (in Inazuma Eleven 2), Mark Evans and his teammates are summoned by Seymour Hillman to assemble at Raimon Jr. High.
When the team get to the school, they see familiar faces from Japan’s national football players who have once fought along with them, such as Xavier Foster and Jordan Greenway originally from Alius Academy, as well as new faces. Hillman has assembled all these Japan’s best football players for one purpose; to enter the “Football Frontier International (FFI)”.
Welcoming Mark Evans as Japan’s national team captain, they now strive forward to challenge best football teams from all around the world!
overview_zh:
在從阿利烏斯學院的攻擊中拯救地球之後（《閃電十一人 2》），馬克·埃文斯和他的隊友們被西摩·希爾曼召喚到雷蒙高中集合。
當球隊到達學校時，他們看到了曾經與他們並肩作戰的日本國足球員的熟悉面孔，例如來自阿利烏斯學院的澤維爾·福斯特和喬丹·格林威，還有一些新面孔。希爾曼為了一個目的而聚集了所有這些日本最好的足球員：進入「國際足球前沿（FFI）」。
歡迎馬克·埃文斯擔任日本國家隊隊長，他們現在正努力挑戰來自世界各地的最佳足球隊！

title_jp: イナズマイレブン3 世界への挑戦!!
title_zh: 閃電十一人3 挑戰世界！！
overview_en:
Several months have passed after saving Earth from Alius Academy’s attack (in Inazuma Eleven 2), Mark Evans and his teammates are summoned by Seymour Hillman to assemble at Raimon Jr. High.
When the team get to the school, they see familiar faces from Japan’s national football players who have once fought along with them, such as Xavier Foster and Jordan Greenway originally from Alius Academy, as well as new faces. title_jp: イナズマイレブン3 世界への挑戦!!
title_zh: 閃電十一人3 挑戰世界！！
overview_en: A new challenge awaits in Inazuma Eleven 3: Team Ogre Attacks! As Mark Evans and his friends prepare to take on the Frontier International Championships, a futuristic enemy travels back in time to threaten the very existence of football. Mark must work with his own future great-grandson, Canon Evans, to preserve the fate of the beautiful game – and help the Inazuma National team win the Frontier International Championships.
overview_zh: 《閃電十一人 3：食人魔團隊攻擊》中的新挑戰正等著您！當馬克·埃文斯和他的朋友們準備參加前沿國際錦標賽時，一個未來的敵人穿越回過去威脅到足球的存在。馬克必須與他未來的曾孫卡農·埃文斯 (Canon Evans) 合作，以維護這項美麗運動的命運，並幫助閃電國家隊贏得前沿國際錦標賽。

title_en: Inazuma Eleven GO - Chrono Stones - Thunderflash
title_jp: イナズマイレブンシリーズ
overview_en:
The story begins following the competition of the Holy Road soccer tournament. Tenma returns to Raimon Junior High, but finds that things have changed. The Raimon soccer team members are not soccer players. In fact, there is no soccer club at the school. Shinsuke is in a different club from Tenma. Is this a parallel world? Tenma wonders. That's when Alpha appears before him.

A future organization called El Dorado is an organization formed by the future world's countries to deal with important matters of world affairs, and for some reason, they've determined that soccer must be destroyed. To do so, they have assigned Alpha and his team, Protocol Omega the mission of ridding soccer from the world.

To help Tenma out, Fei Rune, someone from the same future as El Dorado, comes to help him save soccer and defeat El Dorado. The Inazuma Caravan from Inazuma Eleven GO makes a comeback as a flying time machine. As Tenma begins his journey to save soccer, he must learn how to master keshin armed, a technique where one's keshin becomes a form of armor, and Mixi Maxing, where through the Mixi Max gun, two people's auras can combine.
overview_zh:
故事開始於聖路足球錦標賽的比賽之後。天馬回到雷門中學，卻發現事情發生了變化。雷蒙足球隊成員不是足球員。事實上，學校沒有足球俱樂部。信介與天馬屬於不同的俱樂部。這是平行世界嗎？天馬疑惑道。就在這時，阿爾法出現在他面前。

一個名為埃爾多拉多的未來組織，是未來世界各國為了處理世界事務的重要事務而成立的組織，出於某種原因，他們決定必須摧毀足球。為此，他們給 Alpha 和他的團隊 Protocol Omega 指派了將足球從世界上消滅的使命。

為了幫助天馬擺脫困境，與埃爾多拉多來自同一未來的費魯恩前來幫助他拯救足球並擊敗埃爾多拉多。 《閃電十一人 GO》中的閃電商隊作為飛行時光機捲土重來。天馬開始了拯救足球的旅程，他必須學習如何掌握「keshin Armed」（一種將一個人的「keshin」變成一種盔甲的技術）和「Mixi Maxing」（透過 Mixi Max 槍，兩個人的光環可以結合在一起）。
no_intro_name: Inazuma Eleven GO - Chrono Stones - Thunderflash (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_en: Inazuma Eleven GO - Chrono Stones - Wildfire
title_jp: イナズマイレブンシリーズ
overview_en:
Arion Sherwind and his famous footballing team mates are back in a new adventure, but all is not as it should be at Raimon Junior High. Arion finds himself in a world devoid of football and must unravel its mysterious disappearance and restore its place in the world.

Travel through time and create the ultimate eleven to bring football back in Inazuma Eleven Go Chrono Stones: Thunderflash, launching for Nintendo 3DS and 2DS systems
overview_zh:
阿里昂·舍溫德和他著名的足球隊友們重返新的冒險之旅，但雷蒙初中的一切並不像應有的那樣。阿里昂發現自己身處一個沒有足球的世界，他必須解開足球的神秘消失並恢復其在世界上的地位。

穿越時空，創造終極十一人，在閃電十一人 Go Chrono Stones: Thunderflash（面向任天堂 3DS 和 2DS 系統推出）中回歸足球
no_intro_name: Inazuma Eleven GO - Chrono Stones - Wildfire (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

title_jp: イナズマイレブンシリーズ
overview_en: Inazuma Eleven Go is the fourth installment of the popular Inazuma Eleven series and the first part of the second trilogy. A role-playing game blended with football, players must scout and recruit characters, creating a truly personalised squad you can then battle with friends in multiplayer matches.
overview_zh: 《閃電十一人Go》是廣受歡迎的《閃電十一人》系列的第四部分，也是第二部三部曲的第一部。這是一款與足球相結合的角色扮演遊戲，玩家必須偵察和招募角色，建立一支真正個性化的球隊，然後您可以在多人遊戲中與朋友對戰。

title_en: Inazuma Eleven Go Galaxy - Big Bang
title_jp: Inazuma Eleven Go Galaxy - Big Bang
overview_en:
Youths' soccer world championship, Football Frontier International Vision 2 (FFIV2) is held, thus Inazuma Japan is announced. However, to represent Japan, elected are players never before seen! Many of these never before seen players have never played soccer before, but have participated in sports such as boxing, rhythmic gymnastics, basketball, track and field, or have never played sports before.

What on earth will happen to Inazuma Japan!?
overview_zh:
青少年足球世界錦標賽「Football Frontier International Vision 2」（FFIV2）舉行，閃電日本就此宣佈。然而，代表日本當選的卻是前所未見的選手！其中許多從未見過的球員以前從未踢過足球，但參加過拳擊、藝術體操、籃球、田徑等運動，或以前從未參加過運動。

日本閃電到底會發生什麼事！ ？
no_intro_name: Inazuma Eleven Go Galaxy - Big Bang (Japan)

title_en: Jake Hunter Detective Story - Ghost of the Dusk
title_jp: 探偵 神宮寺三郎 GHOST OF THE DUSK
overview_en:
Investigate a deadly new mystery!

A shaky lead about a stiff in a haunted house starts Jake Hunter on a perilous path of clues and dark secrets. When the owner of the home comes clean that the place is cursed and the body count starts rising, Jake realizes he’s facing a threat unlike any other.

Experience a new chapter in the Jake Hunter saga, along with five additional hard-boiled tales of detectives, deductions, dames, danger, and death.

Use all your sleuthing skills: search crime scenes, question suspects, and discover the truth.
overview_zh: 調查一個致命的新謎團！ 在鬧鬼的房子裡，一條僵硬的線索搖搖欲墜，讓傑克獵人走上了一條充滿線索和黑暗秘密的危險道路。當屋主坦承這個地方受到詛咒，而且屍體數量開始上升時， Jake意識到他正面臨著與眾不同的威脅。 體驗傑克獵人傳奇的新篇章，以及另外五個關於偵探、扣除、少女、危險和死亡的故事。 運用你所有的偵查技巧：搜尋犯罪現場、詢問嫌疑人，並發現真相。
no_intro_name: Jake Hunter Detective Story - Ghost of the Dusk (USA)

overview_en: A brand new intellectual property developed exclusively for the Nintendo 3DS, James Noir's Hollywood Crimes makes the player the main character in a mind-twisting puzzle adventure taking place in an interactive 3D world, with 150 puzzles and mind games to solve.
overview_zh: 詹姆斯諾爾 (James Noir) 的《好萊塢犯罪》是專為 Nintendo 3DS 開發的全新智慧財產權，讓玩家成為主角，在互動 3D 世界中進行一場令人費解的解謎冒險，有 150 個謎題和智力遊戲需要解決。

overview_en: JAWS: Ultimate Predator on the Nintendo 3DS system puts you in control of the hulking terror of the seas like never before, letting you experience the action through the eyes of the beast in startling 3D. Developed by n-Space and produced by Microprose, the Nintendo 3DS version of JAWS: Ultimate Predator lets you defeat an army of shark hunters and rule the ocean by unleashing deadly attack combinations such as Feeding Frenzy and Corkscrew Shred while using the Touch Screen to bite, ram and dodge enemies.
overview_zh: Nintendo 3DS 系統上的《大白鯊：終極鐵血戰士》讓您以前所未有的方式控制海洋中的巨大恐怖，讓您透過令人震驚的 3D 方式透過野獸的眼睛體驗行動。由 n-Space 開發並由 Microprose 製作的任天堂 3DS 版《大白鯊：終極捕食者》讓您透過釋放致命的攻擊組合（例如瘋狂餵食和開瓶器撕碎）來擊敗鯊魚獵人大軍並統治海洋，同時使用觸控螢幕撕咬、撞擊和躲避敵人。

title_en: Jewel Link Double Pack - Safari Quest and Atlantic Quest
overview_en:
Jewel Link Safari Quest – Having graduated top of her Biology class, Jane is sent off to Africa at the request of her University Director, where her mission is to locate and study the very rare White Lion. Accompanied by four animal helpers in the shape of Chippy the Monkey, Leo the Lion, Heppo the hippo and Blacklock the zebra, Jane's quest turns out to be more challenging than originally thought.

Use your match-3 and puzzle-solving skills to help Jane and friends track down the highly elusive King of the Jungle. With 3 game modes and over 100 levels to explore, Jewel Link Safari Quest is the ultimate African-themed match-3 adventure!

Jewel Link Atlantic Quest – A tanker has capsized and leaked tons of oil into the sea, making the sea life sick and turning the ocean into a hostile environment for its inhabitants. Join four fish friends as they embark on an adventure to clean the contaminated water and heal the ocean.

The four brave adventurers include a clever clownfish, a powerful shark, a serious octopus and a crab with an explosive hobby. Solve over 120 match-3 levels, explore 12 beautiful underwater locations, complete challenging mini-games and collect powerful extras to use in your mission to rescue the ocean!
overview_zh:
Jewel Link Safari Quest – 以優異的成績從生物課畢業後，Jane 應大學校長的要求被派往非洲，她的任務是尋找和研究非常罕見的白獅。在猴子奇皮、獅子利奧、河馬赫波和斑馬布萊克洛克這四位動物助手的陪伴下，簡的探索比最初想像的更具挑戰性。

利用你的三消和解謎技巧幫助簡和朋友追蹤高度難以捉摸的叢林之王。 Jewel Link Safari Quest 擁有 3 種遊戲模式和 100 多個可供探索的關卡，是終極非洲主題的三消冒險遊戲！

Jewel Link Atlantic Quest – 一艘油輪傾覆，大量石油洩漏到海中，導致海洋生物生病，並使海洋成為對其居民不利的環境。與四位魚友一起踏上冒險之旅，淨化受汙染的水體並治癒海洋。

四位勇敢的冒險家包括聰明的小丑魚、強壯的鯊魚、認真的章魚和愛好爆炸的螃蟹。解決超過 120 個三消關卡，探索 12 個美麗的水下地點，完成具有挑戰性的迷你遊戲，並收集強大的額外物品以用於您的拯救海洋任務！
no_intro_name: Jewel Link Double Pack - Safari Quest and Atlantic Quest (Europe)

overview_en: Re-create the milennia-old civilization of Egypt in the most exciting addition to the Jewel Master series yet in Jewel Master: Cradle Of Egypt 2 3D.

overview_en:
Play your favorite games like Chess, Air Hockey, Darts, Solitaire, Seek & Find Puzzles, Tic-Tac-Toe and more now in 3D!

Junior Classic Games 3D brings classic games to life and is designed exclusively for kids! Try your hand at mind-boggling puzzles like Sudoku and Tangram, or dive into addicting board and card games like Backgammon, Mahjongg, and Hearts. These games will seem to come alive in your very own hands with engaging graphics and electrifying 3D effects. Featuring 35 exciting and colorful games, Junior Classic Games 3D is a must-have collection that will offer hours upon hours of entertainment!

Features:
- Play classics like Tic-Tac-Toe, Solitaire, and Chess
- Test your speed with Air Hockey, Darts, and Ping- Pong
- Puzzles, seek & find scenes, brainteasers, and more!
- Games developed exclusively for kids ages 5 through 12
overview_zh:
現在就以 3D 形式暢玩您最愛的遊戲，例如西洋棋、空氣曲棍球、飛鏢、紙牌、尋找拼圖、井字遊戲等！

Junior Classic Games 3D 將經典遊戲帶入生活，專為兒童設計！試試數獨和七巧板等令人難以置信的謎題，或者沉浸在雙陸棋、麻將和傷心小棧等令人上癮的棋盤和紙牌遊戲中。這些遊戲擁有引人入勝的圖形和令人驚嘆的 3D 效果，在您的手中彷彿變得栩栩如生。 Junior Classic Games 3D 包含 35 個令人興奮且豐富多彩的遊戲，是一款必備的收藏，將為您帶來數小時的娛樂體驗！

特點：
- 玩井字遊戲、紙牌遊戲和國際象棋等經典遊戲
- 用空氣曲棍球、飛鏢和乒乓球測試你的速度
- 謎題、尋找場景、腦筋急轉彎等等！
- 專為 5 至 12 歲兒童開發的遊戲

title_jp: 新・光神話 パルテナの鏡
title_zh: 新·光神話 帕爾提娜之鏡
overview_en:
One of the most beloved franchises in Nintendos long history makes its glorious return in spectacular 3D! Pit of Kid Icarus fame is back in a new game designed specifically for the Nintendo 3DS system, by Masahiro Sakurai, creator of the Kirby and Super Smash Bros. franchises, and his development team at Project Sora.

Kid Icarus: Uprising is a fast-paced and action-packed blend of aerial and ground-based shooting built on elegantly intuitive and streamlined play control. This follow-up to the original Kid Icarus released for the Nintendo Entertainment System in 1987 has been at the top of gamers wish lists for years.

Boasting gameplay that is easy to pick up but incredibly deep, the game is sure to satisfy novice gamers as well as fans who have been clamouring for a new installment in the franchise.

The hero, Pit, teams up with Palutena, the goddess of light, who bestows on him the miracle of flight for limited stretches. With this gift, Pit soars through the skies, shooting down swarms of enemies, then alights and engages in frantic ground-based battles against Medusas underworld army.

Find and collect numerous weapons and items that offer bonuses and ability boosts. Players can choose weapons before they send Pit into battle, giving them countless layers of strategies in each level.

Players can choose between a basic Blade, basic Claws and a basic Orbitar weapon. Blades are well-balanced, Claws have limited reach but increase running speed and the Orbitars can shoot two shots that grow in power over distance.
overview_zh:
任天堂悠久歷史上最受歡迎的系列之一以壯觀的 3D 形式光榮回歸！ 《Pit of Kid Icarus》的名聲在一款專為任天堂 3DS 系統設計的新遊戲中再次出名，該遊戲由《星之卡比》和《任天堂明星大亂鬥》系列的創造者櫻井正宏及其 Project Sora 的開發團隊設計。

《Kid Icarus: Uprising》是一款快節奏、動感十足的空中和地面射擊遊戲，建立在優雅直覺和簡化的遊戲控制之上。這款 1987 年為任天堂娛樂系統發布的原版《小伊卡洛斯》的後續作品多年來一直位居遊戲玩家願望清單的首位。

遊戲的遊戲玩法簡單易上手，但又極其深入，一定會滿足新手玩家以及一直渴望該系列新作的粉絲的需求。

英雄皮特與光明女神帕魯特娜合作，賦予他有限距離飛行的奇蹟。憑藉這份天賦，皮特翱翔在天空中，擊落成群的敵人，然後降落並與美杜莎黑社會軍隊進行瘋狂的地面戰鬥。

尋找並收集大量可以提供獎勵和能力提升的武器和物品。玩家可以在將 Pit 投入戰鬥之前選擇武器，從而在每個關卡中為他們提供無數層的策略。

玩家可以選擇基本的劍刃、基本的利爪和基本的軌道武器。刀片平衡良好，利爪射程有限，但可以提高執行速度，軌道炮可以發射兩發子彈，威力隨著距離的增加而增強。

overview_en: King Mickey and Yen Sid prepare for an impending threat by putting Sora and Riku through the Mark of Mastery exam. Sora and Riku are sent into the Sleeping Worlds, where they will face enemies and allies that have never been seen before. If they can successfully complete the task they are given, they will be deemed true Keyblade Masters.
overview_zh: 米奇國王和延希德讓空和利庫透過精通標記考試，為即將到來的威脅做準備。索拉和利庫被送往沉睡世界，在那裡他們將面對前所未見的敵人和盟友。如果他們能夠成功完成交給他們的任務，他們將被視為真正的鑰刃大師。

title_jp: 星のカービィ ロボボプラネット
title_zh: 星之卡比 機械行星
overview_en: Harness the power of a mysterious mech to stop brutal invaders from mechanizing Kirby's home world. Smash through tough obstacles, lift heavy objects with ease, and scan enemies to shape-shift into new Modes with powerful abilities in this action-platformer. That's right—Kirby's Robobot Armor can shape-shift into different modes by scanning enemies to copy their moves—like the new Jet Mode. Not to mention, Kirby can copy abilities the old-fashioned way too—by inhaling them! After saving the world, team up with three friends to defeat foes in Team Kirby Clash, an RPG-styled 4-player brawl where you choose from varied roles and level them up.
overview_zh: 利用神秘機甲的力量阻止殘酷的入侵者機械化卡比的家園世界。在這款動作平臺遊戲中，衝破艱難的障礙，輕鬆舉起重物，並掃描敵人以變形為具有強大能力的新模式。沒錯，卡比的機器人裝甲可以透過掃描敵人來複製他們的動作來變形為不同的模式，例如新的噴射模式。更不用說，卡比還可以用老式的方式複製能力——透過吸入它們！拯救世界後，與三位好友組隊，在《Team Kirby Clash》中擊敗敵人，這是一款 RPG 風格的 4 人亂鬥遊戲，您可以從不同的角色中進行選擇併升級他們。

title_jp: 星のカービィ トリプルデラックス
title_zh: 星之卡比 三重豪華版
overview_en:
Pink? Check. Puffy? Check. Powerful? You have no idea. Devour trees, obstacles, and huge chunks of stages with Kirbys Hypernova ability and inhale enemies to copy epic new moves like Archer. Its a grand new Kirby adventure PLUS a new multiplayer battle mode, Kirby Fighters! When a mysterious being kidnaps King Dedede atop a giant Dreamstalk, only Kirby can save the day! Jump from the foreground to the background in dynamic 3D side-scrolling environments while using new and returning copy abilities to defeat enemies. Duke it out in Kirby Fighters, a fierce 4-player battle mode where you fight using a chosen ability like Sword or Ninja. The last Kirby standing reigns supreme. Whether youre new to Kirby or an old fan, the Kirby: Triple Deluxe game offers a triple threat-action, adventure, and a battle mode!

-Kirby's powerful copy ability returns, allowing him to inhale, spit and transform
-Jump from the foreground to the background in dynamic 3D side-scrolling levels
-Employ new and returning abilities, including:
-Archer - Kirby wields a bow to strike silently from a distance
-Beetle - Kirby grabs foes with his horn and slams them into the ground
-Fire - Kirby can roll into a fireball and scorch through the air
-Sword - Kirby dons a green cap and wields a sword
-Kirbys new Hypernova ability lets him inhale obstacles and big chunks of levels!
-Use the Download Play feature to duke it out in Kirby Fighters, a fierce battle mode for up to 4 players! You can also sharpen your skills by playing solo
-Enjoy a selection of additional game modes including Dededes Drum Dash and Arena
-Collect hidden keychains in every level, each resembling legacy Kirby characters
-Unlock improved items and new keychains by using the StreetPass function to tag other players
overview_zh:
粉紅色的？檢視。蓬鬆？檢視。強大的？你不知道。使用卡比的超新星能力吞噬樹木、障礙物和大塊舞臺，並吸入敵人以模仿弓箭手等史詩般的新動作。這是一場盛大的全新卡比冒險加上全新的多人戰鬥模式「卡比戰士」！當一個神秘生物在巨大的夢莖上綁架了帝帝帝國王時，只有卡比可以拯救世界！在動態 3D 橫向捲軸環境中從前景跳到背景，同時使用新的和回歸的複製能力來擊敗敵人。在卡比戰士中一決高下，這是一種激烈的 4 人戰鬥模式，您可以使用劍或忍者等選定的能力進行戰鬥。最後的卡比佔據了至高無上的地位。無論您是《星之卡比》的新手還是老粉絲，《星之卡比：三重豪華》遊戲都提供三重威脅——動作、冒險和戰鬥模式！

-卡比強大的複製能力回歸，讓他可以吸氣、吐氣和變形
- 在動態 3D 橫向捲軸關卡中從前景跳到背景
-運用新的和回歸的能力，包括：
-弓箭手 - 卡比揮舞著弓從遠處無聲地攻擊
-甲蟲 - 卡比用他的角抓住敵人並將他們摔到地上
-火 - 卡比可以滾成火球並燒焦空氣
-劍 - 卡比戴上綠色帽子並揮舞著劍
-卡比的新超新星能力讓他能夠吸入障礙物和大塊關卡！
- 使用「下載遊戲」功能在卡比戰士中一決高下，這是最多可容納 4 名玩家的激烈戰鬥模式！您還可以透過獨奏來提高您的技能
- 享受一系列額外的遊戲模式，包括 Dededes Drum Dash 和 Arena
- 在每個關卡中收集隱藏的鑰匙鏈，每個鑰匙鏈都類似於傳統的卡比角色
- 使用 StreetPass 功能標記其他玩家來解鎖改進的物品和新的鑰匙串

title_jp: カービィ バトルデラックス!
overview_en:
Kirby is about to enter a tournament against his toughest rival yet…himself!

In local or online battle arenas, up to 4 players can fight until the last Kirby standing wins. There are other modes too, like Ore Express, a mad dash to hoard treasure. Choose an ability and prove you're the one Kirby to rule them all. Not to mention, there's a single-player story mode too!

As a Kirby with a special ability, up to 4 players can battle together
Battle via local wireless or regional online play
In Battle Arena mode, everyone fights until the last Kirby standing wins
In Ore Express mode, hoard treasure until the fastest Kirby wins
A single-player story mode offers another way to enjoy the game
overview_zh:
卡比即將參加一場錦標賽，對抗他迄今為止最難對付的對手……他自己！

在本地或線上競技場中，最多 4 名玩家可以戰鬥，直到最後存活的卡比獲勝。還有其他模式，例如礦石快車，瘋狂地囤積寶藏。選擇一種能力並證明你是統治這一切的卡比。更不用說，還有單人故事模式！

作為具有特殊能力的卡比，最多可以4名玩家一起戰鬥
透過本地無線或區域線上對戰
在戰鬥競技場模式中，每個人都會戰鬥，直到最後存活的卡比獲勝
在礦石快遞模式中，囤積寶藏，直到最快的卡比獲勝
單人故事模式提供了另一種享受遊戲的方式

title_jp: 星のカービィ トリプルデラックス
title_zh: 星之卡比 三重豪華版
overview_en:
Duke it out with up to 4 players in Kirby Fighters Deluxe!

Duke it out with your favorite pink puffball in a fierce 4-player battle action game! Team up or go solo as you battle in new and classic Kirby arenas. Choose from powerful copy abilities like Sword, Ninja, Hammer and more as you take your fighting skills to the limit!

Based on the wild battle mode introduced in Kirby: Triple Deluxe, this standalone game contains expanded gameplay features, the ability to play as a team, new arenas and more. Join up with a buddy and fire the powerful new Team Cannon to blast opponents with mega-damage! Earn rare copy ability hats for defeating Kracko and the King Dedede army in the single-player gauntlet. Owners of Kirby: Triple Deluxe can also access two bonus copy abilities plus an exclusive arena - Waddle Dee Train Tracks!
overview_zh:
在星之卡比戰士豪華版中與最多 4 名玩家一決高下！

在激烈的 4 人戰鬥動作遊戲中與您最喜歡的粉紅馬勃一決高下！在新的和經典的星之卡比競技場中戰鬥時，可以組隊或單人作戰。從劍、忍者、錘子等強大的複製能力中進行選擇，將你的戰鬥技巧發揮到極限！

這款獨立遊戲以《星之卡比：三重豪華》中引入的狂野戰鬥模式為基礎，包含擴充套件的遊戲功能、團隊合作能力、新競技場等。與好友一起發射強大的全新團隊大砲，對對手造成巨大傷害！在單人挑戰中擊敗 Kracko 和 Dedede 國王軍隊，獲得稀有的複製能力帽。 《星之卡比：三重豪華版》的擁有者還可以使用兩種額外的複製能力以及一個專屬競技場 - Waddle Dee 火車軌道！

title_jp: カービィのすいこみ大作戦
overview_en: Inhaling foes and blow them away in 3D environments across 25+ stages. Inhale enough enemies and you can launch one huge Blaster Bullet capable of wiping out a troop of Waddle Dees. Now's your chance to battle iconic bosses like Kracko Jr and King Dedede in 3D. Inhaling multiple enemies to launch Blaster Bullets is a great way to pump up your score and go for a bronze, silver, or gold star. Another way to score big is to rack up a combo by continuously firing at enemies without missing. Or you could always just collect coins as you jump across platforms. As you progress, you'll unlock EX stages, which provide a tougher challenge to master. Celebrate your victories by tapping a Kirby series amiibo figure to build a statue in the plaza that plays new music.
overview_zh: 在超過 25 個階段的 3D 環境中吸入敵人並將其吹走。吸入足夠多的敵人，你就可以發射一枚巨大的衝擊彈，足以消滅一群瓦德爾迪斯。現在您有機會在 3D 模式中與 Kracko Jr 和 King Dedede 等標誌性 Boss 戰鬥。吸入多個敵人來發射衝擊波子彈是提高分數並獲得青銅、銀或金星的好方法。另一種獲得高分的方法是透過連續向敵人射擊而不失手來獲得連擊。或者，您始終可以在跨越平臺時收集硬幣。隨著你的進步，你將解鎖 EX 階段，這為掌握提供了更艱鉅的挑戰。點選卡比系列 amiibo 人物，在廣場上建造一座播放新音樂的雕像，慶祝您的勝利。

overview_en:
One ticked-off sorcerer just banished Kirby, warping the poor puffball to a yarn world in need of saving. The twist? Having a yarn body is epic! Kirby can transform into knitted wonders like tanks and flying saucers. Plus, his new ravel abilities mimic his classic copy abilities, adding something new to every stage of this action-adventure game!

Ravel abilities allow Kirby to drop buttons like bombs or wield a wire like a sword. And that’s just the beginning of all the makeshift magic. Dead end? Unzip a secret passage. Too dark? Unbutton the night to shed some light. Boss blocking your way? Unravel its face! As you play, you’ll collect decorative treasures for Kirby’s Pad. Show yours off with the StreetPass feature! If story mode isn’t tough enough, see if you can earn more collectibles in Devilish Mode. In this harder mode, you must survive without invincibility as devils obstruct your path through each stage. There are also all-new minigames starring Meta Knight and King Dedede!
overview_zh:
一位憤怒的巫師剛剛放逐了卡比，將可憐的馬勃扭曲到了一個需要拯救的紗線世界。轉折？擁有紗線主體是史詩般的！卡比可以變身為坦克車和飛碟等針織奇蹟。另外，他的新拉威爾能力模仿了他的經典複製能力，為這款動作冒險遊戲的每個階段新增了一些新內容！

拉威爾的能力讓卡比可以像炸彈一樣丟下按鈕，或是像劍一樣揮舞電線。這只是所有臨時魔法的開始。死衚衕？解開一條秘密通道。太黑了？解開夜晚的紐扣，照亮一些光明。老大擋住你的路了？揭開它的面紗！當你玩的時候，你會收集卡比墊的裝飾寶藏。使用 StreetPass 功能炫耀您的！如果故事模式還不夠困難，看看您是否可以在惡魔模式中獲得更多收藏品。在這個更困難的模式中，你必須在沒有無敵的情況下生存，因為惡魔會阻礙你透過每個階段的道路。還有梅塔騎士、帝帝帝王主演的全新小遊戲！

overview_en:
After months of bitter conflict with its neighbor, country A is preparing to unleash its latest machine of war, code-named Kokuga. With access to 9 destructive weapons and an array of power-ups, the compact mobile tank is an elite military machine.

Highly-reputed boutique game studio G.rev is pleased to offer this old-school strategic shooter for the Nintendo 3DS.

Players are tasked with piloting Kokuga, and must destroy tanks, drones, gun towers and other mecha in 12 different training missions. Each stage culminates with a boss fight, pitting the player against massive heavily-armed bosses. Upon receiving orders for active duty, the player is thrust into action against enemy forces.

Structured so gamers have maximum freedom in their game experience, Kokuga is great for both casual game sessions or long challenges.

Local and Download Play is supported, so assemble your squad of up to four players! Develop new strategies and help out your teammates by coordinating card use.
overview_zh:
經過與鄰國數月的激烈衝突後，A 國正準備發動代號為「Kokuga」的最新戰爭機器。這款小型移動坦克擁有 9 種破壞性武器和一系列強化道具，是一款精銳的軍事機器。

享有盛譽的精品遊戲工作室 G.rev 很高興為 Nintendo 3DS 推出這款老式策略射擊遊戲。

玩家的任務是駕駛 Kokuga，並且必須在 12 個不同的訓練任務中摧毀坦克、無人機、砲塔和其他機甲。每個階段都以老闆之戰告終，讓玩家對抗大量全副武裝的老闆。在收到現役命令後，玩家將被迫對敵軍採取行動。

Kokuga 的結構使玩家在遊戲體驗中擁有最大的自由度，Kokuga 非常適合休閒遊戲或長期挑戰。

支援本地和下載遊戲，因此可以組建最多四名玩家的小隊！制定新策略並透過協調卡片使用來幫助您的隊友。

title_en: Kung Fu Panda - Showdown of Legendary Legends
overview_en:
It is an age of Kung Fu heroes, warriors, and best of all, LEGENDARY LEGENDS! Face-off alongside or against Po, Tigress, Monkey, Tai Lung, Master Shifu, and all of your favorite Kung Fu Panda characters in the Showdown of Legendary Legends. Up to four players compete in iconic locations throughout the Valley of Peace and beyond. Compete in an epic Tournament where all Kung Fu warriors contend for honor and glory. Who will reign on top as the mightiest warrior in the land? Will it be a mighty hero or a cunning villain?
Game Features:

- Fight in an action-packed Kung Fu competition set in the Kung Fu Panda universe a showdown where all fighters must use their unique skills to compete for honor and glory

- Unique fighting styles every character in the game has special attacks, unique moves and an Awesome Attack
overview_zh:
這是一個功夫英雄、武士的時代，最重要的是，還有一個傳奇的時代！在傳奇傳奇的對決中，與阿波、母老虎、悟空、大龍、師父以及所有您最喜歡的功夫熊貓角色對戰或對抗。最多四名玩家將在和平谷及其他地區的標誌性地點進行比賽。參加一場史詩般的錦標賽，所有功夫戰士都將爭奪榮譽和榮耀。誰將成為這片土地上最強大的戰士？他會是強大的英雄還是狡猾的惡棍？
遊戲特色：

- 在功夫熊貓宇宙中參加充滿動感的功夫比賽，所有戰士必須運用自己獨特的技能來爭奪榮譽和榮耀

- 獨特的戰鬥風格遊戲中的每個角色都有特殊的攻擊、獨特的動作和令人敬畏的攻擊
no_intro_name: Kung Fu Panda - Showdown of Legendary Legends (USA)

title_en: Kuroko no Basuke - Mirai e no Kizuna
title_jp: Kuroko no Basuke - Mirai e no Kizuna
