title_en: L'Era Glaciale 4 - Continenti alla Deriva - Giochi Polari
no_intro_name: L'Era Glaciale 4 - Continenti alla Deriva - Giochi Polari (Italy)

overview_en:
Collect, build and battle your palm-sized robot. Play as Van Yamano, a young boy who comes upon a unique LBX - a complex, customizable, palm-sized robot. Use it - and team up with familiar characters from the hit TV series - to take down the evil corporation known as the New Dawn Raisers.

Features:
-Collect and build your own palm-sized robot from more than 4,000 parts to create a one-of-a-kind LBX
-Choose from more than 130 different complete sets of matching parts, or mix and match.
-Customize both external parts and interior parts individually to enhance your LBXs capabilities.
-Battle as your LBX against friends and foes in third-person view with local wireless multiplayer mode.
-Battle other LBX models in 20 different arenas with unique environmental characteristics.
-In local wireless multiplayer play, up to six players can battle using a variety of different rules
overview_zh:
收集、建造並與你的手掌大小的機器人進行戰鬥。扮演 Van Yamano，一個小男孩，他遇到了一個獨特的 LBX——一個複雜的、可自訂的、手掌大小的機器人。使用它 - 並與熱門電視劇中熟悉的角色合作 - 摧毀名為“新黎明崛起者”的邪惡公司。

特點：
-用 4,000 多個零件收集並建造您自己的手掌大小的機器人，打造出獨一無二的 LBX
- 從超過 130 種不同的全套匹配零件中進行選擇，或混合搭配。
- 單獨自訂外部零件和內部零件，以增強您的 LBX 功能。
- 在本地無線多人遊戲模式中，以第三人稱視角，扮演 LBX 與朋友和敵人戰鬥。
- 在 20 個具有獨特環境特徵的不同競技場中與其他 LBX 模型對戰。
- 在本地無線多人遊戲中，最多六名玩家可以使用各種不同的規則進行戰鬥

title_jp: レゴ バットマン2 DCスーパーヒーロー
overview_en: LEGO Batman 2: DC Super Heroes is an action game and the sequel to LEGO Batman: The Videogame. Just like the first game it draws elements from the Batman universe but built entirely in LEGO-style bricks. It starts when a "Man of the Year" award ceremony in Gotham City is interrupted by the Joker and a gang of bandits. Bruce Wayne is a candidate for the award and changes into Batman to pursue them, teaming up with members of the Justice League.
overview_zh: 《樂高蝙蝠俠 2：DC 超級英雄》是一款動作遊戲，也是《樂高蝙蝠俠：電玩遊戲》的續集。就像第一款遊戲一樣，它藉鑒了蝙蝠俠宇宙的元素，但完全用樂高風格的積木建造。故事開始於哥譚市的「年度風雲人物」頒獎典禮被小丑和一群強盜打斷。布魯斯韋恩是該獎項的候選人，他變身蝙蝠俠與正義聯盟成員聯手追逐獎項。

title_jp: LEGO バットマン3 ザ・ゲーム ゴッサムから宇宙へ
overview_en: The best-selling LEGO Batman videogame franchise returns in an out-of-this-world, action-packed adventure! In LEGO Batman 3: Beyond Gotham, the Caped Crusader joins forces with the super heroes of the DC Comics universe and blasts off to outer space to stop the evil Brainiac from destroying Earth. Using the power of the Lantern Rings, Brainiac shrinks worlds to add to his twisted collection of miniature cities from across the universe. Now the greatest super heroes and the most cunning villains must unite and journey to different Lantern Worlds to collect the Lantern Rings and stop Brainiac before it's too late.
overview_zh: 最暢銷的樂高蝙蝠俠電玩系列回歸，帶來一場超凡脫俗、動感十足的冒險！在《樂高蝙蝠俠 3：超越高譚》中，披風十字軍與 DC 漫畫宇宙的超級英雄聯手，飛往外太空，阻止邪惡的布萊尼亞克毀滅地球。布萊尼亞克利用燈籠環的力量縮小了世界，將宇宙中的微型城市加入他扭曲的收藏。現在，最偉大的超級英雄和最狡猾的惡棍必須聯合起來，前往不同的燈籠世界收集燈籠戒指，並在為時已晚之前阻止布萊尼亞克。

title_en: LEGO Batman 3 - The Game - Gotham kara Uchuu e
title_jp: LEGO Batman 3 - The Game - Gotham kara Uchuu e
no_intro_name: LEGO Batman 3 - The Game - Gotham kara Uchuu e (Japan)

title_en: LEGO City Undercover - The Chase Begins
title_jp: LEGO City Undercover - The Chase Begins
title_zh: 樂高小城：臥底密探追捕
overview_en: LEGO City Undercover: The Chase Begins. A prequel to the Wii U game, follow the exploits of Chase McCain as a rookie cop. Find out how the story of Chase McCain begins. Chase McCain is on his first assignment as a police offer-and it's up to you to help him clean up LEGO City! By changing into different disguises, Chase has access to unique abilities, such as putting out fires as a Fireman and breaking open doors as a Robber. After using his skills to infiltrate criminal organizations, help Chase finish the job by slapping cuffs on the bad guys. With multiple areas of LEGO City to explore and a boatload of LEGO Bricks and Studs to collect, the chase has most certainly begun.
overview_zh: 樂高城市臥底：追逐開始。 A prequel to the Wii U game, follow the exploits of Chase McCain as a rookie cop.瞭解蔡斯·麥凱恩的故事是如何開始的。 Chase McCain is on his first assignment as a police offer-and it's up to you to help him clean up LEGO City! By changing into different disguises, Chase has access to unique abilities, such breakas out out, Chase has access to unique abilities, such as using his skills to infiltrate criminal organizations, help Chase finish the job by slapping cuffs on the bad guys. With multiple areas of LEGO City to explore and a boatload of LEGO Bricks and Studs to collect, the explore and a boatload of LEGO Bricks and Studs to collect, the notasely has.
no_intro_name: LEGO City Undercover - The Chase Begins (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: LEGO El Senor de los Anillos
no_intro_name: LEGO El Senor de los Anillos (Spain) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Da)

overview_en: Welcome to beautiful Heartlake City where summer fun awaits. Meet your new LEGO Friends and join them on exciting adventures that build friendships with the girls and allow you to express your individual style and personality as you explore the city. Shop for the latest outfits and accessories, select the perfect hairstyle, decorate your bedroom and even pick out a pet. Choose how to spend your summer vacation; whether you'd rather attend horse riding camp, perfect a dance routine, or care for an animal at the rescue center, you can do these things and more as you express your creativity, and build fun memories with your five new friends.
overview_zh: 歡迎來到美麗的心湖城，這裡有夏日的樂趣。認識您的新樂高朋友，與他們一起進行激動人心的冒險，與女孩們建立友誼，並讓您在探索這座城市時表達您的個人風格和個性。購買最新的服裝和配件，選擇完美的髮型，裝飾您的臥室，甚至挑選寵物。選擇如何度過暑假；無論您是想參加騎馬營、完善舞蹈動作，還是在救援中心照顧動物，您都可以在表達您的創造力時做這些事情，並與您的五個新朋友建立有趣的回憶。

overview_en: Based on the last three Harry Potter books and final four films, LEGO Harry Potter: Years 5-7 takes players through Harry Potter's heroic adventures in the Muggle and wizarding worlds. From Privet Drive in Little Whinging to Diagon Alley, Hogsmeade and Hogwarts - plus new locations including Grimmauld Place, the Ministry of Magic, and Godric's Hollow - players will encounter new faces, new challenges and new magic, preparing them for the ultimate face-off against Lord Voldemort.
overview_zh: 樂高哈利波特：第 5-7 年級以哈利波特的前三本書和最後四部電影為基礎，帶領玩家體驗哈利波特在麻瓜和魔法世界的英雄冒險。從小惠金的女貞路到對角巷、霍格莫德和霍格華茨，再加上格里莫廣場、魔法部和戈德里克山谷等新地點，玩家將遇到新面孔、新挑戰和新魔法，為與佛地魔的終極對決做好準備。

overview_en: Following the epic storylines of Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park and Jurassic Park III, as well as the highly anticipated Jurassic World, LEGO Jurassic World is the first videogame where players will be able to relive and experience all four Jurassic films.
overview_zh: 繼《侏羅紀公園》、《失落的世界：侏羅紀公園》和《侏羅紀公園 III》以及備受期待的《侏羅紀世界》的史詩故事情節之後，樂高侏羅紀世界是第一款讓玩家能夠重溫和體驗所有四部侏羅紀電影的電玩遊戲。

title_en: LEGO Legends of Chima - Laval's Journey
overview_en: Players will embark on an amazing adventure into the world of Chima where the brave warrior Laval and his allies are called upon to fight for justice.
overview_zh: 玩家將踏上奇馬世界的奇妙冒險，勇敢的戰士拉瓦爾和他的盟友被召喚為正義而戰。
no_intro_name: LEGO Legends of Chima - Laval's Journey (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt)

title_en: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Universe in Peril
title_jp: LEGO マーベル スーパー・ヒーローズ ザ・ゲーム
overview_en: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes features an original story crossing the entire Marvel Universe. Players take control of Iron Man, Spider-Man, the Hulk, Captain America, Wolverine and many more Marvel characters as they unite to stop Loki and a host of other Marvel villains from assembling a super-weapon capable of destroying the world. Players will chase down Cosmic Bricks as they travel across LEGO Manhattan and visit key locations from the Marvel Universe, such as Stark Tower, Asteroid M, a Hydra base and the X-Mansion.
overview_zh: 樂高漫威超級英雄的原創故事橫跨整個漫威宇宙。玩家控制鋼鐵人、蜘蛛人、綠巨人、美國隊長、金鋼狼和許多其他漫威角色，聯合起來阻止洛基和其他許多漫威反派組裝能夠毀滅世界的超級武器。玩家將在穿越樂高曼哈頓並參觀漫威宇宙的關鍵地點時追逐宇宙磚塊，例如斯塔克大廈、小行星 M、九頭蛇基地和 X 大廈。
no_intro_name: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Universe in Peril (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt) (English-only Audio)

title_en: LEGO Ninjago - La Sombra de Ronin
no_intro_name: LEGO Ninjago - La Sombra de Ronin (Spain) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Da)

overview_en: The highly popular LEGO Ninjago videogame franchise is back with high-kicking action and adventure! LEGO Ninjago: Nindroids comes to the Nintendo 3DS and PlayStation Vita this summer. Based on the first five new episodes of the animated TV series, "LEGO Ninjago Rebooted,” players will battle and defend the New Ninjago City where the Ninjas face a technological threat by the evil Overlord and his robotic army of Nindroids. Using swift combo attacks, unique fighting moves, special weapons and new vehicles, the Ninjas must fight with all their might to save Ninjago.
overview_zh: 廣受歡迎的樂高幻影忍者電玩系列帶著高踢動作和冒險回來了！樂高幻影忍者：忍者機器人將於今年夏天登陸 Nintendo 3DS 和 PlayStation Vita。根據動畫電視連續劇《樂高幻影忍者重啟》的前五集內容，玩家將戰鬥並保衛新幻影忍者城市，忍者們將在這裡面臨邪惡霸主和他的忍者機器人軍隊的技術威脅。使用快速的組合攻擊、獨特的戰鬥動作、特殊武器和新車輛，忍者必須全力戰鬥以拯救幻影忍者。

title_jp: レゴ ニンジャゴー (テレビアニメ)
overview_en:
Players control Kai, Zane, Cole, Jay, Lloyd, Wu, Nya, and Dareth in their quest to defeat Ronin. Players can use the tornado of creation to create special builds with all four ninjas. Lloyd can use these spots by himself because he possesses all four elements. Players can ride on dragons to access more of the world. Some segments feature characters riding in vehicles to reach more of the current level. The Ninja can use their elemental powers to solve certain puzzles as well as unlock extras.

LEGO Ninjago: Shadow of Ronin delivers an untold story of the LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu TV show. Using their Spinjitzu abilities, players can unleash their Ninja’s elemental power to smash their way through enemies and solve puzzles.
overview_zh:
玩家控制 Kai、Zane、Cole、Jay、Lloyd、Wu、Nya 和 Dareth 尋求擊敗 Ronin。玩家可以使用創造龍捲風與所有四名忍者一起建立特殊的建築。勞埃德可以單獨使用這些位置，因為他擁有所有四種元素。玩家可以騎著龍去探索更多的世界。有些片段的特點是角色乘坐車輛來達到更多的當前水平。忍者可以使用他們的元素力量來解決某些謎題並解鎖額外內容。

《樂高幻影忍者：浪人之影》講述了電視節目《樂高幻影忍者：旋轉術大師》中不為人知的故事。玩家可以利用幻影旋轉術的能力，釋放忍者的元素力量，衝破敵人並解決謎題。

title_en: LEGO Pirates of the Caribbean - The Video Game
overview_en: LEGO Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game will be based in the world of the globally successful film franchise, incorporating storylines, locations and characters from the first three films ("Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl," "Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest" and "Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End") as well as the fourth film, "Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides."
overview_zh: 樂高加勒比海盜：電子遊戲將以全球成功的電影系列的世界為背景，融合了前三部電影（《加勒比海盜：黑珍珠號的詛咒》、《加勒比海盜：聚魂箱》和《加勒比海盜：世界的盡頭》）以及第四部電影《加勒比海盜：驚濤怪浪》的故事情節、地點和角色。
no_intro_name: LEGO Pirates of the Caribbean - The Video Game (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: LEGO Star Wars - The Force Awakens
title_jp: レゴ スター・ウォーズ
overview_en: The No. 1 LEGO videogame franchise triumphantly returns with a fun-filled, humorous journey based on the blockbuster Star Wars film. In LEGO Star Wars: The Force Awakens, players relive the epic action from the blockbuster film Star Wars: The Force Awakens, retold through the clever and witty LEGO lens. The game will also feature exclusive playable content that bridges the story gap between Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi and Star Wars: The Force Awakens. LEGO Star Wars: The Force Awakens also introduces Multi-Builds and Blaster Battles to the LEGO videogame universe. With Multi-Builds, use available LEGO bricks to open up new paths, then break them apart and re-build them again to open up another! And another! During Blaster Battles, use your surroundings as cover to stand against the First Order.
overview_zh: 排名第一的樂高電子遊戲系列凱旋歸來，帶來了基於熱門星際大戰電影的充滿樂趣、幽默的旅程。在《樂高星際大戰：原力覺醒》中，玩家可以透過巧妙而詼諧的樂高鏡頭重溫大片《星際大戰：原力覺醒》中的史詩動作。遊戲還將提供獨家可玩內容，以彌補《星際大戰 6：絕地大反攻》和《星際大戰：原力覺醒》之間的故事差距。樂高星際大戰：原力覺醒還在樂高電子遊戲世界中引入了多重拼裝和爆炸戰鬥。透過多重構建，使用可用的樂高積木開闢新路徑，然後將它們分開並再次重新構建以開闢另一條路徑！還有另一個！在衝擊波戰鬥中，利用周圍環境作為掩護來對抗第一秩序。
no_intro_name: LEGO Star Wars - The Force Awakens (USA)

title_en: LEGO Star Wars III - The Clone Wars
title_zh: 樂高星際大戰III：複製人戰爭
overview_en: Lego Star Wars III: The Clone Wars is similar to the previous titles in the series. Up to two players switch between different characters in order to fight enemies, solve puzzles, and progress through various levels. It introduces a few novelties, including scene swap, where players can switch between teams in separate locations to complete multi-part objectives, and boss battles. The game also features some real-time strategy elements, such as commanding large ground armies across battlefields.
overview_zh: 樂高星球大戰 III：克隆人戰爭與該系列先前的作品類似。最多兩名玩家在不同的角色之間切換，以對抗敵人、解決謎題並在各個關卡中取得進展。它引入了一些新奇之處，包括場景交換（玩家可以在不同地點的團隊之間切換以完成多部分目標）和 Boss 戰。遊戲還具有一些即時戰略元素，例如指揮大型地面部隊穿越戰場。
no_intro_name: LEGO Star Wars III - The Clone Wars (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

overview_en:
From the shire to the lonely mountain. Play Hobbits, Mankind, Wizards, Elves, and Dwarves, as 13 dwarves try to  recaim their homeland from Smaug the dragon. But their not the only ones Orcs are coming to claim The Lonely Mountain for themselves.As they getting closer to the mountain Gandalf  senses a ancient evil rising.

Play the prequel of The Lord of the Rings.
overview_zh:
從郡縣到孤山。飾演哈比人、人類、巫師、精靈和矮人，13 個矮人試圖從龍史矛革手中奪回家園。但他們並不是唯一想要佔領孤山的獸人。當他們越來越接近這座山時，甘道夫感覺到一股古老的邪惡正在崛起。

播放《魔戒》的前傳。

title_en: LEGO The Lord of the Rings
overview_en: LEGO The Lord of the Rings is based on The Lord of the Rings motion picture trilogy and relives the Fellowship's astonishing adventure across the imaginative world created by J.R.R. Tolkien, but with the added fun, humor and creativity that fans can expect from the LEGO videogame franchise. Featuring dialogue from the films, players will experience the same cinematic thrills and excitement they witnessed in the award-winning film series. Whether longtime fans, or newcomers to the The Lord of the Rings saga, family members of all ages will undoubtedly enjoy the humorous, playful touch that TT Games has imparted upon this epic story.
overview_zh: 樂高《魔戒》以《魔戒》電影三部曲為基礎，重現了遠徵隊在 J.R.R. 創造的想像世界中的驚人冒險。託爾金的作品，但樂高電子遊戲系列也為粉絲帶來了更多的樂趣、幽默和創造力。以電影中的對話為特色，玩家將體驗到他們在獲獎電影系列中目睹的相同電影般的刺激和興奮。無論是《魔戒》傳奇的長期粉絲還是新人，各個年齡段的家庭成員無疑都會喜歡 TT Games 為這個史詩故事賦予的幽默、俏皮的風格。
no_intro_name: LEGO The Lord of the Rings (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt)

overview_en: Beyond the Labyrinth is a dungeon crawler role-playing video game developed by tri-Ace and published by Konami for the Nintendo 3DS handheld video game console.[2] The game revolves around a group of players who have begun playing an online multiplayer game, only to find themselves thrust into a world completely different from theirs. They encounter a girl who has become trapped in this world's Labyrinth, and the two parties must work together to find a way out.
overview_zh: Beyond the Labyrinth is a dungeon crawler role-playing video game developed by tri-Ace and published by Konami for the Nintendo 3DS handheld video game console.[2] The game revolves around a handheld playeo game console.[2] The game revolves around a playcale players g play play then playcale player play g play play the g playerc​​l player play the g players g play the g player playle play the g playc​​y player playle play the g player playcle play the g player playcle playline g themselves thrust into a world completely different from theirs.他們遇到了一名被困在這個世界迷宮中的女孩，兩人必須共同努力尋找出路。

overview_en: Peanut Big Top is throwing the biggest Silly Funhouse carnival in Lalaloopsy Land for all to enjoy, including a special treat at the end! It's up to you to find all of the Lalaloopsy friends at the carnival to reveal the BIG surprise!
overview_zh: Peanut Big Top 將在拉拉樂西樂園 (Lalaloopsy Land) 舉辦規模最大的 Silly Funhouse 嘉年華，供所有人享受，最後還提供特別款待！你需要在嘉年華會上找到所有樂樂樂朋友，揭曉大驚喜！

overview_en: Langrisser Re:Incarnation Tensei takes place in a flooded world and the story's protagonist is a man with the Sacred Sword Langrisser, looking to reunite himself with a childhood friend, while fighting the empire's army. The battle system is the same as known from other Langrisser titles, but with 10-on-10 battles fought by super-deformed 3D characters serving as units. The units consist of Infantry, Cavalry, and Archers.
overview_zh: 《Langrisser Re：化身轉生》的故事發生在一個被洪水淹沒的世界，故事的主角是一名手持聖劍的男子Langrisser，他希望與兒時的朋友重聚，同時與帝國軍隊作戰。戰鬥系統與其他《Langrisser》遊戲中的戰鬥系統相同，但以超變形 3D 角色作為單位進行 10 對 10 的戰鬥。部隊由步兵、騎兵和弓箭手組成。

overview_en: When Professor Hershel Layton goes missing, it’s up to his daughter, Katrielle, to figure out what’s going on! As Kat, explore different environments and solve a collection of different puzzles that will get you closer to finding your father.
overview_zh: 赫謝爾雷頓教授失蹤後，他的女兒卡特里埃爾必須找出到底發生了什麼事！扮演凱特，探索不同的環境並解決一系列不同的謎題，這將使你更接近找到你的父親。

overview_en:
Dorothy is Back!

Oz is in Trouble again thanks to the evil Jester! A new villain named Jester showed up on the scene and started kidnapping a lot of the legends of Oz! Scarecrow, Lion and the Tin Man were all captured by his flying monkeys, and now theyre being held with others against their will! Dorothy needs to recruit some new companions to help her make it to the Emerald City. With exciting new lands of Oz to explore, you can help Dorothy and become a Legend of Oz!
overview_zh:
多蘿西回來了！

由於邪惡的小丑，奧茲國再次陷入麻煩！一個名叫小丑的新反派出現了，並開始綁架許多奧茲國的傳奇人物！稻草人、獅子、鐵皮人都被他的飛猴抓走了，現在又被強行關在一起！多蘿西需要招募一些新同伴來幫助她到達翡翠城。探索令人興奮的奧茲國新大陸，您可以幫助多蘿西並成為奧茲國傳奇！

overview_en:
This Launch Edition includes:
    Lord of Magna: Maiden Heaven Game
    28 Song Original CD Soundtrack

This is a role-playing game in which players help an innkeeper assist a maiden to regain her memories. From a 3/4 over-head perspective, players explore landscapes, interact with characters, and battle fantasy creatures (e.g., dinosaur, gargoyles, robots). Players use swords, guns, and magic spells to defeat enemy creatures in turn-based combat. Battles are accompanied by mild explosions and impact sounds. One sequence depicts a character impaled by a sword. The game contains some suggestive material: a bath house sequence depicting female characters with exposed buttocks and/or partially obscured breasts; a female character scrubbing another character's breasts; dialogue pertaining to breast size (e.g., “You really lucked out when filling out, huh” and “I wished mine were that big.”). The word “a*s” can be heard in the game.
overview_zh:
此發布版本包括：
    麥格納之王：處女天堂遊戲
    28首原聲CD原聲帶

這是一款角色扮演遊戲，玩家幫助旅館老闆幫助少女恢復記憶。從 3/4 俯視視角，玩家可以探索風景、與角色互動並與奇幻生物（例如恐龍、石像鬼、機器人）戰鬥。玩家在回合製戰鬥中使用劍、槍和魔法來擊敗敵方生物。戰鬥伴隨著輕微的爆炸和撞擊聲。其中一個場景描繪了一個被劍刺穿的角色。遊戲包含一些暗示性的材料：浴室場景描繪了暴露臀部和/或部分遮蓋乳房的女性角色；一個女性角色擦洗另一個角色的乳房；有關乳房大小的對話（例如，“填寫時你真的很幸運，呵呵”和“我希望我的有那麼大。”）。遊戲中可以聽到「a*s」這個字。

overview_en:
Join Luigi, the lean, green ghost-catching machine in an eerie new 3D adventure!

Luigi is back on a mission to remove a bunch of stubborn ghosts from some super-spooky mansions in Luigi’s Mansion 2 for Nintendo 3DS. Armed with his trusty “Poltergust” ghost-grabbing vacuum cleaner, Mario’s brother takes centre stage to capture those pesky phantoms. Sure, Luigi’s the nervous type who’d rather be as far from these ghosts as he can get, but a reluctant hero can still save the day!

This hair-raising title is the first sequel to the 2002 Nintendo GameCube launch title, Luigi’s Mansion, and brings back all the thrills of the original with bags of new fun features too. The stereoscopic 3D visuals bring the murky mansions, ghastly ghosts and spooky surroundings to life, so you can experience all the haunting chills and supernatural fun the game has to offer.

This time around the ghosts are craftier than ever... Just shining a light on them won’t phase these phantoms; instead you’ll need to shock them with a strobe of light before you can begin to vacuum them up. Incorporating more puzzles than its GameCube predecessor, Luigi’s Mansion 2 will put your grey matter to the test. An array of different ghosts haunt the various mansions, so you’d best get geared-up to help poor scaredy-cat Luigi figure out how to defeat each one!

The old mansions hide secrets aplenty, but that’s just an invitation to exploration for a man armed with a very special vacuum cleaner! On top of hoovering up piles of leaves to reveal hidden hoards or sucking up stacks of cash, the Poltergust can gobble wallpaper and more to reveal secrets, unearth new areas and unveil treasure chests...

And when it's time for a break from cleaning up ghosts on your own, you can team up with your friends and take on the mighty Scarescraper in Luigi's Mansion 2's multiplayer mode. Up for four people can join forces to take on a multi-floored building jam-packed with paranormal creatures, working together to clear each floor before the clock strikes zero. Bonuses and upgrades can be earned depending on how well the team does, while huge boss battles await at the top of the tower. Players can choose the number of floors to play through from five, 10 or 25, adjust the difficulty to cater for both new and veteran gamers, and even revive fallen teammates to keep the adventure going!
overview_zh:
與精巧的綠色捉鬼機器 Luigi 一起踏上怪異的全新 3D 冒險之旅！

在任天堂 3DS 版《路易吉洋館 2》中，路易吉再次執行一項任務，從一些超級詭異的宅邸中清除一群頑固的鬼魂。馬裡奧的兄弟帶著他值得信賴的「Poltergust」幽靈吸塵器，站在舞臺中央捕捉那些討厭的幽靈。當然，路易吉是個神經質的人，他寧願盡可能遠離這些幽靈，但一個不情願的英雄仍然可以拯救世界！

這款令人毛骨悚然的遊戲是 2002 年任天堂 GameCube 推出的遊戲《路易吉洋館》的第一部續作，它帶回了原作的所有刺激，還提供了許多新的有趣功能。立體 3D 視覺效果將陰暗的宅邸、可怕的鬼魂和詭異的環境栩栩如生，讓您可以體驗遊戲所提供的所有令人難以忘懷的寒冷和超自然的樂趣。

這一次，幽靈比以往任何時候都更加狡猾……僅僅用光照射它們並不能改變這些幽靈的相位；相反，你需要先用閃光燈震動它們，然後才能開始吸塵。與 GameCube 前身相比，《路易吉洋樓 2》包含了更多謎題，將考驗您的腦灰質。一系列不同的鬼魂出沒於不同的宅邸，所以你最好做好準備，幫助可憐的膽小貓路易吉弄清楚如何擊敗每一個鬼魂！

古老的宅邸隱藏著大量的秘密，但這只是對一個手持非常特殊的吸塵器的男人的探索邀請！除了吸起成堆的樹葉來揭示隱藏的寶藏或吸走成堆的現金之外，惡作劇者還可以吞噬桌布等來揭示秘密、挖掘新區域並揭開寶箱…

當您需要從獨自清理鬼魂中休息一下時，您可以與您的朋友組隊，在《路易吉洋館 2》的多人遊戲模式中對抗強大的 Scarescraper。最多四人可以聯手攻克一座擠滿超自然生物的多層建築，在時鐘指向零時齊心協力清理每一層樓。根據團隊的表現，可以獲得獎勵和升級，而巨大的頭目戰鬥則在塔頂等待著。玩家可以從 5 層、10 層或 25 層中選擇要玩的樓層數，調整難度以滿足新玩家和老玩家的需求，甚至可以復活倒下的隊友以繼續冒險！

overview_en: Luigi steps out from the shadow of his brother Mario and into the gloomy shadows of a very haunted house in this, his first-ever starring role. Armed with a flashlight and a customized vacuum cleaner, Luigi must rid the mansion of Boos and ghouls--and find his missing brother to boot. As Luigi, you'll search for the keys that open the many locked doors; vacuum coins, cash, and gold bars; and explore vases, bookcases, and drawers. From the brick-walled basement to the gloomy grounds, Luigi's Mansion is packed with chills, thrills, and creepy surprises.
overview_zh: 路易吉從哥哥馬裡奧的陰影中走出來，走進一座鬼屋的陰暗陰影中，這是他第一次主演角色。路易吉帶著手電筒和訂製吸塵器，必須消滅豪宅中的布斯和食屍鬼，並找到他失蹤的兄弟。身為路易吉，你將尋找開啟許多鎖著的門的鑰匙；真空硬幣、現金和金條；探索花瓶、書櫃和抽屜。從磚牆地下室到陰暗的地面，路易吉宅邸充滿了寒冷、刺激和令人毛骨悚然的驚喜。
