這一次，幽靈比以往任何時候都更加狡猾……僅僅用光照射它們並不能改變這些幽靈的相位；相反，你需要先用閃光燈震動它們，然後才能開始吸塵。與 GameCube 前身相比，《路易吉洋樓 2》包含了更多謎題，將考驗您的腦灰質。一系列不同的鬼魂出沒於不同的宅邸，所以你最好做好準備，幫助可憐的膽小貓路易吉弄清楚如何擊敗每一個鬼魂！

古老的宅邸隱藏著大量的秘密，但這只是對一個手持非常特殊的吸塵器的男人的探索邀請！除了吸起成堆的樹葉來揭示隱藏的寶藏或吸走成堆的現金之外，惡作劇者還可以吞噬桌布等來揭示秘密、挖掘新區域並揭開寶箱…

當您需要從獨自清理鬼魂中休息一下時，您可以與您的朋友組隊，在《路易吉洋館 2》的多人遊戲模式中對抗強大的 Scarescraper。最多四人可以聯手攻克一座擠滿超自然生物的多層建築，在時鐘指向零時齊心協力清理每一層樓。根據團隊的表現，可以獲得獎勵和升級，而巨大的頭目戰鬥則在塔頂等待著。玩家可以從 5 層、10 層或 25 層中選擇要玩的樓層數，調整難度以滿足新玩家和老玩家的需求，甚至可以復活倒下的隊友以繼續冒險！

overview_en:
Play and have fun with the fantastic Luv Me Buddies puppets and experience an exciting adventure along with your nice, new friends! In a colorful world, you will discover many mini-games designed for children, which will entertain, amuse and involve the whole family for beautiful moments of pure relaxation!

The Luv Me Buddies game is challenging, fun, educational activities, with fancy and sparkling graphics. Each time you interact with one of the lovable and cute little animals, you increase your chances in the game, unlocking new mini-games, for a never ending experience. Bright colors, catchy music and magical settings. The game stimulates children's imagination and helps them to interact with their creativity. Luv Me Buddies is an immersive experience for children and adults.

Enjoy and relax with Luv Me Buddies!
overview_zh:
與夢幻般的 Luv Me Buddies 木偶玩耍並享受樂趣，並與您的好新朋友一起體驗激動人心的冒險！在豐富多彩的世界裡，您會發現許多專為兒童設計的小遊戲，讓全家人一起享受娛樂、娛樂和享受純粹放鬆的美好時刻！

Luv Me Buddies 遊戲是具有挑戰性、有趣且具有教育意義的活動，具有精美且閃閃發光的圖形。每次與可愛的小動物互動時，您在遊戲中的機會就會增加，解鎖新的迷你遊戲，獲得永無止境的體驗。明亮的色彩、動人的音樂和神奇的場景。遊戲激發孩子們的想像力，幫助他們發揮創造力。 Luv Me Buddies 為兒童和成人帶來身臨其境的體驗。

與 Luv Me Buddies 一起享受和放鬆！

overview_en:
Answer the call of the goddess, Isis

Fast Action
Are you a Sniper?

Answer the call of the goddess, Isis, in this gripping Marble Popper! Chains of colored spheres are working their way through ancient Egypt, and it’s up to you to stop them before they reach the pyramids. Wielding your mystical winged-shooter, you must fire colored orbs into the chain to make matches of three or more, and eliminate the spheres from the chain
overview_zh:
響應女神伊希斯的召喚

快速行動
你是狙擊手嗎？

在這款扣人心絃的大理石波普爾中回應女神伊西斯的召喚！一串串彩色球體正穿過古埃及，你需要在它們到達金字塔之前阻止它們。揮舞你的神秘有翼發射器，你必須向鏈中發射彩色球體以匹配三個或更多球體，並消除鏈中的球體

title_zh: 荒失失奇兵3：歐洲逐隻捉
荒失失奇兵3：歐洲逐隻捉
荒失失奇兵3：歐洲逐隻捉

overview_en:
Madden NFL Football for 3DS offers a unique handheld experience with authentic 11-on-11 football, 5-on-5 action and Season Mode. Additional features jump off the screen with 3D graphics, such as "Spotlight Moments" and "Call Your Shots".

Madden NFL Football brings each of the 32 NFL teams and stadiums to life with a presentation optimized for viewing in 3D, including 3D specific cameras that provide new levels of depth, making Madden NFL Football the perfect on-the-go game for every football fan. And with three types of play calling -- GameFlow, Classic, and Arcade, Madden NFL Football provides an enjoyable experience for gamers of all skill levels.
overview_zh:
Madden NFL Football for 3DS 提供獨特的手持體驗，包括真實的 11 對 11 橄欖球、5 對 5 動作和賽季模式。其他功能透過 3D 圖形躍出螢幕，例如「聚光燈時刻」和「隨心所欲」。

《Madden NFL Football》透過針對 3D 觀看而最佳化的演示，讓 32 支 NFL 球隊和體育場栩栩如生，其中包括可提供新層次深度的 3D 專用攝影機，使《Madden NFL Football》成為每位球迷的完美移動遊戲。 《Madden NFL Football》提供三種遊戲型別——GameFlow、Classic 和 Arcade，為各種技能水平的玩家提供愉快的體驗。

overview_en: Become the Mahjong 3D Champion! Meet the challenge and become the real Mahjong master! Go back to Mahjongs Asian roots and follow the campaign of Emperor Qin Shi Huangdi as he conquers and unites China. Its up to you to decide on the best strategic move: Do you want to defeat Chu first or head north towards Wei to persuade them to join your side? Experience the world famous Chinese board game for the first time in real 3D. With a humorous story and charming characters you will enjoy endless fun with that classic game on your Nintendo 3DS!
overview_zh: 成為麻將 3D 冠軍！迎接挑戰，成為真正的麻將高手！回到麻將的亞洲根源，跟隨秦始皇征服和統一中國的徵戰。最好的策略舉措由你來決定：你是想先打敗楚國，還是北上攻打魏國，說服他們加入你的陣營？首次以真實3D方式體驗世界知名的中國桌遊。憑藉幽默的故事和迷人的角色，您將在 Nintendo 3DS 上享受這款經典遊戲的無盡樂趣！

overview_en: Shanghai mahjong puzzles in varying difficulty levels and 3 game modes...all in 3D.
overview_zh: 上海麻將謎題有不同的難度等級和 3 種遊戲模式......全部為 3D。

title_en: Majin Bone - Jikan to Kuukan no Majin
title_jp: Majin Bone - Jikan to Kuukan no Majin
no_intro_name: Majin Bone - Jikan to Kuukan no Majin (Japan)

title_en: Makai Ouji - Devils and Realist - Dairiou no Hihou
title_jp: Makai Ouji - Devils and Realist - Dairiou no Hihou
no_intro_name: Makai Ouji - Devils and Realist - Dairiou no Hihou (Japan)

title_en: Mamegoma - Yoi Ko Marui Ko Genki na Ko
title_jp: Mamegoma - Yoi Ko Marui Ko Genki na Ko
no_intro_name: Mamegoma - Yoi Ko Marui Ko Genki na Ko (Japan)

overview_en:
This is a game where you can talk with the mysterious creature "Mameshiba", which is neither a bean nor a dog. If you teach them your favorite words, Mameshiba will remember those words and talk with a cute voice! The more you teach them words, the more unique your original Mameshiba is! You can also interact with other Mameshiba and exchange words.
■ Fun-Packed Conversation
If you speak by combining the words you know and many example sentences, the variations are endless. With the cute voice of Mameshiba, you can always enjoy a fresh conversation.
■ Lots of Dress-Up and Remodeling Items
There are plenty of Mameshiba costumes and room interior items, so you can customize it to your liking!
■ Communication Fun
By using StreetPass, you can talk with the Mameshibas of people who passed you in the city, and you can remember one word from them. You can also interact with your friend's Mameshiba in local play.
overview_zh:
這是一款可以與既不是豆子也不是狗的神秘生物「豆柴」對話的遊戲。如果你教他們你最喜歡的單詞，豆柴就會記住這些單字並用可愛的聲音說話！你教他們的單字越多，你的原創豆柴就越獨特！您也可以與其他豆柴互動並交換話語。
■ 充滿樂趣的對話
如果你結合你所知道的單字和許多例句來說話，變化是無窮無盡的。有了豆柴可愛的聲音，您總是可以享受新鮮的對話。
■ 大量的裝扮和改造物品
豆柴服裝和室內裝飾物品種類豐富，可以依照自己的喜好進行客製化！
■ 溝通樂趣
透過使用StreetPass，您可以與城市中與您擦肩而過的人的豆柴交談，並且您可以記住他們的一句話。您還可以在本地遊戲中與朋友的豆柴互動。

title_en: Manga-ka Debut Monogatari - Suteki na Manga o Egakou
title_jp: Manga-ka Debut Monogatari - Suteki na Manga o Egakou
no_intro_name: Manga-ka Debut Monogatari - Suteki na Manga o Egakou (Japan)

overview_en: Luigi and his Mushroom Kingdom neighbors are teeing up once again in Mario Golf: World Tour. The Nintendo 3DS game includes both simple controls and a deeper experience for golf fans, plus courses that range from traditional to those inspired by the Mushroom Kingdom
overview_zh: 路易吉和他的蘑菇王國鄰居再次在馬裡奧高爾夫：世界巡迴賽中開球。 Nintendo 3DS 遊戲既包含簡單的控制，又為高爾夫球迷提供更深入的體驗，以及從傳統到受蘑菇王國啟發的課程

overview_en:
Mario Kart 7 is the seventh installment of the fast paced kart racing game which features an all-star cast from the Super Mario universe. The game continues the tradition of featuring various courses for eight players to race through while using a number of different power ups; avoiding banana peels, and launching red shell projectiles at rival opponents. The mechanics of Mario Kart have evolved allowing the race karts to transform in the middle of a race between a hang glider and a hydro submersible vehicle upon encountering aerial of underwater course segments respectively. The customization also introduces new features in building the ultimate vehicle, choosing from various frames which range in weight, a selection of tires which affect the handling of the vehicle on certain surfaces. There are 32 selectable tracks of which sixteen are new tracks, and the others are enhanced tracks from previous games. Several returning items like Koopa Shells, Banana Peels, and Super Mushrooms are present. Mario Kart 7 also features three items new to the Mario Kart series: the Fire Flower, the Super Leaf, and Lucky 7, which bestows seven items at once. In addition to traditional controls, Mario Kart 7 can be played using the Nintendo 3DS gyroscope, in which the action is viewed in first person and the player steers the kart simply by turning the entire game system. While racing, collecting coins can provide the vehicle with a brief boost of speed.

Multiplayer is supported for up to eight people in Grand Prix, VS, and Battle Modes. Time trial "ghost" data can be shared as well, and Nintendo 3DS owners who don't have the game can use the Download & Play option to join in Grand Prix mode. The improved multiplayer mode allows eight players to connect online and compete together. Players will be treated with a detailed stat tracker that can be exchanged with other players through StreetPass and SpotPass networking features. The innovative community feature allows for several online customization, matchmaking, and player networking.
overview_zh:
《瑪利歐賽車 7》是快節奏卡丁車賽車遊戲的第七部，該遊戲擁有來自超級瑪利歐宇宙的全明星陣容。遊戲延續了八名玩家在不同賽道上進行比賽的傳統，同時使用了多種不同的能力；躲避香蕉皮，並向對手發射紅色砲彈。馬裡奧卡丁車的機制已經進化，允許賽車在懸掛式滑翔機和水力潛水器之間的比賽中分別遇到水下賽道部分的空中時進行轉換。客製化還引入了構建終極車輛的新功能，從不同重量的框架中進行選擇，選擇影響車輛在某些表面上的操控性的輪胎。共有 32 首可選曲目，其中 16 首是新曲目，其他曲目是前作的增強曲目。存在一些返回的物品，例如庫帕貝殼、香蕉皮和超級蘑菇。 《瑪利歐賽車 7》也推出了《瑪利歐賽車》系列的三款新物品：火焰花、超級葉和幸運 7（可同時贈送七件物品）。除了傳統的控制之外，《瑪利歐賽車 7》還可以使用任天堂 3DS 陀螺儀進行遊戲，其中的動作以第一人稱視角觀看，玩家只需轉動整個遊戲系統即可駕駛卡丁車。在賽車時，收集硬幣可以為車輛提供短暫的速度提升。

大獎賽、VS 和對戰模式中最多支援 8 人多人遊戲。計時賽「幽靈」資料也可以共享，沒有遊戲的任天堂 3DS 使用者可以使用「下載並玩」選項加入大獎賽模式。改進的多人遊戲模式允許八名玩家線上上連線並一起競爭。玩家將獲得詳細的統計追蹤器，可以透過 StreetPass 和 SpotPass 網路功能與其他玩家交換。創新的社群功能允許進行多種線上自訂、配對和玩家網路。

overview_en:
Mario Party: Island Tour lets you take the fun on the road with your Nintendo 3DS system!

Face off against friends and family in the all-new, ultimate Mario Party – a portable minigame extravaganza that’s bursting with gameplay possibilities. If you’ve never played a Mario Party game before, you’re in for a treat.

There’s always something new to see on the Party Islands.
In this ultimate showdown you can take on the road, blaze through the 7 new game boards, some of which take just minutes to play. Wrangle goombas and blast out of cannons as you tilt, tap, and draw through new minigames harnessing the unique functionality of Nintendo 3DS. Compete in new multiplayer modes including mind bending puzzles, minigame challenges, or enter a whole new reality with AR Card play for up to 4 players*. Whether in single or multiplayer, this is a portable party that never ends.
overview_zh:
《瑪利歐派對：島嶼之旅》讓您使用 Nintendo 3DS 系統享受旅程的樂趣！

在全新的終極馬裡奧派對中與朋友和家人對抗——這是一場充滿遊戲可能性的行動式迷你遊戲盛宴。如果您以前從未玩過《瑪利歐派對》遊戲，那麼您一定會大飽眼福。

派對群島上總有新的東西可看。
在這場終極對決中，您可以上路，在 7 個新遊戲版中大放異彩，其中一些遊戲只需幾分鐘即可玩完。利用 Nintendo 3DS 的獨特功能，透過傾斜、​​點選和繪製的新迷你遊戲，與 goombas 爭吵並發射大砲。在新的多人遊戲模式中競爭，包括令人費解的謎題、迷你遊戲挑戰，或透過 AR 卡牌遊戲進入全新的現實，最多可容納 4 名玩家*。無論是單人遊戲還是多人遊戲，這都是一場永無止境的行動式派對。

overview_en: Think fast and engage with a variety of ways to party with Mario, Toad, and more, on-the-go or on the couch. It's always your turn as you and up to three friends roll the dice, roam the board, and recruit fan-favorite allies. The bigger your party, the faster you'll earn stars and coins in frantic minigames. Break free of turn order and choose your path to victory in Toad Scramble, a mode with five wild worlds filled with bite-sized, open maps to play on. Blast across them in cannons, creep around haunted houses, or get a lift from Lakitu. You may get a chance to take down Bowser's mech. Team up with Yoshi, Daisy, Waluigi and other allies along the way. Pit your skills against friends by racing along in a gauntlet of rapid-fire minigames in Coinathlon. Cannon down Goombas, take out Shy Guys pinball-style, and even surf on a leafboard…but watch for Wigglers! You may even find yourself wandering a labyrinth of Boos. Partying is tough business.
overview_zh: 快速思考並以各種方式與馬裡奧、蟾蜍等人一起聚會，無論是在旅途中還是在沙發上。輪到你和最多三位朋友擲骰子、在棋盤上漫遊並招募粉絲最喜歡的盟友。您的隊伍規模越大，您在瘋狂的迷你遊戲中獲得星星和金幣的速度就越快。在 Toad Scramble 中打破回合順序並選擇你的勝利之路，該模式有五個野生世界，其中充滿了可供玩耍的小型開放地圖。用大砲炸開它們，在鬼屋周圍爬行，或從拉基圖搭便車。你可能有機會拿下鮑澤的機甲。一路上與耀西、黛西、瓦路易吉和其他盟友合作。在 Coinathlon 的快速迷你遊戲挑戰中，與好友一較高下。加農砲打倒 Goombas，用彈珠方式幹掉 Shy Guys，甚至在葉子板上衝浪……但要小心 Wigglers！您甚至可能會發現自己在 Boos 的迷宮中徘徊。聚會是一件艱難的事。

title_jp: マリオパーティ100 ミニゲームコレクション
overview_en:
Ever partied with Mario? Stuffed mouthfuls of pizza? Dodged penguins? Well, the party is back with the top 100 minigames in Mario Party™ series history!

Test your memory, speed, and luck in a variety of multiplayer minigame types. With Download Play, up to 4 players can party on their own system with just 1 Game Card!

This time the fun comes faster, thanks to some fresh features, including a Favorites option for quicker minigame selection and streamlined instructions. Start playing and pretty soon you'll find there's only enough room for the best at this funfest!

The ultimate Mario Party with the top 100 minigames in Mario Party™ series history!
Up to 4 friends or family members can enjoy multiplayer via local wireless or download play.**
Have fun faster with streamlined minigame instructions and Favorites options for quick selection.
overview_zh:
和馬裡奧一起參加過派對嗎？滿嘴的披薩？躲過企鵝嗎？好吧，派對帶著 Mario Party™ 系列歷史上的 100 款迷你遊戲回歸了！

在各種多人迷你遊戲型別中測試您的記憶力、速度和運氣。透過下載遊戲，最多 4 名玩家只需一張遊戲卡即可在自己的系統上聚會！

這次，由於一些新功能，樂趣來得更快，包括用於更快選擇迷你遊戲的「收藏」選項和簡化的說明。開始玩吧，很快您就會發現這場歡樂盛宴的空間只夠容納最好的玩家！

終極瑪利歐派對，包含瑪利歐派對™系列歷史上的 100 個最佳迷你遊戲！
最多 4 位朋友或家人可以透過本地無線或下載遊戲享受多人遊戲。 **
透過簡化的迷你遊戲說明和快速選擇的收藏夾選項，更快地享受樂趣。

overview_en: Five full-on sports—Soccer, Tennis, Golf, Baseball, and Horse Racing—bring the challenge and depth you demand to Nintendo 3DS systems. Take on friends and rivals in local or online multiplayer*, hone skills in training, or tackle single-player tournaments. Whether you pick Mario, Waluigi, or one of sixteen others, you're on the road to superstardom. Before long, you'll have mastered the ins and outs of each sport: learn when to use an infield shift in Baseball, change your team’s formation in Soccer, and more. Even Horse Racing is surprisingly deep! Build a stable of horses and train them well to win the day in the first-ever horse races in series history. But remember: these aren't normal sports—they're Mario Sports. Expect unexpected thrills and power up to stomp the competition.
overview_zh: 五種全面的運動——足球、網球、高爾夫、棒球和賽馬——為 Nintendo 3DS 系統帶來了您所需的挑戰和深度。在本地或線上多人遊戲*中與朋友和對手較量，在訓練中磨練技能，或應對單人錦標賽。無論您選擇馬裡奧、瓦路易吉還是其他十六人之一，您都走上了超級巨星的道路。不久之後，您將掌握每項運動的詳細內容：瞭解何時在棒球中使用內場輪換，在足球中改變球隊的陣型等等。連賽馬也深得驚人！建立一個馬廄並訓練它們，以便在系列賽歷史上首次的賽馬比賽中贏得勝利。但請記住：這些不是普通的運動——它們是馬裡奧運動。期待意想不到的刺激和力量來擊敗競爭對手。

overview_en: Instantly jump into the multiplayer fun, locally or online, as your Mii or your favorite Mushroom Kingdom character. Discover simple touch screen controls as well as strategic depth with different tennis swings, both which propel the tennis experience into an ever-intensifying crescendo of fun as the volleys go on.
overview_zh: 立即以您的 Mii 或您最喜歡的蘑菇王國角色的身份，在本地或線上享受多人遊戲的樂趣。探索簡單的觸控螢幕控制以及不同網球揮桿的戰略深度，這兩者都將隨著截擊的進行而將網球體驗推向不斷增強的樂趣。

title_en: Mario _ Luigi - Bowser's Inside Story + Bowser Jr.'s Journey
overview_en: Laugh your way through a story told from three perspectives. Search the Mushroom Kingdom for a cure as Bowser, explore his innards as the Mario Bros., and discover the untold story of Bowser Jr.’s Journey. Overcome the fury of Fawful, action-packed battles, puzzling tasks, and giant bosses in a classic action RPG—stuffed with new content! Mario and Luigi are stuck inside Bowser, forced to accomplish unusual tasks to assist their arch nemesis with hero stuff across the land. The scenes and dialogue that ensue will have you cackling like Fawful, even in battle! Time your button presses and keep up with the action: turn the system sideways, blow into the mic, or tap the touch screen. In an all-new mode, Bowser Jr. will cross paths with our unlikely allies as he recruits Ranged, Flying, and Melee troopers to fight for his cause. Strategically form teams and pit them against enemies to reign supreme in frenetic combat.
overview_zh: 從三個角度講述一個故事，讓您開懷大笑。扮演鮑澤在蘑菇王國中尋找治療方法，扮演馬裡奧兄弟探索他的內臟，並發現小鮑澤的旅程中不為人知的故事。在充滿新內容的經典動作角色扮演遊戲中，克服充滿恐怖、動作豐富的戰鬥、令人費解的任務和巨型頭目的憤怒！馬裡奧和路易吉被困在庫巴體內，被迫完成不尋常的任務，用英雄的東西來協助他們的宿敵。接下來的場景和對話會讓你像 Fawful 一樣咯咯笑，即使是在戰鬥中！計算按下按鈕的時間並跟上操作：將系統側向轉動、對著麥克風吹氣或點選觸控螢幕。在全新模式中，小鮑澤將招募遠端、飛行和近戰士兵為他的事業而戰，並與我們意想不到的盟友相遇。策略性地組建團隊，讓他們對抗敵人，在激烈的戰鬥中稱霸。
no_intro_name: Mario _ Luigi - Bowser's Inside Story + Bowser Jr.'s Journey (USA)

overview_en: Mario and Luigi embark on the adventure of their dreams in a hilarious action RPG that combines the resort world of Pi'illo Island with the wild landscapes of Luigi's imagination, where anything can happen. Meet a host of hilarious characters as you strive to rescue Princess Peach and help Prince Dreambert free his petrified Pi'illo people from the bat-king Antasma's curse.
overview_zh: 馬裡奧和路易吉在這款搞笑的動作角色扮演遊戲中開始了他們的夢想冒險，該角色扮演遊戲將皮伊略島的度假世界與路易吉想像中的荒野景觀結合在一起，在那裡一切皆有可能發生。當你努力拯救桃子公主並幫助德雷姆伯特王子將他石化的皮伊羅人民從蝙蝠王安塔斯瑪的詛咒中解救出來時，你會遇到一群搞笑的角色。

overview_en: Princess Peach and her staff, plus brothers Mario and Luigi in tow, are invited for a sightseeing trip to the mysterious Pi’illo Island by its equally mysterious proprietor, Dr Snoozemore. But after an initially hospitable welcoming to the island – albeit with Dr Snoozemore noticeably absent – things take a turn for the worse when Princess Peach is kidnapped and pulled into a Dream World by a new enemy in the series, the ghostly bat king Antasma.
overview_zh: 桃子公主和她的工作人員，以及馬裡奧和路易吉兄弟，被同樣神秘的島主斯努茲莫爾博士邀請前往神秘的皮伊洛島觀光旅行。但在島上受到了最初的熱情歡迎之後——儘管斯努茲莫爾博士明顯缺席——當桃子公主被系列中的新敵人——幽靈般的蝙蝠王安塔斯瑪綁架並拉入夢幻世界時，事情變得更糟。

overview_en: Mario & Luigi: Paper Jam is a game in the Mario & Luigi series for Nintendo 3DS that crosses over with the Paper Mario series. As a result, the game uses the same graphics and engine as its predecessor and contains elements from Paper Mario: Sticker Star. The plot revolves around Mario, Luigi, and Paper Mario trying to stop the two Bowsers from taking over the Mushroom Kingdom using their combined armies. It is the second Mario & Luigi game for the Nintendo 3DS and the fifth game overall in the series.
overview_zh: 瑪利歐與路易吉：紙片卡醬是任天堂 3DS 的瑪利歐與路易吉系列中的一款遊戲，與紙片瑪利歐系列交叉。因此，遊戲使用與其前身相同的圖形和引擎，並包含《紙片瑪利歐：貼紙明星》的元素。故事圍繞在馬裡奧、路易吉和紙片馬裡奧試圖阻止兩位庫巴使用他們的聯合軍隊佔領蘑菇王國。這是任天堂 3DS 上的第二款《瑪利歐與路易吉》遊戲，也是該系列的第五款遊戲。

overview_en: Mario & Luigi: Paper Jam Bros. is a game in the Mario & Luigi series for Nintendo 3DS that crosses over with the Paper Mario series. As a result, the game uses the same graphics and engine as its predecessor and contains elements from Paper Mario: Sticker Star. The plot revolves around Mario, Luigi, and Paper Mario trying to stop the two Bowsers from taking over the Mushroom Kingdom using their combined armies. It is the second Mario & Luigi game for the Nintendo 3DS and the fifth game overall in the series.
overview_zh: 《瑪利歐與路易吉：紙片兄弟》是 Nintendo 3DS 的《瑪利歐與路易吉》系列中的一款遊戲，與《紙片瑪利歐》系列交叉。因此，遊戲使用與其前身相同的圖形和引擎，並包含《紙片瑪利歐：貼紙明星》的元素。故事圍繞在馬裡奧、路易吉和紙片馬裡奧試圖阻止兩位庫巴使用他們的聯合軍隊佔領蘑菇王國。這是任天堂 3DS 上的第二款《瑪利歐與路易吉》遊戲，也是該系列的第五款遊戲。

overview_en:
Save Princess Peach's voice, the Beanbean Kingdom and ... Bowser?!

The game that launched the Mario & Luigi series returns looking better than ever before. In this renewed classic, Mario and Luigi journey to the Beanbean Kingdom with Bowser to restore Princess Peach’s voice. Control Mario and Luigi simultaneously, making use of their unique Bros. Moves to solve puzzles and emerge victorious in action-packed battles. Pay heed to the enemy’s patterns and time your reactions right to land satisfying counterblows. Included in this remake is the Minion Quest: The Search for Bowser mode, which tells the story of the game from the perspective of Bowser’s minions. Recruit characters to grow your own Minion army as you fight to locate your missing leader!
overview_zh:
拯救桃子公主的聲音、豆豆王國和…庫巴？ ！

推出《瑪利歐與路易吉》系列的遊戲回歸，看起來比以往任何時候都更好。在這部全新經典中，馬裡奧和路易吉與庫巴一起前往豆豆王國，恢復桃子公主的聲音。同時控制馬裡奧和路易吉，利用他們獨特的兄弟動作來解決謎題並在充滿動作的戰鬥中取得勝利。注意敵人的模式並掌握正確的反應時機，以獲得令人滿意的反擊。此重製版中包含「小小兵任務：尋找庫巴」模式，該模式從庫巴的小小兵的角度講述遊戲的故事。招募角色來發展你自己的小小兵軍隊，並努力尋找失蹤的領袖！

title_en: Mario _ Luigi - Superstar Saga + Bowser's Minions
overview_en:
Save Princess Peach's voice, the Beanbean Kingdom and ... Bowser?!

The game that launched the Mario & Luigi series returns looking better than ever before. In this renewed classic, Mario and Luigi journey to the Beanbean Kingdom with Bowser to restore Princess Peach’s voice. Control Mario and Luigi simultaneously, making use of their unique Bros. Moves to solve puzzles and emerge victorious in action-packed battles. Pay heed to the enemy’s patterns and time your reactions right to land satisfying counterblows. Included in this remake is the Minion Quest: The Search for Bowser mode, which tells the story of the game from the perspective of Bowser’s minions. Recruit characters to grow your own Minion army as you fight to locate your missing leader!
overview_zh:
拯救桃子公主的聲音、豆豆王國和…庫巴？ ！

推出《瑪利歐與路易吉》系列的遊戲回歸，看起來比以往任何時候都更好。在這部全新經典中，馬裡奧和路易吉與庫巴一起前往豆豆王國，恢復桃子公主的聲音。同時控制馬裡奧和路易吉，利用他們獨特的兄弟動作來解決謎題並在充滿動作的戰鬥中取得勝利。注意敵人的模式並掌握正確的反應時機，以獲得令人滿意的反擊。此重製版中包含「小小兵任務：尋找庫巴」模式，該模式從庫巴的小小兵的角度講述遊戲的故事。招募角色來發展你自己的小小兵軍隊，並努力尋找失蹤的領袖！
no_intro_name: Mario _ Luigi - Superstar Saga + Bowser's Minions (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: Mario _ Luigi RPG - Paper Mario MIX
title_jp: Mario _ Luigi RPG - Paper Mario MIX
no_intro_name: Mario _ Luigi RPG - Paper Mario MIX (Japan)

title_en: Mario _ Sonic at the London 2012 Olympic Games
overview_en: Arriving on Nintendo's new handheld system for the first time ever Mario & Sonic at the London 2012 Olympic Games contains over 50 original Olympic themed events playable in both single and multiplayer modes. Bringing a whole new dimension to the Mario & Sonic universe, the glasses-free 3D visuals and the unique control systems mean there are plenty of new and exciting ways to compete for a coveted gold medal!
overview_zh: 2012 年倫敦奧運會上首次登陸任天堂全新掌上系統的《瑪利歐與索尼克》包含 50 多個原創奧運主題賽事，可在單人和多人模式下進行。裸眼 3D 視覺效果和獨特的控制系統為《瑪利歐與索尼克》宇宙帶來了全新的維度，這意味著有很多新的、令人興奮的方式來爭奪令人垂涎的金牌！
no_intro_name: Mario _ Sonic at the London 2012 Olympic Games (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: Mario _ Sonic at the Rio 2016 Olympic Games
overview_en: Compete with Mario, Sonic and all your favorite characters in Rio de Janeiro, host of the Olympic Games in 2016. Gear up for the competition, and see if you've got what it takes to compete with the best in events like Soccer, Rugby Sevens and Beach Volleyball.
overview_zh: 在 2016 年奧運會主辦國裡約熱內盧，與馬裡奧、索尼克和所有您最喜歡的角色競爭。為比賽做好準備，看看您是否有能力在足球、七人制橄欖球和沙灘排球等賽事中與最優秀的選手競爭。
no_intro_name: Mario _ Sonic at the Rio 2016 Olympic Games (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: Mario and Donkey Kong - Minis on the Move
overview_en: Get ready for a new puzzle adventure! Enjoy over 180 puzzling levels as you twist, drag, slide and drop tiles to build paths for the Minis to move along. Four different play styles offer unique ways to experience the action, while exciting minigames challenge you to rack up the highest score possible! Create your own levels and share them online, then download levels made by other players and expand the puzzle fun even further!
overview_zh: 準備好迎接新的益智冒險吧！扭轉、拖曳、滑動和放下圖塊，為迷你小人建造移動路徑，享受 180 多個令人費解的關卡。四種不同的遊戲風格提供了獨特的方式來體驗動作，而令人興奮的迷你遊戲則挑戰您盡可能獲得最高分！建立您自己的關卡並線上分享，然後下載其他玩家製作的關卡，進一步擴充套件解謎樂趣！
no_intro_name: Mario and Donkey Kong - Minis on the Move (USA)

title_en: Mario vs Donkey Kong - Tipping Stars
overview_en:
This version does not include a physical cartridge, only a download code for the Nintendo 3DS game. Once redeemed, the user will also receive a download code for the Wii U version of the game.

The Mario vs. Donkey Kong series makes its way to 3DS with the newest game in the charming puzzle series. This entry takes full advantage of the touch screen and features a near-limitless puzzle-creation mode.
overview_zh:
此版本不包含實體卡帶，僅包含任天堂 3DS 遊戲的下載程式碼。兌換後，使用者還將收到 Wii U 版遊戲的下載程式碼。

《瑪利歐大戰大金剛》系列以迷人益智系列的最新遊戲登陸 3DS。遊戲充分利用了觸控螢幕的優勢，並具有近乎無限的拼圖建立模式。
no_intro_name: Mario vs Donkey Kong - Tipping Stars (USA)

title_en: Mario vs. Donkey Kong - Minna de Mini-Land
title_jp: Mario vs. Donkey Kong - Minna de Mini-Land
overview_en: Japanese Nintendo 3DS release of Mario vs. Donkey Kong: Tipping Stars (or Mario vs. Donkey Kong: Minna de Mini-Land in Japanese). The physical release came with a cartridge, unlike other regions where the game was digital-only.
overview_zh: 日本任天堂 3DS 發行的《瑪利歐大戰大金剛：Tipping Stars》（日文為《瑪利歐大戰大金剛：Minna de Mini-Land》）。與其他地區的遊戲僅提供數位版本不同，實體版本附帶卡帶。
no_intro_name: Mario vs. Donkey Kong - Minna de Mini-Land (Japan)

title_en: Marvel Disk Wars - Avengers - Ultimate Heroes
title_jp: Marvel Disk Wars - Avengers - Ultimate Heroes
no_intro_name: Marvel Disk Wars - Avengers - Ultimate Heroes (Japan)

title_en: Marvel Super Hero Squad - The Infinity Gauntlet
overview_en: Marvel Super Hero Squad: The Infinity Gauntlet is a fighting video game, and the sequel to Marvel Super Hero Squad.
overview_zh: 《漫威超級英雄小隊：無限手套》是一款格鬥電玩遊戲，也是《漫威超級英雄小隊》的續作。
no_intro_name: Marvel Super Hero Squad - The Infinity Gauntlet (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

overview_en:
All your favourite pets are happily waiting for you! Pamper them, offer them a comfortable home and entertain them with funny minigames.

Care for dogs, cats, horses, rabbits, guinea pigs, birds and fishes. Have fun in minigames like feeding, playing, stroking, brushing, grooming or going for a walk. You can even enjoy exciting horse rides on the back of a Haflinger, Arabian & co. using the motion controls of your Nintendo 3DS.

Upgrade your compounds and keep an eye on the individual needs of each animal, then visit the store and buy food, medicine, toys or accessories for your pets. Collect Play Coins and spend them in the pet store!

- Earn stars by mastering your tasks and change them into great in-game extras
- Take a real 3D photo of yourself and use it in the game
overview_zh:
所有你最喜歡的寵物都在快樂地等著你！寵愛他們，為他們提供一個舒適的家，並透過有趣的小遊戲來娛樂他們。

照顧狗、貓、馬、兔子、天竺鼠、鳥類和魚。享受餵食、玩耍、撫摸、刷牙、梳理毛髮或散步等小遊戲的樂趣。您甚至可以騎在哈夫林格、阿拉伯等馬背上享受刺激的騎馬之旅。使用 Nintendo 3DS 的運動控制。

升級您的化合物並注意每隻動物的個人需求，然後前往商店為您的寵物購買食物、藥品、玩具或配件。收集遊戲幣並在寵物店消費！

- 透過完成你的任務來贏得星星，並將它們變成遊戲中的精彩額外內容
- 拍攝自己的真實 3D 照片並在遊戲中使用

overview_en:
Mega Man Legacy Collection is a celebration of the 8-bit history of Capcom's iconic Blue Bomber. Featuring faithful reproductions of the series' origins with the original six Mega Man games, the Legacy Collection will remind long-time fans and introduce newcomers to what made Mega Man such a popular and iconic character.

In addition to the six Mega Man games, Mega Man Legacy Collection features new ways to experience the classic games with the Museum Mode and new Challenge Mode. Challenge Mode remixes gameplay segments from all six games, with plenty of scaling difficulty objectives for experienced players to conquer yet serving as a good starting point for new players, too. Museum Mode contains a comprehensive collection of history, high-res art and original concept pieces - a mega treat for any fan of Mega Man and video game history.

Features:
Six classic games in one - Play a piece of video game history with the original six Mega Man games and experience the origins of the classic series.
8-bit style with HD flair - The games retain their retro 8-bit style with an added HD finish, giving a crisp, clean look to the charming, classic sprites.
Challenge remix mode for new and veteran players - The robust new Challenge Mode remixes gameplay from all six games for a new type of challenge. It provides both increasingly difficult trials for experienced players and also teaches newcomers to become familiar with the style of the games and tackle some of the trickier areas.
Museum of the era - The Museum Mode features a massive repository of history and art collected from the era of the games in this collection. Take a look back at the history of Mega Man with loads of information, high-res art, concept pieces, sketches and more in the Museum.
Developed with an all-new engine - Using the newly developed Eclipse Engine, Capcom and Digital Eclipse are able to archive these six pieces of video game history with faithful reproductions of the originals for a new generation of gamers.
Leaderboards and video replays - Fans will be able to watch video replays of the top players on the leaderboards, showcasing a whole new generation of Mega Man talent!

Also Available
Mega Man Legacy Collection: Collectors Edition
Collectors Edition includes two Nintendo 3DS Mega Man themes, 18-song sample compilation soundtrack, four Mega Man stickers, six Mega Man postcards and exclusive gold Mega Man amiibo Figure.
overview_zh:
《Mega Man Legacy Collection》是對 Capcom 標誌性藍色轟炸機 8 位歷史的慶祝。 Legacy Collection 忠實再現了該系列的起源，包括六款洛克人原作遊戲，將提醒老粉絲並向新玩家介紹是什麼讓洛克人成為如此受歡迎的標誌性角色。

除了六款《洛克人》遊戲外，《洛克人遺產合輯》還提供了體驗經典遊戲的新方式，包括博物館模式和新的挑戰模式。挑戰模式重新混合了所有六款遊戲的遊戲玩法部分，為經驗豐富的玩家提供了大量的難度目標來征服，同時也為新玩家提供了一個良好的起點。博物館模式包含歷史、高解析度藝術和原創概念作品的全面收藏 - 對於洛克人和電子遊戲歷史的任何粉絲來說都是一次巨大的享受。

特點：
六款經典遊戲合而為一 - 透過原版六款《洛克人》遊戲暢玩一段電玩遊戲歷史，體驗經典系列的起源。
具有高畫質風格的 8 位元風格 - 遊戲保留了復古的 8 位元風格，並新增了高畫質外觀，為迷人的經典精靈帶來清晰、乾淨的外觀。
適合新玩家和老玩家的挑戰混音模式 - 強大的新挑戰模式將所有六款遊戲的遊戲玩法重新混合，形成一種新型挑戰。它既為經驗豐富的玩家提供了越來越困難的嘗試，也教導新手熟悉遊戲風格並解決一些更棘手的領域。
時代博物館 - 博物館模式擁有從遊戲時代收集的大量歷史和藝術資源。博物館提供大量資訊、高解析度藝術作品、概念作品、草圖等，回顧《洛克人》的歷史。
採用全新引擎開發 - 使用新開發的 Eclipse 引擎，Capcom 和 Digital Eclipse 能夠忠實地為新一代遊戲玩家重現原作，從而存檔這六段電玩歷史。
排行榜和影片重播 - 粉絲將能夠觀看排行榜上頂級玩家的影片重播，展示全新一代洛克人的才華！

還提供
洛克人遺產合輯：收藏版
收藏版包括兩個任天堂 3DS 洛克人主題、18 首歌曲樣本合集配樂、四張洛克人貼紙、六張洛克人明信片和獨家金色洛克人 amiibo 公仔。

overview_en: Mercenaries Saga 2 is a Tactical RPG based on a fantasy world's stage. Claude is the captain of the Kingdom's Order of the Silver Eagle. One day while he guarded Prince Laz's hunting session, an assassin appeared. Claude covers the prince's escape and stops the assassin, but it was just a trap and the prince has been poisoned by a blade. To aid the prince, Claude has to lead the Silver Eagle north so that they can find the only antidote: an Erni Herb...
overview_zh: 《傭兵傳奇 2》是一款以奇幻世界舞臺為基礎的戰術角色扮演遊戲。克勞德是王國銀鷹勳章的隊長。有一天，當他看守拉茲王子的狩獵場時，一名刺客出現了。克勞德掩護王子逃跑並阻止了刺客，但這只是一個陷阱，王子已經被利刃毒死。為了幫助王子，克洛德必須帶領銀鷹北上，找到唯一的解藥：厄尼藥草…

title_en: Metal Fight Beyblade 4D x ZEROG Ultimate Tournament
title_jp: Metal Fight Beyblade 4D x ZEROG Ultimate Tournament
no_intro_name: Metal Fight Beyblade 4D x ZEROG Ultimate Tournament (Japan)

overview_en:
A classic Metroid adventure returns, rebuilt from the ground up!

Brave the hostile terrain of an alien planet teeming with vicious life forms as legendary bounty hunter Samus Aran. Her mission? Terminate the Metroid menace in this masterful reimagining of her 1991 Game Boy™ adventure. Samus Aran’s arsenal has been enhanced with new moves and abilities that are sure to help her face the deadly surprises that await. This intense, side-scrolling action platformer is a great entry point into the Metroid franchise and perfect for returning fans as well, and it’s available only on the Nintendo 3DS family of systems.

Features: 

This intense, side-scrolling action platformer has been completely remade with engaging and immersive 3D visuals and a rich, atmospheric color palette.
Classic Metroid II: Return of Samus gameplay is joined by a wealth of new content, including a set of brand new abilities that utilizes a mysterious energy resource called “Aeion,” a powerful melee counterattack, and 360-degree Free Aim Mode. 
There are plenty of secrets to find—and if you uncover enough of them, you may even start to unravel the mystery of Planet SR388’s past. 
Two new amiibo™ figures*—Samus Aran and Metroid—will be released as a set alongside the game. This game is also compatible with the Zero Suit Samus and Samus amiibo from the Super Smash Bros. series. Functionality details will be revealed at a later date. 
While supplies last, fans will be able to purchase a special edition of the game, which includes a physical copy of the game, a sound-selection CD featuring 25 tracks from across the Metroid franchise, and a reversible title-sheet insert for the game case.
overview_zh:
經典的銀河戰士冒險回歸，從頭開始重建！

飾演傳奇賞金獵人薩姆斯·阿蘭 (Samus Aran)，勇敢地面對充滿邪惡生命形式的外星球的敵對地形。她的使命？在這款對她 1991 年 Game Boy™ 冒險的巧妙重新演繹中，消滅銀河戰士的威脅。薩姆斯·阿蘭的武器庫已透過新的動作和能力得到增強，這肯定會幫助她面對等待的致命驚喜。這款激烈的橫向捲軸動作平臺遊戲是進入《銀河戰士》系列的絕佳切入點，也是回歸粉絲的完美選擇，並且僅在 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統上提供。

特點：

這款激烈的橫向捲軸動作平臺遊戲經過徹底重製，具有引人入勝的沉浸式 3D 視覺效果和豐富大氣的調色盤。
經典《銀河戰士 II：薩姆斯歸來》遊戲玩法加入了豐富的新內容，包括一系列利用名為“Aeion”的神秘能源的全新能力、強大的近戰反擊以及 360 度自由瞄準模式。 
有許多秘密等待您去發現，如果您發現了足夠的秘密，您甚至可能會開始解開 SR388 行星過去的謎團。 
兩個新的 amiibo™ 人物*——Samus Aran 和 Metroid——將與遊戲一起發布。遊戲也相容於《任天堂明星大亂鬥》系列中的零服 Samus 和 Samus amiibo。功能細節將在稍後公佈。 
售完為止，粉絲們可以購買遊戲的特別版，其中包括遊戲的實體副本、收錄有《銀河戰士》系列中 25 首曲目的精選聲音 CD，以及遊戲盒的雙面標題頁插頁。

overview_en:
Bounty Hunter Samus Aran faces off against the Metroid scourge once again in this epic sequel to the NES™ classic, Metroid. Take control to guide Samus™ through cavernous corridors, ancient ruins, and alien traps. On the mysterious planet SR388, you'll find artifacts of a lost civilization that grant amazing powers. Cut through creatures in a buzz-saw blur. Roll through hidden tunnels and climb sheer walls.

Fight to the heart of the planet and search for the merciless Metroid leaders. If you are a cunning explorer, you’'ll earn the best of several super endings. Enter this exciting Metroid sequel and experience the thrills of this beloved series.
overview_zh:
在這部 NES™ 經典《銀河戰士》的史詩續集中，賞金獵人薩姆斯·阿蘭再次對抗銀河戰士禍害。控制並引導Samus™穿過洞穴走廊、古代遺跡和外星陷阱。在神秘的 SR388 星球上，您會發現失落文明的文物，這些文物賦予了驚人的力量。以圓鋸般的模糊方式切割生物。穿過隱藏的隧道並攀爬陡峭的牆壁。

戰鬥到地球的中心並尋找無情的銀河戰士領導人。如果你是一個狡猾的探險家，你將獲得幾個超級結局中最好的一個。進入這款令人興奮的《銀河戰士》續作，體驗這個深受喜愛的系列的刺激。

overview_en:
The galaxy is not at peace. Following the destruction of Phazon and the corrupted world, Phaaze, the Space Pirate threat remains. As a recruit in the Federation Force, a best-of-the-best unit created by the Galactic Federation, it’s your duty to stamp out the Space Pirate menace. Suit up in specialised battle armour, known as a Mech, and head out to the desolate Bermuda system to investigate reports of suspicious activity, using your handy blaster to eliminate any enemies that get in your way!

Touch down on inhospitable worlds and infiltrate enemy-infested bases, solve environmental puzzles and battle fearsome alien life forms of all shapes and sizes in objective-based missions. Tread carefully as a lone marine, or join a squad of up to four players, locally or online, to take the fight to the Space Pirates!

When you’re completing missions as a squad, working together is vital to survival. Before each assignment, divide different types of AUX ammo between your comrades and use them to support each other mid-mission. For example, Repair Capsules can be fired at team-mates to heal them in battle, while the Slow Beam can be used to hinder an enemy to give the rest of your squad the perfect opportunity to lay down some fire!

With each successful mission, you’ll earn MODs that can enhance your Mech’s armour and abilities, preparing you for tougher trials ahead. If you want to give your Mech a fresh new look, customise it with a variety of different paint jobs. With compatible amiibo (sold separately) you can even unlock decals!

Take a break from fighting Space Pirates and unwind with a round of Blast Ball! In this original futuristic sport, up to six players split into teams and pilot their own individual Mechs, using their cannons to blast a large ball into the opposing team’s goal to score points. Play solo, take on nearby friends and family via Local Play and Download Play, or seek out competition in online multiplayer. This sci-fi sport is a great way to familiarise yourself with your Mech or settle a friendly score among your squad mates!

Band together with other players – or brave it on your own – and protect the galaxy by any means necessary in Metroid Prime: Federation Force, only on Nintendo 3DS family systems.
overview_zh:
銀河系並不平靜。隨著 Phazon 和腐敗世界 Phaaz 的毀滅，太空海盜的威脅仍然存在。身為銀河聯邦建立的最優秀部隊聯邦部隊的新兵，你有責任消滅太空海盜的威脅。穿上專門的戰鬥裝甲，稱為機甲，前往荒涼的百慕達星系，調查可疑活動的報告，使用你方便的爆能槍消滅任何阻礙你的敵人！

降落在荒涼的世界，滲透敵人出沒的基地，解決環境難題，並在基於目標的任務中與各種形狀和大小的可怕外星生命形式戰鬥。作為一名孤獨的海軍陸戰隊員小心行事，或加入最多四名玩家的小隊（本地或線上），與太空海盜作戰！

當你作為一個小隊完成任務時，共同努力對於生存至關重要。在每次任務之前，為你的戰友分配不同型別的 AUX 彈藥，並在任務中使用它們互相支援。例如，修復膠囊可以在戰鬥中向隊友發射以治癒他們，而慢光束可以用來阻礙敵人，為你的小隊其他成員提供絕佳的射擊機會！

每次成功完成任務後，您都將獲得可以增強機甲裝甲和能力的 MOD，為未來更艱難的考驗做好準備。如果您想為您的機甲煥然一新的外觀，請使用各種不同的油漆作業對其進行自訂。使用相容的 amiibo（單獨出售），您甚至可以解鎖貼花！

從與太空海盜的戰鬥中休息一下，玩一輪爆炸球放鬆一下！在這款原創的未來運動中，最多六名玩家分成小組，駕駛自己的機甲，使用大砲將大球射入對方球隊的球門以獲得分數。單人遊戲，透過本地遊戲和下載遊戲與附近的朋友和家人較量，或線上上多人遊戲中尋求競爭。這項科幻運動是熟悉你的機甲或與你的隊友之間友好得分的好方法！

在《銀河戰士：聯邦力量》中，與其他玩家團結起來，或獨自勇敢地戰鬥，並透過任何必要的手段保護銀河系，僅限任天堂 3DS 系列系統。

overview_en:
The most intense sci-fi sport in the Metroid universe!

Six mechs. Two teams. One free pass to play the most intense 3-on-3 sci-fi sport in the Metroid universe. Literally shoot the ball into the goal and grab power-ups as you fight. Increase your firing rate or even eject opponents from their mechs! Score victory locally or online* as you prepare for the full game Metroid Prime: Federation Force.
overview_zh:
銀河戰士宇宙中最激烈的科幻運動！

六臺機甲。兩隊。一張免費通行證即可暢玩《銀河戰士》宇宙中最激烈的 3 對 3 科幻運動。從字面上看，將球射入球門並在戰鬥時獲取能量提升。提高你的射擊速度，甚至將對手從他們的機甲中彈出！當您準備完整的《銀河戰士：聯邦力量》遊戲時，在本地或線上*取得勝利。

overview_en: Cast Mischaracterise into various roles and watch hilarious scenes unfold as they work together to defeat the Dark Lord who has stolen the faces of the townspeople of Miitopia. Players can bring in their created Mischaracterise from Miitomo Tomodachi Life, or create their own Mii team in the game. This game has a light-hearted tone with traditional and strategic RPG-like elements, including customisation, relationship building and team management.
overview_zh: 讓 Mischaracterise 扮演各種角色，觀看搞笑場景的展開，他們齊心協力打敗偷走 Miitopia 鎮民面孔的黑魔王。玩家可以從 Miitomo Tomodachi Life 中引入自己建立的 Mischaracterise，或在遊戲中建立自己的 Mii 團隊。這款遊戲的基調輕鬆，帶有傳統和戰略角色扮演遊戲的元素，包括客製化、關係建立和團隊管理。

title_en: Mike the Knight and the Great Gallop
no_intro_name: Mike the Knight and the Great Gallop (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)

overview_en: Make minis march like never before in this free download. Tap an amiibo™ figure to guide one of 11 minis across more than 50 levels. Use minis and their unique abilities, like Yoshi who can eat enemies or Luigi who jumps to high places to reach the exit. But watch out! Mine carts, ghostly Boos and other new obstacles lurk around every corner. Whether you're playing on a Nintendo 3DS or Wii U system, simply tap any compatible amiibo figure to get started. Or, by tapping specific amiibo figures, you can guide minis that have their own unique abilities and exclusive sets of levels. These specially designed, character-themed levels include their own look, remixed music and obstacles for you to master, which comes in handy the more you play. Earn in-game amiibo tokens with different minis to unlock even more difficult challenges.
overview_zh: 在此免費下載中，以前所未有的方式進行迷你遊行。點選 amiibo™ 玩偶，引導 11 個迷你小人之一穿越 50 多個關卡。使用迷你人和他們獨特的能力，例如可以吃掉敵人的耀西或跳到高處到達出口的路易吉。但要小心！礦車、幽靈般的噓聲和其他新的障礙物潛伏在每個角落。無論您是在 Nintendo 3DS 還是 Wii U 系統上玩遊戲，只需點選任何相容的 amiibo 玩偶即可開始。或者，透過點選特定的 amiibo 人物，您可以引導擁有自己獨特能力和專屬關卡的迷你人偶。這些專門設計的、以角色為主題的關卡包括它們自己的外觀、混音音樂和障礙，供您掌握，玩得越多就會派上用場。使用不同的迷你遊戲賺取遊戲內的 amiibo 代幣，以解鎖更困難的挑戰。

title_en: Miracle Tunes! Game de Tune Up! Dapun!
title_jp: Miracle Tunes! Game de Tune Up! Dapun!
no_intro_name: Miracle Tunes! Game de Tune Up! Dapun! (Japan)

overview_en:
Join apprentice witch Moco and her friends on a journey of friendship, excitement, and adventure!

Moco Moco Friends is an exciting twist on the adventure RPG genre. Build your skills and amass loads of cuddly monsters to become the ultimate Plushkin Master! Battle against your rivals, scavenge items, venture through massive dungeons, evolve your Plushkin monsters, and travel with your companions across the magical realm of Dreamtopia!
overview_zh:
與學徒女巫莫科和她的朋友們一起踏上友誼、刺激和冒險的旅程！

Moco Moco Friends 是一款令人興奮的冒險角色扮演遊戲。培養你的技能並累積大量可愛的怪物，成為終極毛絨大師！與你的對手戰鬥，搜尋物品，冒險穿越巨大的地牢，進化你的毛絨怪物，並與你的同伴一起穿越夢幻國度的魔法王國！

overview_en:
Momotaro Dentetsu 2017: Tachiagare Nippon!! is the first Momotaro Dentetsu game for the Nintendo 3DS and is developed by Valhalla Game Studios. It is normally owned by Konami, but it was licensed to Nintendo.

The game is similar to various board games like Monopoly. The goal is to earn the most money before the game ends. A player does this by buying shops along the train tracks. The player that gets to a destination first also gets a bonus. At the end of each in-game year in March, the sum total of possessions and money is announced. Players too slow to their destination will get possessed by a god of poverty which will make the player lose money in various ways. This god of poverty can be passed around by escaping last place. There are also 130 different skill cards that affect the state of the game.

The game supports download play multiplayer a la Mario Party: Star Rush in that each player only needs to download an app from the 3DS eShop and they get the full multiplayer experience.
overview_zh:
桃太郎電鐵2017：立甲日本！ ！是任天堂 3DS 上的第一款桃太郎電鐵遊戲，由 Valhalla Game Studios 開發。它通常由科樂美擁有，但已授權給任天堂。

遊戲類似大富翁等各種棋盤遊戲。目標是在遊戲結束前賺到最多的錢。玩家透過沿著火車軌道購買商店來做到這一點。最先到達目的地的玩家還會獲得獎勵。在每個遊戲年份的三月結束時，都會公佈財產和金錢的總數。到達目的地太慢的玩家會被窮神附體，使玩家以各種方式損失金錢。這位窮神可以透過逃離最後一名而被繞過。還有130張不同的技能卡會影響遊戲的狀態。

遊戲支援下載多人遊戲，就像《馬裡奧派對：星海爭霸》一樣，每個玩家只需從 3DS eShop 下載一個應用程式，即可獲得完整的多人遊戲體驗。

title_en: MonHun Nikki - Poka Poka Ailu Mura DX
title_jp: MonHun Nikki - Poka Poka Ailu Mura DX
no_intro_name: MonHun Nikki - Poka Poka Ailu Mura DX (Japan)

overview_en: Live a Monster Truck experience in 3D! Feel the power of fully customizable, aggressive and loud vehicles which can destroy and change the game environment and enable you to create mayhem.
overview_zh: 體驗 3D 怪物卡車體驗！感受完全可自訂的、侵略性的、吵鬧的車輛的力量，它們可以破壞和改變遊戲環境，讓你製造混亂。

overview_en: Monster High fans will be whisked away on a voltageous adventure in Monster High 13 Wishes The Official Game. Gamers will play as their favorite freaky-fab ghoul as they jump, climb and swing through multiple magical levels to save Monster High and their ghoulfriends.
overview_zh: Monster High 粉絲將在 Monster High 13 Wishes 官方遊戲中踏上一段驚心動魄的冒險之旅。玩家將扮演他們最喜歡的怪異食屍鬼，在多個魔法關卡中跳躍、攀爬和搖擺，以拯救 Monster High 和他們的食屍鬼朋友。

title_en: Monster High - New Ghoul in School
no_intro_name: Monster High - New Ghoul in School (USA)

overview_en: It's time to lace up your skates and get ready for Monster High: Skultimate Roller Maze! Pick your favorite Monster High character and assemble a team of friends and fiends as you skate your way through the catacombs of Monster High. Collect power-ups, avoid monstrous obstacles, scream past the competition and use each character's special ability and ghoul power to win the race and bring home the victory! The importance of teamwork and good sportsmanship are the final nail in the coffin as you "Be Yourself. Be Unique. Be a Monster!"
overview_zh: 是時候繫上你的溜冰鞋，為《Monster High: Skultimate Roller Maze》做好準備了！選擇你最喜歡的 Monster High 角色，並組建一支由朋友和惡魔組成的團隊，在 Monster High 的地下墓穴中滑行。收集能量道具，避開巨大的障礙，在比賽中尖叫，並利用每個角色的特殊能力和食屍鬼力量來贏得比賽，把勝利帶回家！團隊合作和良好體育精神的重要性是壓垮你「做你自己、成為獨一無二、成為怪物！」的最後一根稻草。

overview_en:
Welcome to the world of Monster Hunter, where you forge your own path to glory. Take up arms and battle dozens of ferocious monsters. Go it alone or team up with friends. Gain more than just satisfaction from your hard-fought victories: carve conquered monsters to gain their bones, horns, hides and more, then have them fashioned into weapons and armour to steel you for the even tougher battles ahead. It is the hunter's way.

Hunt, gather, and become a legend in Monster Hunter 3 Ultimate.

Monster Hunter 3 Ultimate on Nintendo 3DS contains all the quests, equipment and monsters of its high-definition counterpart on Wii U, and also offers several features unique to the Nintendo 3DS version:

--> Local Play
Get together with friends and form a hunting party of up to four players via local wireless connection. Combine your strengths and watch each other’s backs to take down spectacular beasts together. Find out more at the Multiplayer section.

--> Nintendo 3DS Circle Pad Pro and Circle Pad Pro XL
Monster Hunter 3 Ultimate offers an improved camera system to help you keep track of your enemies more easily, and with the optional Nintendo 3DS Circle Pad Pro or Circle Pad Pro XL (both sold separately) you can make use of dual analogue controls to manoeuvre your character and the camera with total precision.

--> StreetPass
Exchange your Guild Card with other players via StreetPass and meet new hunters more easily than ever.

--> Transfer your save data
If you own both a Wii U and Nintendo 3DS, and a copy of Monster Hunter 3 Ultimate for each system, you can transfer your save data between systems to press on with your journey wherever you are. Take your hunter on the road with Nintendo 3DS, then transfer your progress back to Wii U and resume your journey in HD.
overview_zh:
歡迎來到《魔物獵人》的世界，在這裡你可以開啟自己的榮耀之路。拿起武器，與數十種兇猛的怪物戰鬥。單獨行動或與朋友組隊。從你艱苦奮鬥的勝利中獲得的不僅僅是滿足感：雕刻被征服的怪物以獲得他們的骨頭、角、獸皮等等，然後將它們塑造成武器和盔甲，讓你在未來更艱難的戰鬥中堅強起來。這是獵人的方式。

在《Monster Hunter 3 Ultimate》中狩獵、採集並成為傳奇。

Nintendo 3DS 上的《魔物獵人 3 Ultimate》包含 Wii U 上高畫質版本的所有任務、裝備和怪物，也提供了 Nintendo 3DS 版本獨有的多項功能：

--> 本機播放
透過本地無線連線與朋友聚會，組成最多四名玩家的狩獵隊伍。結合你們的優勢，互相監視，共同擊倒壯觀的野獸。在多人遊戲部分了解更多。

--> 任天堂 3DS Circle Pad Pro 和 Circle Pad Pro XL
《魔物獵人 3 Ultimate》提供了改進的攝影機系統，可幫助您更輕鬆地追蹤敵人，並且透過選購的 Nintendo 3DS Circle Pad Pro 或 Circle Pad Pro XL（均單獨出售），您可以使用雙模擬控制來完全精確地操縱角色和攝影機。

--> 街道通行證
透過 StreetPass 與其他玩家交換您的公會卡，並比以往更輕鬆地結識新獵人。

--> 傳輸你的儲存資料
如果您同時擁有 Wii U 和 Nintendo 3DS，並且每個系統都擁有《怪物獵人 3 Ultimate》的副本，則可以在系統之間傳輸儲存資料，以便無論您身在何處都可以繼續您的旅程。使用 Nintendo 3DS 帶領您的獵人上路，然後將您的進度傳回 Wii U 並繼續您的高畫質旅程。

overview_en:
Monster Hunter™ 4 Ultimate is the newest installment in the popular Monster Hunter series, which has sold more than 28 million units worldwide to date. In Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate, players will take on the role of a hunter that joins up with a traveling caravan to explore new lands and towns along the way. This grand adventure will include hundreds of quests to take on a variety of extraordinary creatures that yield valuable resources used for weapons and equipment. Launching on Nintendo 3DS™, Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate represents the biggest leap forward ever for the series with more new content and exciting features than ever before. Also, for the first time ever for the Monster Hunter series on a handheld system, players will be able to join up with friends over the internet via the Nintendo Network™, as well as the previously available local wireless option.

Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate will take players to new heights, literally, with the introduction of more vertical and lateral movement than ever. An expanded repertoire of actions will create more dynamic hunting experiences with fluid climbing motions and the ability to jump attack from walls or ledges. In addition, players will be able to ride atop a monster for a limited time as they hang on and deliver attacks. With the addition of two new weapon classes, challenging new monsters and numerous locales, Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate will be the most robust hunting experience yet.
overview_zh:
《Monster Hunter™ 4 Ultimate》是廣受歡迎的《Monster Hunter》系列的最新作品，迄今為止該系列在全球的銷量已超過 2800 萬份。在《魔物獵人 4 Ultimate》中，玩家將扮演獵人的角色，與旅行商隊一起探索沿途的新土地和城鎮。這場盛大的冒險將包括數百個任務，以應對各種非凡的生物，這些生物將產生用於武器和裝備的寶貴資源。 《魔物獵人 4 Ultimate》在 Nintendo 3DS™ 上推出，代表著該系列有史以來最大的飛躍，擁有比以往更多的新內容和令人興奮的功能。此外，對於手持系統上的《魔物獵人》系列來說，玩家將能夠透過 Nintendo Network™ 以及之前提供的本地無線選項與網路上的朋友一起玩，這還是第一次。

《魔物獵人 4 終極版》將透過引入比以往更多的垂直和橫向移動，將玩家帶到新的高度。擴大的動作範圍將透過流暢的攀爬動作和從牆壁或壁架跳躍攻擊的能力來創造更動態的狩獵體驗。此外，玩家將能夠在有限的時間內騎在怪物身上並進行攻擊。隨著兩個新武器類別的加入、具有挑戰性的新怪物和眾多場景的加入，《魔物獵人 4 Ultimate》將帶來迄今為止最強大的狩獵體驗。

overview_en:
Monster Hunter Generations is the most customizable Monster Hunter experience to date, featuring a blend of brand new areas and monsters, and returning fan-favorites that have been updated and adapted to the newest generation of gameplay.

Monster Hunter Generations introduces new gameplay mechanics including Styles and Hunter Arts that can further refine a very personalized playstyle. Mount monsters from mid-air using the Aerial style or make the most out of the advantageous Hunter Arts abilities with the Striker style. Hunter Arts are visually striking, indispensable combat skills and power-ups that hunters using any style or weapon can equip.

Along the hunter's journey, players must defend each of the game's four villages from new major threats -- the Fated Four. With hundreds of quests in store, there are tons of challenges to tackle in a solo adventure, and also via local or online play with up to three other hunters.
overview_zh:
《魔物獵人世代》是迄今為止最可自訂的《魔物獵人》體驗，融合了全新的區域和怪物，以及經過更新和適應最新一代遊戲玩法的回歸粉絲最愛。

《魔物獵人世代》引入了新的遊戲機制，包括風格和獵人藝術，可以進一步完善非常個人化的遊戲風格。使用空中風格從半空中騎乘怪物，或使用前鋒風格充分利用有利的獵人藝術能力。獵人藝術具有視覺衝擊力、不可或缺的戰鬥技能和能力，使用任何風格或武器的獵人都可以裝備。

在獵人的旅程中，玩家必須保衛遊戲中的四個村莊免受新的主要威脅——命運四人的威脅。遊戲中有數百個任務，在單人冒險中需要應對大量挑戰，也可以透過本地或線上與最多三名其他獵人一起玩。

overview_en:
Mount up for battle in a Monster Hunter adventure like no other in Monster Hunter Stories™, only for Nintendo 3DS family systems! Become a legendary Rider, bond with wild beasts and take to the skies for a breathtaking journey, filled with friendship, mystery, and plenty of turn-based battles.

When the sleepy settlement of Hakum Village is attacked by a terrifying beast, it’s down to you to follow in the footsteps of the legendary Rider Redan and discover the truth behind a corrupting dark force known as the Black Blight.

Take flight on a whirlwind adventure through a vast new world, filled with amazing places to explore and new friends to meet!
overview_zh:
在 Monster Hunter Stories™ 中，像其他遊戲一樣，在 Monster Hunter 冒險中進行戰鬥，僅適用於 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統！成為傳奇騎士，與野獸結下不解之緣，飛向天空，踏上一段充滿友誼、神秘和大量回合製戰鬥的驚心動魄的旅程。

當哈庫姆村的沉睡定居點遭到可怕野獸的襲擊時，你必須追隨傳奇騎士雷丹的腳步，發現被稱為「黑疫病」的腐敗黑暗力量背後的真相。

踏上旋風般的冒險之旅，穿越廣闊的新世界，這裡充滿了令人驚嘆的地方可供探索，還有新朋友可供結識！

overview_en: Nintendo 3DS version of "Monster Strike" is an RPG in which the player takes on the role of the protagonist Shoren (Homureen) and fights against monsters that appear in the city while cooperating with his friends.
overview_zh: 任天堂3DS版《怪物彈珠》是一款角色扮演遊戲，玩家扮演主角Shoren（Homureen），與朋友合作，對抗城市中出現的怪物。

overview_en: In this all-new, fresh and friendly, monster-ific adventure, you get to help Katsuma and the rest of the Moshi menagerie save the world from the evil schemes of Dr. Strangeglove and his destructive robot Moshlings by bashing and dashing their way through six worlds, packed with intense battles, wild boss showdowns and glittering treasures to discover.
overview_zh: 在這個全新、新鮮、友好、怪物化的冒險中，你將幫助 Katsuma 和 Moshi 動物園的其他成員從 Strangeglove 博士和他的破壞性機器人 Moshlings 的邪惡計劃中拯救世界，衝破六個世界，充滿激烈的戰鬥、狂野的 Boss 決戰和等待發現的閃閃發光的寶藏。

overview_en: Moshi Monsters: Moshlings Theme Park, developed by Black Lantern Studios, invites players to restore the legendary Moshi theme park to its former glory. Players progressively unlock six zones by successfully building attractions and rescuing the scattered Moshlings (adorable, itty bitty pets for your pet monster). Users of the Nintendo 3DS can also interact with other Nintendo 3DS players via the StreetPass feature and play cool games to bring the Moshlings to life in a whole new dimension. Moshi Monsters: Moshlings Theme Park marks the first time fans can interact with beloved characters via 3D technology and introduces players to a brand new, exclusive Moshling that can transfer across platforms to the online world.
overview_zh: Moshi Monsters: Moshlings 主題樂園由 Black Lantern Studios 開發，邀請玩家恢復傳奇的 Moshi 主題樂園昔日的輝煌。玩家透過成功建造景點和營救分散的莫什林（可愛的小寵物）來逐步解鎖六個區域。 Nintendo 3DS 的使用者還可以透過 StreetPass 功能與其他 Nintendo 3DS 玩家互動，玩酷炫遊戲，將 Moshlings 帶到全新的維度。 Moshi Monsters: Moshlings 主題樂園標誌著粉絲們第一次可以透過 3D 技術與心愛的角色互動，並向玩家介紹了一個全新的、獨特的 Moshling，它可以跨平臺轉移到線上世界。

overview_en:
It is 1912, and a fabulous voyage on the Titanic awaits you. As assistant to globetrotter Professor Jacob Larsson, you board that breathtaking ship to experience a wonderful passage to New York.
Yet early in the evening of April 14th, Captain Smith unexpectedly requests Larsson's help. Deep within the bowels of the mighty Titanic, the body of a stoker had been discovered. Now it is up to you to solve this murder.
- 50 faithfully depicted scenes on board the luxurious Titanic
- Lots of tricky mini-games for pondering and puzzling
- A gripping story with numerous tasks and puzzles over six extensive chapters
- first hidden object adventure game at the eShop
overview_zh:
現在是 1912 年，泰坦尼克號上的精彩旅程正在等著您。作為環球旅行家雅各布·拉爾森教授的助手，您登上這艘令人驚嘆的船，體驗前往紐約的美妙旅程。
然而4月14日傍晚，史密斯船長出人意料地請求拉爾森的幫助。在泰坦尼克號的深處，發現了一名司爐的屍體。現在輪到你來解決這起謀殺案了。
- 忠實描繪豪華泰坦尼克號上的 50 個場景
- 許多棘手的小遊戲，供思考和解謎
- 一個扣人心絃的故事，在六個章節中包含大量任務和謎題
- eShop 上的第一款隱藏物品冒險遊戲

overview_en: Love pixels? Fond of platformers? Is there a special place in your heart for the 8-bit and 16-bit era? Want to have fun? Yes!? Well, you’ve come to the right place, my friend. Mutant Mudds Deluxe is a “12-bit” action platformer full of pixels and platforming fun!
overview_zh: 喜歡畫素？喜歡平臺遊戲嗎？ 8位和16位時代在你心中有特殊的地位嗎？想玩得開心嗎？是的！ ？好吧，你來對地方了，我的朋友。 Mutant Mudds Deluxe 是一款充滿畫素和平臺樂趣的「12 位元」動作平臺遊戲！

title_en: My Melody - Negai ga Kanau Fushigi na Hako
title_jp: My Melody - Negai ga Kanau Fushigi na Hako
no_intro_name: My Melody - Negai ga Kanau Fushigi na Hako (Japan)

title_en: My Nintendo Picross - The Legend of Zelda - Twilight Princess
overview_en: This is a My Nintendo-exclusive downloadable game for Nintendo 3DS systems. In this puzzle game, you'll use numbers on a grid as clues to complete a hidden illustration with The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess theme. You can play all 45 puzzles in Picross mode or Mega Picross mode.
overview_zh: 這是一款適用於 Nintendo 3DS 系統的 My Nintendo 獨家下載遊戲。在這款益智遊戲中，您將使用網格上的數字作為線索來完成《薩爾達傳說：暮光公主》主題的隱藏插圖。您可以在 Picross 模式或 Mega Picross 模式下玩所有 45 個謎題。
no_intro_name: My Nintendo Picross - The Legend of Zelda - Twilight Princess (USA)

overview_en: My Pet Puppy 3D is a pet-care simulation game in which players tend to virtual puppies. Players can groom their pet and teach it new tricks such as sitting, jumping, and begging.
overview_zh: My Pet Puppy 3D 是一款寵物照顧模擬遊戲，玩家在遊戲中照顧虛擬小狗。玩家可以打扮自己的寵物並教它新的技巧，例如坐下、跳躍和乞討。

title_en: My Riding Stables 3D - Jumping for the Team
no_intro_name: My Riding Stables 3D - Jumping for the Team (Europe) (En,Fr,De,It,Nl)

title_en: My Vet Practice 3D - In the Country
no_intro_name: My Vet Practice 3D - In the Country (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)

overview_en:
It's more than a game. It's a journey. And now the journey is enhanced in 3D for even greater immersion into the fantastic adventure of MYST. 

You will embark on a wondrous voyage as The Stranger, and explore an island of intrigue as you uncover clues about your surroundings and the quest you must take. Now the most well-known adventure game in the world comes alive in the new 3D version of this classic story! With a multitude of puzzles, problems, and mazes to solve, and a brand new Age added to enhance the MYST experience, you'll find MYST 3DS even more entertaining than the original.
overview_zh:
這不僅僅是一場遊戲。這是一趟旅程。現在，旅程以 3D 方式增強，讓您更加沉浸在 MYST 的奇妙冒險中。 

您將作為陌生人踏上奇妙的旅程，並探索一座陰謀之島，同時發現周圍環境和必須完成的任務的線索。現在，世界上最著名的冒險遊戲在這個經典故事的新 3D 版本中復活了！有大量的謎題、問題和迷宮需要解決，並且新增了一個全新的時代來增強 MYST 體驗，您會發現 MYST 3DS 比原版更有趣。

title_en: Mysterious Cities of Gold, The - Secret Paths
no_intro_name: Mysterious Cities of Gold, The - Secret Paths (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Pt,Sv,No,Ar)

overview_en:
Explore the town of Dire Grove - A mystery 1000 of years old
The Celtic legend of Dire Grove has been passed down from generation to generation for centuries.
Considered a fairytale, its telling was common at campfires and as a bedtime story meant to frighten small children into staying in their beds through the night. However, a recently unearthed artifact in the United Kingdom corroborates the legend and so begins a journey of survival for a small band of graduate students in the secluded resort of Dire Grove.
overview_zh:
探索 Dire Grove 小鎮 - 1000 年前的謎團
凱爾特人關於可怕叢林的傳說已經代代相傳了幾個世紀。
它被認為是一個童話故事，通常在篝火旁講述，並且作為睡前故事，旨在嚇唬小孩子整夜躺在床上。然而，英國最近出土的一件文物證實了這個傳說，於是一小群研究生在幽靜的迪雷格羅夫度假村開始了求生之旅。

overview_en:
Dozens of puzzles to solve. Thousands of unique items to find.
Rumors surrounding the history of stately Ravenhearst Manor have circulated for decades.
The recently acquired diary of Emma Ravenhearst may hold the key to unraveling the tale behind this unsettling place, yet the pages are missing. Players assume the role of Master Detective to unlock secrets held within Ravenhearst™, scouring a myriad of enchanting rooms in the manor for cleverly hidden clues. Locating and assembling diary pages helps tell the story of the house and, ultimately, unlock the mystery.
overview_zh:
數十個謎題等待解開。數以千計的獨特物品可供尋找。
關於莊嚴的雷文赫斯特莊園歷史的謠言已經流傳了幾十年。
最近獲得的艾瑪·雷文赫斯特的日記可能是解開這個令人不安的地方背後故事的關鍵，但日記已經丟失了。玩家扮演偵探大師的角色來解開 Ravenhearst™ 中隱藏的秘密，在莊園中無數迷人的房間中搜尋巧妙隱藏的線索。找到並組裝日記頁面有助於講述房子的故事，並最終解開謎團。

title_en: Mystery Case Files - Return to Ravenhearst
overview_en: Emma's soul is free, but her ghost has delivered a dire warning: evil still lurks in Ravenhearst Manor. Big Fish Games Studios takes you deep inside the cursed estate in Mystery Case Files: Return to Ravenhearst, the thrilling sequel. Experience Ravenhearst's special halls as never before with new immersive adventure-style gameplay and an epic original soundtrack. Feel the floorboards creak as you move from room to room solving puzzles and seeking out clues in over 150 detailed scenes.
overview_zh: 艾瑪的靈魂是自由的，但她的鬼魂發出了可怕的警告：邪惡仍然潛伏在雷文赫斯特莊園。在驚心動魄的續作《神秘案件檔案：重返雷文赫斯特》中，Big Fish Games Studios 將帶您深入被詛咒的莊園。透過全新的沉浸式冒險風格遊戲和史詩般的原創配樂，以前所未有的方式體驗 Ravenhearst 的特殊大廳。當您從一個房間移動到另一個房間解決謎題並在 150 多個詳細場景中尋找線索時，您會感受到地板的吱吱聲。
no_intro_name: Mystery Case Files - Return to Ravenhearst (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)

overview_en: NASCAR Unleashed will allow players to take their racer "to the streets" by driving on AND off some of NASCAR's most famous tracks in this stylistically souped-up arcade racing competition. After picking a turbo-charged race machine from 15 of NASCAR's biggest names, including NASCAR Sprint Cup series drivers Kyle Busch, Dale Earnhardt, Jr, Jeff Gordon, and Joey Logano, players are transported into a fast-paced, special effect laden, thrill ride. In game NASCAR tracks include: Daytona International SpeedwayÃ‚Â®, Chicagoland Speedway, Homestead-Miami SpeedwaySM, Martinsville SpeedwayÃ‚Â® and Talladega Superspeedway. Best of all, racers can break free from the oval as they explode onto the pavements, beaches and off-roads of the surrounding cities. For NASCAR fanatics and those new to the sport, the thrill is in discovering the joys of a completely unchained stock car experience. See the sights, feel the salty ocean breeze and blast past the lofty skyscrapers.
overview_zh: 《NASCAR Unleashed》將允許玩家在這場風格升級的街機賽車比賽中駕駛他們的賽車“上街”，在 NASCAR 一些最著名的賽道上行駛。從 NASCAR Sprint Cup 系列車手 Kyle Busch、Dale Earnhardt, Jr、Jeff Gordon 和 Joey Logano 等 15 名 NASCAR 知名人士中挑選了一臺渦輪增壓賽車後，玩家將進入快節奏、充滿特效的驚險旅程。遊戲中的 NASCAR 賽道包括：Daytona International Speedway®、Chicagoland Speedway、Homestead-Miami SpeedwaySM、Martinsville Speedway® 和 Talladega Superspeedway。最重要的是，賽車手可以衝破橢圓形跑道，衝向周圍城市的人行道、海灘和越野道路。對於 NASCAR 狂熱分子和這項運動的新手來說，令人興奮的是發現完全不受束縛的原車體驗的樂趣。欣賞美景，感受鹹鹹的海風，掠過高聳的摩天大樓。

overview_en: For the first time ever, the world of the NCIS TV show comes to your home console and PC. Experience four original NCIS episodes created with the writers of the show, and travel across the USA and around the world to solve complex murder, espionage and terrorist cases as your favorite characters from the hit TV drama.
overview_zh: 海軍罪案調查處 (NCIS) 電視節目的世界首次來到您的家用遊戲機和 PC 上。體驗由該劇編劇創作的四部原創海軍罪案調查處劇集，並扮演熱門電視劇中您最喜歡的角色，穿越美國和世界各地解決複雜的謀殺、間諜和恐怖案件。

title_en: Nanami to Issho ni Manabo! English Joutatsu no Kotsu Riron-Hen
title_jp: Nanami to Issho ni Manabo! English Joutatsu no Kotsu Riron-Hen
no_intro_name: Nanami to Issho ni Manabo! English Joutatsu no Kotsu Riron-Hen (Japan)

title_en: Nanatsu no Taizai - The Seven Deadly Sins - Unjust Sin
title_jp: Nanatsu no Taizai - The Seven Deadly Sins - Unjust Sin
no_intro_name: Nanatsu no Taizai - The Seven Deadly Sins - Unjust Sin (Japan)

title_en: Nankou Furaku Sangokuden - Shu to Toki no Doujaku
title_jp: Nankou Furaku Sangokuden - Shu to Toki no Doujaku
no_intro_name: Nankou Furaku Sangokuden - Shu to Toki no Doujaku (Japan)

overview_en: In Nano Assault, players blast their way through 32 twisted cell stages and dark worlds with rugged landscapes that adjust in difficulty based on the player's skill level. Prepare to battle and defeat extreme nemeses including the Black Nucleus, Hyper Blobs and Spore Plants using powerful beams, energetic bombs and other unlockable assault weapons. To ensure successful missions, players can clone and respawn themselves to continue the journey anytime. Special features include Missions Mode, an unlockable arcade style cell stage where players must beat the clock by destroying the most enemies, and Hall of Fame, a bragging rights leaderboard where players can publish and compare high level scores with friends. Additionally, players will be able to use the StreetPass feature to trade unlocked content.
overview_zh: 在《Nano Assault》中，玩家在 32 個扭曲的細胞階段和黑暗世界中殺出一條血路，這些世界的地形崎嶇不平，難度會根據玩家的技能水平進行調整。準備好使用強大的光束、高能量炸彈和其他可解鎖的攻擊武器來戰鬥並擊敗包括黑核、超級斑點和孢子植物在內的極端敵人。為了確保任務成功，玩家可以隨時複製和重生以繼續旅程。特殊功能包括任務模式，一個可解鎖的街機風格細胞階段，玩家必須透過消滅最多的敵人來爭分奪秒，以及名人堂，一個吹牛的權利排行榜，玩家可以在其中發布並與朋友比較高水平分數。此外，玩家將能夠使用 StreetPass 功能來交易解鎖內容。

overview_en: NARUTO Powerful Shippuden includes a Story Mode as well as an Endless Battle Mode so players can choose to either follow a progressive storyline or just pull out the punches for a sprightly ninja showdown. The action-packed gameplay allows players to earn experience points to power up their vivacious characters and also use the touch screen to strengthen special attacks. Fans will recognize their favorite characters from the NARUTO franchise such as Kakashi, Sakura, Gaara, and many more; all can be called upon as support characters in the midst of battle. With familiar friends at their sides and ninja moves up their sleeves, players will embark on the journey of becoming a powerful Leaf ninja to knock out opponents or even become a knock-out with sexy jutsu.
overview_zh: 《火影忍者》強大的疾風傳包括故事模式和無盡的戰鬥模式，因此玩家可以選擇遵循循序漸進的故事情節，或者只是拿出拳頭來一場明快的忍者對決。動感十足的遊戲玩法讓玩家可以賺取經驗值來增強他們活潑的角色，還可以使用觸控螢幕來加強特殊攻擊。粉絲們會認出他們最喜歡的火影忍者係列角色，如卡卡西、小櫻、我愛羅等等；在戰鬥中所有人都可以被召喚為支援角色。有熟悉的朋友在身邊，忍者大招，玩家將踏上成為強大的木葉忍者的旅程，擊倒對手，甚至用性感的忍術擊倒對手。

title_en: Naruto Shippuden - Shinobi Rittai Emaki! Saikyou Ninkai Kessen!!
title_jp: Naruto Shippuden - Shinobi Rittai Emaki! Saikyou Ninkai Kessen!!
no_intro_name: Naruto Shippuden - Shinobi Rittai Emaki! Saikyou Ninkai Kessen!! (Japan)

title_en: Nashi-jiru Action! Funassyi no Yukai na Ohanassyi
title_jp: Nashi-jiru Action! Funassyi no Yukai na Ohanassyi
no_intro_name: Nashi-jiru Action! Funassyi no Yukai na Ohanassyi (Japan) (Rev 1)

overview_en:
A classic board game that you can take wherever you go.
You define the rules: number of ships, time limit, grid size and bonuses.
Play against a friend on the same system, or play with a single game on two different systems!
overview_zh:
一款可以隨身攜帶的經典桌遊。
您定義規則：船隻數量、時間限制、網格大小和獎金。
在同一系統上與朋友對戰，或在兩個不同的系統上玩同一個遊戲！

title_en: Nazo Waku Yakata - Oto no Ma ni Ma ni
title_jp: Nazo Waku Yakata - Oto no Ma ni Ma ni
no_intro_name: Nazo Waku Yakata - Oto no Ma ni Ma ni (Japan)

overview_en: Need for Speed The Run lures players into an underground world of illicit, high-stakes racing. The heat is on - and it isn't just the fuzz who are after you. Entering the race is just the beginning as you blow across borders, weave through dense urban traffic, rocket down icy mountain passes and navigate narrow canyons at breakneck speeds. Powered by DICE's state-of-the-art Frostbite 2 engine, Need for Speed The Run takes the action racing genre to new heights with stunning visuals and car physics that hug the road even at top speeds all built around a gripping storyline. The cars are hot, the racing is intense and the story will have you at the edge of your seat… all the way from the Golden Gate Bridge to the Empire State building.
overview_zh: 《極速快感：狂奔》吸引玩家進入充滿非法、高風險賽車的地下世界。熱潮已經開始——追捕你的不僅僅是絨毛。參加比賽只是開始，您將跨越國界，穿梭於密集的城市交通中，衝下冰冷的山口，並以極快的速度穿越狹窄的峽谷。由 DICE 最先進的 Frostbite 2 引擎提供支援，《Need for Speed The Run》將動作賽車型別推向新的高度，具有令人驚嘆的視覺效果和汽車物理特性，即使在最高速度下也能緊貼道路，所有這些都圍繞著扣人心絃的故事情節。賽車很熱，賽車很激烈，故事會讓您緊張不已…從金門大橋一直到帝國大廈。

title_jp: Neratte! Tobashite! Rilakkuma Guragura Sweets Tower
no_intro_name: Neratte! Tobashite! Rilakkuma Guragura Sweets Tower (Japan)

overview_en: New art academy! is an interactive application that teaches real world art techniques anyone can enjoy-from beginners to experts of all ages. Discover more than 30 lessons, all using realistic stylus and touch screen-based tools for drawing and painting. Enjoy a robust Free Paint mode that lets you create to your heart's content using included subjects, or your own images taken with the Nintendo 3DS Camera—whenever and wherever the inspiration strikes.
overview_zh: 新藝術學院！是一個互動式應用程式，教授現實世界的藝術技巧，任何人都可以享受——從初學者到各個年齡段的專家。探索 30 多個課程，全部使用逼真的手寫筆和基於觸控螢幕的工具進行繪圖和繪畫。享受強大的免費繪畫模式，讓您可以使用包含的主題或您自己用 Nintendo 3DS 相機拍攝的影象進行創作 - 無論何時何地靈感襲來。

overview_en: New Super Mario Bros. 2 is a traditional side-scrolling adventure game featuring Mario, Luigi and loads of other favorite characters from the popular Mario series. The game was created specifically as a pick-up-and-play experience that can be instantly enjoyed by players of all skill levels on the Nintendo 3DS system.
overview_zh: 《新超級瑪利歐兄弟 2》是一款傳統的橫向捲軸冒險遊戲，主角包括馬裡奧、路易吉以及流行的瑪利歐系列中的許多其他最受歡迎的角色。該遊戲是專門為一種即玩即玩的體驗而設計的，各種技能水平的玩家都可以在 Nintendo 3DS 系統上立即享受遊戲的樂趣。

overview_en:
True to classic TMNT-style gameplay and atmosphere, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is an energetic, blazing beat 'em up with four-person, local, drop-in/drop-out co-op (Wii system from Nintendo, Xbox 360 video game and entertainment system only) and features character upgrades, secondary items, and multiple gameplay modes. It offers an authentic Turtles storyline, encompassing franchise-favorite characters and locations from the animated series, unfolding through animated cut scenes and in-game events.

Shredder and the Kraang intend to unleash a devastating mutagen bomb that will transform the citizens of New York City into mindless mutants. Join Leonardo, Raphael, Donatello, and Michelangelo in the fight for NYC in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles the videogame. Play as your favorite Turtle Anytime! Join the Turtle Power and battle through 15 action-packed levels. Booyakasha!
overview_zh:
忠於經典 TMNT 風格的遊戲玩法和氛圍，《忍者龜》是一款充滿活力、火熱的格鬥遊戲，支援四人、本地、隨機加入/退出合作模式（僅限任天堂 Wii 系統、Xbox 360 電玩遊戲和娛樂系統），並具有角色升級、輔助物品和多種遊戲模式。它提供了真實的海龜故事情節，包括動畫系列中深受系列喜愛的角色和地點，並透過動畫過場動畫和遊戲內事件展開。

施萊德和克朗打算釋放一顆毀滅性的誘變炸彈，將紐約市的居民變成無意識的變種人。在電玩遊戲《忍者龜》中，與李奧納多、拉斐爾、多納泰羅和米開朗基羅一起為紐約市而戰。隨時扮演你最喜歡的烏龜！加入 Turtle Power 並透過 15 個充滿動作的關卡。布亞卡莎！

overview_en: Brought to you by the world famous puzzle maker Nikoli, engage your mind with 5 diverse and challenging puzzles inside this authentic Nintendo 3DS puzzle game! Take the game on the go,play on breaks, or relax at home with this invigorating puzzler. Offering a variety of games at several difficulties, Nikoli's Pencil Puzzle brings fan-favorite puzzles right to your finger tips!
overview_zh: 由世界著名的拼圖製作者 Nikoli 為您帶來，在這款正宗的 Nintendo 3DS 拼圖遊戲中，用 5 個不同且具有挑戰性的拼圖來吸引您的注意力！透過這款充滿活力的益智遊戲，隨時隨地玩遊戲、休息時玩遊戲或在家中放鬆身心。 Nikoli's Pencil Puzzle 提供多種不同難度的遊戲，將粉絲最喜愛的謎題帶到您的指尖！

title_en: Ninja Jajamaru-kun - Sakura Hime to Karyuu no Himitsu
title_jp: Ninja Jajamaru-kun - Sakura Hime to Karyuu no Himitsu
no_intro_name: Ninja Jajamaru-kun - Sakura Hime to Karyuu no Himitsu (Japan)

overview_en:
ENGLISH Version

Experience the Louvre without even leaving home with an official guide in 3D!

Explore one of the greatest museums in the world without ever leaving your home! Get up close and personal with each work of art through official photos, videos, and audio interviews with museum curators. Discover the Louvres collection on a guided tour of specific masterpieces, or customize your own virtual walking tour through the museum.

In addition, certain masterpieces are viewable from different angles with special 3D photos and videos. Going to Paris? Enrich your visit to the Louvre museum and carry your Nintendo 3DS Guide: Louvre with you for official in-depth commentary as you walk each wing. With all this and more supplemented by updates through the SpotPass feature, you'll always have an up-to-date audio and visual guide to the worlds most legendary art collection!
overview_zh:
英文版

透過 3D 官方導遊，足不出戶即可體驗羅浮宮！

足不出戶即可探索世界上最偉大的博物館之一！透過博物館館長的官方照片、影片和音訊採訪，近距離接觸每件藝術品。在特定傑作的導遊帶領下探索羅浮宮藏品，或自訂自己的博物館虛擬步行之旅。

此外，某些傑作還可以透過特殊的 3D 照片和影片從不同角度觀看。要去 巴黎 嗎？豐富您的羅浮宮博物館之旅，隨身攜帶《任天堂 3DS 指南：羅浮宮》，在您漫步各個側翼時聆聽官方的深入解說。有了這一切以及 SpotPass 功能更新的補充，您將始終擁有世界上最具傳奇色彩的藝術收藏的最新音訊和視覺指南！

There are three versions of the software, each with different starting breeds: French bulldog, toy poodle and golden retriever. But in each version players can unlock and enjoy more than 20 different breeds.

overview_en:
ONE PIECE 大海賊闘技場 (One Piece: Daikaizoku Colosseum) is a 2D tag team fighting game for the Nintendo 3DS, published by Bandai Namco and developed by Arc System Works released on September 21st, 2016. It is based on the popular Shonen Jump series One Piece, with the game being based around the Zou story arc and also including characters from the film One Piece: Gold which was released in theaters on July 23rd, 2016 in Japan.

The game has 23 playable characters and over 80+ assist characters. In November of 2016, the game was given a patch that gave it the ability to be cross compatible with Dragon Ball Z: Extreme Butoden, allowing the games to face against each other.
overview_zh:
海賊王閔技場（海賊王閔技場）是一款任天堂 3DS 2D 雙打格鬥遊戲，由 Bandai Namco 發行，Arc System Works 開發，於 2016 年 9 月 21 日發行。它基於熱門少年 Jump 系列海賊王，遊戲以鄒的故事情節為基礎，還包括在影院上映的電影海賊王：黃金中的角色。 2016年7月23日在日本舉行。

遊戲有 23 個可玩角色和超過 80 個輔助角色。 2016年11月，該遊戲獲得了一個補丁，使其能夠與《七龍珠Z：極限武藤傳》交叉相容，從而允許遊戲相互對抗。

overview_en:
One Piece: Romance Dawn (Wan Pīsu: Romansu Dōn - Bōken no Yoake?, "One Piece: Romance Dawn - Dawn of the Adventure") is a role-playing video game based on the One Piece manga and anime series, released in Japan and other parts of Asia for the PlayStation Portable on December 20, 2012 via retail and the PlayStation Store. A port for the Nintendo 3DS was released in Japan on August 8, 2013 via retail and the eShop. It was also released in Europe on November 29, 2013 and February 11, 2014 in North America.

The game covers the first half of the series from Luffy's early adventures in the East Blue to the battle at Marineford.
overview_zh:
海賊王：浪漫黎明（Wan Pīsu: Romansu Dōn - Bōken no Yoake?，「海賊王：浪漫黎明 - 冒險黎明」）是一款基於海賊王漫畫和動畫系列的角色扮演影片遊戲，於 2012 年 12 月 20 日在日本和亞洲其他地區透過 PlayStation Portable 透過零售和 PlayStation Store 發行。任天堂 3DS 的移植版於 2013 年 8 月 8 日在日本透過零售和 eShop 發布。它也於2013年11月29日在歐洲發行，2014年2月11日在北美發行。

遊戲涵蓋了該系列的前半部分，從魯夫早期在東海的冒險到馬林福德之戰。

title_en: One Piece - Romance Dawn - Bouken no Yoake
title_jp: One Piece - Romance Dawn - Bouken no Yoake
no_intro_name: One Piece - Romance Dawn - Bouken no Yoake (Japan)

title_en: One Piece - Super Grand Battle! X
title_jp: One Piece - Super Grand Battle! X
no_intro_name: One Piece - Super Grand Battle! X (Japan)

overview_en:
In One Piece: Unlimited Cruise SP, the motley crew of Straw Hat Pirates find themselves aboard the Thousand Sunny Ship, the ship of 1,000 seas, as they set sail to a variety of mysterious islands and begin their fantastic adventures.

The Nintendo 3DS will immerse players in an unforgettable three-dimensional journey around all the famous One Piece Battle site such as Marineford. Along the way, the game’s hero Monkey D. Luffy organizes and leads a crew named the Straw Hat Pirates, who together will face a host of dastardly pirate crews and marines. In adventure mode, players will be able to choose the playable character from Straw Hat Pirates, with more than 30 boss characters from the original anime series to take on. The games will also feature an exclusive character, created by none other than One Piece author Eiichiro Oda, who will be key to the games’ original storyline.
overview_zh:
在《海賊王：無限航海 SP》中，草帽海賊團的雜七雜八的船員們發現自己登上了千陽船，這艘遠徵千海的船，揚帆起航前往各個神秘島嶼，開始了他們的奇幻冒險。

任天堂 3DS 將使玩家沉浸在一場難忘的三維旅程中，周圍有所有著名的海賊王之戰地點，例如馬林福德。一路上，遊戲英雄蒙奇·D·路飛組織並領導了一支名為「草帽海賊團」的船員，他們將共同面對一群卑鄙的海盜船員和海軍陸戰隊員。在冒險模式中，玩家可以選擇《草帽海賊團》中的角色來扮演，其中有 30 多個來自原作動畫系列的 Boss 角色。遊戲還將推出一個專屬角色，該角色由《海賊王》作者尾田榮一郎創作，他將成為遊戲原創故事情節的關鍵。

overview_en: Set sail on a gripping adventure in the New World with the beloved Straw Hat Crew in ONE PIECE Unlimited World Red. Dive into a wayfaring journey with fun-filled escapades, action-packed battles and powerful comrades in a whole new never-before- seen scenario. Play as members of the Straw Hat crew and progress through the episodic storyline with encounters against famous bosses like Rob Lucci, Caesar Clown, and more. Master a large variation of flashy combos and test your reflexes by pressing the right button at the right time to counter, dodge or otherwise interact with enemies. Enjoy endless playability by exploring the central town and taking on quests to assist the townfolk and gain more rewards and items.
overview_zh: 與心愛的草帽海賊團一起在海賊王無限世界紅中起航，在新世界展開一場扣人心絃的冒險。在全新的前所未見的場景中，投入一段充滿樂趣的冒險、緊張刺激的戰鬥和強大的夥伴的旅程。飾演草帽一夥的成員，在情節故事情節中不斷前進，並遭遇羅布·盧奇、凱撒·小丑等著名大佬。掌握各種華麗的連擊，並透過在正確的時間按下正確的按鈕來反擊、躲避或以其他方式與敵人互動來測試你的反應能力。透過探索中心城鎮並接受任務來幫助城鎮居民並獲得更多獎勵和物品，享受無盡的可玩性。

title_en: Onnanoko to Misshitsu ni Itara Marumaru Shichau Kamoshirenai
title_jp: Onnanoko to Misshitsu ni Itara Marumaru Shichau Kamoshirenai

overview_en: In Order Up!!, players get to experience the dizzying life of a top-notch chef and restaurateur as they prepare all types of food, serve hordes of demanding patrons, and build their own restaurant empire from the ground up. Beginning in the world of fast food, new cooks must prove themselves by serving up quality dishes in the time allotted. As they master the basic skills and serve up tasty dishes using precision and time management skills, they will earn more money and move from fast food to five-star!
overview_zh: 在《Order Up!!》中，玩家將體驗頂級廚師和餐廳老闆令人眼花繚亂的生活，他們準備各種型別的食物，為大批挑剔的顧客提供服務，並從頭開始建立自己的餐廳帝國。從快餐世界開始，新廚師必須透過在規定的時間內提供優質菜餚來證明自己。當他們掌握基本技能並利用精確度和時間管理技能提供美味佳餚時，他們將賺更多的錢並從快餐變成五星級！
