overview_en:
Are you ready to go wild? Head for deepest, darkest Africa! Bring your huge array of high-powered weapons and accessories along with you. Experience the fastest moving arcade experience anywhere, all in the palm of your hand in full 3D! Explore 35 challenging locations, across a variety of terrain. Make sure you’re using the right weapons in each situation to get the highest score possible, all while hunting 15 of the biggest game animals, birds, and varmints. Earn achievements, and purchase new weapons and accessories. Zoom in using your scope for unbelievable long shots and head shots. Just don’t forget to take down dangerous predators before they can take you down.

Features:

Super fast-paced arcade hunting action in full 3D.Outfit your hunter with an array of over 30 earnable weapons, scopes and hunting accessories.
Hunt over 15 big game animals, including the Big 5: Leopard, Buffalo, Rhino, Lion, and Elephant.
Venture into 35 unique and dangerous environments, each with its own threats and rewards.
Use the right weapon for the task and maximize your score.
Chase your prey through the open plains. Stalk them in murky swamps. Corner them on rocky cliffs, and track them into an abandoned gold mine.
Many weather conditions, including rain, fog, wind, and even a raging brushfire. Hunt day and night, rain or shine...
overview_zh:
你準備好去野外了嗎？前往最深處、最黑暗的非洲！隨身攜帶大量高效能武器和配件。隨時隨地體驗最快移動的街機體驗，全 3D 盡在您的手掌之中！探索 35 個具有挑戰性的地點，跨越各種地形。確保您在每種情況下都使用正確的武器，以獲得盡可能高的分數，同時狩獵 15 種最大的動物、鳥類和老鼠。獲得成就併購買新武器和配件。使用瞄準鏡放大，拍攝令人難以置信的遠景和頭部照片。只是不要忘記在危險的掠食者打倒你之前將其打倒。

特點：

超快節奏的全 3D 街機狩獵動作。為您的獵人配備超過 30 種可賺取的武器、瞄準鏡和狩獵配件。
狩獵超過 15 種大型動物，包括 5 種大型動物：豹、水牛、犀牛、獅子和大象。
冒險進入 35 個獨特而危險的環境，每個環境都有自己的威脅和獎勵。
使用正確的武器來完成任務並最大化你的分數。
在開闊的平原上追逐你的獵物。在黑暗的沼澤中跟蹤他們。將他們逼到岩石懸崖上，並跟蹤他們進入一座廢棄的金礦。
許多天氣條件，包括雨、霧、風，甚至是熊熊大火。不分晝夜，風雨無阻，狩獵…

overview_en: PAC-MAN PARTY 3D brings together family and friends with a fun experience that includes dozens of mini-games for gamers to play with or against each other. Perfect for the whole family, PAC-MAN PARTY 3D features a variety of control styles that utilize the system’s buttons, touchscreen, microphone, and accelerometer. With support for download play, friends can join in on the fun using just one cartridge shared across Nintendo 3DS systems.
overview_zh: PAC-MAN PARTY 3D 將家人和朋友聚集在一起，提供有趣的體驗，其中包括數十種供玩家相互玩耍或對抗的迷你遊戲。 PAC-MAN PARTY 3D 非常適合整個家庭，具有利用系統按鈕、觸控螢幕、麥克風和加速計的多種控制風格。藉助下載遊戲支援，朋友們只需使用一張在 Nintendo 3DS 系統上共享的卡帶即可加入遊戲。

overview_en:
PAC-MAN and Galaga bring their iconic gameplay to spectacular 3D in an exciting six game package for the Nintendo 3DS. Enjoy classic hits PAC-MAN, PAC-MAN Championship Edition, Galaga, and Galaga Legions, or play two brand new games developed exclusively for the Nintendo 3DS. In PAC-MAN Tilt, move PAC-MAN through stages filled with obstacles, platforms and ghosts with tilt controls. Flippers, platforms and power pellets help PAC-MAN jump, flip, swing, and eat his way to the finish line. Rid space of the incoming Galaga army by shooting down enemies in an exciting 3D skirmish in Galaga 3D Impact! Your Nintendo 3DS system becomes your ship’s gun turret as you attack and defend the ship through waves of the Galaga armada. Nostalgia is taken to a new dimension with a fresh take on Namco’s most popular arcade franchises!

Gaming’s Biggest Brands – Two of Namco’s most popular and recognizable arcade icons in one game

New Hardware, New Gameplay – Play with PAC-MAN and GALAGA using the Nintendo 3DS system’s motion sensor, gyro sensor, 3D Screen, Touch Screen controls and more

A Tilting Sensation – Control PAC-MAN directly and tilt the world by moving the Nintendo 3DS system to traverse the moving platforms and terrain to reach the goal for a wholly unique gameplay experience

Shoot in the Next Dimension – Move the Nintendo 3DS system utilizing the gyro sensors to target incoming Galaga in 3D and shoot your way to top of the online leaderboards

Four Classic Hits – PAC-MAN, PAC-MAN Championship Edition, Galaga, and Galaga Legions take advantage of the unique features of the Nintendo 3DS

*Two of Namco’s most popular arcade icons in one game
*Control PAC-MAN directly by tilting the 3DS!
*Use the gyro sensors to shoot Galaga in 3D!
*Includes classic PAC-MAN and Galaga games
overview_zh:
PAC-MAN 和 Galaga 將他們的標誌性遊戲玩法以壯觀的 3D 形式呈現在任天堂 3DS 的令人興奮的六款遊戲包中。享受經典熱門 PAC-MAN、PAC-MAN 冠軍版、Galaga 和 Galaga Legions，或玩專為 Nintendo 3DS 開發的兩款全新遊戲。在 PAC-MAN Tilt 中，透過傾斜控制移動 PAC-MAN 透過充滿障礙物、平臺和幽靈的舞臺。腳蹼、平臺和動力丸幫助 PAC-MAN 跳躍、翻轉、擺動和吃食，直到終點線。在 Galaga 3D Impact 中，在激動人心的 3D 小衝突中擊落敵人，消滅來襲的 Galaga 軍隊！當您透過加拉加艦隊攻擊和保衛船隻時，您的 Nintendo 3DS 系統將成為您船隻的砲塔。南夢宮最受歡迎的街機系列遊戲煥然一新，懷舊之情被提升到了一個新的高度！

遊戲界最大的品牌 – Namco 在一款遊戲中最受歡迎和最知名的兩個街機圖示

新硬體、新遊戲玩法 – 使用 Nintendo 3DS 系統的運動感應器、陀螺儀感應器、3D 螢幕、觸控螢幕控制等來玩 PAC-MAN 和 GALAGA

傾斜的感覺 - 直接控制 PAC-MAN，透過移動 Nintendo 3DS 系統來傾斜世界，穿越移動平臺和地形，到達目標，獲得完全獨特的遊戲體驗

在新維度中射擊 – 利用陀螺儀感應器移動 Nintendo 3DS 系統，以 3D 模式瞄準即將到來的加拉加 (Galaga)，並一路射擊，登上線上排行榜榜首

四款經典熱門遊戲 - PAC-MAN、PAC-MAN 冠軍版、Galaga 和 Galaga Legions 利用 Nintendo 3DS 的獨特功能

*一款遊戲中包含 Namco 最受歡迎的兩個街機圖示
*透過傾斜 3DS 直接控制 PAC-MAN！
*使用陀螺儀感應器以 3D 方式拍攝 Galaga！
*包括經典的 PAC-MAN 和 Galaga 遊戲

overview_en:
Pac is back in an all-new experience for a whole new generation of fans. PAC-MAN and the Ghostly Adventures game has an original story that is inspired by the show as well as all the charming characters from the highly anticipated PAC-MAN and the Ghostly Adventures animated series created and produced by Avi Arad, acclaimed director and founder of Marvel Studios.

The story begins as the menacing ghosts escape from the creepy Netherworld to invade PacWorld. These frightening ghosts, ghouls, and goblins wreak havoc on the population and cause nothing but trouble wherever they go! Pac and his pals rise to the challenge of protecting their home and embark on an epic battle.

Pac and his 2 best friends, Spiral and Cylindria, rise to the challenge of protecting their home, in a big, bustling, bonkers world of action, adventure, and just plain wackiness. All the while fighting for: Friendship, Freedom and the Future!

Pac is Back!
overview_zh:
Pac 回歸，為全新一代粉絲帶來全新體驗。 《吃豆人與幽靈歷險記》遊戲的原創故事靈感源自該劇，以及備受期待的《吃豆人與幽靈歷險記》動畫系列中的所有迷人角色，這些角色均由漫威影業著名導演兼創始人阿維·阿拉德創作和製作。

故事開始於險惡的幽靈從令人毛骨悚然的幽冥世界逃出併入侵 PacWorld。這些可怕的鬼魂、食屍鬼和妖精對人們造成嚴重破壞，所到之處只會帶來麻煩！帕克和他的夥伴們迎接保護家園的挑戰，並開始了一場史詩般的戰鬥。

帕克和他的兩個最好的朋友斯皮拉爾和西林德里亞，在一個充滿動作、冒險和純粹古怪的大型、熙熙攘攘、瘋狂的世界裡，迎接保護家園的挑戰。一直在為：友誼、自由和未來而奮鬥！

帕克回來了！

overview_en:
New and Distant Worlds - Journey to Outer Space and back through time to Prehistoric World while still battling Betrayus and his ghoulish army in Pacworld and Netherworld.
New Characters - Encounter new friends and enemies from Seasons 1 & 2 of the hit Animation Series.
New and Improved Power Ups - Enjoy enhanced power ups from the first game along with brand new power ups helping PAC become larger than life!
overview_zh:
新的遙遠世界 - 前往外太空並穿越時間回到史前世界，同時仍在 Pacworld 和 Netherworld 與 Betrayus 和他的殘忍軍隊作戰。
新角色 - 遇到來自熱門動畫系列第 1 季和第 2 季的新朋友和敵人。
新的和改進的能量提升 - 享受第一款遊戲中增強的能量提升以及幫助 PAC 變得更加強大的全新能量提升！

title_en: PachiPara 3D - Deluxe Umi Monogatari - Pachi-Pro Fuuunroko - Hana Kotou no Shoubushi-tachi
title_jp: PachiPara 3D - Deluxe Umi Monogatari - Pachi-Pro Fuuunroko - Hana Kotou no Shoubushi-tachi
no_intro_name: PachiPara 3D - Deluxe Umi Monogatari - Pachi-Pro Fuuunroko - Hana Kotou no Shoubushi-tachi (Japan)

title_en: PachiPara 3D - Ooumi Monogatari 2 - Pachi Pro Fuuunroku Hana - Kibou to Uragiri no Gakuen Seikatsu
title_jp: PachiPara 3D - Ooumi Monogatari 2 - Pachi Pro Fuuunroku Hana - Kibou to Uragiri no Gakuen Seikatsu
no_intro_name: PachiPara 3D - Ooumi Monogatari 2 - Pachi Pro Fuuunroku Hana - Kibou to Uragiri no Gakuen Seikatsu (Japan)

title_en: PachiPara 3D - Ooumi Monogatari 2 with Agnes Lum - Pachi-Pro Fuuunroku Hana Kesareta License
title_jp: PachiPara 3D - Ooumi Monogatari 2 with Agnes Lum - Pachi-Pro Fuuunroku Hana Kesareta License
no_intro_name: PachiPara 3D - Ooumi Monogatari 2 with Agnes Lum - Pachi-Pro Fuuunroku Hana Kesareta License (Japan)

overview_en: Paddington Bear arrives in London and tasks players with helping Paddington and the Brown family solve a series of engaging and playful mysteries in order to find explorer Montgomery Hyde. Along the way, he interacts with memorable Londoners, works with the police to catch thieves, solves puzzles given by his Aunt Lucy and satisfies his love of marmalade and sandwiches.
overview_zh: 帕丁頓熊抵達倫敦，玩家需要幫助帕丁頓熊和布朗一家解開一系列引人入勝且有趣的謎團，以找到探險家蒙哥馬利海德。一路上，他與令人難忘的倫敦人互動，與警察一起抓小偷，解決露西阿姨給的謎題，並滿足他對果醬和三明治的熱愛。

overview_en: On the day of the annual Sticker Fest, Bowser decides to pull a prank and scatters six Royal Stickers across the land. To retrieve these mysterious, magical stickers, which are now stuck onto Bowser and his underlings, Mario sets off on an adventure with Kersti, a sticker fairy, visiting prairies, deserts, forests, snowy mountains and volcanoes around the world.
overview_zh: 在一年一度的貼紙節當天，鮑澤決定搞個惡作劇，將六張皇家貼紙撒在了整個土地上。為了取回這些貼在鮑澤和他的部下身上的神秘魔法貼紙，馬裡奧與貼紙仙子克斯蒂一起踏上了冒險之旅，參觀了世界各地的草原、沙漠、森林、雪山和火山。

title_en: Parascientific Escape - Crossing at the Farthest Horizon
overview_en:
The fusion of puzzle solving escape game and command selection adventure game - Parascientific Escape series Vol.3 - is here!

Choose from the two previous protagonists: Kyosuke Ayana and Hitomi Akeneno, proceed with the separated stories on the stage of Latoua City, escape from three prisoned rooms!

Months after the luxury cruise ship explosion case, the girl with two psychic powers, Hitomi Akeneno, has engaged in saving people with the psychic research facility, ZENA, is struggling to strengthen her abilities.

At the same time, the detective with an artificial arm that has the ability to change the past time, Kyosuke Ayana, has just received the information that, Ritsu Kamiji, the person concerned with the serial killer case in Camellia Hills, would probably make some trouble in the small country of Eastern Europe, Witsarock. To stop the potential disaster, he set out for Witsarock.

Now, the time of crossing the two stories, has arrived.
overview_zh:
解謎逃脫遊戲與命令選擇冒險遊戲的融合——超科學逃脫系列Vol.3——來了！

選出前兩位主角：綾奈京介和紅野瞳，在拉圖阿城的舞臺上繼續各自的故事，逃離三間牢房！

豪華遊輪爆炸案發生數月後，擁有兩種超能力的少女綾野仁美，在超能力研究機構ZENA從事救人工作，並努力強化自己的能力。

與此同時，擁有改變過去時間能力的人工手臂偵探綾奈京介剛收到情報，山茶花之丘連環殺人案的當事人上地律很可能會在東歐小國維特薩羅克製造麻煩。為了阻止潛在的災難，他出發前往維特薩洛克。

現在，兩個故事交叉的時刻，已經到來。
no_intro_name: Parascientific Escape - Crossing at the Farthest Horizon (USA)

title_en: Parascientific Escape - Cruise in the Distant Seas
overview_en:
Hitomi Akeneno is a 16 year old high school student with a little secret.

Hitomi Akeneno is a 16 year old high school student with a little secret - she has not one, but two psychic powers.

After receiving an invitation, she boards a luxury cruise ship with her friend, Chisono Shio. As soon as she enters a suite room, a loud explosion sounds…and she finds herself stuck, unable to get out. Is this an accident? Or something far more sinister…?

The only way to find out is to escape, with the help of her powers.
overview_zh:
明野瞳是一名 16 歲的高中生，她有一個小秘密。

明野瞳 (Hitomi Akeneno) 是一名 16 歲的高中生，她有一個小秘密 - 她擁有的不是一種，而是兩種超能力。

收到邀請後，她與好友鹽千園登上了豪華遊輪。當她進入套房時，一聲巨大的爆炸聲響起……她發現自己被困住了，無法出去。這是意外嗎？還是更險惡的事……？

找到答案的唯一方法就是藉助她的力量逃跑。
no_intro_name: Parascientific Escape - Cruise in the Distant Seas (USA)

overview_en:
'Parascientific Escape～Gear Detective～' is a sequal to 'Parascientific Escape～Cruise in the distant seas～', where the player is required to find clues and solve puzzles to escape certain situation using PSI abilities.

The story follows Detective Kyosuke Ayana, who has the ability named chronokinesis which allows him to look back in time in a limited field of view, for up till 5 days back. Detective Ayana is hired to find a serial killer threatening the quiet neighborhood of Camellia Hills - but soon finds himself in much bigger trouble as he investigates the crime scenes.
overview_zh:
《超科學逃亡～齒輪偵探～》是《超科學逃亡～遠海巡航～》的續作，玩家需要利用PSI能力尋找線索並解決謎題，以逃離特定的情況。

故事講述偵探綾奈恭介，他擁有一種名為「計時異能」的能力，可以讓他在有限的視野內回顧過去，最多可追溯至 5 天前。阿亞娜偵探受僱尋找一名威脅茶花山安靜社群的連環殺手，但在調查犯罪現場時很快發現自己遇到了更大的麻煩。

overview_en: Spoil your pets to your heart’s content with Paws & Claws Pampered Pets Resort 3D – an all-new virtual simulation game in 3D! As a newcomer to the pet caring business, players start out at a small accommodation and over time, gain more experience to transform their shabby digs into an elegant resort their clients desire. From administering vaccinations and acupuncture to learning aromatherapy and earning a cosmetology degree – it’s important to keep your clients happy by giving your pets the best care and comfort they deserve.
overview_zh: 使用 Paws & Claws Pampered Pets Resort 3D（全新的 3D 虛擬模擬遊戲）盡情寵愛您的寵物！作為寵物護理行業的新人，玩家從一個小型住宿開始，隨著時間的推移，獲得更多經驗，將他們破舊的住處改造成客戶想要的優雅度假村。從接種疫苗和針灸到學習芳香療法和獲得美容學位 - 為您的寵物提供應有的最佳護理和舒適度，讓您的客戶滿意非常重要。

overview_en:
Use your ninja reflexes to solve puzzles in this easy to learn, hard to master puzzle game. Twist, bounce, warp and toggle your way through the levels. Collect all the stars and be a true ninja master!

Game features:

Over 70 brain-twisting levels
Create custom levels with the built-in level editor
Share levels online and offline via QR Code
overview_zh:
在這款易學難精的益智遊戲中，利用你的忍者反應來解決謎題。扭轉、彈跳、扭曲和切換你的方式透過關卡。收集所有星星，成為真正的忍者大師！

遊戲特色：

超過 70 個令人費解的關卡
使用內建關卡編輯器建立自訂關卡
透過二維碼線上和離線分享關卡

title_en: Peanuts Movie, The - Snoopy's Grand Adventure
no_intro_name: Peanuts Movie, The - Snoopy's Grand Adventure (USA)

title_en: Penguin no Mondai+ Bakushou! Roulette Battle!!
title_jp: Penguin no Mondai+ Bakushou! Roulette Battle!!
no_intro_name: Penguin no Mondai+ Bakushou! Roulette Battle!! (Japan)

overview_en:
THE ELITEST OF THE ELITE

Help Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private defeat Dr. Octavius Brines plan for world domination!

Game Features :
-Go on stealth operations in top-secret locations from the movie and beyond.
-Master each Penguins unique skill, like Ricos Explosive Slide and Skippers Stun Slap.
-Solve puzzles, crack codes and hunt for Cheezy Dibbles!
overview_zh:
精英中的精英

幫助隊長、科瓦爾斯基、里科和二等兵擊敗奧克塔維斯·布林斯博士統治世界的計劃！

遊戲特色：
- 在電影及其他絕密地點進行秘密行動。
- 掌握每隻企鵝的獨特技能，如 Ricos 爆炸滑行和船長擊暈拍打。
-解決謎題、破解密碼並尋找 Cheezy Dibbles！

title_en: Persona Q - Shadow of the Labyrinth
title_jp: Persona Q - Shadow of the Labyrinth
overview_en:
Persona Q is the first Persona game for Nintendo 3DS. The game takes the beloved characters from Persona 3 and Persona 4, puts them into an all new adventure. The game is in the style of Etrian Odyssey, where teams of five will navigate dungeons in a first-person view. New characters, enemies, the presence of Etrian Odyssey's F.O.Es will give players all new challenges.

Also Available
Persona Q: Shadow Of The Labyrinth Wild Cards Premium Edition
overview_zh:
《女神異聞錄 Q》是任天堂 3DS 上的第一款《女神異聞錄》遊戲。遊戲採用《女神異聞錄 3》和《女神異聞錄 4》中深受喜愛的角色，將他們帶入全新的冒險。遊戲採用《Etrian Odyssey》的風格，五人小組將以第一人稱視角探索地下城。新的角色、敵人、Etrian Odyssey 的 F.O.E 的出現將為玩家帶來全新的挑戰。

還提供
女神異聞錄Q：暗影迷宮外卡高階版
no_intro_name: Persona Q - Shadow of the Labyrinth (USA)

overview_en: Joker Takes Center Stage - Experience a thought-provoking story from the perspective of the protagonist from Persona 5 as you along with the other Phantom Thieves meet the S.E.E.S. from Persona 3 and the Investigation Team from Persona 4 in a cinematic world!
overview_zh: 小丑佔據舞臺中心 - 當你和其他怪盜團成員一起遇見 S.E.E.S 時，從《女神異聞錄 5》主角的角度體驗一個發人深省的故事。來自《女神異聞錄 3》和《女神異聞錄 4》的調查小組在電影世界中！

overview_en: Pet Zombies is a pet simulation spoof with a horrific twist – nurture or punish, it’s your choice. Reanimate your very own customizable zombies that you can play with, care for, or torment in a variety of environments where they can shamble, shuffle and lurch. Form a bond with your zombie by providing it with food, toys, and entertainment. Pet Zombies offers lots of gory effects and games to keep players fully entertained and challenged. Customize your zombie to look as grotesque and scary as you desire. It’s your pet, your rules, however twisted they may be.
overview_zh: 《寵物殭屍》是一款寵物模擬惡搞遊戲，帶有可怕的扭曲——培育或懲罰，由你選擇。復活你自己的可自訂殭屍，你可以在各種環境中與它們玩耍、照顧或折磨它們，它們可以搖搖欲墜、拖拖拉拉和蹣跚而行。透過為你的殭屍提供食物、玩具和娛樂來與它建立聯絡。 《寵物殭屍》提供了大量血腥效果和遊戲，讓玩家充分享受娛樂和挑戰。自訂你的殭屍，使其看起來像你想要的那樣怪誕和可怕。這是你的寵物，你的規則，無論它們有多扭曲。

title_en: Petit Novel Series - Harvest December Series
no_intro_name: Petit Novel Series - Harvest December Series (USA)

overview_en: In Petz Beach, players and their Petz can complete quests, meet new villagers, explore, and expand their community. Petz Beach is a beautiful ocean vista with white sands, towering palm trees, and exotic ocean-themed Petz, including dolphins, polar bears, and penguins. Along the way, youll interact with 28 breeds of dogs, 6 breeds of cats, and over 200 in-game collectibles!
overview_zh: 在佩茲海灘，玩家和他們的佩茲可以完成任務、結識新村民、探索和擴大他們的社群。佩茲海灘 (Petz Beach) 擁有美麗的海洋景觀，有白色的沙灘、高聳的棕櫚樹和異國情調的海洋主題佩茲，包括海豚、北極熊和企鵝。一路上，您將與 28 種狗、6 種貓以及超過 200 種遊戲內收藏品互動！

overview_en:
In Ubisoft's Petz Beach and Petz Countryside, players can care for a variety of dogs and take them on exciting adventure around town in two new exciting locales. They can also adopt a cat with a unique personality and watch them interact with their dogs. Petz on Nintendo 3DS introduces two vibrant towns where players and their dogs can freely explore, complete quests, meet new villagers, and expand their community.

In Petz Countryside, players exchange sandy beaches and venture inland for fields of golden wheat and lush acres of green. Petz Countryside also has 28 dog breeds, six cat breeds, more than 200 in-game collectibles, and exclusive Petz at home on land such as a lion, a tiger, and a bear.

Players with both games can transfer the unique Petz and items between the different titles. Or, players can visit a friend's village with a wireless connection for the opportunity to buy and collect some of items not found in their version of the game.
overview_zh:
在育碧的 Petz Beach 和 Petz Countryside 中，玩家可以照顧各種狗狗，並帶著它們在兩個新的令人興奮的地點進行令人興奮的冒險。他們還可以收養一隻個性獨特的貓，並觀看它們與狗互動。 Nintendo 3DS 上的 Petz 引入了兩個充滿活力的城鎮，玩家和他們的狗可以自由探索、完成任務、結識新村民並擴大他們的社群。

在佩茲鄉村，玩家交換沙灘，冒險前往內陸，尋找金色的麥田和鬱鬱蔥蔥的綠色土地。 Petz Countryside 還擁有 28 種狗品種、6 種貓品種、200 多種遊戲內收藏品，以及陸地上專屬 Petz 的獅子、老虎和熊等寵物。

玩這兩款遊戲的玩家可以在不同遊戲之間轉移獨特的 Petz 和物品。或者，玩家可以透過無線連線訪問朋友的村莊，有機會購買和收集他們的遊戲版本中未找到的一些物品。

overview_en:
Discover and take care of your very own lifelike magical pets. Become best friends, teach them tricks and dress them up! Bonding with your Petz has never felt so real!

Features

Hatch & collect 20 magic pets, each with their own personality and sense of humor. Collect all of them and dress them up in more than 42 fun costumes and accessories.
Take care of life-like pets: Feed them, clean them and learn their preferences – from cotton candy to Tabasco sauce – to help them grow.
3D Petz and realistic reactions bring your Petz to life: Petz react to your actions in 3D, such as licking you, putting a paw up to welcome you, and performing 360 jumps when they’re excited. Bonding with your Petz has never felt so real!
Explore an immersive 3D world as you teach them magical powers: Through new fun mini-games and 20 new magical maps, teach them to fly, speed, breathe ice and spit fire.
Keep them hidden from your parents: Teach them to morph into household objects like toasters and lamps, and watch them transform in 3D! Have fun looking for them in your home once they transform.
Augmented reality features: use the Nintendo 3DS Camera to decrypt codes on cards and discover new 3D realistic creatures, outfits and accessories.
overview_zh:
發現並照顧你自己的栩栩如生的魔法寵物。成為最好的朋友，教他們技巧並打扮他們！與您的 Petz 的親密關係從未如此真實！

特點

孵化並收集 20 隻神奇寵物，每隻都有自己的個性和幽默感。收集所有這些物品，並為他們穿上超過 42 種有趣的服裝和配件。
照顧栩栩如生的寵物：餵養牠們、清潔它們並瞭解它們的喜好——從棉花糖到塔巴斯科醬——以幫助它們成長。
3D Petz 和逼真的反應讓您的 Petz 栩栩如生：Petz 會對您的動作做出 3D 反應，例如舔您、舉起爪子歡迎您，以及在興奮時進行 360 度跳躍。與您的 Petz 的親密關係從未如此真實！
探索身臨其境的 3D 世界，教他們神奇的力量：透過新的有趣的迷你遊戲和 20 張新的神奇地圖，教他們飛行、加速、呼吸冰和噴火。
讓它們不被父母發現：教它們變身為烤麵包機和檯燈等家用物品，並觀看它們以 3D 方式變形！一旦它們變形，就可以在家中尋找它們。
擴增實境功能：使用 Nintendo 3DS 相機解密卡片上的程式碼並發現新的 3D 逼真生物、服裝和配件。

title_en: Phineas and Ferb - Quest for Cool Stuff
overview_en: Join Phineas and Ferb as they travel to out-of-this-world places in their newest invention, the A.T.T. (All-Terrain Transformatron). This upgradeable, customizable, ultra-cool amphibious ride helps the boys hunt for lost loot to display in their backyard Museum of Cool. Phineas and Ferb: Quest for Cool Stuff features many of the fan-favorite characters from the hit show, including Perry the Platypus -- aka secret Agent P, Candace, Isabella, Buford, Baljeet, and the evil Dr. Doofenshmirtz, who is determined to unleash his latest creation, the "get-rid-of-cool-stuff-inator" on the Tri-State Area.
overview_zh: 與菲尼亞斯和小佛一起駕駛他們的最新發明 A.T.T. 前往世界之外的地方。 （全地形變壓器）。這種可升級、可自訂、超酷的兩棲遊樂設施可以幫助男孩們尋找丟失的戰利品，並在他們的後院酷博物館中展示。 《菲尼亞斯與小佛：追尋酷玩意兒》收錄了該劇中許多深受粉絲喜愛的角色，包括鴨嘴獸佩裡（又名秘密特工 P）、坎迪斯、伊莎貝拉、佈福德、巴爾吉特，以及邪惡的杜芬施米爾茨博士，後者決心在三州地區釋放他的最新創作——“擺脫酷兒玩意”。
no_intro_name: Phineas and Ferb - Quest for Cool Stuff (USA)

title_en: Phoenix Wright - Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies
overview_en:
Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney − Dual Destinies, known in Japan as Gyakuten Saiban 5 (逆転裁判 5?, lit. "Turnabout Trial 5"), is a visual novel adventure video game developed and published by Capcom. It is the fifth main entry in the Ace Attorney series, and was originally released for the Nintendo 3DS in 2013, with iOS and Android versions following in 2014 and 2017.

The game is set around a year after the previous game, Apollo Justice: Ace Attorney, in a time where the court system has entered a dark era of false charges and fabricated evidence. The player takes the roles of three defense attorneys Phoenix Wright, Apollo Justice and Athena Cykes, who defend their clients in multiple cases and try to restore confidence in the courts. The gameplay is split into investigation sections, where the player searches for evidence and talks to witnesses, and trials, where they search for inconsistencies between witness testimonies and the evidence. The player can use some character-specific gameplay mechanics: Phoenix can see "psyche-locks" over witnesses who are hiding something; Apollo can spot visual cues in witnesses that indicate lying; and Athena can detect conflicting emotions in witnesses' voices.
overview_zh:
《逆転裁判 5》在日本被稱為《逆轉裁判 5》，是一款由 Capcom 開發和發行的視覺小說冒險電玩遊戲。它是逆轉裁判系列的第五部主要作品，最初於 2013 年針對 Nintendo 3DS 發布，隨後於 2014 年和 2017 年推出 iOS 和 Android 版本。

遊戲背景設定在前作《阿波羅正義：逆轉裁判》一年後，當時法院系統已進入虛假指控和捏造證據的黑暗時代。玩家扮演菲尼克斯懷特 (Phoenix Wright)、阿波羅正義 (Apollo Justice) 和雅典娜賽克斯 (Athena Cykes) 三位辯護律師，在多起案件中為自己的當事人辯護，並試圖恢復人們對法庭的信心。遊戲玩法分為調查部分，玩家搜尋證據並與證人交談，以及審判部分，玩家尋找證人證詞與證據之間的不一致之處。玩家可以使用一些特定於角色的遊戲機制：菲尼克斯可以看到隱藏某些東西的目擊者的「心靈鎖」；阿波羅可以從目擊者身上發現表明撒謊的視覺線索；雅典娜可以從目擊者的聲音中察覺到矛盾的情緒。
no_intro_name: Phoenix Wright - Ace Attorney - Dual Destinies (USA)

title_en: Phoenix Wright - Ace Attorney - Spirit of Justice
overview_en: This narrative adventure stars beloved defense attorneys Phoenix Wright and Apollo Justice and sees the return of many familiar faces alongside some exciting new additions. Filled with puzzling cases to solve, the new game also brings popular investigative techniques from previous installments, along with brand new mechanics such as the Divination Séance. Spirit of Justice sees Phoenix in a brand new location: a courtroom situated in the Kingdom of Khura'in, origin of the Kurain Channeling Technique, where mysterious séance trials decide the fate of all defendants. Meanwhile, defense attorney Apollo Justice faces his own challenges holding down the fort at the Wright Anything Agency, as he takes on a case that will have explosive implications. Both our heroes are joined by a host of returning friends and adversaries in their fight to bring about justice.
overview_zh: 這場敘事冒險由深受喜愛的辯護律師菲尼克斯·賴特和阿波羅·正義主演，許多熟悉的面孔回歸，同時也有一些令人興奮的新成員。新遊戲充滿了需要解決的令人費解的案件，也帶來了前幾部作品中流行的調查技巧，以及占卜降神會等全新機制。 《正義之魂》將菲尼克斯帶到了一個全新的地點：庫拉因王國的法庭，庫拉因通靈術的起源，神秘的降神會審判將決定所有被告的命運。同時，辯護律師阿波羅·賈斯蒂斯（Apollo Justice）也面臨堅守賴特一切機構堡壘的挑戰，因為他接手的案件將具有爆炸性影響。我們的兩位英雄都與許多回歸的朋友和對手一起為正義而戰。
no_intro_name: Phoenix Wright - Ace Attorney - Spirit of Justice (USA)

overview_en: Defend the innocent and save the day! Courtroom hero Phoenix Wright lays down the law this Winter in the digital release of Phoenix Wright™:Ace Attorney™ Trilogy. Experience the original trilogy like never before in clear, high-resolution re-drawn graphics and immersive 3D visuals optimized for the Nintendo 3DS system. Join rookie lawyer Phoenix Wright through the early years of his career in his quest to find the truth behind all of the classic cases! Prepare for intense courtroom showdowns by investigating crime scenes, collecting evidence, and questioning witnesses. Use evidence and the testimonies of witnesses to your advantage as you battle for the innocence of your client. Nothing less of a full acquittal will do in this court of law. Find the contradictions in witnesses' testimony to expose the truth!
overview_zh: 保護無辜者並拯救世界！今年冬天，法庭英雄菲尼克斯·賴特 (Phoenix Wright) 在數位版《逆轉裁判》三部曲 (Phoenix Wright™: Ace Attorney™ Trilogy) 中製定了法律。以前所未有的清晰、高解析度重新繪製的圖形和針對 Nintendo 3DS 系統最佳化的沉浸式 3D 視覺效果體驗原始三部曲。與菜鳥律師菲尼克斯·賴特 (Phoenix Wright) 一起度過他職業生涯的早期，尋找所有經典案件背後的真相！透過調查犯罪現場、收集證據和詢問證人，為激烈的法庭對決做好準備。當你為你的當事人的清白而戰時，利用證據和證人的證詞為你帶來優勢。在這個法庭上，只有完全無罪釋放才是最有效的。找出證人證詞中的矛盾點，揭露真相！

title_en: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip _ Kipper Vol. 1
no_intro_name: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip _ Kipper Vol. 1 (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Pt)

title_en: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip _ Kipper Vol. 2
overview_en: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip & Kipper is a study series on Nintendo 3DS and 2DS to help children practise their letters and sounds, and has been designed especially for younger children and their parents or guardians to use together.
overview_zh: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip & Kipper 是任天堂 3DS 和 2DS 上的一個學習系列，旨在幫助孩子練習字母和發音，並且專為年幼的孩子及其父母或監護人一起使用而設計。
no_intro_name: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip _ Kipper Vol. 2 (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Pt)

title_en: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip _ Kipper Vol. 3
overview_en:
Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip & Kipper is a study series on Nintendo 3DS and 2DS to help children practise their letters and sounds, and has been designed especially for younger children and their parents or guardians to use together.
The software will help your child build their English vocabulary through fun exercises in reading, writing and speaking, and is based on the Oxford Reading Tree series, Floppy’s Phonics.
overview_zh:
Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip & Kipper 是任天堂 3DS 和 2DS 上的一個學習系列，旨在幫助孩子練習字母和發音，並且專為年幼的孩子及其父母或監護人一起使用而設計。
該軟體將幫助您的孩子透過有趣的閱讀、寫作和口語練習來建立英語詞彙，並且基於牛津閱讀樹系列、Floppy’s Phonics。
no_intro_name: Phonics Fun with Biff, Chip _ Kipper Vol. 3 (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Pt)

overview_en: Chip away at a three-dimensional block puzzle to reveal the object hidden within. Only this time, blocks can be painted with two colors of paint to mold detailed shapes. Enjoy more than 300 puzzles at the Cafe or even tap compatible amiibo figures (sold separately) to solve 10 more puzzles hiding secret Nintendo characters!
overview_zh: 削掉三維方塊拼圖，揭示隱藏在其中的物體。只是這一次，塊可以塗上兩種顏色的油漆來塑造詳細的形狀。在咖啡館享受 300 多個謎題，甚至點選相容的 amiibo 人偶（單獨出售）來解決另外 10 個隱藏任天堂秘密角色的謎題！

overview_en: Picross e features 150 puzzles of varying difficulties and dimensions.
overview_zh: Picross e 具有 150 個不同難度和尺寸的謎題。

overview_en:
The sequel to Picross e offers a new navigation feature to make gameplay even smoother. As with the previous game, this sequel has 150 new puzzles, plus an all new gameplay element known as Micross.

Picross is a Picture Crossword Puzzle Game in which you use numbers as hints to complete illustrations. The rules are simple and easy to understand. Anyone can do it!
overview_zh:
Picross e 的續作提供了新的導航功能，讓遊戲玩法更加流暢。與前作一樣，這款續作有 150 個新謎題，以及名為 Micross 的全新遊戲元素。

Picross 是一款圖片填字遊戲，您可以在其中使用數字作為提示來完成插圖。規則簡單易懂。任何人都可以做到！

overview_en:
The third Picross instalment, Picross e3, has arrived! It includes an all-new mode called Mega Picross that's a must-see for fans!

Picross is a picture crossword puzzle game in which you use numbers as hints to complete illustrations. Use the numbers that line the grid to work out which squares need to be filled in and which should be left alone. Successfully complete puzzles to form images right before your eyes!

The rules are simple and easy to understand. Anyone can do it! Beginners and intermediate players alike will be able to enjoy these 150 all-new puzzles.

Picross e3 includes an all-new mode, Mega Picross, which will push even experienced players to use a different kind of logic. In Mega Picross, use Mega Numbers – numbers spanning two rows – to complete images! It can be difficult to determine where to fill Mega Numbers, so adjust your approach and enjoy a whole new way of playing Picross!
overview_zh:
第三部 Picross e3 現已推出！它包括一個名為 Mega Picross 的全新模式，這是粉絲們必看的！

Picross 是一款圖片填字遊戲，您可以在其中使用數字作為提示來完成插圖。使用網格上的數字來計算出哪些方格需要填寫，哪些方格應該保留。成功完成拼圖，在您眼前形成影像！

規則簡單易懂。任何人都可以做到！初學者和中級玩家都可以享受這 150 個全新謎題的樂趣。

Picross e3 包含全新模式 Mega Picross，它將促使經驗豐富的玩家使用不同型別的邏輯。在 Mega Picross 中，使用 Mega Numbers（跨越兩行的數字）來完成影像！確定在哪裡填寫巨型數字可能很困難，因此調整您的方法並享受玩Picross的全新方式！

overview_en:
The 4th game in the Picross e series! Now with big 20x15 puzzles! With Micross and Mega Picross modes!

The 4th game in the Picross e series, with a Navigation Feature! As fans requested, new 20x15 puzzles have been added. Micross and Mega Picross modes are also included, with 150+ new puzzles! Tutorials and rule options let newcomers to the series start playing with ease. With save data from previous games, you can also play additional Special Puzzles. Picross is a "Picture Crossword Puzzle Game" where numbers act as hints to complete images. The rules are simple and easy to grasp. Anyone can do it!
overview_zh:
Picross e 系列第四款遊戲！現在有 20x15 的大拼圖！具有 Micross 和 Mega Picross 模式！

Picross e 系列的第四款遊戲，具備導航功能！應粉絲要求，新增了新的 20x15 謎題。還包括 Micross 和 Mega Picross 模式，以及 150 多個新謎題！教學和規則選項讓該系列的新手可以輕鬆開始玩。透過之前遊戲的儲存資料，您還可以玩其他特殊謎題。 Picross 是一款“圖片填字遊戲”，其中數字充當完成影象的提示。規則簡單且易於掌握。任何人都可以做到！

overview_en:
The 5th game in the Picross e series! Includes all three modes, "Micross", "Mega Picross", and "20×15 Picross".
The 5th game in the Picross e series, with a Navigation Feature!

Featuring Micross, Mega Picross and 20×15 Picross, all three modes from the previous game.

Also includes more than 150 satisfying, all-new puzzles to solve.

Tutorials and rule options let newcomers to the series start playing with ease.

Picross is a "Picture Crossword Puzzle Game" where numbers act as hints to complete images.

The rules are simple and easy to grasp. Anyone can do it!
overview_zh:
Picross e 系列第 5 款遊戲！包括所有三種模式：「Micross」、「Mega Picross」和「20×15 Picross」。
Picross e 系列的第五款遊戲，具備導航功能！

包括 Micross、Mega Picross 和 20×15 Picross，這是前一款遊戲的所有三種模式。

還包括超過 150 個令人滿意的全新謎題等待解決。

教學和規則選項讓該系列的新手可以輕鬆開始玩。

Picross 是一款“圖片填字遊戲”，其中數字充當完成影象的提示。

規則簡單且易於掌握。任何人都可以做到！

overview_en:
The 6th game in the Picross e series! Packed with over 300 puzzles!

The 6th game in the Picross e series, with a Navigation Feature!

-New to this title, each puzzle can be played in either Picross or Mega Picross mode!
-Enjoy over 300 puzzles, including special puzzles.
-You can also choose the fill animation for the puzzle screen.

Picross is a "Picture Crossword Puzzle Game" where numbers act as hints to complete images.

The rules are simple and easy to grasp. Anyone can do it!
overview_zh:
Picross e 系列第 6 款遊戲！包含 300 多個謎題！

Picross e 系列的第六款遊戲，具有導航功能！

- 這個遊戲的新功能，每個謎題都可以在 Picross 或 Mega Picross 模式下玩！
- 享受 300 多個謎題，包括特殊謎題。
- 您也可以選擇拼圖畫面的填滿動畫。

Picross 是一款“圖片填字遊戲”，其中數字充當完成影象的提示。

規則簡單且易於掌握。任何人都可以做到！

overview_en:
The 7th game in the Picross e series, with a Navigation Feature!
The first game with 20x15-size Mega Picross puzzles.

The new Mark function lets you leave indicators on squares you aren't sure about, without risking a penalty.

Also, new Switch stylus controls allow you to switch input modes just by pressing the Circle Pad or +Control Pad once!

Picross is a "Picture Crossword Puzzle Game" where numbers act as hints to complete images.

The rules are simple and easy to grasp. Anyone can do it!
overview_zh:
Picross e 系列的第七款遊戲，具備導航功能！
第一款搭配 20x15 尺寸的巨型繪圖方塊拼圖的遊戲。

新的標記功能可以讓您在不確定的方塊上留下指示符，而不會受到懲罰。

此外，新的 Switch 手寫筆控制讓您只需按一次 Circle Pad 或 +Control Pad 即可切換輸入模式！

Picross 是一款“圖片填字遊戲”，其中數字充當完成影象的提示。

規則簡單且易於掌握。任何人都可以做到！

overview_en:
The newest version of the series, withall the functions of previous titles!"

The 8th game in the Picross e series with over 500,000 downloads worldwide.

It retains all the functions of Picross e 7, with all new puzzles. Enjoy Picross in a comfortable play environment refined from all the previous series.

Picross is a "Picture Crossword Puzzle Game" where numbers act as hints to complete images.

The rules are simple and easy to grasp. Anyone can do it!
overview_zh:
系列的最新版本，擁有前作的所有功能！ 」

Picross e 系列的第 8 款遊戲，全球下載量超過 50 萬次。

它保留了 Picross e 7 的所有功能，並帶有所有新的謎題。在從之前所有系列中改進的舒適遊戲環境中享受 Picross。

Picross 是一款“圖片填字遊戲”，其中數字充當完成影象的提示。

規則簡單且易於掌握。任何人都可以做到！

title_en: Pika Pika Nurse Monogatari - Shounika wa Itsumo Oosawagi
title_jp: Pika Pika Nurse Monogatari - Shounika wa Itsumo Oosawagi
no_intro_name: Pika Pika Nurse Monogatari - Shounika wa Itsumo Oosawagi (Japan)

overview_en: Pilotwings Resort, an aerial adventure featuring airplanes, hang gliders and rocket belts. Players soar above tropical Wuhu Island in 3D as they complete missions or snap pictures.
overview_zh: Pilotwings Resort 是一場以飛機、懸掛式滑翔機和火箭帶為主題的空中冒險之旅。玩家以 3D 方式翱翔在熱帶蕪湖島上空，完成任務或拍照。

title_en: Pinball Hall of Fame - The Williams' Collection
no_intro_name: Pinball Hall of Fame - The Williams' Collection (USA)

title_en: Pinball Hall of Fame 3D - The Williams' Collection
no_intro_name: Pinball Hall of Fame 3D - The Williams' Collection (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

overview_en:
Pocket Card Jockey on Nintendo 3DS is a unique crossbreed of a game that combines the thrill of horse racing with the classic card game solitaire.

You can expect to meet horse owners, trainers and other interesting individuals along the way to liven up your career!

The more you race, the more horses you're bound to come across, some of which can be rather striking!

If you want to live up to your sponsors' expectations, you'll need to ride your horses to the top and take first place in all 20 of the highest-ranked G1 races!

Having trouble with a specific race? You can always get a more skilled horse from another player via QR Code and create a foal capable of dominating the leaderboards!

With colourful characters and intuitive controls, you don't have to be a pro jockey to experience the thrill of the race!
overview_zh:
Nintendo 3DS 上的 Pocket Card Jockey 是一款獨特的混合遊戲，將賽馬的快感與經典紙牌遊戲紙牌結合在一起。

您可以期待一路上遇到馬主、馴馬師和其他有趣的人，讓您的職業生涯充滿活力！

您比賽的次數越多，您必然會遇到的馬匹就越多，其中一些馬匹可能相當引人注目！

如果您想不辜負贊助商的期望，您需要騎著您的馬匹登上頂峰，並在所有 20 場排名最高的 G1 比賽中獲得第一名！

在特定比賽中遇到困難？您隨時可以透過二維碼從其他玩家那裡獲得一匹更熟練的馬匹，並創造出一匹能夠稱霸排行榜的小馬！

憑藉豐富多彩的角色和直觀的控制，您無需成為職業騎師即可體驗比賽的刺激！

overview_en: Prepare for an epic adventure exploring a world filled with Pokémon in Pokémon Omega Ruby for the Nintendo 3DS family of systems. Your adventure takes place in Hoenn, a region that consists of a main island that stretches widely from east to west, along with countless small islets that dot the deep blue sea around it. A live volcano steams constantly in the heart of this green-covered island. Look forward to a region rich with natural beauty, a variety of Pokémon, and extraordinary people! During your journey through Hoenn, you’ll be able to build and invite friends to visit your personal Super-Secret Base! Come up with your own Secret Base design, including selecting and placing Decorations however you like. You can also use Super-Secret Bases to play a capture-the-flag activity.Stop Team Aqua from going after the Legendary Pokémon Kyogre. And look out for Omega Ruby. Plus a all new MEGA EVOLUTIONS as well.
overview_zh: 準備在適用於 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統的 Pokémon Omega Ruby 中展開史詩般的冒險，探索充滿 Pokémon 的世界。你的冒險發生在豐緣，該地區由一座從東向西延伸的主島以及點綴在周圍深藍色大海中的無數小島組成。在這座綠色覆蓋的島嶼中心，一座活火山不斷冒著蒸氣。期待這個擁有豐富自然美景、各種神奇寶貝和非凡人物的地區！在豐緣之旅中，您將能夠建造並邀請朋友參觀您的個人超級秘密基地！提出你自己的秘密基地設計，包括選擇和放置你喜歡的裝飾。您還可以使用超級秘密基地進行奪旗活動。阻止水隊追捕傳奇神奇寶貝蓋歐卡。並留意歐米茄紅寶石。還有全新的 MEGA EVOLUTIONS。

overview_en:
This Pokémon-themed installment of the Art Academy series offers Pokémon fans and budding illustrators alike 40 unique lessons to learn how to paint, sketch and draw beloved Pokémon characters in 2D. Along the way, students of Pokémon Art Academy can pick up actual illustration skills that they can transfer onto real canvas, or share their digital masterpieces with the world. Pokémon Art Academy boasts 40 lessons in which players can encounter favorite Pokémon from throughout the series, such as Pikachu, Oshawott, Charizard, Torchic, Fletchling and Fennekin.

The Art Academy series offers a comprehensive virtual art studio with a variety of realistically behaving art materials. Wield the stylus with tactile precision on the Nintendo 3DS or Nintendo 2DS touch screen to use a plethora of paint, pencils and pastels. A hallmark of the Art Academy franchise is its easy-to-follow lessons with step-by-step guides that teach painting and drawing techniques. A friendly tutor takes students of all ages through these lessons, each of which breaks down complex-looking images into simple steps. Gradually, players pick up more new techniques that allow anyone to create artwork they can be proud of.
overview_zh:
藝術學院系列的這個以神奇寶貝為主題的分期課程為神奇寶貝粉絲和嶄露頭角的插畫家提供了 40 門獨特的課程，學習如何以 2D 形式繪畫、素描和繪製深受喜愛的神奇寶貝角色。在這個過程中，神奇寶貝藝術學院的學生可以學習實際的插畫技能，並將其轉移到真實的畫布上，或與世界分享他們的數位傑作。神奇寶貝藝術學院擁有 40 個課程，玩家可以在其中遇到整個系列中最喜歡的神奇寶貝，如皮卡丘、奧沙沃特、噴火龍、火炬、箭雀和狐蝠。

藝術學院系列提供了一個綜合性的虛擬藝術工作室，其中包含各種逼真的藝術材料。在 Nintendo 3DS 或 Nintendo 2DS 觸控螢幕上精確地揮動手寫筆，以使用大量的顏料、鉛筆和蠟筆。藝術學院特許經營的一個標誌是其易於學習的課程以及教授繪畫和繪畫技巧的分步指南。友好的導師帶領各個年齡層的學生完成這些課程，每一節課程都將複雜的影象分解為簡單的步驟。漸漸地，玩家們掌握了更多新技術，讓任何人都能創作出令他們引以為傲的藝術品。

title_en: Pokemon Fushigi no Dungeon - Magnagate to Mugendai Meikyuu
title_jp: Pokemon Fushigi no Dungeon - Magnagate to Mugendai Meikyuu
no_intro_name: Pokemon Fushigi no Dungeon - Magnagate to Mugendai Meikyuu (Japan)

overview_en: Pokémon Sun and Moon are role-playing video games with adventure elements, based in the fictional Alola region (which itself is loosely based on Hawaiian and Pacific Islander culture), presented in a third-person, overhead perspective. The player controls a young trainer who goes on a quest to catch and train creatures known as Pokémon, and win battles against other trainers. By defeating enemy Pokémon in turn-based battles, the player's Pokémon gains experience, allowing them to level up and increase their battle statistics, learn new battle techniques, and in some cases, evolve into more powerful Pokémon. Alternatively, players can capture wild Pokémon, found during random encounters, by weakening them in battle and catching them with Poké Balls, allowing them to be added to their party. Players are also able to battle and trade Pokémon with other human players using the Nintendo 3DS's connectivity features. Like in previous games in the series, certain Pokémon are only obtainable in either Sun or Moon, with players encouraged to trade with others in order to obtain all Pokémon from both versions.
overview_zh: 《神奇寶貝太陽與月亮》是帶有冒險元素的角色扮演電玩遊戲，以虛構的阿羅拉地區（該地區本身大致基於夏威夷和太平洋島民文化）為背景，以第三人稱俯視視角呈現。玩家控制一名年輕的訓練師，他去尋找和訓練被稱為神奇寶貝的生物，並贏得與其他訓練師的戰鬥。透過在回合製戰鬥中擊敗敵方神奇寶貝，玩家的神奇寶貝可以獲得經驗，使他們能夠升級並增加戰鬥統計資料，學習新的戰鬥技巧，並在某些情況下進化成更強大的神奇寶貝。或者，玩家可以捕捉隨機遭遇中發現的野生神奇寶貝，透過在戰鬥中削弱它們並用神奇寶貝球捕捉它們，將它們新增到隊伍中。玩家還可以使用 Nintendo 3DS 的連線功能與其他人類玩家戰鬥和交易 Pokémon。與該系列之前的遊戲一樣，某些神奇寶貝只能在太陽或月亮中獲得，鼓勵玩家與其他人進行交易，以獲得兩個版本中的所有神奇寶貝。

title_en: Pokemon Mystery Dungeon - Gates to Infinity
overview_en: Discover the incredible 3D world of Pokemon Mystery Dungeon: Gates to Infinity, where Pokemon speak and amazing adventures are always nearby! What's more, you will become a Pokemon yourself! You'll meet all kinds of Pokemon throughout the game, both in the towns you'll visit and the Mystery Dungeons you'll explore.
overview_zh: 探索 Pokemon Mystery Dungeon: Gates to Infinity 令人難以置信的 3D 世界，Pokemon 會說話，奇妙的冒險就在附近！更重要的是，你自己也會變成神奇寶貝！在整個遊戲中，你會遇到各種神奇寶貝，無論是在你將要造訪的城鎮還是你將要探索的神秘地下城。
no_intro_name: Pokemon Mystery Dungeon - Gates to Infinity (USA)

overview_en: Prepare for an epic adventure exploring a world filled with Pokémon in Pokémon Omega Ruby for the Nintendo 3DS family of systems. Your adventure takes place in Hoenn, a region that consists of a main island that stretches widely from east to west, along with countless small islets that dot the deep blue sea around it. A live volcano steams constantly in the heart of this green-covered island. Look forward to a region rich with natural beauty, a variety of Pokémon, and extraordinary people! During your journey through Hoenn, you’ll be able to build and invite friends to visit your personal Super-Secret Base! Come up with your own Secret Base design, including selecting and placing Decorations however you like. You can also use Super-Secret Bases to play a capture-the-flag activity.Stop Team Magma from going after the Legendary Pokémon Groudon. And look out for Alpha Sapphire. Plus a all new MEGA EVOLUTIONS as well.
overview_zh: 準備在適用於 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統的 Pokémon Omega Ruby 中展開史詩般的冒險，探索充滿 Pokémon 的世界。你的冒險發生在豐緣，該地區由一座從東向西延伸的主島以及點綴在周圍深藍色大海中的無數小島組成。在這座綠色覆蓋的島嶼中心，一座活火山不斷冒著蒸氣。期待這個擁有豐富自然美景、各種神奇寶貝和非凡人物的地區！在豐緣之旅中，您將能夠建造並邀請朋友參觀您的個人超級秘密基地！提出你自己的秘密基地設計，包括選擇和放置你喜歡的裝飾。您也可以使用超級秘密基地進行奪旗活動。阻止巖漿隊追捕傳奇神奇寶貝固拉多。並留意阿爾法藍寶石。還有全新的 MEGA EVOLUTIONS。

overview_en: Pokémon Picross is a puzzle game to complete and reveal a hidden Pokémon illustration. The main feature of this game is that once you solve a puzzle and complete an illustration of a Pokémon, you can collect the Pokémon. In addition to 300+ standard Pokémon puzzles, Pokémon Picross has an advanced mode that is significantly harder. It also has Daily Training to help players improve their skills. This free-to start game launches in the Nintendo eShop early December.
overview_zh: Pokémon Picross 是一款益智遊戲，用於完成並揭示隱藏的 Pokémon 插圖。這個遊戲的主要特點是，一旦你解決了一個謎題並完成了神奇寶貝的插圖，你就可以收集神奇寶貝。除了 300 多個標準 Pokémon 謎題之外，Pokémon Picross 還有一個難度明顯更高的高階模式。它還提供日常訓練來幫助玩家提高技能。這款免費遊戲於 12 月初在 Nintendo eShop 發布。

overview_en:
Pokemon Rumble Blast, the first Pokemon game created exclusively for the Nintendo 3DS system, is an action-packed Pokemon adventure in 3D! Battle against waves of opponents, connect and play with friends, and collect more than 600 different Toy Pokemon!
 
As you advance through each stage in Pokemon Rumble Blast, your Toy Pokemon will face dozens of Pokemon at once in fast and furious real-time battles! You'll also run into giant Boss Pokemon, whose massive size and strength will make them especially tough to defeat and who can become powerful allies if you're lucky!
overview_zh:
Pokemon Rumble Blast 是首款專為 Nintendo 3DS 系統打造的 Pokemon 遊戲，是一款充滿動感的 3D Pokemon 冒險遊戲！與一波又一波的對手戰鬥，與朋友聯絡並玩耍，並收集 600 多種不同的玩具神奇寶貝！
 
當您在《Pokemon Rumble Blast》的每個階段中前進時，您的玩具神奇寶貝將在快速而激烈的實時戰鬥中同時面對數十隻神奇寶貝！你還會遇到巨大的 Boss 口袋妖怪，它們巨大的體型和力量使它們特別難以擊敗，如果你幸運的話，它們可以成為強大的盟友！

overview_en:
Pokémon Rumble World (Japanese: みんなのポケモンスクランブル Everyone's Pokémon Scramble) is a freemium Nintendo 3DS game released in most regions on April 8, 2015 and is the fourth entry in the Pokémon Rumble series. The game is free to download, but features in-game microtransactions. The game was also later released as a retail product with all the available microtransactions already paid for. The game features all species of Pokémon available at the time of release. Mega Evolution, including the use of Primal Kyogre, Primal Groudon, and Mega Rayquaza, is also possible.
The title "Pokémon Rumble World" was originally discovered prior to its announcement due to receiving a classification from the Australian Classification Board.
overview_zh:
《Pokémon Rumble World》（日文：みんなのポケモンsukuranburu Every's Pokémon Scramble）是一款免費增值任天堂 3DS 遊戲，於 2015 年 4 月 8 日在大多數地區發布，也是《Pokmon Rumble》系列的第四款作品。該遊戲可免費下載，但具有遊戲內微交易功能。該遊戲後來也作為零售產品發布，所有可用的微交易都已支付。遊戲包含釋出時可用的所有神奇寶貝物種。超級進化，包括使用原始蓋歐卡、原始固拉多和超級烈空坐也是可能的。
「Pokémon Rumble World」這個標題最初是在其宣佈之前因收到澳洲分類委員會的分類而被發現的。

overview_en: Pokemon Shuffle is a Pokemon game available now for the Nintendo 3DS family of systems. In Pokemon Shuffle, your goal is to clear various stages by lining up the same Pokemon and clearing these matches from the puzzle area. Within each puzzle stage, you can deal damage to the wild Pokemon you face by lining up three of the same Pokemon to clear them. Battle and try to catch the Pokemon before you run out of moves!
overview_zh: Pokemon Shuffle 是一款適用於 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統的 Pokemon 遊戲。在 Pokemon Shuffle 中，您的目標是透過排列相同的 Pokemon 並從拼圖區域清除這些匹配項來清除各個階段。在每個謎題階段中，您可以透過排列三個相同的神奇寶貝來清除它們，從而對您面對的野生神奇寶貝造成傷害。戰鬥並嘗試在你的招數用完之前抓住神奇寶貝！

overview_en: Pokémon Sun and Moon are role-playing video games with adventure elements, based in the fictional Alola region (which itself is loosely based on Hawaiian and Pacific Islander culture), presented in a third-person, overhead perspective. The player controls a young trainer who goes on a quest to catch and train creatures known as Pokémon, and win battles against other trainers. By defeating enemy Pokémon in turn-based battles, the player's Pokémon gains experience, allowing them to level up and increase their battle statistics, learn new battle techniques, and in some cases, evolve into more powerful Pokémon. Alternatively, players can capture wild Pokémon, found during random encounters, by weakening them in battle and catching them with Poké Balls, allowing them to be added to their party. title_en: Pokemon Sun and Moon Special Demo Version
no_intro_name: Pokemon Sun and Moon Special Demo Version (USA)

overview_en:
The definitive Pokemon Mystery Dungeon! Prepare yourself for a grand adventure where you become a Pokemon and battle alongside Legendary and Mythical Pokemon to help save the world! Befriend Pokemon and explore ever-changing mystery dungeons with them! 

Players are suddenly transformed into a Pokemon and sent out to a world inhabited only by Pokemon. From a group of 20 Pokemon, including the starters from core RPG Pokemon games plus Pikachu and Riolu, you can choose your Pokemon and your partner Pokemon! Battle alongside your partner Pokemon, who will become your best friend as you investigate ever-changing dungeons. Befriend and interact with all 720 Pokemon as you attempt to save the world from a crisis in a tale of unprecedented scale! The possibilities are limitless!
overview_zh:
終極寶可夢不可思議的迷宮！準備好迎接一場盛大的冒險吧，你將成為一名神奇寶貝，與傳奇和神話的神奇寶貝一起戰鬥，幫助拯救世界！與神奇寶貝交朋友，與它們一起探索不斷變化的神秘地下城！ 

玩家突然變成了神奇寶貝，被傳送到只有神奇寶貝居住的世界。從 20 隻 Pokemon 中，包括核心 RPG Pokemon 遊戲的入門者以及皮卡丘和利歐魯，您可以選擇您的 Pokemon 和您的夥伴 Pokemon！與你的夥伴寶可夢並肩作戰，當你調查不斷變化的地下城時，他們將成為你最好的朋友。在規模空前的故事中，試著將世界從危機中拯救出來，與所有 720 隻神奇寶貝交朋友並互動！可能性是無限的！

overview_en:
A new light shines on the Alola region!
Take on the role of a Pokémon Trainer and unravel the mystery of the Legendary Pokémon Necrozma's new forms: Dusk Mane Necrozma in the Pokémon Ultra Sun game and Dawn Wings Necrozma in the Pokémon Ultra Moon game. You can encounter and battle 400+ Pokémon, including new forms. A brand-new showdown awaits!

Discover the Legendary Pokémon Solgaleo and Lunala's new Z-Moves and their mysterious connection to the Legendary Pokémon Necrozma. Then venture into Ultra Wormholes to explore the Ultra Beasts' home world, encounter every Legendary Pokémon, and uncover Ultra Megalopolis, a dark world where Necrozma has stolen the light. On the bright side, the Alola region has new activities, and fresh landscapes to explore with some assistance from your powered-up Rotom Dex. You'll need all the help you can get if you're going to stop Giovanni, Ghetsis, and the rest of Team Rainbow Rocket from taking over the Alola region!
overview_zh:
阿羅拉地區迎來新的光芒！
扮演神奇寶貝訓練師的角色，解開傳奇神奇寶貝奈克洛茲瑪的新形態之謎：《神奇寶貝究極之日》遊戲中的黃昏鬃毛奈克洛茲瑪和《神奇寶貝究極之月》遊戲中的黎明之翼奈克洛茲瑪。您可以遇到並戰鬥 400 多種神奇寶貝，其中包括新形態。一場全新的對決正在等待中！

探索傳奇神奇寶貝索爾迦雷歐和露娜拉的新 Z 招式，以及它們與傳奇神奇寶貝奈克洛茲瑪的神秘聯絡。接著冒險進入究極蟲洞，探索究極異獸的家園世界，邂逅每隻傳奇神奇寶貝，並揭開究極特大城市──奈克洛茲瑪偷走了光明的黑暗世界。好的一面是，阿羅拉地區有新的活動和新鮮的風景，可以在強化的洛託姆德克斯的幫助下探索。如果您要阻止喬瓦尼、蓋齊斯和彩虹火箭隊的其他成員佔領阿羅拉地區，您將需要所有可以獲得的幫助！

overview_en:
A new light shines on the Alola region!
Take on the role of a Pokémon Trainer and unravel the mystery of the Legendary Pokémon Necrozma's new forms: Dusk Mane Necrozma in the Pokémon Ultra Sun game and Dawn Wings Necrozma in the Pokémon Ultra Moon game. You can encounter and battle 400+ Pokémon, including new forms. A brand-new showdown awaits!

Discover the Legendary Pokémon Solgaleo and Lunala's new Z-Moves and their mysterious connection to the Legendary Pokémon Necrozma. Then venture into Ultra Wormholes to explore the Ultra Beasts' home world, encounter every Legendary Pokémon, and uncover Ultra Megalopolis, a dark world where Necrozma has stolen the light. On the bright side, the Alola region has new activities, and fresh landscapes to explore with some assistance from your powered-up Rotom Dex. You'll need all the help you can get if you're going to stop Giovanni, Ghetsis, and the rest of Team Rainbow Rocket from taking over the Alola region!
overview_zh:
阿羅拉地區迎來新的光芒！
扮演神奇寶貝訓練師的角色，解開傳奇神奇寶貝奈克洛茲瑪的新形態之謎：《神奇寶貝究極之日》遊戲中的黃昏鬃毛奈克洛茲瑪和《神奇寶貝究極之月》遊戲中的黎明之翼奈克洛茲瑪。您可以遇到並戰鬥 400 多種神奇寶貝，其中包括新形態。一場全新的對決正在等待中！

探索傳奇神奇寶貝索爾迦雷歐和露娜拉的新 Z 招式，以及它們與傳奇神奇寶貝奈克洛茲瑪的神秘聯絡。接著冒險進入究極蟲洞，探索究極異獸的家園世界，邂逅每隻傳奇神奇寶貝，並揭開究極特大城市──奈克洛茲瑪偷走了光明的黑暗世界。好的一面是，阿羅拉地區有新的活動和新鮮的風景，可以在強化的洛託姆德克斯的幫助下探索。如果您要阻止喬瓦尼、蓋齊斯和彩虹火箭隊的其他成員佔領阿羅拉地區，您將需要所有可以獲得的幫助！

overview_en:
All-new Pokémon and past favorites come to life with detailed graphics and intense 3D battles. Become a Pokémon Trainer and set out for adventure in a visually stunning new region filled with new Pokémon to catch, trade, and battle. In Pokémon-Amie, you can pet, feed, and play with your Pokémon to form a deeper bond, which may benefit you in future battles. Plus, you can connect and communicate with players around the world at any time to challenge them to a battle, trade Pokémon, and much more.

Australian Classification: PG
overview_zh:
全新的神奇寶貝和過去最受喜愛的神奇寶貝透過詳細的圖形和激烈的 3D 戰鬥變得栩栩如生。成為一名神奇寶貝訓練師，在充滿新神奇寶貝的視覺效果令人驚歎的新區域中展開冒險，捕捉、交易和戰鬥。在 Pokémon-Amie 中，你可以撫摸你的 Pokémon、餵食它、和它一起玩耍，以建立更深的聯絡，這可能會讓你在未來的戰鬥中受益。此外，您可以隨時與世界各地的玩家聯絡和交流，向他們挑戰戰鬥、交易神奇寶貝等等。

澳洲分類：PG

overview_en: All-new Pokémon and past favorites come to life with detailed graphics and intense 3D battles. Become a Pokémon Trainer and set out for adventure in a visually stunning new region filled with new Pokémon to catch, trade, and battle. In Pokémon-Amie, you can pet, feed, and play with your Pokémon to form a deeper bond, which may benefit you in future battles. Plus, you can connect and communicate with players around the world at any time to challenge them to a battle, trade Pokémon, and much more.
overview_zh: 全新的神奇寶貝和過去最受喜愛的神奇寶貝透過詳細的圖形和激烈的 3D 戰鬥變得栩栩如生。成為一名神奇寶貝訓練師，在充滿新神奇寶貝的視覺效果令人驚歎的新區域中展開冒險，捕捉、交易和戰鬥。在 Pokémon-Amie 中，你可以撫摸你的 Pokémon、餵食它、和它一起玩耍，以建立更深的聯絡，這可能會讓你在未來的戰鬥中受益。此外，您可以隨時與世界各地的玩家聯絡和交流，向他們挑戰戰鬥、交易神奇寶貝等等。

overview_en: Embark on a new Yoshi adventure in a world made from yarn, cloth and textiles. Explore the world by using yarn to weave wool platforms and warp pipes to reach new areas, and gleefully unravel its secrets and puzzles by pulling yarn walls apart. Add a little color to Yoshi's life with a spectrum of yarn balls. Then team up with a friend to have a ball together in this wild and woolly world.
overview_zh: 在由紗線、布料和紡織品組成的世界中踏上新的耀西冒險之旅。透過使用紗線編織羊毛平臺和扭曲管道來探索世界，以到達新的區域，並透過拉開紗線牆壁來愉快地解開它的秘密和謎題。用一系列毛線球為耀西的生活增添一點色彩。然後與朋友組隊，在這個狂野而毛茸茸的世界裡一起玩球。

overview_en:
Climb aboard your blimp and explore the vast, uncharted island chains of Poptropica. Steer clear of hazards and discover exotic islands beneath the clouds. Take to the islands and embark on quests, discovering the secrets of Poptropica past one artifact at a time.

Poptropica: Forgotten Islands is the adaptation of the most popular virtual world for kids on iPhone and iPad. Customize your avatar and travel across multiple islands, on foot or by blimp. Collect artifacts and other items and discover the mystery of the Forgotten Islands.
overview_zh:
登上你的飛艇，探索 Poptropica 廣闊、未知的島鏈。避開危險並探索雲層下的奇異島嶼。前往島嶼並開始任務，一次探索一件神器，發現 Poptropica 的秘密。

Poptropica：被遺忘的島嶼是 iPhone 和 iPad 上最受歡迎的兒童虛擬世界的改編版。自訂您的頭像併步行或乘坐飛艇穿越多個島嶼。收集文物和其他物品並發現被遺忘的島嶼的秘密。

overview_en:
Unlock Your Inner MEGAFORCE!

For as long as evil has threatened the Earth, there have been teams of Power Rangers sworn to protect it. The Power Rangers Megaforce are the planet's newest defenders. For the first time, experience the next chapter in the Power Rangers legacy in 3-D! Power up your rangers with the all-new card scanning feature! Go, Go Megaforce!
overview_zh:
釋放你內在的巨大力量！

只要邪惡威脅地球，就有電力別動隊發誓要保護地球。電力別動隊巨型部隊是地球上最新的捍衛者。首次以 3D 方式體驗《恐龍戰隊》傳奇的新篇章！使用全新的卡片掃描功能為您的護林員提供動力！加油，加油超級力量！

overview_en: Pro Evolution Soccer 2011 3D is the 2010-2011 version of Konami's long-running, video game soccer franchise, now available for play on the Nintendo 3DS handheld platform.* The tenth release in the series overall, Pro Evolution Soccer 2011 3DS refreshes the popular franchise by merging the best features that earlier iterations have presented to video game footballers worldwide over the years, along with new features and unique Nintendo 3DS functionality. Notable features include: crisp 3D graphics, two-player wireless support, a wide variety of players and teams, 3DS StreetPass functionality and more.
overview_zh: Pro Evolution Soccer 2011 3D 是 Konami 長期執行的電玩足球系列的 2010-2011 版本，現在可以在 Nintendo 3DS 手持平臺上玩。 * Pro Evolution Soccer 2011 3DS 是該系列的第十個版本，它融合了多年來早期版本為全世界影片遊戲足球運動員提供的最佳功能，以及新功能和獨特的 Nintendo，重新整理了流行的系列。 3DS 功能。顯著的功能包括：清晰的 3D 圖形、兩人無線支援、多種玩家和團隊、3DS StreetPass 功能等等。

overview_en: Pro Evolution Soccer makes its return this fall, Pro Evolution Soccer 2012! This year, Konami is determined to give global football fans a truly realistic, immersive and a delightfully playable take on the beautiful game. Creative Producer Shingo "Seabass" Takatsuka has been sourcing the desires of fans across the globe and working non-stop on marrying the digital game to the real life game so fans can get as close to the real thing. All elements have been examined - defense, offense, AI, penalties, officiating and of course, graphics! The result is a game truly represents the key attributes of the game and it's players. Pro Evolution Soccer "Can you play?"
overview_zh: 《實況足球 2012》將於今年秋季回歸！今年，科樂美決心為全球足球迷提供真正逼真、身臨其境且令人愉悅的精彩比賽體驗。創意製作人 Shingo “Seabass” Takatsuka 一直在尋找全球粉絲的需求，並不斷致力於將數位遊戲與現實生活中的遊戲結合起來，以便粉絲能夠盡可能接近真實的遊戲。所有元素都經過檢查 - 防守、進攻、人工智慧、處罰、裁判，當然還有圖形！結果是遊戲真正代表了遊戲及其玩家的關鍵屬性。實況足球“你會玩嗎？”

overview_en:
Pro Evolution Soccer 2013 returns to the roots of soccer with unique levels of control plus major emphasis on the individual style of the world's best players.
 
Thanks to feedback from dedicated fans, PES2013 offers total freedom to play any kind of ball, which for the first time includes full control over shooting and first touch. Endorsed by Cristiano Ronaldo and Neymar, PES will continue to push boundaries, perfectly reflecting the genius of top level players and capturing the essence of modern teamwork. The result will be the most faithful recreation of modern day football to date.
overview_zh:
《實況足球 2013》以獨特的控制水準回歸足球的根源，並聚焦在世界最佳球員的個人風格。
 
由於忠實粉絲的回饋，PES2013 提供了玩任何型別球的完全自由，其中首次包括對投籃和第一次觸球的完全控制。在克里斯蒂亞諾·羅納爾多和內馬爾的認可下，PES將繼續突破界限，完美體現頂級球員的天才並捕捉現代團隊合作的精髓。結果將是迄今為止對現代足球最忠實的再現。

overview_en: Pro Yakyuu Spirits 2011 is a Baseball game, developed and published by Konami, which was released in Japan in 2011.
overview_zh: Pro Yakyuu Spirits 2011是一款棒球遊戲，由Konami開發並發行，於2011年在日本發行。

title_en: Professor Layton and the Azran Legacy
overview_en:
Journey across the globe aboard the airship Bostonius while solving mind-bending brainteasers themed to their environments. Can you help Professor Layton and his assistants solve the greatest puzzle mankind has ever faced and uncover the mystery surrounding the ancient Azran civilization?

The Professor Layton series couples brilliant puzzle games with a fascinating story to create a riveting formula that has provided great entertainment for mystery fans and puzzle-solving gurus alike. And now, you can complete the Professor Layton storyline with this brand new puzzle-driven narrative from LEVEL-5. This fun adventure can either stand on its own, or act as the glue that connects the two Layton trilogies into one epic story.
overview_zh:
乘坐波士頓飛艇進行環球之旅，同時解決以環境為主題的令人費解的腦筋急轉彎。你能幫助雷頓教授和他的助手解決人類有史以來面臨的最大難題並揭開古代阿茲蘭文明的謎團嗎？

《雷頓教授》系列將精彩的益智遊戲與引人入勝的故事結合在一起，創造了一個引人入勝的公式，為神秘迷和解謎大師等提供了極大的娛樂。現在，您可以透過 LEVEL-5 中全新的謎題驅動敘事來完成雷頓教授的故事情節。這場有趣的冒險既可以獨立存在，也可以作為將兩部雷頓三部曲連線成一個史詩故事的黏合劑。
no_intro_name: Professor Layton and the Azran Legacy (USA)

title_en: Professor Layton and the Miracle Mask
overview_en:
Professor Layton's first adventure on the Nintendo 3DS system takes him to the colorful city of Monte d'Or, where he must stop a mysterious man from wreaking havoc with the powerful Mask of Chaos.
 
Unravel new details about Professor Layton's past alongside Luke, assistant Emmy Altava, and a whole new cast of characters in this riveting story. Wrack your brain with hundreds of puzzles weaving their way throughout the story. In addition, download free daily puzzles for a year!
 
With a robust hint system to help players of all experience levels, and an epic tale packed to the brim with all-new puzzles, Professor Layton makes his triumphant return-only for Nintendo 3DS.
overview_zh:
雷頓教授在任天堂 3DS 系統上的第一次冒險將他帶到色彩繽紛的金山城，在那裡他必須阻止一個神秘人用強大的混沌面具造成嚴重破壞。
 
在這個引人入勝的故事中，揭開雷頓教授與盧克、助理艾米·阿爾塔瓦以及全新角色的過去的新細節。數百個謎題貫穿整個故事，考驗你的大腦。此外，還可以免費下載一年的每日拼圖！
 
憑藉強大的提示系統來幫助所有經驗水平的玩家，以及充滿全新謎題的史詩故事，雷頓教授凱旋歸來，僅限任天堂 3DS。
no_intro_name: Professor Layton and the Miracle Mask (USA)

title_en: Professor Layton en de Erfenis van de Azran
overview_en:
Het tweede avontuur van Professor Layton en zijn hulpje Luke voor de Nintendo 3DS heet Professor Layton en de Erfenis van de Azran. Al puzzelend moet het dappere tweetal een groot mysterie oplossen. Hierbij wordt de hulp van de speler ingeroepen om raadsels en puzzels op te lossen en de twee helden bij te staan!

De puzzels in Professor Layton en de Erfenis van de Azran begaan de grens tot rekenen, inzicht en meetkunde. Soms krijg je te maken met woordspelingen, andere keren moet je slim rekenen of juist een goed en logisch nadenken.

Het laatste hoofdstuk van de Professor Layton-serie laat je puzzels oplossen over de hele wereld, met het meest ambitieuze avontuur van de speurende heer tot nu toe. Na het ontvangen van een mysterieuze brief waarin wordt beweerd dat er een levende mummie is ontdekt, reizen Layton en zijn team af naar een stad diep in het poolgebied. Daar bevrijden ze een jongedame uit een gevangenis van ijs, wat een groots avontuur in beweging zet. Een luchtschip neemt ze mee naar spectaculaire locaties, op het spoor van de raadsels van eeuwenoude beschavingen.
overview_zh:
《雷頓教授》和《盧克》是任天堂 3DS 的《雷頓教授》和《雷頓教授》的主角。 Al puzzelend moet het dappere tweetal een groot mysterie oplossen. Hierbij wordt de hulp van de speler ingeroepen om raadsels en puzzels op te lossen en de tweehelden bij te staan​​！

《雷頓教授》和《阿茲蘭教授》中的謎題開始於重新認識、相遇和相遇。 Soms krijg je te maken met woordspelingen, andere keren moet je slim rekenen of juist een goed en logisch nadenken.

雷頓教授在這個世界上遇到了難題，遇到了雄心勃勃的冒險家。 Na het ontvangen van een mysterieuze 簡而言之，waarin wordt beweed dat er een levende mummie is ontdekt，reizen Layton en zijn team af naar een stad diep in het poolgebied。 Daar bevrijden ze een jongedame uit een gevangenis van ijs, wat een groots avontuur in beweging zet. Een luchtschip neemt ze mee naar 壯觀的地點，op het spoor van de raadsels van vingeeuwude bes chaeeuwen。
no_intro_name: Professor Layton en de Erfenis van de Azran (Netherlands)

title_en: Professor Layton en het Masker der Wonderen
overview_en:
Dit vijfde deel in de serie begint met Layton, Luke en Emmy, korte tijd na de gebeurtenissen in Professor Layton en de Melodie van het Spook. Het dappere drietal krijgt het verzoek om de mysterieuze Gemaskerde Heer te stoppen die de stad Monte d'Or terroriseert met duistere toverkunsten, waardoor de bewoners bijvoorbeeld in steen veranderen. De professor vermoedt de invloed van het Masker der Chaos, een masker dat volgens de verhalen bijzondere krachten geeft aan wie het draagt. Zijn onderzoek voert Layton terug naar een duistere periode in zijn verleden, waar misschien wel de oplossing schuilt voor de problemen van het heden. Tijdens flashbacks maken spelers kennis met Laytons ouders en zijn jeugdvriend Randall, en kunnen ze spelen met de 17-jarige Layton, wiens passie voor de archeologie hem duur komt te staan…

De handgetekende stijl die bekend is van eerdere spellen in de serie krijgt in Professor Layton en het Masker der Wonderen nieuwe diepgang door 3D-personages en –animaties. Het spel bevat ook een heel nieuwe spelstand waarin de jonge Professor Layton oude ruïnes verkent. Hierin moet de speler hem voorbij hindernissen en mummievijanden loodsen om de uitgangen van de mysterieuze kamers te bereiken.

In de koffer van de professor verschijnen drie nieuwe minigames. In de speelgoedrobot-uitdagingen moet je een opwindbaar speelgoedrobotje besturen die telkens drie stappen tegelijk zet. Kun jij het robotje voorbij de apparaten tot aan de finish loodsen? De tweede minigame is winkeltje-van-alles, waarin wordt getest hoe aantrekkelijk je winkelplanken met voorraad kunt vullen – je slaagt alleen wanneer je klanten in één aankoop alles van de planken kopen. In de derde minigame, konijnenshow, help je Luke een circuskonijn te trainen voor nieuwe trucs en uitvoeringen, om de circusbaas te overtuigen het konijn weer op te laten treden.
overview_zh:
在《雷頓教授》和《幽靈的旋律》中，我們在《雷頓教授》和《幽靈》中開始遇見了雷頓、盧克和艾美獎。他在金山的恐怖襲擊中遇到了杜斯特雷·託弗昆斯滕（duistere toverkunsten），在斯丁·維蘭德倫（steen veranderen）中迷住了他們。弗莫埃德教授參與了混沌掩面者的戰鬥，他是一個在黑暗中被破壞的惡魔掩面者。 Zijn onderzoek voert Layton terug naar een duistere periode in zijn verleden, waar misschien wel de oplossing schilt voor de Problemen van het het het. Tijdens 閃回使肯尼斯遇見了雷頓和雷頓，並與考古學中的美好時光，一段美好時光，並與考古相遇的美好時光，並與考古學中的美好時光相遇，一段美好時光，並與考古學中的美好時光相遇，並在考古學中的美好時光，並與考古相遇，在一段美好時光並與考古學的雷頓，並與考古相遇，一段美好時光，並與考古相遇的美好時光，並與考古相遇，

《雷頓教授》中的《雷頓教授》和《新奇幻門 3D 人物和動畫》中的《蒙面人》系列遊戲中的手控風格是最典型的。雷頓教授已經徹底毀掉了。 Hierin moet de speler hem voorbij mudnissen en mummievijanden loodsen om de uitgangen van de mysterieuze kamers te bereiken.

在 de koffer van de 教授 verschijnen drie nieuwe 迷你遊戲中。在機器人的操作過程中，機器人的操作最好是在 telkens 上進行，然後再進行操作。您需要使用機器人來完成 Loodsen 的任務嗎？迷你遊戲是 winkeltje-van-alles，waarin wordt getest hoe aantrekkelijk je winkelplanken met voorraad kunt vullen – je slaagt alleen wanneer je klanten in één aankoop alles van de gtken kopen。在小遊戲中，“Konijnenshow”，幫助盧克在馬戲團訓練中訓練新的卡車，並在馬戲團中將其過度訓練。
no_intro_name: Professor Layton en het Masker der Wonderen (Netherlands)
