title_en: Professor Layton vs Phoenix Wright - Ace Attorney
overview_en:
When the mysterious Espella is pursued through London by a bewildering force, she desperately seeks help from legendary puzzle investigator Professor Layton and his assistant Luke Triton. However, before the duo are able to work out whats going on, Espella is suddenly kidnapped. While attempting to track her down, Layton and Luke encounter a strange book and are transported to the outlandish medieval city of Labyrinthia - a place allegedly inhabited by witches and magic!

Meanwhile, defence attorney extraordinaire Phoenix Wright and spirit medium-in-training Maya Fey also find themselves teleported to Labyrinthia after discovering the same book during a business trip to London. When he realises that Espella is to be put on trial as a witch, Phoenix decides to defend her in court. While Phoenix learns the bizarre laws of the land, Professor Layton sets out to solve the mysteries of Labyrinthia but can the two masters of their professions work together long enough to save the day? Uncover the truth in Professor Layton vs. Phoenix Wright: Ace Attorney, only on Nintendo 3DS!

Two entirely unique gameplay styles collide investigate the mysteries of Labyrinthia, solving puzzles as you go, then seek justice in the courts of law! Professor Laytons expertise is put to the test as he explores the city, finding clues, solving puzzles and speaking with its enigmatic inhabitants. Meanwhile, Phoenix Wright defends his client to the end in a courtroom quite unlike any hes experienced before. With completely different laws and logic at play in Witch Trials, Phoenix must cross-examine witnesses, and sometimes even quiz multiple people at once to find contradictions!
overview_zh:
當神秘的埃斯佩拉在倫敦被一股令人困惑的力量追趕時，她絕望地向傳奇謎題調查員雷頓教授和他的助手盧克·特里頓尋求幫助。然而，在兩人弄清楚發生了什麼事之前，埃斯佩拉突然被綁架了。在試圖追蹤她的過程中，雷頓和盧克遇到了一本奇怪的書，並被傳送到了古怪的中世紀城市迷宮 - 據稱是女巫和魔法居住的地方！

與此同時，傑出的辯護律師菲尼克斯·賴特和靈媒實習生瑪雅·菲在去倫敦出差時發現同一本書後也發現自己被傳送到了迷宮。當菲尼克斯意識到埃斯佩拉將作為女巫接受審判時，他決定在法庭上為她辯護。當菲尼克斯瞭解了這片土地的奇異法則時，雷頓教授著手解開迷宮的謎團，但這兩位職業大師能夠合作足夠長的時間來拯救世界嗎？在任天堂 3DS 限定的《雷頓教授 vs. 菲尼克斯賴特：逆轉裁判》中揭開真相！

兩種完全獨特的遊戲風格碰撞，探索迷宮的奧秘，邊走邊解決謎題，然後在法庭上尋求正義！雷頓教授探索這座城市、尋找線索、解決謎題並與神秘的居民交談，他的專業知識受到了考驗。與此同時，菲尼克斯·賴特在法庭上為他的當事人辯護到底，這與他以前經歷過的任何事情都不同。在《女巫審判》中，有著完全不同的法律和邏輯，菲尼克斯必須盤問證人，有時甚至同時詢問多個人以找出矛盾！
no_intro_name: Professor Layton vs Phoenix Wright - Ace Attorney (Europe) (En,Es,It)

overview_en: Developed by Banpresto and Monolith Soft, Project X Zone features over 50 characters from 29 historic game franchises by three of Japan's most prolific video game companies. In Project X Zone players will use a team of two characters known as a Pair Unit to explore the world within the game. An additional character known as a Solo Unit can be combined with the Pair Unit to assist in battles with Solo Attacks as well as augment the attacks available for players to execute. Throughout the game, epic battles are waiting to erupt at a moment's notice. Players will have to master an array of screen-busting moves including Solo Attacks, Support Attacks, Cross Hits, and Finishing Moves in order to defeat a multitude of foes
overview_zh: Project X Zone 由 Banpresto 和 Monolith Soft 開發，擁有來自日本最多產的三個影片遊戲公司的 29 個歷史遊戲系列的 50 多個角色。在 Project X Zone 中，玩家將使用兩個角色組成的團隊（稱為「配對單位」）來探索遊戲中的世界。稱為單人單位的附加角色可以與配對單位組合，以協助單人攻擊的戰鬥，並增強玩家可以執行的攻擊。在整個遊戲中，史詩般的戰鬥隨時可能爆發。玩家必須掌握一系列破壞螢幕的動作，包括單人攻擊、支援攻擊、交叉攻擊和終結動作，才能擊敗眾多敵人

overview_en: In the sequel to the original world-crossing RPG adventure, legendary characters from Japan’s most prolific video game publishers come together to create the biggest mash-up strategy game ever! Project X Zone 2 gives gamers the opportunity to play as their favorite characters from a multitude of franchises and form teams of characters hailing from classic and current franchises and engage enemies through strategic turn-based battles.
overview_zh: 在原創穿越世界 RPG 冒險的續集中，來自日本最多產的電玩發行商的傳奇人物齊聚一堂，創造了有史以來最大的混搭策略遊戲！ Project X Zone 2 讓玩家有機會扮演眾多系列中他們最喜歡的角色，並組建來自經典和當前系列的角色團隊，並透過戰略回合製戰鬥與敵人交戰。

title_en: Project X Zone 2 - Brave New World
title_jp: Project X Zone 2 - Brave New World
no_intro_name: Project X Zone 2 - Brave New World (Japan)

overview_en: Choose your favorite breed of kitten, give it a name, feed it and play with it, all through the easy-to-use Nintendo DS interface. Your kitten will even respond to your voice, and interact with the environment you provide. Earn an allowance to buy cute accessories and toys for your pet.
overview_zh: 選擇您最喜歡的小貓品種，給它命名，餵養牠並與它玩耍，這一切都透過易於使用的 Nintendo DS 介面進行。您的小貓甚至會對您的聲音做出反應，並與您提供的環境互動。賺取津貼為您的寵物購買可愛的配件和玩具。

overview_en:
Putty Squad is a 1994 video game developed by System 3 and published by Maximum Games and Ocean Software. It was originally developed for the Amiga 1200, but was not released until the end of 2013; Sega Mega Drive and MS-DOS ports also existed, but were cancelled. It is the sequel to Putty (1992). In December 2013, the Amiga version was released as a Christmas gift on System 3's website. In October 2015, the Mega Drive version was also released by a Sega-16 user who got a hold of a working prototype.

A remake was first released in November 2013, and it was for PlayStation 4, PlayStation Vita, PlayStation 3, Nintendo 3DS, Xbox Live Arcade, and Microsoft Windows.
overview_zh:
Putty Squad 是由 System 3 開發、Maximum Games 和 Ocean Software 發行的 1994 年電玩遊戲。最初是為Amiga 1200開發的，但直到2013年底才發布； Sega Mega Drive 和 MS-DOS 埠也存在，但被取消了。這是《Putty》（1992）的續集。 2013年12月，Amiga版本作為聖誕禮物在System 3的網站上發布。 2015 年 10 月，一位 Sega-16 使用者也發布了 Mega Drive 版本，他獲得了一個工作原型。

重製版於 2013 年 11 月首次發布，適用於 PlayStation 4、PlayStation Vita、PlayStation 3、Nintendo 3DS、Xbox Live Arcade 和 Microsoft Windows。

overview_en:
Puyo Puyo Tetris was the first Tetris-related title published by Sega since the PlayStation 2 game of Tetris Collection, an installment in the Sega Ages series, in 2006. Puyo Puyo Tetris adopts the guidelines used in contemporary Tetris games, so the rotation patterns and colors of the Tetrominoes differ from Sega's previous releases.

Puyo Puyo Tetris was released for the Nintendo 3DS, Wii U, PlayStation Vita and PlayStation 3 in Japan in February 2014,followed by versions for PlayStation 4 and Xbox One in December 2014,and Nintendo Switch in March 2017. The PlayStation 4 and Nintendo Switch versions were released outside of Japan in April 2017, marking the first English localization of a Puyo Puyo game since Puyo Pop Fever in 2004.A Microsoft Windows version was released in February 2018.
overview_zh:
Puyo Puyo Tetris 是世嘉自 2006 年 PlayStation 2 遊戲《Tetris Collection》（世嘉時代系列的一部分）以來推出的第一款與俄羅斯方塊相關的遊戲。 Puyo Puyo Tetris 採用了當代俄羅斯方塊遊戲中使用的準則，因此 Tetrominoes 的旋轉模式和顏色與 Sega 先前發布的版本有所不同。

《Puyo Puyo Tetris》於 2014 年 2 月在日本發布適用於 Nintendo 3DS、Wii U、PlayStation Vita 和 PlayStation 3 的版本，隨後於 2014 年 12 月發布適用於 PlayStation 4 和 Xbox One 的版本，並於 2017 年 3 月發布適用於 Nintend Switch 的版本。 PlayStation 4 和 Nintendo Switch 版本於 2017 年 4 月在日本境外發布，這是自《Puyo Pop Fever》以來，《Puyo Puyo》遊戲的首個英文字地化版本。 2004年。 2018年2月發布了Microsoft Windows版本。

overview_en:
Puzzle Bobble Universe sees brothers Bub and Bob facing more bubble trouble as they stumble across an unmanned spaceship and a distant cry for help.

Unknown to the dinosaur duo, several surrounding planets have "doors" in their vicinity which have been opened, releasing floods of bubbles that are rapidly turning into hazardous space-debris. With Bob captured by the Boss, Bub must act fast to ensure the future safety of all the planets and their inhabitants.

The legendary puzzle game Puzzle Bobble comes full speed to the Nintendo 3DS
Experience an all-new feeling of depth only made possible by the 3DS
All-new features including Challenge Mode and a trophy system
Puzzle Mode: The player travels around 8 different worlds to rescue friends. Each world contains 10+1 stages for a total of 88 stages in the entire game
Challenge Mode: The player can choose from a selection of challenge modes including Non-Stop Bubbles, and timed games where the player must burst as many bubbles as possible in 100 and 300 seconds.
Gimmick Bubbles: Dramatic visual effects on a screen with depth have been added to the well-received traditional puzzle elements where the player tries to put colourful bubbles together to make them disappear!
overview_zh:
在《泡泡龍宇宙》中，巴布和鮑勃兄弟遇到了更多的泡泡麻煩，他們偶然發現了一艘無人太空船，並聽到遠處傳來求救聲。

恐龍二人組不知道的是，周圍的幾個行星在其附近有“門”，這些“門”已開啟，釋放出大量氣泡，這些氣泡迅速變成危險的太空碎片。鮑勃被 Boss 抓獲後，巴布必須迅速採取行動，以確保所有行星及其居民未來的安全。

傳奇益智遊戲《泡泡龍》全速登陸 Nintendo 3DS
體驗只有 3DS 才能實現的全新深度感
全新功能，包括挑戰模式和獎盃系統
解謎模式：玩家週遊 8 個不同的世界來營救朋友。每個世界包含10+1個階段，整個遊戲共有88個階段
挑戰模式：玩家可以選擇多種挑戰模式，包括不間斷的泡泡，以及玩家必須在 100 秒和 300 秒內爆破盡可能多的泡泡的限時遊戲。
噱頭泡泡：在廣受好評的傳統解謎元素中新增了具有深度的螢幕上的戲劇性視覺效果，玩家試圖將彩色泡泡放在一起以使它們消失！

title_en: Puzzle _ Dragons - Super Mario Bros. Edition
title_jp: Puzzle _ Dragons - Super Mario Bros. Edition
overview_en: Puzzle & Dragons: Super Mario Bros. Edition is a Puzzle game, developed and published by GungHo, which was released in Japan in 2015.
overview_zh: 《智龍迷城：超級瑪利歐兄弟版》是一款益智遊戲，由GungHo開發並發行，於2015年在日本發行。
no_intro_name: Puzzle _ Dragons - Super Mario Bros. Edition (Japan)

title_en: Puzzle _ Dragons X - Kami no Shou
title_jp: Puzzle _ Dragons X - Kami no Shou
no_intro_name: Puzzle _ Dragons X - Kami no Shou (Japan)

title_en: Puzzle _ Dragons X - Ryuu no Shou
title_jp: Puzzle _ Dragons X - Ryuu no Shou
no_intro_name: Puzzle _ Dragons X - Ryuu no Shou (Japan)

title_en: Puzzle _ Dragons Z + Puzzle _ Dragons Super Mario Bros. Edition
overview_en: Two puzzling RPG adventures await you! Rescue Princess Peach from Bowser or defeat the evil group Paradox by battling enemies with the awesome power of orbs. Drag and match orbs, or chain together combos to deal massive blows to your enemies. Then bolster your forces with hundreds of unique monsters in this two-in-one game pack.
overview_zh: 兩個令人費解的角色扮演冒險等著您！從鮑澤手中救出桃子公主，或是利用球體的強大力量與敵人作戰，擊敗邪惡組織 Paradox。拖曳並匹配球體，或將組合連在一起，對敵人造成巨大打擊。然後在這個二合一遊戲包中使用數百種獨特的怪物來增強你的力量。
no_intro_name: Puzzle _ Dragons Z + Puzzle _ Dragons Super Mario Bros. Edition (USA)

overview_en:
Puzzler Mind Gym 3D offers a daily program of brain exercises and puzzles in 3D, designed to help make the most of your mind. Improve your capabilities in four categories you use every day - Visual, Memorization, Word-based, and Numerical puzzles abound. Puzzler Mind Gym 3D is a 90-day program of enjoyable exercises for the mind, allowing players to flex their memory muscle before undertaking the daily Mind Gym Challenges set by Professor Ian Robertson: neuroscientist and world expert on cognitive rehabilitation.

Players can work through each session from start to finish, or choose from any of the 90 daily programs at any time by browsing their preferred game type. Each of the daily sessions features selectable icons representing the four individual game categories of Memory, Word, Visual, and Numerical – and will offer four games that the player must complete in order to access the Mind Gym Challenge for that session.
overview_zh:
Puzzler Mind Gym 3D 提供每日大腦練習和 3D 謎題計劃，旨在幫助您充分發揮思維能力。提高您每天使用的四個類別的能力 - 視覺、記憶、基於單字和數字的謎題比比皆是。 Puzzler Mind Gym 3D 是一項為期 90 天的令人愉悅的思維鍛煉計劃，讓玩家在接受由神經科學家和世界認知復健專家 Ian Robertson 教授設定的每日 Mind Gym 挑戰之前鍛煉自己的記憶力。

玩家可以從頭到尾完成每個會話，或透過瀏覽自己喜歡的遊戲型別隨時從 90 個每日節目中進行選擇。每個每日課程都有可選擇的圖示，代表記憶、文字、視覺和數字四個單獨的遊戲類別，並將提供玩家必須完成的四個遊戲才能參加該課程的心靈健身房挑戰。

overview_en: With Puzzler World 2012 3D, players can collect trophies in a personal trophy cabinet as proof of skill, collect hint tokens for help on tricky clues and puzzles, and teach the game to remember individual letters and numbers using the handwriting recognition feature. Add more variety and hours of fun by unlocking bonus games with new modes. Take on additional bonus games such as Hangman, Chain Letters, Missing Piece, and more with Challenge mode. For an extra challenge, unlock Master mode puzzles to reveal a broad range of even tougher puzzles.
overview_zh: 藉助 Puzzler World 2012 3D，玩家可以在個人獎杯櫃中收集獎杯作為技能證明，收集提示標記以幫助解決棘手的線索和謎題，並教遊戲使用手寫識別功能記住單個字母和數字。透過使用新模式解鎖獎勵遊戲來增加更多的多樣性和更多的樂趣。透過挑戰模式進行額外的獎勵遊戲，例如絞刑吏、連環信、失蹤的碎片等等。如需額外挑戰，請解鎖大師模式謎題，以揭示各種更難的謎題。

overview_en:
Puzzler World 2013 features over 1,200 brain teasing puzzles and introduces new games such as Maze-a-Pix, Number Jig and Loko.
 
Puzzler World 2013 takes Master Mode even further with new, tougher challenge that the player can unlock and test themselves against.
overview_zh:
Puzzler World 2013 包含 1,200 多個腦筋急轉彎謎題，並推出了 Maze-a-Pix、Number Jig 和 Loko 等新遊戲。
 
Puzzler World 2013 進一步推進了大師模式，推出了新的、更艱鉅的挑戰，玩家可以解鎖並測試自己。

overview_en:
Create the RPG you always dreamed of with RPG Maker Fes!

RPG Maker Fes is a game creation software that lets you create your own RPGs, at anytime and anywhere, on the Nintendo 3DS™ system without any programming knowledge.

Moreover, all your completed RPGs can be uploaded and then downloaded to be played by other Nintendo 3DS™ users for free!

In order to download and play other users' creations, please visit the Nintendo eShop and download the free software RPG Maker Player.
overview_zh:
使用 RPG Maker Fes 建立您一直夢想的 RPG！

RPG Maker Fes 是一款遊戲建立軟體，讓您隨時隨地在 Nintendo 3DS™ 系統上建立自己的 RPG，而無需任何程式設計知識。

此外，您完成的所有角色扮演遊戲都可以上傳並下載，供其他 Nintendo 3DS™ 使用者免費玩！

若要下載和玩其他使用者的作品，請造訪 Nintendo eShop 並下載免費軟體 RPG Maker Player。

overview_en: Rabbids are bwaaack and this time they have an infallible plan: travel back in time and invade human history! Plunge into the past with the wacky Rabbids and revisit the greatest moments of history like the discovery of fire, the broken nose of the Sphinx or the legend of Arthur. Uncover how Rabbids wreaked havoc and changed the course of history...
overview_zh: 兔子們瘋了，這次他們有一個萬無一失的計劃：回到過去併入侵人類歷史！與古怪的瘋兔一起沉浸在過去，重溫歷史上最偉大的時刻，例如火的發現、獅身人面像的斷鼻子或亞瑟的傳說。揭開瘋狂兔子如何造成嚴重破壞並改變歷史程序...

overview_en: Rabbids have escaped from your cartridge all over your Nintendo 3DS and found their way into the real world. You must collect them throughout 7 worlds full of mini games and bring the complete collection back, one battle at the time!
overview_zh: 瘋狂兔子已經從你的任天堂 3DS 的卡帶中逃脫，並找到了進入現實世界的方法。您必須在充滿迷你遊戲的 7 個世界中收集它們，然後透過一場戰鬥將完整的收藏品帶回來！

overview_en:
Unlock the time traveling power of the White Chronicle once again in Radiant Historia: Perfect Chronology. This beloved classic is an expanded from the original Nintendo 3DS™ game and contains a great deal of added gameplay/story content, updated presentation, and new ways to experience the adventure!

The continent of Vainqueur is plagued with the spreading desertification, laying the land to waste by turning it slowly into sand. Tensions rise, and war breaks out for the remaining fertile land. Stocke, a Special Intelligence agent of Alistel, is sent on a special mission when he discovers the powers of the relic, the White Chronicle. With his new-found abilities, Stocke will need to right the wrongs of the past in order to prevent the total annihilation of the world. In this version, a new, mysterious character named Nemesia teaches him about the world's history and unlocks a third timeline to explore the ripple effect of some of his actions with episodic "what-if" scenarios.
overview_zh:
在光輝歷史：完美年代學中再次解鎖白色編年史的時間旅行力量。這款深受喜愛的經典遊戲是原版 Nintendo 3DS™ 遊戲的擴充套件版，包含大量新增的遊戲/故事內容、更新的演示以及體驗冒險的新方式！

萬奎爾大陸飽受沙漠化蔓延的困擾，土地慢慢變成沙子，導致土地荒廢。緊張局勢加劇，爭奪剩餘肥沃土地的戰爭爆發。斯托克是阿利斯泰爾的一名特殊情報人員，當他發現了遺物「白色編年史」的力量時，他被派去執行一項特殊任務。憑藉新發現的能力，斯托克需要糾正過去的錯誤，以防止世界徹底毀滅。在這個版本中，一個名為 Nemesia 的新神秘角色向他講述了世界歷史，並解鎖了第三條時間線，以透過情境「假設」場景探索他的一些行為的連鎖反應。

overview_en: One of the most popular franchises of all time lands on Nintendo 3DS with an outstanding platform experience that will take advantage of the Nintendo 3DS specifications with impressive graphics, stunning 3D effects and full use of the Circle Pad. An adaptation of the acclaimed Rayman 2 original game on Dreamcast, Rayman 3D will feature major updates on key game play elements such as accessibility, progression and learning curve.
overview_zh: 有史以來最受歡迎的系列之一登陸 Nintendo 3DS，帶來出色的平臺體驗，它將充分利用 Nintendo 3DS 的規格，提供令人印象深刻的圖形、令人驚嘆的 3D 效果以及 Circle Pad 的充分利用。 《雷曼 3D》改編自 Dreamcast 上廣受好評的《雷曼 2》原版遊戲，將對主要遊戲元素（如可訪問性、進度和學習曲線）進行重大更新。

overview_en: Rayman Origins is a comic adventure set in a lush 2D world brimming with unexpected secrets and outlandish enemies. The Glade of Dreams is overrun by the "nefurrious" Darktoons. The Fairy Council seeks Rayman's help to save the day. Rayman receives the aid of his best friend Globox as well as two crafty wizards, the Teensies. Together the world's most hilarious team of heroes sets out to restore peace to the Glade before their beloved home is destroyed. Rayman Origins supports four-player jump-in-and-jump-out co-op gameplay. The game offers a massive universe to explore, with more than 100 characters, 12 unique worlds, and more than 60 levels of platforming gameplay designed for all ages and play styles. Unlock new abilities and moves as you progress through the game. All members of your team will discover new unique abilities, including swimming, diving, slapping, and the sensational "HarilyCopter."
overview_zh: 《雷曼：起源》是一款漫畫冒險遊戲，背景設定在鬱鬱蔥蔥的 2D 世界中，充滿了意想不到的秘密和稀奇古怪的敵人。夢境林地被「邪惡的」黑暗漫畫所佔領。仙女議會尋求雷曼的幫助來拯救世界。雷曼得到了他最好的朋友 Globox 以及兩個狡猾的巫師 Teensies 的幫助。世界上最搞笑的英雄團隊一起出發，在他們心愛的家園被摧毀之前恢復林間空地的和平。 《雷曼起源》支援四人跳進跳出合作遊戲。遊戲提供了一個巨大的宇宙可供探索，擁有 100 多個角色、12 個獨特的世界以及 60 多個級別的平臺遊戲，專為所有年齡和遊戲風格而設計。隨著遊戲的進展解鎖新的能力和動作。你團隊的所有成員都會發現新的獨特能力，包括游泳、潛水、拍打和令人驚嘆的「HarilyCopter」。

overview_en: The Rayman and Rabbids Family Pack for Nintendo 3DS bundles together two Rabbids games - Rabbids Rumble and Rabbids 3D - and the already classic Rayman title, Rayman Origins.
overview_zh: Nintendo 3DS 版《雷曼與瘋狂兔》家庭包將兩款瘋狂兔子遊戲 - 《瘋狂兔子大亂鬥》和《瘋狂兔子 3D》 - 以及已經經典的《雷曼》遊戲《雷曼起源》捆綁在一起。

overview_en:
In this first-person fire & rescue action game players will enter the soot-stained boots of an everyday hero as a newly graduated academy cadet getting their start in a big city fire station. Players must use the tools of the trade like the axe, hose and saw to battle raging blazes, tackle explosive environments and rescue survivors.

Face the heat on the frontline as you assume the role of a rookie firefighter destined to become a hero on the Nintendo 3DS. Operate the tools of the trade. Aim jets of water, swing axes and prise open doors. Adding to the already intense drama is an impressive cast of voice actors. Become that rarest of commodities - a real hero!
overview_zh:
在這款第一人稱消防救援動作遊戲中，玩家將扮演一名普通英雄，扮演一名剛畢業的學院學員，在大城市消防局開始工作。玩家必須使用斧頭、水管和鋸子等專業工具來撲滅熊熊大火、應對爆炸性環境並拯救倖存者​​。

在 Nintendo 3DS 上，您將扮演一名註定成為英雄的新秀消防員，面對前線的酷熱天氣。操作交易工具。瞄準水柱、揮舞斧頭並撬開門。令人印象深刻的配音演員陣容為本已緊張的戲劇增添了色彩。成為最稀有的商品 - 真正的英雄！

overview_en: In Reel Fishing Paradise 3D, players will travel to over a dozen stunning fishing locales in their quest to become master anglers. They'll fish tranquil lakes, rocky coasts, flooded forests, and more, all rendered in eye-popping 3D that brings every leaping fish and splash of water to life.
overview_zh: 在 Reel Fishing Paradise 3D 中，玩家將前往十多個令人驚嘆的釣魚地點，尋求成為釣魚高手。他們將在寧靜的湖泊、岩石海岸、洪水氾濫的森林等地方釣魚，所有這些都以令人瞠目結舌的 3D 渲染，讓每條跳躍的魚和濺起的水花都栩栩如生。

title_en: Regular Show - Mordecai and Rigby in 8-bit Land
overview_en:
Regular Show: Mordecai & Rigby in 8-bit Land is the very first video game based on the hit Cartoon Network TV Show. Mordecai and Rigby are trapped inside a video game and must travel through the pixilated land of 8-Bit to find their way out. This hijinx-filled adventure is packed with platforming, space shooting, and old-school top down video game mania, and comes fully loaded with tons of Regular Show characters and jokes.

-Play as Mordecai and Rigby and use their unique powers to battle epic bosses and escape 8-Bit land.
-Original storyline and concept written by series creator J. G. Quintel.
-Unique action adventure gameplay combines platforming ,arcade shooting and top down gaming.
-Regular Show reimagined! Awesome retro style 8-bit graphics
overview_zh:
常規節目：Mordecai & Rigby in 8-bit Land 是第一款基於熱門卡通網路電視節目的電玩遊戲。莫迪凱和裡格比被困在電子遊戲中，必須穿越 8-Bit 的畫素化土地才能找到出路。這場充滿狂歡的冒險充滿了平臺跳躍、太空射擊和老式自上而下的影片遊戲狂熱，並充滿了大量的常規表演角色和笑話。

- 扮演 Mordecai 和 Rigby，利用他們獨特的力量與史詩般的 Boss 作戰並逃離 8 位土地。
- 由系列創作者 J. G. Quintel 撰寫的原創故事情節和概念。
- 獨特的動作冒險遊戲結合了平臺跳躍、街機射擊和自上而下的遊戲。
- 常規秀重新設計！令人驚嘆的復古風格 8 位元圖形
no_intro_name: Regular Show - Mordecai and Rigby in 8-bit Land (USA)

overview_en:
Taking place in 2005, between the events of Resident Evil 4 and Resident Evil 5, the action centers on BSAA (Bioterrorism Security Assessment Alliance) member Jill Valentine and introduces her new partner, Parker Luciani. The story is set principally on board a supposedly abandoned cruise ship in the Mediterranean, where Jill and Parker have been sent to search for Chris Redfield, based on his last known GPS coordinates. Far from being empty, the ship hides danger around every corner as Jill and Parker explore the confined space of the ship and must face a menacing new horror that emerges from the darkness.
 
Adding a new unique horror setting to the series, Resident Evil: Revelations gives players the chance to venture underwater as they try to escape the terrifying creatures that are roaming the ship. But even the water does not provide safety as the creatures continue to attack from the depths while Jill and Parker make a desperate bid to make it off the ship alive.
overview_zh:
故事發生在 2005 年《生化危機 4》和《生化危機 5》之間，故事以 BSAA（生物恐怖主義安全評估聯盟）成員 Jill Valentine 為中心，並介紹了她的新搭檔 Parker Luciani。故事主要發生在地中海一艘據稱被遺棄的遊輪上，吉爾和帕克被派去根據克里斯·雷德菲爾德最後已知的 GPS 坐標尋找克里斯·雷德菲爾德。吉爾和帕克探索船上的密閉空間，必須面對從黑暗中出現的新的威脅。
 
《生化危機：啟示錄》為該系列增添了新的獨特恐怖場景，讓玩家有機會在水下冒險，試圖逃離船上漫遊的可怕生物。但即使是水也無法提供安全，因為這些生物繼續從深處發動攻擊，而吉爾和帕克則拼命想活著離開船。

overview_en: For the first time Resident Evil: The Mercenaries 3D delivers the intense Mercenaries gameplay experience on a handheld console. Featuring re-mastered stages from Resident Evil 4 and Resident Evil 5, it's a race against time as players try to defeat as many enemies as possible before the countdown reaches zero. The fast-paced, combat intensive action of Resident Evil: The Mercenaries 3D is available both as a solo experience or gamers across the world can team up and enjoy two-player co-op via network play.
overview_zh: 《生化危機：僱傭兵 3D》首次在手持遊戲機上提供了激烈的傭兵遊戲體驗。重製了《生化危機 4》和《生化危機 5》的關卡，這是一場與時間的賽跑，玩家要在倒數歸零之前擊敗盡可能多的敵人。 《生化危機：僱傭兵 3D》的快節奏、戰鬥密集型動作既可以作為單人體驗，也可以讓世界各地的玩家透過網路組隊並享受兩人合作遊戲的樂趣。

title_en: Return to PopoloCrois - A Story of Seasons Fairytale
overview_en:
The fairy tale world of PoPoLoCrois meets the farm living of Story of Seasons in this cross-over RPG. It features classically-styled turn-based combat and towns full of lively and interesting NPCs who contribute to a heartwarming narrative that veterans or newcomers to either franchise can enjoy. Ample farming and life simulation elements such as crop-raising, bug-catching, rock quarrying, item synthesis and more round out the experience.

It’s Prince Pietro’s 13th birthday, and all the people of PopoloCrois have come out to celebrate! But among them is a very special guest: Marmela, a representative from an otherworldly kingdom called Galariland. Her country has been ravaged by shadowy creatures who corrupt the soil, preventing crops from growing -- and since this same phenomenon has been occurring in PopoloCrois as well, King Paulo visits Galariland. But once he’s there, he finds there’s no way back home, and his princely name holds little sway over the long-suffering people of this new world. Forced to take up residence in an abandoned farmhouse on a long-forgotten plot of land, Pietro works to cultivate the desolate, darkness-stricken earth and bring life back to Galariland one field at a time. His ultimate goal is to resurrect the Goddess Galariel so he can drive back the darkness and return to PopoloCrois -- but the road ahead will be a long and difficult one filled with hardships, adventure, farming, robots, wolves, bugs, betrayal, romance, friends both new and old, and a whole lot of fairydust...
overview_zh:
在這款跨界角色扮演遊戲中，PoPoLoCrois 的童話世界與 Story of Seasons 的農場生活相遇。它以經典風格的回合製戰鬥和充滿活潑有趣的 NPC 的城鎮為特色，他們為任何一個系列的老手或新人都提供了一個溫馨的故事。種植農作物、抓蟲、採石、物品合成等豐富的農業和生活模擬元素讓體驗更加豐富。

今天是 Pietro 王子的 13 歲生日，PopoloCrois 的所有人都出來慶祝！但其中有一位非常特別的客人：馬爾梅拉，來自一個名為加拉利蘭的超凡脫俗王國的代表。她的國家遭到了陰暗生物的蹂躪，這些生物腐蝕了土壤，阻礙了農作物的生長——而且由於波波洛克魯瓦也發生了同樣的現象，保羅國王訪問了加拉利蘭。但一旦他到了那裡，他就發現沒有回家的路，而他的高貴名聲對這個新世界長期受苦受難的人們幾乎沒有影響力。皮特羅被迫在一片被遺忘已久的土地上的一座廢棄農舍裡定居，他努力耕種這片荒涼、黑暗的土地，一次一點地讓加拉利蘭恢復生機。他的最終目標是復活女神加拉利爾，這樣他就可以擊退黑暗，回到波波洛克魯瓦——但前方的道路將是一條漫長而艱難的道路，充滿艱辛、冒險、農業、機器人、狼、蟲子、背叛、浪漫、新老朋友，還有一大堆仙塵…
no_intro_name: Return to PopoloCrois - A Story of Seasons Fairytale (USA)

title_en: Rhythm Kaitou R - Koutei Napoleon no Isan
title_jp: Rhythm Kaitou R - Koutei Napoleon no Isan
no_intro_name: Rhythm Kaitou R - Koutei Napoleon no Isan (Japan)

overview_en: Test your rhythm by chopping wood, sticking speeding viruses with forks and playing badminton while flying an airplane, all in time to catchy tunes in this deceptively challenging rhythm game. The accessible controls and catchy music, combined with the new visual feedback system, make this a great entry in the Rhythm Paradise  series. Can you match the beat and reach Rhythm Paradise ?
overview_zh: 透過砍木頭、用叉子黏住超速病毒以及在駕駛飛機時打羽毛球來測試你的節奏，在這款極具挑戰性的節奏遊戲中，所有這些都與朗朗上口的曲調同步。易於操作的控制和朗朗上口的音樂，再加上新的視覺回饋系統，使其成為節奏天堂系列中的絕佳入門產品。你能跟上節奏並到達節奏天堂嗎？

overview_en: Rhythm Thief & the Emperor's Treasure sees players enter the secret life of Raphael, infamous among Parisians as an honorable thief for stealing famous works of art only to return them days later. Dive into Raphael's world and help him find the Wristlet of Tiamat to unmask the mystery behind his father's disappearance. While unravelling the truth players will encounter an assortment of different rhythm challenges to master. Tap the screen, swipe the stylus and control the gyro to the beat of the music to maneuver Raphael through the unique streets of Paris, brought to life by stylish animations and vibrant 3D maps and landscapes.
overview_zh: 在《節奏竊賊與皇帝寶藏》中，玩家將進入拉斐爾的秘密生活，拉斐爾在巴黎人中是一位臭名昭著的小偷，因為他偷走了著名的藝術品，但幾天后又將其歸還。潛入拉斐爾的世界，幫助他找到提亞瑪特的腕帶，揭開父親失蹤背後的謎團。在揭開真相的同時，玩家將會遇到各種需要掌握的不同節奏挑戰。點選螢幕、滑動手寫筆並隨著音樂的節拍控制陀螺儀，操縱拉斐爾穿過巴黎獨特的街道，時尚的動畫和充滿活力的 3D 地圖和風景使這些街道栩栩如生。

overview_en: The Ridge Racer series returns to set the racing world on fire with brand new features, breathtaking stereoscopic 3D visuals, a wider variety of machines, new environments, expanded customization and updated drift mechanics. Ridge Racer 3D will be the hottest racing game on the Nintendo 3DS. Drift through hairpin turns at blistering speeds to edge out the rest of the pack with powerful drift-tuned cars. Using the stereoscopic 3D power of the Nintendo 3DS, players will be able to experience a level of intimacy with the on-screen races like never before. Players can now accurately judge the distance between them and the competition with 3D depth of field for some of the most intense arcade racing available.
overview_zh: Ridge Racer 系列回歸，憑藉全新功能、令人驚嘆的立體 3D 視覺效果、更多種類的機器、新環境、擴充套件的定製和更新的漂移機制，讓賽車世界火熱起來。 Ridge Racer 3D 將成為任天堂 3DS 上最熱門的賽車遊戲。駕駛強大的漂移改裝賽車，以極快的速度漂移透過髮夾彎，從其他車手中脫穎而出。利用 Nintendo 3DS 的立體 3D 功能，玩家將能夠體驗前所未有的螢幕比賽的親密感。玩家現在可以透過 3D 景深準確判斷自己與對手之間的距離，參加一些最激烈的街機賽車比賽。

title_en: Riding Stables 3D - Rivals in the Saddle
no_intro_name: Riding Stables 3D - Rivals in the Saddle (Europe) (En,Fr,De,It,Nl,Sv,No,Da) (Rev 1)

title_en: Rilu Rilu Fairilu Kirakira Hajimete no Fairilu Magic
title_jp: Rilu Rilu Fairilu Kirakira Hajimete no Fairilu Magic
overview_en: Rilu Rilu Fairilu Kirakira * Hajimete no Fairilu Magic is a collection of minigames, developed and published by FuRyu, which was released in Japan in 2016.
overview_zh: Rilu Rilu Fairilu Kirakira * Hajimete no Fairilu Magic 是由 FuRyu 開發和發行的迷你遊戲合集，於 2016 年在日本發行。
no_intro_name: Rilu Rilu Fairilu Kirakira Hajimete no Fairilu Magic (Japan)

overview_en:
Rise of the Guardians is a 2012 action-adventure game based on the film of the same name. It is developed by Torus Games and published by D3 Publisher. The game was released on 20 November 2012 in North America and 23 November 2012 in Europe for PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, Wii, Nintendo DS, and Nintendo 3DS, and on 4 December 2012 in North America and 14 December 2012 in Europe for Wii U.

The player is able to play as Jack Frost with the help of Santa Claus, the Tooth Fairy, the Easter Bunny, and the Sandman as they battle the evil Pitch Black and his Nightmare minions in order to restore world belief in the Guardians.

The game features drop-in/drop-out cooperative play for up to four players, as well as a levelling system that allows the player to unlock greater attacks and special team moves.
overview_zh:
《守護者崛起》是一款 2012 年根據同名電影改編的動作冒險遊戲。它是由Torus Games開發並由D3 Publisher發行。該遊戲於 2012 年 11 月 20 日在北美發行，2012 年 11 月 23 日在歐洲發行 PlayStation 3、Xbox 360、Wii、Nintendo DS 和 Nintendo 3DS，並於 2012 年 12 月 4 日在北美髮行 U12012 年 12 月 14 日在歐洲發行，2012 年。

玩家可以扮演傑克·弗羅斯特，在聖誕老人、牙仙子、復活節兔子和沙人的幫助下，與邪惡的漆黑和他的夢魘爪牙作戰，以恢復世界對守護者的信心。

遊戲具有最多可容納四名玩家的加入/退出合作遊戲，以及允許玩家解鎖更大攻擊和特殊團隊動作的升級系統。

overview_en:
Big Trouble in River City!

Mystery is afoot once again for Kunio and his River City pals! One night, Kunio is attacked by two mysterious individuals. On top of that, Riki's girlfriend has disappeared, and it's up to Kunio to find out the truth! Kunio has just 3 days to unravel the mystery, and he'll need your help to take down all who stand in his way!

Different Story Paths and Different Endings!
Bonus Double Dragon Fighting Game Included!
2 Player Local Co-Op Play! Grab a friend and team up together!
overview_zh:
河城大麻煩！

國夫和他的河城夥伴們的謎團再次上演！一天晚上，國夫遭到兩個神秘人的攻擊。最重要的是，Riki 的女朋友失蹤了，國男必須找出真相！國夫只有 3 天的時間來解開這個謎團，他需要你的幫助來消滅所有阻擋他的人！

不同的故事路徑和不同的結局！
附贈雙龍格鬥遊戲！
2 人本地合作遊戲！找個朋友一起組隊吧！

overview_en:
Rumble in the Concrete Jungle!

Follow the story of a hot-blooded high school student named Kunio and his good friends. When a nefarious gang moves into Tokyo to try to take it over, it's up to this self-proclaimed "fighter for justice" and his buddies to make sure the streets stay safe! Punch, kick, use weapons such as soccer balls, iron knuckles, chains, and even bicycles to knock some sense into those devious gang members.

-Take on jobs to earn extra cash, special moves, and more!
-Take a break from the main story to fight in a 4-man Rumble or Dodgeball match!
-Take on your friends using Local Play and Download Play!
-Unlock new characters, stages, and songs as you progress through the game!
overview_zh:
在混凝土叢林中隆隆作響！

講述熱血高中生國夫和他的好朋友們的故事。當一個邪惡團夥進入東京並試圖佔領東京時，這個自稱「正義鬥士」的人和他的夥伴們有責任確保街道安全！拳打腳踢，使用足球、指關節、鐵鍊、甚至腳踏車等武器，讓這些狡猾的幫派成員恢復理智。

- 從事工作賺取額外現金、特殊動作等等！
- 從主要故事中休息一下，參加一場 4 人大戰或躲避球比賽！
- 使用本地遊戲和下載遊戲與您的朋友較量！
- 隨著遊戲的進展，解鎖新的角色、階段和歌曲！

overview_en: The brainchild of Yuji Naka and Zin Hasegawa, Rodeo the Sky Soldier brings speed and adventure together in this new journey through the sky. 1,000 years ago, Emperor Gerardo of the Naga Empire sent an army of machine soldiers to invade the sky kingdom of Garuda. Thanks to the efforts of Princess Cecilia and Rodeo, a machine soldier who promised to protect Garuda, Emperor Gerardo's assault was thwarted. In present day, a spirited inventor named Ion discovers an abandoned robot that has fallen into disrepair in the heart of a scorching desert. Upon completing her repairs, the robot stirs to life and reveals itself to be none other than Rodeo. Stunned to find himself in the future, Rodeo learns that the Naga Empire is no more and that Garuda has known peace for 1,000 years. But this peace was not meant to last, for the forces of Naga have returned to wage war against Garuda. Remembering the promise he made 1,000 years ago, Rodeo takes to the skies to defend Garuda from the Naga Empire once again.
overview_zh: 《Rodeo the Sky Soldier》是中雄二和長谷川真的創意，在這場全新的天空之旅中將速度與冒險融為一體。 1000年前，娜迦帝國的格拉爾多皇帝派出一支機械兵軍隊入侵空中王國迦樓羅。在塞西莉亞公主和承諾保護嘉魯達的機械兵羅迪歐的努力下，赫拉爾多皇帝的進攻被挫敗。如今，一位名叫艾恩的充滿活力的發明家在炎熱的沙漠中心發現了一個年久失修的廢棄機器人。完成修理後，機器人甦醒過來，並發現自己正是 Rodeo。羅迪奧驚訝地發現自己身處未來，並得知娜迦帝國已不復存在，而金翅鳥已經享受了 1000 年的和平。但這種和平並不會持續下去，因為那迦的軍隊已經捲土重來，對迦樓羅發動戰爭。羅迪歐銘記 1000 年前的承諾，再次飛向天空，保衛迦樓羅免受娜迦帝國的侵害。

overview_en:
The next installment of the hit RollerCoaster Tycoon franchise is here and this time, its in 3D!

Meet the Rocket Coaster Company, an energetic and small group of coaster fanatics. Run by your father, a world-renowned roller coaster genius, the RCC is poised to change the world with its incredible designs and style. Unfortunately your father is a bit of a scatterbrain and is far too busy dreaming up new rides and roller coasters to get the company off the ground.

This is where you, the player comes in as your father has decided that spending your time helping him out is more important than your summer vacation! Aided by a friend of the family and an old retired theme park industry veteran, the player is tasked to take the reins to get a foothold in the theme park world. Take on jobs, help design coasters, and even manage your own theme parks as you push the RCC to the top!
overview_zh:
熱門《過山車大亨》系列的下一期現已推出，而且這次是 3D 版本！

來認識火箭過山車公司，這是一個充滿活力的小團體過山車狂熱者。 RCC 由您的父親（世界著名的過山車天才）經營，準備以其令人難以置信的設計和風格改變世界。不幸的是，你的父親有點漫不經心，忙於構思新的遊樂設施和過山車，無暇讓公司起步。

這就是你，玩家登場的地方，因為你的父親決定花時間幫助他比你的暑假更重要！在一位家庭朋友和一位退休主題樂園行業資深人士的幫助下，玩家的任務是掌控主題樂園世界，並在主題樂園世界中站穩腳跟。承擔工作、幫助設計過山車，甚至管理自己的主題公園，將 RCC 推向頂峰！

overview_en: Rune Factory 4 marks the return of the popular Harvest Moon spinoff that combines farming with dungeon adventuring. For the first time in the series, the player can select to play as a male or female hero, and potential suitors of either gender are also available in order to pursue love, marriage, and possibly a child. As the newly-appointed prince or princess, you can fulfill your royal duties of protecting the town from invaders, or take a more rural approach to governing by raising your own fruits and vegetables and helping townsfolk. Should some dungeon adventuring be on the days itinerary, you can select from the castles vast armament of swords, spears, and staffs along with magic for battle against dangerous foes, or even bring along a companion or friendly monster to aid you during your travels.
overview_zh: 《符文工廠 4》標誌著廣受歡迎的《牧場物語》衍生遊戲的回歸，該遊戲將農業與地下城冒險結合在一起。在該系列中，玩家第一次可以選擇扮演男性或女性英雄，也可以選擇任何性別的潛在追求者來追求愛情、婚姻，甚至可能是孩子。作為新任命的王子或公主，你可以履行保護城鎮免受入侵者的皇家職責，或者透過種植自己的水果和蔬菜並幫助城鎮居民，採取更鄉村的方式進行治理。如果當天的行程中有一些地下城冒險，您可以從城堡中選擇大量的武器，包括劍、矛和法杖以及魔法來對抗危險的敵人，甚至可以帶上一個同伴或友好的怪物來幫助您在旅途中。

title_en: Ryoume de Unou o Kitaeru - 3D Sokudoku Jutsu
title_jp: Ryoume de Unou o Kitaeru - 3D Sokudoku Jutsu
no_intro_name: Ryoume de Unou o Kitaeru - 3D Sokudoku Jutsu (Japan)

overview_en:
With over a half million units in combined sales worldwide, SEGA's digital series, 3D Classics, brings gamers back to the glory days of the beloved SEGA hardware systems. Popular titles from the Master System, Genesis, Mega Drive, and Giga Drive arrive on the Nintendo 3DS - remastered with full stereoscopic 3D. The best part? FOUR of the NINE classics are available on 3DS for the first time! Making its first appearance on retail shelves, this compilation package takes the series' fantastic offerings and packs it with additional exclusive content for unbeatable value!

Nine Games in One Fantastic Compilation...

Experience anew the game that started it all: Sonic The Hedgehog!
Rise from your grave with Altered Beast! Supports multiplayer of Local Wireless!
Fly through enemy bases and across solar landscapes in the space simulator marvel, Galaxy Force II!
Deepen your appreciation for SEGA's arcade prowess with the helicopter simulator, Thunder Blade.
What do you get when you take a classic Sega Master System shoot 'em up and port it back to arcade? 3D Fantasy Zone II W!
Reach the finish line with the visually stunning arcade racing game Power Drift!
Test your competitive puzzle skills with the game that set off an arcade puzzle craze, Puyo Puyo 2!
Plus 2 more...
overview_zh:
SEGA 的數位系列 3D Classics 在全球累積銷售超過 50 萬臺，讓玩家重回心愛的 SEGA 硬體系統的輝煌歲月。 Master System、Genesis、Mega Drive 和 Giga Drive 的熱門遊戲登陸 Nintendo 3DS - 採用全立體 3D 重新製作。最好的部分？九款經典遊戲中的四款首次在 3DS 上推出！合輯包首次出現在零售貨架上，它採用了該系列的精彩產品，並包含額外的獨家內容，具有無與倫比的價值！

九個遊戲合而為一，精彩合輯...

重新體驗這一切的開始遊戲：刺蝟索尼克！
與獸王一起從墳墓中復活！支援本地無線多人遊戲！
在太空模擬器奇蹟《銀河力量 II》中飛越敵人基地並穿越太陽景觀！
透過直升機模擬器 Thunder Blade 加深您對 SEGA 街機實力的欣賞。
當您將經典的 Sega Master System 射擊遊戲移植回街機時，您會得到什麼？ 3D 幻想地帶 II W！
透過視覺震撼的街機賽車遊戲 Power Drift 到達終點線！
在掀起街機解謎熱潮的《Puyo Puyo 2》遊戲中測試您的競技解謎技巧！
再加上2個...

overview_en: Sega 3D Fukkoku Archives is a Miscellaneous game, developed by M2 and published by Sega, which was released in Japan in 2014.
overview_zh: 《世嘉3D復國檔案》是一款由M2開發、世嘉發行的雜項遊戲，於2014年在日本發行。

overview_en: Sega 3D Fukkoku Archives 3: Final Stage (セガ3D復刻アーカイブス3 FINAL STAGE, Sega 3D Fukkoku Ākaibusu 3 FINAL STAGE) is a sequel to both Sega 3D Fukkoku Archives and Sega 3D Classics Collection that has been released for the Nintendo 3DS on December 22, 2016 in Japan alongside a retail box set containing all three compilations.
overview_zh: Sega 3D Fukkoku Archives 3: Final Stage（セガ3D復刻アーカイブsu3 FINAL STAGE、Sega 3D Fukkoku Ākaibusu 3 FINAL STAGE Classic）是Sega 3D Fuoku Archive Archivesega 33Dk Collection的續集，已於2016年12月22日在日本面向任天堂3DS發行，並附有零售盒裝包含所有三個彙編。

title_en: Saiki Kusuo no Sainan - Shijou Saidai no Sainan
title_jp: Saiki Kusuo no Sainan - Shijou Saidai no Sainan
no_intro_name: Saiki Kusuo no Sainan - Shijou Saidai no Sainan (Japan)

overview_en: The legend of the samurai comes to life like never before with immersive battles featuring 3D graphics! Samurai Warriors Chronicles takes the fan favorite series into uncharted territory with 3D graphics and new gameplay improvements that will bring this franchise to the next level. In the game, players will be able to change control between four different warriors on the fly, easily switching between characters by touching the Nintendo 3DS touch panel. Teamwork is a key focal point of the game, as the secret to success lies in positioning your team on the battlefield wisely. There are also friendship levels between the various characters that will ultimately guide where the story goes and how battles play out, so helping others has its rewards. Samurai Warriors Chronicles is set to help usher in the Nintendo 3DS by providing tactical action like you've never seen! Through deep combat, multiple branching storylines and a living 3D battlefield, the legend of the samurai lives on.
overview_zh: 透過 3D 圖形的身臨其境的戰鬥，武士的傳奇以前所未有的方式栩栩如生！ 《Samurai Warriors Chronicles》透過 3D 圖形和新的遊戲改進將深受粉絲喜愛的系列帶入未知領域，將這個系列提升到一個新的水平。在遊戲中，玩家將能夠在飛行中改變四個不同戰士的控制，透過觸控任天堂 3DS 觸控面板輕鬆切換角色。團隊合作是遊戲的關鍵焦點，因為成功的秘訣在於明智地在戰場上定位你的團隊。各個角色之間也存在著友誼級別，這最終將指導故事的發展和戰鬥的進行，因此幫助他人是有回報的。 《Samurai Warriors Chronicles》將透過提供您從未見過的戰術動作來幫助迎接 Nintendo 3DS！透過深入的戰鬥、多個分支故事情節和生動的 3D 戰場，武士的傳奇永垂不朽。

title_en: Scooby-Doo! _ Looney Tunes Cartoon Universe - Adventure
overview_en: Join the mystery with Scooby and friends and leap into the zany worlds of Looney Tunes in Scooby Doo & Looney Tunes Cartoon Universe: Adventure. Solve the mystery of Kraken Cove with Scooby, Shaggy and the rest of the Mystery Machine Gang or help Bugs and Daffy discover who is behind the dastardly defective MOCME products that are creating chaos. Solve puzzles and fight enemies as you unlock the mysteries in this exciting cartoon world come to life. Find gifts, safes and treasure chests and use the loot you collect to customize your character and empower them with special ability upgrades.
overview_zh: 在《史酷比與樂一通卡通宇宙：冒險》中，與史酷比與朋友們一起揭開謎團，躍入樂一通的滑稽世界。與 Scooby、Shaggy 和神秘機器團夥的其他成員一起解開 Kraken Cove 的謎團，或者幫助 Bugs 和 Daffy 找出誰是製造混亂的卑鄙缺陷 MOCME 產品的幕後黑手。在這個激動人心的卡通世界中，解開謎題並與敵人戰鬥，解開謎團。尋找禮物、保險箱和寶箱，並使用你收集的戰利品來客製化你的角色，並賦予他們特殊能力升級。
no_intro_name: Scooby-Doo! _ Looney Tunes Cartoon Universe - Adventure (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt)

overview_en: Created and developed by 5TH Cell, Scribblenauts Unlimited features a huge side-scrolling open world with new, high-definition hand-drawn scenery and objects where players can help the game's hero, Maxwell, solve robust puzzles and challenges by summoning any object they can imagine. Players can leverage the Nintendo 3DS Street Pass functionality to see all of the creative puzzle solutions by other players in the area. And for the first time, learn the backstory about Maxwell's parents, his twin sister Lily, and how he got his magical notepad.
overview_zh: 《Scribblenauts Unlimited》由 5TH Cell 建立和開發，擁有一個巨大的橫向捲軸開放世界，其中包含全新的高畫質手繪風景和物體，玩家可以透過召喚他們能想像到的任​​何物體來幫助遊戲的英雄麥克斯韋解決強大的謎題和挑戰。玩家可以利用 Nintendo 3DS Street Pass 功能檢視該地區其他玩家的所有創意謎題解決方案。第一次瞭解麥克斯韋父母、他的雙胞胎妹妹莉莉的背景故事，以及他如何獲得神奇記事本。

title_en: Scribblenauts Unmasked - A DC Comics Adventure
overview_en:
Challenge your imagination as you battle the mightiest villains in an exciting and action-filled adventure through GOTHAM CITY, METROPOLIS, ATLANTIS and other iconic locales from the DC Comics universe. Enjoy endless replayability with new, dynamic puzzles that feature a different mission every time you play.

Bring out your inner super hero (or villain!) with the all-new Super Hero Creator by crafting completely original objects out of parts of existing DC Comics characters. Then assign unique properties to your creations and use them to solve puzzles, or share them online with friends - which they can use in game or further modify as they like.
overview_zh:
挑戰你的想像力，在哥譚市、大都會、亞特蘭蒂斯和 DC 漫畫宇宙中的其他標誌性地點進行激動人心且充滿動作的冒險，與最強大的惡棍戰鬥。透過新的動態謎題享受無盡的可重玩性，每次玩時都有不同的任務。

使用全新的超級英雄創作器，利用現有 DC 漫畫角色的各個部分製作完全原創的物體，展現您內心的超級英雄（或惡棍！）。然後為您的創作分配獨特的屬性，並使用它們來解決謎題，或與朋友線上分享 - 他們可以在遊戲中使用或根據自己的喜好進一步修改。
no_intro_name: Scribblenauts Unmasked - A DC Comics Adventure (USA) (En,Fr,Es,Pt)

overview_en:
Probably the most challenging adventure to date for Nintendo 3DS and Nintendo 2DS.
Mia is direct, gruff and has a big mouth. She's a good shooter, but she's also klutzy and can be pretty sensitive at times. And she always has a solution. Just not right now.
The Secret Service just fired her. She has no money, no papers and no idea how she got into this situation.
But she'll be damned if she doesn't find out what this crap is all about - to put it in her words.
Stranded in Miami, she now goes to see her mother, whom she hasn't seen in years. And her mother has no inkling of Mia's real job…
You will meet a wide variety of people over the course of this gripping tale. Some will be on your side, others not so much. Proceed with caution and be sure to look and listen closely. It's the only way Mia can survive and maybe even find out who or what is behind it all.
overview_zh:
對於 Nintendo 3DS 和 Nintendo 2DS 來說，這可能是迄今為止最具挑戰性的冒險遊戲。
米婭個性直率、粗魯，而且嘴巴很大。她是一名出色的射手，但她也很笨拙，有時相當敏感。而且她總有辦法解決。只是現在還不行。
特勤局剛解僱了她。她沒有錢，沒有證件，也不知道自己是如何陷入這種境地的。
但如果她不明白這些廢話到底是怎麼回事——用她的話來說，那她就該死了。
被困在邁阿密的她現在去探望多年未見的母親。而她的母親對米婭的真正工作一無所知…
在這個扣人心絃的故事中，你會遇到各種各樣的人。有些人會站在你這邊，有些人則不會。謹慎行事，一定要仔細觀察和傾聽。這是米婭生存的唯一途徑，甚至可能找出幕後黑手。

overview_en: Seisou no Amazones is a Role-Playing game, developed and published by Arc System Works, which was released in Japan in 2013.
overview_zh: Seisou no Amazones是一款角色扮演遊戲，由Arc System Works開發和發行，於2013年在日本發行。

title_en: Sekaiju no Meikyuu IV - Denshou no Kyoshin
title_jp: Sekaiju no Meikyuu IV - Denshou no Kyoshin
no_intro_name: Sekaiju no Meikyuu IV - Denshou no Kyoshin (Japan)

title_en: Sekaiju no Meikyuu V - Nagaki Shinwa no Hate
title_jp: Sekaiju no Meikyuu V - Nagaki Shinwa no Hate
no_intro_name: Sekaiju no Meikyuu V - Nagaki Shinwa no Hate (Japan) (Rev 1)

overview_en:
Picking up directly where its predecessor Senran Kagura Burst left off, Senran Kagura 2: Deep Crimson follows the Hanzo & Hebijo Shinobi Academies as they battle for good and evil respectively. This time however there is a greater evil at work, as the tyrannous tycoon behind the Hebijo Academy is hell-bent on raining terror across all of Japan by utilising a destructive army of summoned demons! This great danger thrusts the girls together and forces them to unite and work as one in a way the series has never seen before.

Expect fast-paced beat ‘em up gameplay with insane combo chains, plenty of playable characters, hilarious cutscenes and an abundance of tantalising action! In addition to the epic narrative, Deep Crimson takes the Senran Kagura Nintendo 3DS franchise to whole new levels in terms of gameplay and extra features.
overview_zh:
《閃亂神樂 2：深紅》直接接續前作《閃亂神樂爆紅》的故事，講述了半藏忍者學院和蛇尾忍者學院分別為善與惡而戰的故事。然而，這次有更大的邪惡在起作用，因為 Hebijo 學園背後的暴虐大亨一心要利用一支毀滅性的召喚惡魔大軍，在整個日本製造恐怖雨！這種巨大的危險將女孩們聚集在一起，迫使她們以該系列從未見過的方式團結起來並共同努力。

期待快節奏的清版遊戲，包括瘋狂的連擊鏈、大量的可玩角色、搞笑的過場動畫和大量誘人的動作！除了史詩般的敘事之外，《深紅》將任天堂 3DS 的《閃亂神樂》系列在遊戲玩法和額外功能方面提升到了全新的水平。

overview_en:
A little violent, a little sexy, and a ton of fun!

Enter a world filled with beautiful ninja destined to break down the barriers between good and evil.

Play two different storylines, each with its own perspective. The girls of Hanzō believe they fight on the side of righteousness, but are their methods always right? The girls of Hebijo are mercenaries to the highest bidders, but what if their motives aren't as clear as they seem?

-Crush your enemies with your favorite buxom ninja girl using fast punches, mid-air flight sequences, combos, super attacks, revealing cut-scenes and sexy Ninja Arts.
-Dozens of costumes expose endless combinations!
-Choose from 72 different costume sets such as school uniforms, swimsuits and ninja gear, along with hairstyles that can be changed, mixed and matched to provide an endless array of looks
overview_zh:
有點暴力，有點性感，還有很多樂趣！

進入一個充滿美麗忍者的世界，註定要打破善惡之間的障礙。

玩兩個不同的故事情節，每個故事情節都有自己的視角。半藏的女孩們相信她們站在正義一邊戰鬥，但她們的方法總是正確的嗎？赫比霍的女孩們是出價最高者的傭兵，但如果她們的動機並不像看起來那麼明顯呢？

- 與你最喜歡的豐滿忍者女孩一起使用快速拳擊、空中飛行序列、連擊、超級攻擊、揭示的過場動畫和性感的忍者藝術粉碎你的敵人。
-數十種服裝暴露無盡組合！
- 從 72 種不同的服裝套裝中進行選擇，例如校服、泳衣和忍者裝備，以及可以更換、混合和搭配的髮型，以提供無盡的外觀

title_en: Senran Kagura Burst - Guren no Shoujo-tachi
title_jp: Senran Kagura Burst - Guren no Shoujo-tachi
no_intro_name: Senran Kagura Burst - Guren no Shoujo-tachi (Japan)

title_en: Sentouchu - Densetsu no Shinobi to Survival Battle!
title_jp: Sentouchu - Densetsu no Shinobi to Survival Battle!
no_intro_name: Sentouchu - Densetsu no Shinobi to Survival Battle! (Japan)

overview_en:
- Finally, the authentic game of Mahjong on Nintendo 3DS!
- 5 game modes, from traditional to brand new.
- A timed mode so you can break all the records.
overview_zh:
- 終於，任天堂 3DS 上正宗的麻將遊戲了！
- 5 種遊戲模式，從傳統到全新。
- 計時模式，讓你可以打破所有記錄。

overview_en: Embark on a brand new adventure with Shantae, the hair-whipping belly dancing genie! When Shantae loses her genie magic, she must team up with her nemesis, the nefarious pirate Risky Boots in order to save Sequin Land from evil. As a pirate, Shantae gains new weapons and tools to advance her quest, slay monsters, battle epic bosses …and hopefully get her magic back in the bargain! But can she really trust her most deadly enemy?
overview_zh: 與甩頭髮的肚皮舞精靈桑塔一起踏上全新的冒險之旅！當桑塔失去精靈魔法時，她必須與她的宿敵、邪惡的海盜風險靴子聯手，以拯救亮片之地免受邪惡的侵害。作為一名海盜，桑塔獲得了新的武器和工具來推進她的任務、殺死怪物、與史詩般的頭目戰鬥……並希望重新獲得她的魔法！但她真的能相信她最致命的敵人嗎？

title_en: Sherlock Holmes - The Mystery of the Frozen City
overview_en: When a mysterious snowstorm falls on London, so cold that even the Thames is starting to freeze, Sherlock Holmes, the most astute detective of all time, is called in to investigate. Explore amazing environments, meet and interrogate many colorful characters, and examine objects and clues in order to discover the evidence that will help solve this incredible case. Many original puzzles and brain-teasers will put your skills to the test during your investigation, while you unveil the truth behind the Mystery of the Frozen City!
overview_zh: 當一場神秘的暴風雪降臨倫敦時，寒冷得連泰晤士河都開始結冰了，有史以來最精明的偵探夏洛克·福爾摩斯奉命前去調查。探索令人驚奇的環境，會見並審問許多豐富多彩的人物，並檢查物體和線索，以發現有助於解決這個令人難以置信的案件的證據。許多原創謎題和腦筋急轉彎將在您的調查過程中考驗您的技能，同時揭開冰凍之城之謎背後的真相！
no_intro_name: Sherlock Holmes - The Mystery of the Frozen City (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)

overview_en: Based on the Portal-inspired Flash game called Shift, Shifting World on 3DS features the same basic premise but with added features and expanded content. Shifting World has players guiding a man who has been forcibly transported into another dimension. To help find his way back home, you must run, jump, and "shift" the environment -- transforming black into white and vice versa -- so you can find a path to escape.
overview_zh: 3DS 版《Shifting World》以 Portal 風格為基礎的 Flash 遊戲《Shift》，具有相同的基本前提，但增加了功能和擴充內容。 《轉變世界》讓玩家引導一個被強行傳送到另一個次元的人。為了幫助他找到回家的路，你必須奔跑、跳躍和「改變」環境——將黑色變成白色，反之亦然——這樣你才能找到一條逃跑的路。

title_en: Shifting World - Shiro to Kuro no Meikyuu
title_jp: Shifting World - Shiro to Kuro no Meikyuu
no_intro_name: Shifting World - Shiro to Kuro no Meikyuu (Japan)

title_en: Shin Hikari Shinwa - Palutena no Kagami
title_jp: Shin Hikari Shinwa - Palutena no Kagami
overview_en: Shin Hikari Shinwa: Palutena no Kagami (Kid Icarus Uprising in the West) is a third-person shooter video game developed by Project Sora and published by Nintendo for the Nintendo 3DS. Released worldwide in March 2012, it is the third installment in the Kid Icarus franchise, the first to be released since Kid Icarus: Of Myths and Monsters in 1991, and the first worldwide release since the original NES game in 1986. It is also the only video game Project Sora made before shutting down in mid-2012.
overview_zh: Shin Hikari Shinwa: Palutena no Kagami (Kid Icarus Uprising in the West) 是由 Project Sora 開發並由任天堂為 Nintendo 3DS 發行的第三人稱射擊遊戲。它於 2012 年 3 月在全球發行，是《伊卡洛斯小子》系列的第三部作品，是自 1991 年《伊卡洛斯小子：神話與怪物》以來發行的第一部作品，也是自 1986 年最初的 NES 遊戲以來在全球發行的第一部作品。它也是《索拉計劃》在 2012 年中關閉之前製作的唯一一款影片遊戲。
no_intro_name: Shin Hikari Shinwa - Palutena no Kagami (Japan)

title_en: Shin Megami Tensei - Deep Strange Journey
title_jp: Shin Megami Tensei - Deep Strange Journey
no_intro_name: Shin Megami Tensei - Deep Strange Journey (Japan)

title_en: Shin Megami Tensei - Devil Summoner - Soul Hackers
overview_en: Soul Hackers delivers a first-person, dungeon-crawling RPG experience set in a future where technology and otherworldly forces meet in a macabre fusion of cyberpunk futurism and gothic horror. A first-person sci-fi RPG epic, Soul Hackers tells of a city held up as a beacon of humanity's triumph of technology, but with an infernal secret. In this would-be utopia, a group of hackers takes on a centuries-old mystic society, and a battle for control over humanity's fate is about to begin.
overview_zh: 《Soul Hackers》提供了第一人稱、地下城探索的角色扮演遊戲體驗，背景設定在未來，科技與超凡脫俗的力量相遇，賽博龐克未來主義與哥德式恐怖的可怕融合。 《靈魂駭客》是一款第一人稱科幻角色扮演遊戲史詩，講述了一座被視為人類科技勝利燈塔的城市，但卻隱藏著一個地獄般的秘密。在這個未來的烏託邦中，一群駭客挑戰了一個有著數百年歷史的神秘社會，一場爭奪人類命運控制權的戰鬥即將開始。
no_intro_name: Shin Megami Tensei - Devil Summoner - Soul Hackers (USA)

title_en: Shin Megami Tensei - Devil Survivor 2 - Record Breaker
overview_en: Your days are numbered. This is a chilling reminder that the apocalypse is upon us. Exclusive to the Nintendo 3DS handheld system, Shin Megami Tensei: Devil Survivor 2 Record Breaker offers more than 100 hours of gameplay and plot -- nearly double the content of the original Devil Survivor 2. It also includes fully voiced English story dialogue, giving new depth to the cast of Devil Survivor 2's original story. Record Breaker requires no knowledge of the story from the original Devil Survivor, so newcomers to the series won't lack any crucial plot information.
overview_zh: 你的日子屈指可數了。這是一個令人不寒而慄的提醒：世界末日即將來臨。 《真女神轉生：惡魔倖存者 2 破紀錄者》是 Nintendo 3DS 掌上系統獨有的遊戲，提供超過 100 小時的遊戲時間和劇情，幾乎是原版《惡魔倖存者 2》內容的兩倍。它還包括全語音英語故事對話，為《惡魔倖存者 2》的原始故事演員陣容提供了新的深度。 《破紀錄者》不需要了解原版《惡魔倖存者》的故事，因此該系列的新手不會缺少任何關鍵的情節資訊。
no_intro_name: Shin Megami Tensei - Devil Survivor 2 - Record Breaker (USA)

title_en: Shin Megami Tensei - Devil Survivor Overclocked
overview_en: Expanded and enhanced, Devil Survivor Overclocked for Nintendo 3DS builds upon the game's original release with the addition of voice acting for the entirety of the game's lengthy, unconventional narrative. Moreover, that very story, already boasting multiple endings based on critical decisions by the player, now concludes with a special eighth chapter, a rousing epilogue for Shin Megami Tensei fans. The game's beautifully remastered hand drawn artwork and character portraits benefit from the new system's higher resolution screens, offering players a crisper, higher fidelity experience.
overview_zh: 任天堂 3DS 版《惡魔倖存者超頻》經過擴充套件和增強，以遊戲的原始版本為基礎，並為整個遊戲冗長、非傳統的敘述新增了配音。此外，這個故事已經擁有基於玩家關鍵決定的多個結局，現在以特殊的第八章結束，這是真女神轉生粉絲們激動人心的尾聲。遊戲精美重製的手繪藝術作品和人物肖像受益於新系統更高解析度的螢幕，為玩家提供更清晰、更高保真度的體驗。
no_intro_name: Shin Megami Tensei - Devil Survivor Overclocked (USA)

title_en: Shin Megami Tensei - Strange Journey Redux
overview_en:
A spatial distortion full of demons appeared in Antarctica, threatening to engulf the Earth in Shin Megami Tensei: Strange Journey. The United Nations responded by tasking a team of highly advanced specialists with piercing the anomaly and figuring out how to stop it from the source. Well, get ready to don your Demonica once again in this new expanded port: Shin Megami Tensei: Strange Journey Redux. Expect new story content, additional endings, a new dungeon to explore, and more in the return of this sci-fi tinged SMT adventure.

In Strange Journey Redux, you play as a brave United Nations soldier investigating a spatial anomaly called the Schwarzwelt—a dome of dark energy that threatens to consume the world. Inside, you'll find it home to a nightmare mirror of our own Earth, populated with demons dying to meet you. The game touts brand-new illustrations by Masayuki Doi, updated visuals, UI tweaks, and more to make this journey back into the Schwarzwelt… even stranger.

You won't be retreading the same nightmarish path as before because a brand-new character named Alex will play a major role in how the story unfolds. Much about her is a mystery, but there is one thing you know for sure: she's got a bone to pick with you. Joining her are new demons you might recognize from other SMT entries, new endings, and a new dungeon to discover.

With its twisted demonic sci-fi story, addictive demon-collecting fun, and multiple narrative paths to explore, Strange Journey Redux is an essential ATLUS JRPG adventure that can't be missed!
overview_zh:
在《真女神轉生：奇異之旅》中，南極洲出現了充滿惡魔的空間扭曲，威脅著吞噬地球。聯合國的回應是指派一支由高度先進的專家組成的團隊來探究異常情況並找出從源頭阻止其發生的方法。好吧，準備好在這個新的擴充套件埠中再次穿上你的惡魔：真女神轉生：奇怪的旅程終極版。在這場帶有科幻色彩的 SMT 冒險中，期待新的故事內容、額外的結局、新的地牢探索以及更多內容。

在《Strange Journey Redux》中，你扮演一名勇敢的聯合國士兵，調查一個名為「黑世界」的空間異常現象——一個威脅要吞噬世界的黑暗能量圓頂。在裡面，你會發現它是我們地球的惡夢鏡子的所在地，裡面充滿了渴望與你見面的惡魔。遊戲採用了 Masayuki Doi 的全新插畫、更新的視覺效果、UI 調整等，讓這次重返黑世界的旅程變得更加陌生。

你不會像以前一樣重蹈惡夢的覆轍，因為一個名叫亞歷克斯的全新角色將在故事的展開中扮演重要角色。關於她的很多事情都是個謎，但有一件事你可以肯定：她對你有意見。加入她的還有你可能從其他 SMT 條目中認識的新惡魔、新結局和新地牢等你發現。

憑藉其扭曲的惡魔科幻故事、令人上癮的惡魔收集樂趣以及多種可供探索的敘事路徑，《奇異之旅 Redux》是一款不容錯過的 ATLUS JRPG 冒險遊戲！
no_intro_name: Shin Megami Tensei - Strange Journey Redux (USA)

overview_en: Building on the styles of ATLUS' Persona, Devil Summoner, and Devil Survivor titles, SMTIV is the first true successor to 2004's Shin Megami Tensei: Nocturne. The story of SMTIV revolves around the Samurai, the sacred protectors of the Eastern Kingdom of Mikado. As a newly appointed Samurai, players will struggle with factions that have nefarious designs on the world as they defend their home kingdom from a growing army of demons. Decisions players make throughout the course of the story will have lasting repercussions, as the fate of the world hangs in the balance.
overview_zh: SMTIV 以 ATLUS 的《女神異聞錄》、《惡魔召喚師》和《惡魔倖存者》遊戲的風格為基礎，是 2004 年《真女神轉生：夜曲》的第一個真正的繼承者。 SMTIV 的故事圍繞著東方天皇王國的神聖保護者武士。作為一名新任命的武士，玩家將與對世界懷有邪惡圖謀的派系進行鬥爭，同時保衛自己的祖國免受日益壯大的惡魔大軍的侵害。玩家在整個故事過程中所做的決定將產生持久的影響，因為世界的命運懸而未決。

overview_en: Shin Megami Tensei IV: Apocalypse is a post-apocalyptic role-playing video game developed and published by Atlus for the Nintendo 3DS. It is set in the same universe as Shin Megami Tensei IV and forms part of the Shin Megami Tensei series, the central series of the Megami Tensei franchise.
overview_zh: Shin Megami Tensei IV: Apocalypse is a post-apocalyptic role-playing IV 設定在同一宇宙，是真女神轉生系列的一部分，也是真女神轉生系列的核心繫列。

title_en: Shingeki no Kyojin - Jinrui Saigo no Tsubasa CHAIN
title_jp: Shingeki no Kyojin - Jinrui Saigo no Tsubasa CHAIN
overview_en: The game has been greatly upgraded with new elements such as the long-awaited Internet cooperative play! Overview: The most significant feature is support for Internet play via Wi-Fi connection! The most important feature of the new version is the support of Internet-based cooperative play via Wi-Fi connection! New stages, missions, modes, characters, Titans, equipment, costumes, and more have been added! : Not only has the game volume been greatly increased, but the 3D maneuvering action and difficulty of existing missions have also been finely tuned. More than 20 additional character voices have been added! In addition to the additional voices of characters from the previous title, more than 20 characters' voices that were not included in the previous title have been newly recorded. Purchasers of the previous title will be able to purchase an update kit from the Nintendo eShop to enjoy "Shingakunin no Kyojin - The Last Wings of Mankind - CHAIN" while transferring their saved data. This product is compatible with the Nintendo 3DS Expansion Slide Pad. [Players: 1 to 4] (CERO age rating: to be determined)
overview_zh: 遊戲大幅升級，加入了期待已久的網路合作玩法等新元素！概述： 最重要的功能是支援透過 Wi-Fi 連線進行網路遊戲！新版本最大的特色就是支援透過Wi-Fi連線進行連網合作遊戲！新增了新的階段、任務、模式、角色、泰坦、裝備、服裝等等！ ：不僅遊戲體積大幅提升，現有任務的3D機動動作和難度也進行了微調。新增了 20 多個角色聲音！除了前作中角色的額外聲音之外，還新錄製了前作中未包含的 20 多個角色的聲音。前作的購買者將能夠從 Nintendo eShop 購買更新套件，在傳輸儲存的資料的同時享受“Shingakunin no Kyojin - The Last Wings of Mankind - CHAIN”。本產品與 Nintendo 3DS Expansion Slide Pad 相容。 [玩家：1至4]（CERO年齡等級：待定）
no_intro_name: Shingeki no Kyojin - Jinrui Saigo no Tsubasa CHAIN (Japan)

title_jp: Shingeki no Kyojin - Shichi-Kara no Dasshutsu
overview_en: Shingeki no Kyojin: Shichi-Kara no Dasshutsu is an Adventure game, developed by Ruby Party and published by Koei Tecmo Games, which was released in Japan in 2017.
overview_zh: 《新擊之狂：七空大決戰》是一款冒險遊戲，由 Ruby Party 開發，Koei Tecmo Games 發行，於 2017 年在日本發行。
no_intro_name: Shingeki no Kyojin - Shichi-Kara no Dasshutsu (Japan)

overview_en:
Only you can save them.

As Joe Musashi, Red leader of the Oboro School of Shinobi, your destiny awaits. An evil force emanating from Neo City has captured your fellow students. Attack with your powerful katana as you battle for their freedom. Each ninja you rescue adds their formidable weaponry, training and Ninjutsu magic to yours.

Destroy the enemies with bombs, shurikens, a crescent blade and more. Use the magic of the ninja to wreak havoc with the force of a tornado or the blinding glow of lightning. When all else fails, turn your body into a living bomb and explode with concussive damage. Do not stop until the City of Fear is annihilated! Are you ready for the challenge of Ninja warfare?

Special abilities include running on water, swinging from a crescent blade and walking on ceilings
Ninjutsu magic includes tornadoes, earthquakes and energy fields
overview_zh:
只有你才能拯救他們。

扮演喬·武藏 (Joe Musashi)，奧博羅忍者學校的紅色領袖，你的命運在等待著。一股來自新城的邪惡勢力俘虜了你的同學。當你為他們的自由而戰時，用你強大的武士刀進行攻擊。你救出的每個忍者都會為你增添強大的武器、訓練和忍術魔法。

用炸彈、手裡劍、新月刀等消滅敵人。使用忍者的魔法，用龍捲風的力量或眩目的閃電造成嚴重破壞。當一切都失敗時，將你的身體變成活炸彈並爆炸並造成震盪傷害。在恐懼之城被消滅之前不要停止！你準備好迎接忍者戰爭的挑戰了嗎？

特殊能力包括在水上奔跑、在新月形刀片上擺動以及在天花板上行走
忍術魔法包括龍捲風、地震和能量場

overview_en:
Shovel Knight is a 2014 action platformer video game developed and published by independent developer Yacht Club Games for the Nintendo 3DS, Wii U, and personal computer platforms. The game was released worldwide on June 26, 2014. Shovel Knight was directed by former WayForward Technologies member Sean Velasco, and includes music composed by Jake Kaufman and Manami Matsumae.

Prior to the game, adventurers Shovel Knight and Shield Knight fought alongside one another, journeying across the world and seeking treasure. However, when the two explore the Tower of Fate, the two fall to the dark magic power of a cursed amulet. When Shovel Knight reawakens, the Tower has been sealed and Shield Knight is nowhere to be seen. Grieving for his beloved, Shovel Knight gives up adventuring and secludes himself. However, during his absence, the Enchantress rises to power, spreading evil across the land. Upon hearing that the Enchantress has unsealed the Tower of Fate, Shovel Knight takes up his shovel again and ventures towards it, hoping to find and rescue Shield Knight. In order to do so, Shovel Knight must fight the eight members of "The Order of No Quarter," who have been dispatched by the Enchantress to impede him.
overview_zh:
《鏟子騎士》是一款 2014 年動作平臺電玩遊戲，由獨立開發商 Yacht Club Games 為 Nintendo 3DS、Wii U 和個人電腦平臺開發和發行。該遊戲於 2014 年 6 月 26 日在全球發布。 《鏟子騎士》由前 WayForward Technologies 成員 Sean Velasco 執導，音樂由 Jake Kaufman 和 Manami Matsumae 創作。

遊戲開始前，冒險家鏟子騎士和盾騎士並肩作戰，穿越世界尋找寶藏。然而，當兩人探索命運之塔時，兩人卻陷入了被詛咒的護身符的黑暗魔力之下。當鏟子騎士甦醒時，塔已被封印，盾騎士也不見蹤影。鏟子騎士因思念所愛之人而放棄冒險，與世隔絕。然而，在他缺席期間，女巫掌權，在這片土地上散播邪惡。聽說魔女解開了命運之塔的封印，鏟子騎士再次拿起鏟子，冒險前往，希望能找到並營救盾騎士。為此，鏟子騎士必須與女巫派來阻礙他的八名「無敵騎士團」成員戰鬥。
