overview_en: Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure is the first video game in the Skylanders series. It is an action 3D platformer video game that is played along with toy figures that interact with it through a "Portal of Power", that reads their tag through NFC and features the voices of Josh Keaton, Darin De Paul, Dave Wittenberg, Keythe Farley, Audrey Wasilewski, Joey Camen and Kevin Michael Richardson. It was released in October 2011 for North America, Europe, and Australia for Microsoft Windows and OS X, Nintendo 3DS, PlayStation 3, Wii, and Xbox 360.
overview_zh: 《Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure》是《Skylanders》系列的第一款電玩遊戲。這是一款動作 3D 平臺視訊遊戲，玩家可以透過「權力之門」與玩具人物互動，透過 NFC 讀取標籤，並由喬什·基頓、達林·德·保羅、戴夫·維滕伯格、凱斯·法利、奧黛麗·瓦西勒夫斯基、喬伊·卡門和凱文·邁克爾·理查森配音。它於 2011 年 10 月在北美、歐洲和澳洲發布，適用於 Microsoft Windows 和 OS X、Nintendo 3DS、PlayStation 3、Wii 和 Xbox 360。

overview_en: Skylanders: Giants is a 2012 video game in the Skylanders series, a direct sequel to the 2011 game Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure and features the voices of Kevin Michael Richardson, Greg Ellis, Peter Lurie, Steve Blum, Dave Wittenberg, Carlos Alazraqui, Kevin Sorbo, Bobcat Goldthwait, Patrick Seitz and Julie Nathanson. It is the game before Skylanders: Swap Force. As the title suggests, it features larger Skylanders known as "Giants", along with other new gameplay mechanics.
overview_zh: 《Skylanders: Giants》是 2012 年推出的 Skylanders 系列電玩遊戲，是 2011 年遊戲《Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure》的直接續集，由 Kevin Michael Richardson、Greg Ellis、Peter Lurie、Steve Blum、Dave Wittenberg、Carlos Arazraqui、Kevin Sorbo、Greg Ellis、Peter Lurie、Steve Blum、Dave Wittenberg、Carlos Arazraqui、Kevin Sorbo、Greg Ellis、Peter Lurie、Steve Blum、Dave Wittenberg、Carlos Arazraqui、Kevin Sorbo、Bobcatthwait Patrick Seson Patrick Seson Patrick Seson 配音。這是《Skylanders: Swap Force》之前的遊戲。如標題所示，它具有被稱為“巨人”的更大的 Skylanders，以及其他新的遊戲機制。

overview_en: READY. SET. RACE! Skylanders, start your engines! The infamous race promoter Pandergast has challenged the best racers in Skylands to come forward and test their driving skills in a head-to-head, no-holds-barred driving competition! Race across Land, Sea, and Sky for the ultimate prize - a mysterious token of immense power! Kick start your Skylanders adventure into overdrive with Skylanders SuperChargers Racing. SUPER CHARGED COMBO BRING THE SKYLANDERS TO LIFE! 3 TYPES OF VEHICLES AVAILABLE 40+ SKYLANDERS AND VEHICLES TO COLLECT
overview_zh: 準備好。放。種族！ Skylanders，啟動你的引擎！臭名昭著的賽事發起人 Pandergast 向 Skylands 中最優秀的賽車手發出挑戰，要求他們挺身而出，在一場面對面、無拘無束的駕駛比賽中測試他們的駕駛技巧！跨越陸地、海洋和天空，爭奪終極獎品——蘊含巨大力量的神秘代幣！透過 Skylanders SuperChargers Racing 開始您的 Skylanders 冒險之旅。超級充電組合讓 Skylanders 栩栩如生！ 3 種型別的車輛可供收集 40 多種 Skylanders 和車輛

overview_en:
Mix and match tops and bottoms. Create 250+ SWAP Force Skylanders.

Embark on an exciting new adventure with the Skylanders and the SWAP Force. For generations, the SWAP Force protected the volcano that replenishes Skylands’ magic. That is until an epic battle caught them in an eruption that blasted them apart, sent them to Earth and gave them the ability swap powers. Only you can mix and match their tops and bottoms, put them on the new Portal of Power and help save Skylands.

Starter Pack includes: 1-Video Game, 1-Portal of Power, 3-Skylanders Figures, 1-Character Collector Poster, 3-Sticker Sheets with Secret Codes and 3-Trading Cards.
overview_zh:
混合搭配上衣和下裝。建立 250 多個 SWAP Force Skylanders。

與 Skylanders 和 SWAP Force 一起踏上激動人心的新冒險之旅。世世代代以來，SWAP Force 一直保護著這座火山，為 Skylands 的魔力提供補充。直到一場史詩般的戰鬥讓他們陷入了火山爆發，將他們炸得四分五裂，將他們送到了地球，並賦予了他們能力交換的能力。只有你可以混合搭配他們的上衣和下裝，將它們放在新的力量之門上，並幫助拯救 Skylands。

入門包包括：1 個電玩遊戲、1 個力量之門、3 個 Skylanders 人物、1 個角色收藏海報、3 張帶有密碼的貼紙和 3 張集換式卡牌。

overview_en:
Kaos has blown up the walls of the feared Cloudcracker Prison freeing the most notorious villains in Skylands. it's up to you and the Skylanders to find and capture them. using Traptanium, a magic material that can harness the power of the Elements, you have the amazing ability to trap the villains and return them to Skylands to fight for you! Begin the ultimate adventure as you explore Skylands in search of the escaped villains!


Starter Pack includes: 1-Video Game, 1-Traptanium Portal, 2-Skylanders Figures, 2-Traps, 1-Character Collector Poster, 2-Sticker Sheets with Secret Codes and 2-Trading Cards.


Build the ultimate Trap Team - Over 60 Skylanders to collect and 40+ villains to capture. Sticker Sheets with Secret Codes – Enjoy stickers of your favorite Skylanders. Place the names and codes on the Character Collect Poster to track your collection. The secret codes can be used in the Skylanders Lost Islands and Skylanders Collection Vault Apps. Trading Cards – Learn more about each Skylander’s powers and abilities.
overview_zh:
卡奧斯炸毀了令人恐懼的破雲監獄的圍牆，釋放了天空之境中最臭名昭著的惡棍。你和 Skylanders 需要找到並捕捉他們。使用特拉普坦金屬（Traptanium）這種可以利用元素力量的魔法材料，你有驚人的能力來捕捉惡棍並將他們帶迴天空之地為你而戰！探索天空之地，尋找逃脫的惡棍，開始終極冒險！


入門包包括：1 個電玩遊戲、1 個 Traptanium Portal、2 個 Skylanders 人物、2 個陷阱、1 張角色收藏海報、2 張帶有密碼的貼紙和 2 張交易卡。


組成終極陷阱團隊 - 收集 60 多個 Skylanders，捕獲 40 多個惡棍。帶有密碼的貼紙 - 享受您最喜歡的 Skylanders 的貼紙。將名稱和程式碼放在角色收集海報上以追蹤您的收藏。這些密碼可在 Skylanders Lost Island 和 Skylanders Collection Vault 應用程式中使用。集換式卡牌 – 瞭解更多關於每個 Skylander 的力量和能力的資訊。

title_en: Slime Mori Mori Dragon Quest 3 - Daikaizoku to Shippo Dan
title_jp: Slime Mori Mori Dragon Quest 3 - Daikaizoku to Shippo Dan
overview_en:
In the game, the player controls a slime named Slalin. Unlike the first two games of the series, which were 2D games featuring tank battles, Slime Mori Mori Dragon Quest 3 features naval battles in a 3D environment. Also unlike the first two games, the goal is not to rescue one hundred kidnapped slimes, but to take back the "Rainbow Orbs", the treasure of the Slime Kingdom.

The battle mechanics are similar to the previous game in the series, Dragon Quest Heroes: Rocket Slime, with the player journeying through specific game locations, fighting enemies by either flinging the slime at enemies or by fighting naval battles by loading ammunition into the ship's guns. The game features multiplayer mode with up to four participants and uses Nintendo's Street Pass system. An online shop called Netshop, also used in Dragon Quest IX, allows players to upgrade ship parts and buy rare items with in-game currency.
overview_zh:
在遊戲中，玩家控制一隻名為斯拉林的史萊姆。與該系列的前兩款遊戲以坦克戰為特色的 2D 遊戲不同，《Slime Mori Mori Dragon Quest 3》以 3D 環境中的海戰為特色。與前兩作不同的是，遊戲的目標不是解救一百個被綁架的史萊姆，而是奪回史萊姆王國的寶藏「彩虹球」。

戰鬥機制與系列的前作《勇者鬥惡龍英雄：火箭史萊姆》類似，玩家穿越特定的遊戲地點，透過向敵人投擲史萊姆來與敵人戰鬥，或者透過將彈藥裝入艦炮來進行海戰。遊戲採用多人遊戲模式，最多可容納四名參與者，並使用任天堂的 Street Pass 系統。勇者鬥惡龍 IX 中也使用了名為 Netshop 的線上商店，允許玩家升級船舶零件並使用遊戲內貨幣購買稀有物品。
no_intro_name: Slime Mori Mori Dragon Quest 3 - Daikaizoku to Shippo Dan (Japan)

title_en: Slime Morimori Dragon Quest 3 - Daikaizoku to Shippo Dan
title_jp: Slime Morimori Dragon Quest 3 - Daikaizoku to Shippo Dan
no_intro_name: Slime Morimori Dragon Quest 3 - Daikaizoku to Shippo Dan (Japan)

title_en: Smile Precure! Lets Go! Marchen World
title_jp: Smile Precure! Lets Go! Marchen World
no_intro_name: Smile Precure! Lets Go! Marchen World (Japan)

overview_en: SmileBASIC is a 3DS application which lets you program in BASIC on your 3DS! It gives you the tools to create games using sprites, backgrounds, music, and sound effects. You can also upload your creations to the SmileBASIC servers so that other people can download your programs! SmileBASIC was created by SmileBoom; check out their website for more information: smilebasic.com
overview_zh: SmileBASIC 是一款 3DS 應用程式，可讓您在 3DS 上使用 BASIC 進行程式設計！它為您提供了使用精靈、背景、音樂和聲音效果來建立遊戲的工具。您還可以將您的創作上傳到 SmileBASIC 伺服器，以便其他人可以下載您的程式！ SmileBASIC 由 SmileBoom 建立；請檢視他們的網站以獲取更多資訊：smilebasic.com
genre_raw: Action / Adventure / Role-Playing / Puzzle / Racing / Shooter / Fighting / Platform

overview_en: Dr. Eggman has harnessed the power of six menacing creatures known as the Deadly Six, but when the Deadly Six rise up against their master, Sonic has to unite with his arch nemesis in order to take on the new enemies head-to-head. Using his dynamic new parkour moves and improved Colour Powers, Sonic must run, jump and race through a variety of ever changing terrains in order to defeat the Deadly Six.
overview_zh: 艾格曼博士利用了被稱為「致命六人」的六種威脅生物的力量，但當「致命六人」奮起反抗他們的主人時，索尼克必須與他的宿敵聯合起來，才能與新敵人正面交鋒。索尼克必須利用他充滿活力的新跑酷動作和改進的色彩力量，在各種不斷變化的地形中奔跑、跳躍和競賽，才能擊敗致命六人組。

overview_en: The iconic 'blue blur', Sonic the Hedgehog, will be racing once again in Sonic Boom: Fire & Ice as the game introduces more adventure, speed, exploration, and an all-new fire and ice gameplay element that will help propel the action. The game will also feature the triumphant return of Sonic, Tails, Knuckles, Amy and Sticks. Developed by Sanzaru Games Inc., Sonic Boom: Fire & Ice is a single-player game with collaborative gameplay components that shares key characters, events and lore of the Sonic Boom universe. Players will see Sonic and his friends in familiar settings as they embark on a brand new adventure to battle Dr. Eggman as well as an all-new super villain, D-Fekt. The team's adventures will bring them to locations both familiar and new as they explore, race and protect their world. To create an entirely new experience, Sonic Boom: Fire & Ice will infuse fire and ice elements throughout gameplay, enabling new abilities to play out in special character moves and interactions with environments. The new title also delivers gameplay that enables players to run through the game at top speed, or take their time with deeper exploration and puzzle play. New to the title is the introduction of Bot Racing, a supplemental game tied to the single-player story that features multiplayer gameplay. The new Bot Racing feature is an extension of Sonic Boom: Fire & Ice that is purely about racing and speed, where a user will unlock character-themed Bots to challenge friends on fast courses or tracks.
overview_zh: 標誌性的「藍色模糊」刺蝟索尼克將在《音爆：火與冰》中再次飆車，遊戲引入了更多冒險、速度、探索以及有助於推動動作的全新火與冰遊戲元素。遊戲中索尼克、塔爾斯、納克魯斯、艾米和史蒂克斯也將凱旋歸來。 Sonic Boom: Fire & Ice 由 Sanzaru Games Inc. 開發，是一款單人遊戲，具有協作遊戲元件，共享 Sonic Boom 宇宙的關鍵角色、活動和傳說。玩家將在熟悉的場景中看到索尼克和他的朋友們，踏上全新的冒險之旅，與艾格曼博士以及全新的超級反派 D-Fekt 戰鬥。當他們探索、競賽和保護他們的世界時，團隊的冒險將帶他們到熟悉和陌生的地方。為了創造一種全新的體驗，《音爆：火與冰》將在整個遊戲過程中註入火和冰元素，使新的能力能夠在特殊的角色動作和與環境的互動中發揮作用。新遊戲還提供了遊戲玩法，使玩家能夠以最快的速度執行遊戲，或花時間進行更深入的探索和解謎遊戲。遊戲的新功能是引入 Bot Racing，這是一款與單人故事相關的補充遊戲，具有多人遊戲玩法。新的機器人賽車功能是《音爆：火與冰》的延伸，純粹是關於賽車和速度，使用者將解鎖以角色為主題的機器人，在快速賽道或賽道上挑戰朋友。

overview_en: In Sonic Boom: Shattered Crystal, Amy discovers a secret ancient language and manuscript detailing the history and whereabouts of a Lost Crystal of Power. The evil and vile villain, Lyric the Last Ancient, kidnaps Amy in his eagerness to get his claws on this long-forgotten power that has been hidden throughout the jungles and canyons of a mysterious new island. Sonic must team up with Tails, Knuckles and new friend Sticks the Badger to trace Amy’s footsteps and save her from the clutches of Lyric and his robot army. By trusting in their own abilities and working as a team, they will prove they are stronger together than they are apart.
overview_zh: 在《音爆：破碎水晶》中，艾米發現了一種秘密的古代語言和手稿，詳細介紹了失落能量水晶的歷史和下落。邪惡卑鄙的惡棍，最後的遠古者利瑞克，綁架了艾米，因為他渴望獲得這種被遺忘已久的力量，這種力量隱藏在一個神秘新島嶼的叢林和峽谷中。索尼克必須與塔爾斯、納克魯斯和新朋友獾棒一起追蹤艾米的足跡，並將她從萊瑞克和他的機器人軍隊的手中救出來。透過相信自己的能力並作為一個團隊工作，他們將證明他們在一起比單獨相處更強大。

overview_en: Set across three defining eras from 20 years of Sonic the Hedgehog video game history, the instantly recognisable environments of Sonic Generations have been re-built in stunning HD and are now playable in both classic side scrolling 2D from 1991, as well as modern 3D style found in Sonic's most recent adventures. Each incarnation of Sonic in Sonic Generations comes complete with his trademark special move, Spin Dash and Spin Attack for Classic Sonic, and Homing Attack and Sonic Boost for Modern Sonic. An innovative new interactive menu system allows for complete immersion in Sonic's universe with favourite characters and hidden treasures gradually being revealed throughout the game.
overview_zh: 《刺蝟索尼克》影片遊戲歷史跨越了 20 年的三個決定性時代，《索尼克世代》中可立即識別的環境已以令人驚嘆的高畫質版本重新構建，現在可以以 1991 年的經典橫向捲軸 2D 模式以及索尼克最新冒險中的現代 3D 風格進行遊戲。索尼克在《索尼克世代》中的每一個化身都配有他標誌性的特殊動作，經典索尼克的旋轉衝刺和旋轉攻擊，現代索尼克的歸巢攻擊和音速增強。創新的互動式選單系統讓您完全沉浸在索尼克的宇宙中，最喜歡的角色和隱藏的寶藏在整個遊戲中逐漸顯現出來。

overview_en: Sonic and the All-Stars cast line up on the starting grid once again to battle for supremacy in the ultimate race. Compete across land, water and air in incredible transforming vehicles that change from cars to boats to planes mid-race. Master your driving skills as you drift, barrel role and boost to overtake your rivals, or use your weapons tactically and unleash your All-Star move to gain the winning advantage. It's not just your fellow racers you need to watch out for, as the road falls away beneath you, or the river runs dry, new routes emerge and your vehicle transforms to take advantage of the terrain. Discover alternative routes and short cuts as you perfect the course in this adrenaline fuelled dash to the finish line - racing will never be the same again. This is not just racing, it's racing transformed!
overview_zh: 索尼克和全明星陣容再次在起跑線上排隊，爭奪終極競賽的霸主地位。駕駛令人難以置信的變形車輛在陸地、水上和空中競爭，這些車輛在比賽過程中會從汽車變成船隻，然後變成飛機。在漂移、加速和加速時掌握你的駕駛技巧，以超越你的對手，或有策略地使用你的武器，釋放你的全明星動作以獲得致勝優勢。您需要提防的不僅僅是您的賽車同伴，當您腳下的道路塌陷或河流乾涸時，新的路線就會出現，您的車輛也會發生變化以利用地形。在這場充滿腎上腺素的衝刺中完善賽道，探索替代路線和捷徑——賽車將不再一樣。這不僅是賽車，這是賽車的轉變！

overview_en: Spider-Man: Edge of Time challenges the player to take on the roles of both classic Amazing Spider-Man and Spider-Man 2099 to correct a timestream gone awry and prevent a catastrophic future brought on by the early and untimely death of Peter Parker.
overview_zh: 《蜘蛛人：時間邊緣》挑戰玩家扮演經典《超凡蜘蛛人》和《蜘蛛人 2099》的角色，以糾正偏差的時間流，並防止因彼得帕克過早去世而帶來的災難性未來。

overview_en:
Em Spirit Camera The Cursed Memoir você encara a pele de Maya, uma garotinha misteriosa que está se escondendo nas sombras de uma casa antiga. O jogador precisa se libertar de uma terrível maldição, escapando das garras de uma mulher maligna. Viva uma aventura de Terror cheia de momentos assustadores e diabólicos.

O Nintendo 3DS se torna uma Câmera Obscura e é capaz de revelar os espíritos sobrenaturais e dissipar o mal, as linhas entre realidade e ficção se tornam tênues nesta aventura de terror arrepiante. Use do Diário das faces para estar seguindo durante o jogo e vivendo toda a experiência garantida pelo mesmo.
overview_zh:
Em Spirit Camera The Cursed Memoir 講述了瑪雅人的故事，是一部神秘的作品，講述了安提加之家的黑暗。 O jogador precisa se libertar de uma terrível maldição, ecapando das garras de uma mulher maligna.恐怖冒險萬歲，支持者和惡魔的時刻。

任天堂 3DS 以暗箱為主角，以揭示真實的精神和消散的能力，以真實的方式呈現恐怖冒險的故事。使用 Diário das faces para estar seguindo durante o gogo e vivendo toda a experience garantida pelo mesmo.

overview_en: SpongeBob HeroPants is an action game with a focus on platforming, exploration, light puzzles and combat. Each of its six playable characters–SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward, Sandy, Mr. Krabs and Plankton–can morph into a unique superpowered champion to solve challenges, unlock new areas and defeat SpongeBob's crazy imagination. The full adventure features boss battles, upgradeable skills and a treasure trove of hidden items to unearth.
overview_zh: 《海綿寶寶英雄褲》是一款動作遊戲，專注於平臺跳躍、探索、輕度謎題和戰鬥。六個可玩角色——海綿寶寶、派大星、章魚哥、桑迪、蟹老闆和浮游生物——都可以變身為獨特的超能力冠軍來解決挑戰、解鎖新領域並擊敗海綿寶寶的瘋狂想像力。完整的冒險包括頭目戰鬥、可升級的技能和隱藏物品的寶庫。

overview_en: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Robotic Revenge is an action-adventure video game based on the hit television series, SpongeBob SquarePants. It was released in October 2013 for Wii U, Wii, Nintendo 3DS, Nintendo DS, PlayStation 3, and Xbox 360. The game was developed by Behaviour Interactive and published by Activision, who took over the license from previous SpongeBob SquarePants video game publisher THQ after the company's bankruptcy and liquidation. This is also the first SpongeBob SquarePants game to be released for the PlayStation 3 and Wii U thus far, as well as the first SpongeBob SquarePants game to be rated E10+ by the ESRB.
overview_zh: 《海綿寶寶：浮游生物的機器人復仇》是一款基於熱門電視劇《海綿寶寶》的動作冒險電玩遊戲。該遊戲於 2013 年 10 月發布，適用於 Wii U、Wii、任天堂 3DS、任天堂 DS、PlayStation 3 和 Xbox 360。該遊戲由 Behaviour Interactive 開發，動視公司發行，動視公司在公司破產清算後從前海綿寶寶電玩發行商 THQ 手中接過了許可。這也是迄今為止第一款在 PlayStation 3 和 Wii U 上發布的海綿寶寶遊戲，也是第一款被 ESRB 評為 E10+ 的海綿寶寶遊戲。

overview_en: In SpongeBob's most crazy, creative adventure yet, be prepared to laugh your SquigglePants off as you tilt, flick, tap and draw through more than 100 Nanogames set in six zany worlds. SpongeBob SquigglePants puts you in the driver's seat for a dizzying series of lightening-speed Nanogames, giving you mere seconds to finish one before moving right on to the next. Within this rapid-fire succession of challenges, SpongeBob SquigglePants exposes players to never-before-seen SpongeBob art styles from the Nickelodeon vault. SpongeBob SquigglePants also lets players digitally draw, paint, color and choose from dozens of SpongeBob-themed stamps to create a masterpiece worthy of a place in Patchy's own collection of SpongeBob art. The entire game is hosted by SpongeBob's biggest fan, Patchy the Pirate, in a never-before-seen live action experience for an added level of under-the-sea silliness.
overview_zh: 在《海綿寶寶》迄今為止最瘋狂、最具創意的冒險中，傾斜、輕拂、點選和繪畫，在六個滑稽世界中的 100 多個奈米遊戲中，準備好讓你的 SquigglePants 笑掉。 《海綿寶寶 SquigglePants》讓您坐在駕駛座上，體驗一系列令人眼花繚亂的閃電般速度的奈米遊戲，讓您只需幾秒鐘即可完成一個遊戲，然後直接進入下一個遊戲。在這一系列快速的挑戰中，《海綿寶寶 SquigglePants》讓玩家接觸到尼克頻道金庫中前所未見的海綿寶寶藝術風格。 《SpongeBob SquigglePants》還允許玩家以數位方式繪畫、繪畫、著色，並從數十個海綿寶寶主題郵票中進行選擇，以創作出值得在 Patchy 自己的海綿寶寶藝術收藏中佔有一席之地的傑作。整個遊戲由海綿寶寶的忠實粉絲海盜帕奇主持，帶來前所未有的真人體驗，進一步提升了海底愚蠢的水平。

overview_en: Sports Island 3D marks the debut of HUDSON SOFT's fun series for Nintendo 3DS, and allows up to four players to participate in events designed to show off the 3D capabilities of the new format. The ten sports on offer are Soccer, Tennis, Basketball, Ice Hockey, Snowball Fighting, Sumo Wrestling, Bowling, Snowmobile Racing, Sport Blowgun and Trampoline. Each demands different skills from the user, and has been designed to make stunning use of the additional depth of field the format offers.
overview_zh: Sports Island 3D 標誌著 HUDSON SOFT 的任天堂 3DS 趣味系列的首次亮相，最多允許四名玩家參加旨在展示新格式的 3D 功能的活動。提供的十項運動包括足球、網球、籃球、冰球、打雪仗、相撲、保齡球、雪地摩托車賽車、運動吹槍和彈跳床。每種格式都需要使用者俱備不同的技能，而其設計目的是充分利用該格式提供的額外景深。

overview_en: 150 magnificent photos of landscapes, decorations, animals, still life, and more. Stay focused to find all of the hidden differences. A relaxing classic for the mind that the whole family can enjoy – anywhere! This description was provided by the publisher.
overview_zh: 150 張精美的風景、裝飾、動物、靜物等照片。集中精力尋找所有隱藏的差異。適合全家人在任何地方都可以享受的放鬆經典！此描述由出版商提供。

overview_en: On the eve of the franchise's 30th anniversary since the original Spy Hunter was released to arcades in 1983, the new Spy Hunter races forward on its most thrilling and dangerous ride yet. The player once again takes on the role of the "Agent," the driver of the high-tech G-6155 Interceptor supercar, armed extensively with advanced weaponry, and ready to take on a global terrorist organization set on world domination.
overview_zh: 自從原版《間諜獵人》於 1983 年在街機上發布以來，在該系列 30 週年紀念日前夕，新的《間諜獵人》將踏上迄今為止最驚險、最危險的旅程。玩家再次扮演「特工」的角色，駕駛高科技 G-6155 Interceptor 超級跑車，配備大量先進武器，準備對抗旨在統治世界的全球恐怖組織。

overview_en:
The Star Fox team triumphantly returns to one of its greatest missions with this remake of Star Fox 64 in full 3D, featuring a complete graphical update.

The entire Star Fox universe spreads out realistically into the depths of the Nintendo 3DS screen while the 3D visuals give the player a clearer grasp of distance and position. This makes the game more approachable and intuitive, thereby allowing players to focus on the action.
overview_zh:
《星際火狐》團隊以全 3D 方式重製《星際火狐 64》，並進行了完整的圖形更新，成功回歸其最偉大的任務之一。

整個《星際火狐》宇宙真實地展開到任天堂 3DS 螢幕的深處，而 3D 視覺效果讓玩家更清楚地掌握距離和位置。 This makes the game more approachable and intuitive, thereby allowing players to focus on the action.

overview_en:
SteamWorld Dig is a 2D platform game that revolves around mining for resources and ores. The objective of the game is to investigate the mines underneath the old Western town Tumbleton in order to unearth the secrets lurking below. The player controls Rusty, a steam-powered robot who is equipped with a pickaxe, but can gain access to a variety of tools, such as a drill and dynamite. The player can upgrade the tools used for digging as progression is made in the game. Besides health, the player also needs coal for light, and water for special abilities.

SteamWorld Dig has platform elements in that the player runs, jumps and encounter foes, but the main objective is mining. That means that the player builds – or rather deconstructs – the game world and creates platforms that way. The player collects ores and resources which can be brought back to the surface and exchanged for cash. When the player progress in the game new abilities are unlocked. Each playthrough, the mines are randomized, making items and treasure appear in different locations. If the player gets stuck there is a self-destruct function, but the players can also buy ladders in the store at the surface to get out of tricky situations.

When progressing deeper down in the cave, the player encounters various enemies with different attack patterns and weak spots. The game features multiple subterranean worlds, each with a completely different environment. Dying results in a reparation penalty fee, and the player respawns back on the surface. All the loot that has been accumulated when the player dies can be picked up again.
overview_zh:
SteamWorld Dig 是一款 2D 平臺遊戲，圍繞著資源和礦石的開採。遊戲的目標是調查古老的西部城鎮坦布林頓地下的礦井，以揭示潛伏在下面的秘密。玩家控制 Rusty，一個蒸汽驅動的機器人，配備鎬，但可以使用各種工具，例如鑽頭和炸藥。隨著遊戲的進展，玩家可以升級用於挖掘的工具。除了生命值之外，玩家還需要煤炭來照明，以及水來獲得特殊能力。

SteamWorld Dig 有平臺元素，玩家可以奔跑、跳躍和遭遇敵人，但主要目標是採礦。這意味著玩家建立（或更確切地說是解構）遊戲世界並以這種方式建立平臺。玩家收集礦石和資源，可以帶回地面並兌換現金。當玩家在遊戲中取得進展時，新的能力就會解鎖。每次遊戲時，地雷都是隨機的，使物品和寶藏出現在不同的位置。如果玩家陷入困境，有自毀功能，但玩家也可以在地表商店購買梯子來擺脫困境。

當玩家在洞穴深處前進時，玩家會遇到各種具有不同攻擊模式和弱點的敵人。遊戲有多個地下世界，每個世界都有完全不同的環境。死亡會導致賠償金，玩家會重生到地面。玩家死亡時累積的所有戰利品都可以再次拾取。

overview_en: Steel Diver, a submarine game that involves strategy and combat. The 3D visuals give players the sensation that they are looking into a miniature aquarium as they control the subs speed, depth and pitch, and fire torpedoes.
overview_zh: 《鋼鐵潛水員》是一款涉及策略和戰鬥的潛水艇遊戲。 3D 視覺效果讓玩家感覺自己正在觀察一個微型水族館，同時控制潛水艇的速度、深度和俯仰以及發射魚雷。

overview_en:
Song Magic: Famous Japanese voice actors sing more than 20 songs in the game. Plus, the soundtrack is composed by Yasunori Mitsuda (Chrono Trigger, Xenogears). The songs are part of Song Magic - a vital combat and story element.
    
Players will get an allotment of Free Time where they can upgrade or buy items, tune Witches' hearts, explore, and grind experience, but that's in limited supply as Combat Time will drive along the game's story.
    
Stella Glow will have 40-60 hours of story and side quest content, with multiple endings, New Game+ mode, and more than 50 maps to battle on, the world of Stella Glow is rich and vibrant with tons to do!
    
From the team behind the classic Luminous Arc games comes a brand new IP with the same renowned strategic combat.
overview_zh:
歌曲魔法：日本著名聲優在遊戲中演唱20多首歌曲。此外，配樂由光田康典（《時空之輪》、《異度齒輪》）創作。這些歌曲是 Song Magic 的一部分 - 一個重要的戰鬥和故事元素。
    
玩家將獲得一定的空閒時間，他們可以在其中升級或購買物品、調整女巫的心、探索和磨練經驗，但由於戰鬥時間將推動遊戲的故事發展，所以這些空閒時間的供應有限。
    
Stella Glow 將擁有 40-60 小時的故事和支線任務內容，具有多個結局、新遊戲+模式以及 50 多張可供戰鬥的地圖，Stella Glow 的世界豐富而充滿活力，有很多事情要做！
    
經典 Luminous Arc 遊戲背後的團隊帶來了一個全新的 IP，具有同樣著名的戰略戰鬥。

overview_en: Story of Seasons is the start of a new chapter in the ‘Bokujo Monogatari’ series, a long-standing farming/life simulation franchise. Though the series is reborn with a new name, it continues the traditions of customizable farms, animal care, marriage and child-rearing. After creating a customized character, players can live out a new life by cultivating their favorite fruits and vegetables while expanding and filling their farm with their choice of animals.
overview_zh: 《季節的故事》是「Bokujo Monogatari」系列新篇章的開始，該系列是一個歷史悠久的農業/生活模擬系列。雖然該系列以新名稱重生，但它延續了定製農場、動物護理、婚姻和育兒的傳統。建立自訂角色後，玩家可以種植自己喜歡的水果和蔬菜，同時用自己選擇的動物擴大和填充農場，從而過上新的生活。

title_en: Story of Seasons - Trio of Towns
overview_en:
Take on the role of a young city slicker who has always wished for a life on the farm. Your dream leads you to a huge plot of open land just ready to be filled with crops, livestock, decorations, and more.

Your new farm is at the crossroads of three different towns. Westown, with its cows and corrals, has everything the classic frontier settler needs. Right next door is Lulukoko Town, a warm, friendly paradise to rival any tropical island. Rounding out the neighborhood is Tsuyukusa, a traditional Far Eastern village. Become friends with the residents and help them improve their towns, then connect to other farmers like you, locally or via internet, to chat and trade useful items.

Grow crops, raise adorable pets, become a renowned chef or fashionista, and even discover romance with the locals. It's all up to you in STORY OF SEASONS: Trio of Towns
overview_zh:
扮演一位年輕的城市人，一直渴望在農場生活。你的夢想會帶你來到一大片開闊的土地，準備種植農作物、牲畜、裝飾品等等。

您的新農場位於三個不同城鎮的十字路口。西鎮擁有乳牛和畜欄，擁有經典邊境定居者所需的一切。隔壁就是盧盧科科鎮 (Lulukoko Town)，這是一個可與任何熱帶島嶼媲美的溫暖、友善的天堂。鄰近地區也有傳統的遠東村落 Tsuyukusa。與居民成為朋友，幫助他們改善城鎮，然後在本地或透過網路與其他像您一樣的農民聯絡，聊天和交易有用的物品。

種植農作物、飼養可愛的寵物、成為著名廚師或時尚達人，甚至與當地人發現浪漫。在《季節的故事：城鎮三重奏》中，一切都由您決定
no_intro_name: Story of Seasons - Trio of Towns (USA)

overview_en:
Nintendo Presents: New Style Boutique 2 - Fashion Forward, known in Japan as Girls Mode 3: Kirakira ? Code, is a fashion video game developed by syn Sophia and published by Nintendo and the third instalment in the fashion simulation series after the Nintendo DS game Style Savvy (Nintendo presents: Style Boutique in the PAL region) and the Nintendo 3DS game Style Savvy: Trendsetters (Nintendo presents: New Style Boutique in the PAL region).

It was released for the Nintendo 3DS in Japan on April 16, 2015, in Europe on November 20, 2015[1] and in Australia on November 21, 2015
overview_zh:
任天堂推出：新風格精品店 2 - 時尚前沿，在日本稱為女孩模式 3：Kirakira？ 《Code》是一款由 syn Sophia 開發、任天堂發行的時尚電玩遊戲，是繼 Nintendo DS 遊戲 Style Savvy（任天堂在 PAL 地區推出：Style Boutique）和 Nintendo 3DS 遊戲 Style Savvy：Trendsetters（任天堂在 PAL 地區推出：New Style Boutique）。

任天堂 3DS 版本於 2015 年 4 月 16 日在日本發布，2015 年 11 月 20 日在歐洲發布[1]，2015 年 11 月 21 日在澳洲發布

overview_en:
In the Style Savvy: Trendsetters game, you take on the role of a budding fashion mogul, working your way to the top of the fashion world! Manage your own boutique and help customers find the perfect outfit by keeping up with fashion trends, stocking new clothes for your store, and customizing your shop to reflect your personality.

Choose from over 12,000 clothing items and accessories spanning 19 different brands to put together dream-come-true ensembles for hundreds of customers. Share your creations with friends who have the game through an online* shopping portal, download additional outfits online*, and discover an AR Photo Shoot mode that virtually puts your outfits into the real world!
overview_zh:
在「風格精明：潮流引領者」遊戲中，您將扮演一位嶄露頭角的時尚大亨，努力登上時尚界的頂峰！管理您自己的精品店，透過跟上時尚潮流、為您的商店儲備新衣服以及定製您的商店以反映您的個性，幫助顧客找到完美的服裝。

從 19 個不同品牌的 12,000 多件服裝和配件中進行選擇，為數百名顧客打造夢想成真的套裝。透過線上*購物入口網站與玩遊戲的朋友分享您的創作，線上*下載其他服裝，並探索 AR 照片拍攝模式，將您的服裝虛擬地融入現實世界！

title_en: Sudoku + 7 Other Complex Puzzles by Nikoli
no_intro_name: Sudoku + 7 Other Complex Puzzles by Nikoli (Europe)

overview_en:
* Put yourself to the test and tackle Japanese puzzles as you’ve never seen them before in Sudoku – The Puzzle Game Collection for Nintendo 3DS.
* Tackle 600 puzzles that include Sudoku and other Japanese favourites Shikaku, Hashi and Akari.
* Unlock hints by using the Play Coins you acquire whilst walking around with your Nintendo 3DS in Sleep Mode.
* Watch puzzles come to life in a new way thanks to the unique graphical capabilities of the Nintendo 3DS system.
overview_zh:
* 在數獨 - Nintendo 3DS 益智遊戲合集中考驗自己並解決您以前從未見過的日本謎題。
* 解 600 個謎題，包括數獨和其他日本人喜愛的 Shikaku、Hashi 和 Akari。
* 使用您在睡眠模式下帶著 Nintendo 3DS 四處走動時獲得的 Play Coins 來解鎖提示。
* 由於 Nintendo 3DS 系統獨特的圖形功能，觀看謎題以一種新的方式變得栩栩如生。

title_en: Sudoku to 3-Tsu no Puzzle - Nikoli no Puzzle Variety
title_jp: Sudoku to 3-Tsu no Puzzle - Nikoli no Puzzle Variety
no_intro_name: Sudoku to 3-Tsu no Puzzle - Nikoli no Puzzle Variety (Japan)

overview_en: Sumikko Gurashi: Koko ga Ochitsukundesu is an Action game, developed and published by Nippon Columbia, which was released in Japan in 2014.
overview_zh: 《Sumikko Gurashi: Koko ga Ochitsukundesu》是一款動作遊戲，由 Nippon Columbia 開發並發行，於 2014 年在日本發行。

overview_en: Cast the lure through the air, feel the impact as it hits the water surface, and wait in anticipation of the next big catch. Players search for more than 30 types of fish as they experience fishing in vivid 3D, all while competing for the top spot on the leaderboards.
overview_zh: 將魚餌拋向空中，感受魚餌撞擊水面時的衝擊力，並等待下一次大捕獲。玩家可以尋找 30 多種魚類，體驗生動的 3D 釣魚體驗，同時爭奪排行榜的第一名。

overview_en:
Super Mario 3D Land is a platform game that has been described by game designer Shigeru Miyamoto as a "3D Mario that plays as a 2D Mario game." As such, Super Mario 3D Land combines the elements of traditional side-scrolling Mario titles, such as linear-based levels, with those of the modern open world Mario titles, such as moving Mario in three dimensions and performing a variety of actions.

Similar to the classic side-scrolling Mario games, the objective of each level is to reach and grab the "Goal Pole" located at the end of the course before the time limit expires. Super Mario 3D Land utilizes a similar health system to those games, in which Mario shrinks upon taking damage from enemies or hazards, and damage while as "Small Mario" results in losing a life.

Australian Classification: G
overview_zh:
《超級瑪利歐 3D 大陸》是一款平臺遊戲，遊戲設計師宮本茂將其描述為「像 2D 馬裡奧遊戲一樣玩的 3D 馬裡奧」。因此，《Super Mario 3D Land》結合了傳統橫向捲軸 Mario 遊戲的元素（例如基於線性的關卡）與現代開放世界 Mario 遊戲的元素（例如在三個維度中移動 Mario 並執行各種動作）。

與經典的橫向捲軸馬裡奧遊戲類似，每個關卡的目標都是在時間限製到期之前到達並抓住位於路線末端的「球門桿」。 《超級瑪利歐 3D 世界》採用了與這些遊戲類似的健康系統，其中馬裡奧在受到敵人或危險的傷害時會縮小，而「小馬裡奧」受到傷害會導致失去生命。

澳洲分類：G

overview_en:
Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool, and Toad embark on a quest together to save the day against the villainous Wart.
Pick up items and throw them at your adversaries to clear levels in seven fantastical worlds. Even enemies can be picked up and tossed across the screen. Each character has a unique set of abilities: Luigi can jump higher and farther than any of the other characters, Toad can dig extremely fast and pull items out of the ground quicker than anyone, and the princess is the only one who can jump and hover temporarily. This unique installment in the Mario series will keep you coming back for more!

This game is only playable in 2D.
overview_zh:
馬裡奧、路易吉、傘菌公主和蟾蜍一起踏上旅程，對抗邪惡的疣，拯救世界。
撿起物品並將其扔給你的對手，以在七個奇幻世界中通關。甚至敵人也可以被撿起並扔到螢幕上。每個角色都有一套獨特的能力：路易吉可以比其他任何角色跳得更高更遠，蟾蜍可以極其快速地挖掘並比任何人更快地從地下拉出物品，而公主是唯一一個可以暫時跳躍和懸停的角色。馬裡奧系列中的這款獨特作品將讓您流連忘返！

遊戲只能以 2D 形式玩。

title_en: Super Mario Bros. 2 The Lost Levels
title_jp: Super Mario Bros. 2 The Lost Levels
no_intro_name: Super Mario Bros. 2 The Lost Levels (Japan)

overview_en:
Relive the classic that brought renowned power-ups such as the Tanooki Suit to the world of Super Mario Bros.!

Bowser and the Koopalings are causing chaos yet again, but this time they’re going beyond the Mushroom Kingdom into the seven worlds that neighbor it. Now Mario and Luigi must battle a variety of enemies, including a Koopaling in each unique and distinctive world, on their way to ultimately taking on Bowser himself. Lucky for the brothers, they have more power-ups available than ever before. Fly above the action using the Super Leaf, swim faster by donning the Frog Suit, or defeat enemies using the Hammer Bros. Suit. Use the brand-new overworld map to take the chance to play a minigame in hopes of gaining extra lives or to find a Toad’s House where you can pick up additional items. All this (and more) combines into one of gaming’s most well-known and beloved titles—are you ready to experience gaming bliss?
overview_zh:
重溫將狸套裝等著名道具帶入《超級瑪利歐兄弟》世界的經典遊戲！

庫巴和庫帕林一家人再次製造混亂，但這次他們超越了蘑菇王國，進入了鄰近的七個世界。現在，馬裡奧和路易吉必須與各種各樣的敵人戰鬥，包括每個獨特世界中的庫帕林，最終擊敗庫巴本人。兄弟倆很幸運，他們擁有比以往更多的可用能力。使用超級葉子飛越行動，穿上青蛙套裝遊得更快，或使用錘子兄弟套裝擊敗敵人。使用全新的世界地圖抓住機會玩迷你遊戲，希望獲得額外的生命，或找到蟾蜍之家，在那裡你可以拾取額外的物品。所有這些（以及更多）都融入了遊戲界最知名和最受歡迎的遊戲之一中——您準備好體驗遊戲的幸福了嗎？

overview_en:
Get ready to play a near-infinite number of side-scrolling 2D Mario courses anytime, anywhere! Earn in-game medals in 100 built-in courses and access recommended courses from the Super Mario Maker game on the Wii U console*. Plus, design courses and share them with other players via the StreetPass feature and local wireless**! Want your cannons to shoot coins? Go for it! In this game, you call the shots, and simple touch-screen controls and interactive tutorials make designing courses a snap. Learn design tips and tricks from Mary O. and Yamamura, then share your masterpieces via the StreetPass feature and local wireless. Collaborating has never been easier now that you can share incomplete courses with other players. Finish off a course together and a special icon will commemorate the collaboration. That's one of many reasons that this is the must-play portable Mario game for inventive groups of friends and anyone yearning for never-ending Super Mario magic. 
* Enjoy a nearly limitless supply of side-scrolling 2D Mario courses anytime, anywhere. 
* Take on 100 built-in courses as you tackle the Super Mario Challenge. 
* Create the Super Mario courses of your dreams! 
* Play recommended courses from the Super Mario Maker game on the Wii U console and take on that game's 100 Mario Challenge.
* Share courses with other players via the StreetPass feature and local wireless.
* For the first time ever, collaborate to make special shared courses.
overview_zh:
準備好隨時隨地玩近乎無限數量的橫向捲軸 2D 馬裡奧課程！在 100 個內建課程中贏得遊戲內獎牌，並訪問 Wii U 主機上的 Super Mario Maker 遊戲的推薦課程*。此外，還可以設計課程並透過 StreetPass 功能和本地無線**與其他玩家分享！想要你的大砲發射硬幣嗎？大膽試試吧！在這款遊戲中，您做主，簡單的觸控螢幕控制和互動式教程使設計課程變得輕而易舉。向 Mary O. 和 Yamamura 學習設計技巧和技巧，然後透過 StreetPass 功能和本地無線分享您的傑作。現在您可以與其他玩家分享不完整的課程，因此協作變得更加容易。一起完成一門課程，一個特殊的圖示將紀念這次合作。這也是這款遊戲成為創意十足的朋友和任何渴望永無止境的超級瑪利歐魔法的人必玩的行動式馬裡奧遊戲的眾多原因之一。 
* 隨時隨地享受幾乎無限的橫向捲軸 2D 馬裡奧課程。 
* 在應對超級瑪利歐挑戰時，接受 100 個內建課程。 
* 建立你夢想中的超級瑪利歐課程！ 
* 在 Wii U 主機上玩 Super Mario Maker 遊戲的推薦課程，並接受該遊戲的 100 Mario Challenge。
* 透過 StreetPass 功能和本地無線網路與其他玩家共享課程。
* 有史以來第一次，合作製作特別的共享課程。

overview_en: Taking advantage of the power of the Nintendo 3DS, players can let themselves loose in each new vibrant world as they twist and turn whilst aiming to collect every banana in the fastest time possible. This latest installment contains three brand-new compelling gameplay choices including single-player puzzle levels, Monkey Race and Monkey Fight. These new game modes give players the chance to compete via wireless connection with up to four players in the best 3D social experience possible in the palm of their hands. In addition, Super Monkey Ball fans will be able to choose between the Nintendo 3DS motion sensor or the Slide Pad to navigate the puzzle mazes with complete precision.
overview_zh: 利用任天堂 3DS 的強大功能，玩家可以在每個充滿活力的新世界中盡情放鬆，扭轉方向，同時努力在最快的時間內收集每根香蕉。最新一期包含三個全新的引人入勝的遊戲選擇，包括單人益智關卡、猴子賽跑和猴子大戰。這些新的遊戲模式讓玩家有機會透過無線連線與最多四名玩家競爭，盡享掌上最佳的 3D 社交體驗。此外，《超級猴子球》粉絲還可以選擇 Nintendo 3DS 運動感應器或 Slide Pad，以完全精確地導航拼圖迷宮。

overview_en: Super Robot Taisen BX is a Strategy game, developed by B.B.Studio and published by Bandai Namco Games, which was released in Japan in 2015.
overview_zh: 《超級機器人大戰BX》是一款由B.B.Studio開發、Bandai Namco Games發行的策略遊戲，於2015年在日本發行。

overview_en:
Super Smash Bros. for Nintendo 3DS is the first portable entry in the renowned series, in which game worlds collide. Up to four players battle each other locally or online using some of Nintendo’s most well-known and iconic characters across beautifully designed stages inspired by classic portable Nintendo games. It’s a genuine, massive Super Smash Bros. experience that’s available to play on the go, anytime, anywhere.

Australian Classification: PG
overview_zh:
Nintendo 3DS 版《任天堂明星大亂鬥》是這個著名系列中的第一款行動式遊戲，其中遊戲世界相互碰撞。最多四名玩家可以在本地或線上使用任天堂一些最著名和標誌性的角色在設計精美的舞臺上相互對戰，這些舞臺的靈感源自經典的行動式任天堂遊戲。這是一種真正的、大規模的《任天堂明星大亂鬥》體驗，可以隨時隨地玩。

澳洲分類：PG

overview_en: The ultimate version of Street Fighter makes its seamless transition to the Nintendo 3DS with Super Street Fighter IV: 3D Edition. The console experience is now in the palm of your hand with rich new features that utilize the capabilities of the Nintendo 3DS to its fullest. Packed with 35 playable characters, bonus stages and cinematic Ultra combos, Super Street Fighter IV: 3D Edition expands the action by allowing you to fight your friends around the world using Wi-Fi. New to the franchise are the figurine mode, which utilizes the Street Pass feature to add a collectible meta-game, and the 3D over-the-shoulder camera option that takes fighting to new depths. For those new to the franchise, a simple mode has been added allowing players to pull off challenging moves with a single touch of the screen.
overview_zh: 《街頭霸王》終極版透過《超級街頭霸王 IV：3D 版》無縫過渡到 Nintendo 3DS。現在，控制檯體驗就在您的手掌中，豐富的新功能充分利用了 Nintendo 3DS 的功能。 《超級街頭霸王 IV：3D 版》包含 35 個可玩角色、獎勵關卡和電影般的超級連擊，讓您可以使用 Wi-Fi 與世界各地的朋友戰鬥，從而擴充套件了動作內容。該系列的新功能是雕像模式，它利用街道通行證功能新增可收藏的元遊戲，以及將戰鬥提升到新深度的 3D 肩扛攝影機選項。對於該系列的新手來說，新增了一個簡單的模式，讓玩家只需觸控螢幕即可完成具有挑戰性的動作。

title_en: Sushi Striker - The Way of Sushido
overview_en: Help Musashi end the Empire's tyrannical monopoly of the world's sushi supply by becoming a Sushi Striker! Devour conveyor-belt sushi, matching plates and sushi types to defeat any enemy or boss who stands between you and victory. Befriend Sushi Sprites and use their powerful skills in battle. Deliciously strategic action-RPG-puzzle battles await!
overview_zh: 成為壽司前鋒，幫助武藏結束帝國對世界壽司供應的暴虐壟斷！吞噬傳送帶壽司，搭配盤子和壽司型別，擊敗任何阻礙你和勝利的敵人或老闆。與壽司精靈交朋友，並在戰鬥中使用他們強大的技能。美味的戰略動作角色扮演解謎戰鬥等著您！
no_intro_name: Sushi Striker - The Way of Sushido (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

title_en: THE DENPA MEN - They Came By Wave
no_intro_name: THE DENPA MEN - They Came By Wave (USA)

title_en: THE DENPA MEN 2 - Beyond the Waves
overview_en: The Denpa Men are mysterious little creatures that float around radio waves. They all have their own territory. You can't see them with the naked eye, but you can use your 3DS to find them and catch them.
overview_zh: 電波人是漂浮在無線電波周圍的神秘小生物。他們都有自己的領地。您無法用肉眼看到它們，但您可以使用 3DS 找到它們並捕捉它們。
no_intro_name: THE DENPA MEN 2 - Beyond the Waves (USA)

title_en: THE DENPA MEN 3 - The Rise of Digitoll
overview_en:
The Denpa Men are mysterious creatures that live among radio waves. Invisible to the naked eye, they can only be seen and caught by looking through your Nintendo 3DS. In this game, catch Denpa Men, form your team, and head out on an exciting adventure across the world. All to save a special someone!

This time, some Denpa Men can capture monsters, turning them into allies who can be summoned to your side. Capture powerful monsters to turn the tide of battle. Also, your Denpa Men friends now have their own little homes, which can be customized and decorated to suit your style.

Network play is now better than ever. Trade items with players worldwide, and lend or borrow Denpa Men. You can import your hero and bring all your friends from the previous two THE “DENPA” MEN titles, too.

In-game content available for purchase using stored account funds.
overview_zh:
電波人是生活在無線電波中的神秘生物。它們是肉眼看不見的，只有透過你的 Nintendo 3DS 才能看到和捕捉。在這款遊戲中，抓住電波男，組建你的團隊，前往世界各地展開激動人心的冒險。一切都是為了拯救一個特別的人！

這次，有些電波男可以捕獲怪物，將它們變成可以召喚到你身邊的盟友。捕捉強大的怪物來扭轉戰局。此外，您的 Denpa Men 朋友現在擁有自己的小家，可以根據您的風格進行客製化和裝飾。

現在網路遊戲比以往任何時候都更好。與世界各地的玩家交易物品，並借出或借用 Denpa Men。您還可以匯入您的英雄，並帶上前兩部《THE DENPA》MEN 遊戲中的所有朋友。

可以使用儲存的帳戶資金購買遊戲內內容。
no_intro_name: THE DENPA MEN 3 - The Rise of Digitoll (USA)

title_en: Taiko no Tatsujin - Chibi Dragon to Fushigi na Orb
title_jp: Taiko no Tatsujin - Chibi Dragon to Fushigi na Orb
overview_en: Taiko no Tatsujin: Chibi Dragon to Fushigi na Orb is another rhythm game in the Taiko no Tatsujin series. This time, the game features a fantasy theme. Gameplay features drumming along to the rhythm of the music.
overview_zh: 《太鼓達人：赤壁龍與不死之球》是《太鼓達人》系列中的另一款節奏遊戲。這一次，遊戲以奇幻為主題。遊戲玩法的特點是隨著音樂的節奏打鼓。
no_intro_name: Taiko no Tatsujin - Chibi Dragon to Fushigi na Orb (Japan)

title_en: Taiko no Tatsujin - Doko Don! Mystery Adventure
title_jp: Taiko no Tatsujin - Doko Don! Mystery Adventure
no_intro_name: Taiko no Tatsujin - Doko Don! Mystery Adventure (Japan)

title_en: Taiko no Tatsujin - Don to Katsu no Jikuu Daibouken
title_jp: Taiko no Tatsujin - Don to Katsu no Jikuu Daibouken
no_intro_name: Taiko no Tatsujin - Don to Katsu no Jikuu Daibouken (Japan)

overview_en: Tales of the Abyss, the critically-acclaimed PlayStation 2 computer entertainment system role playing game, is updated for the Nintendo 3DS system. The upcoming title delivers full 3D support and use of the dual screens to bring players closer to the action. Tales of the Abyss tells the story of Luke fon Fabre, sole heir to a family of aristocrats, as he is suddenly thrust into the outside world on an epic adventure. Naïve and spoiled by years of isolation, Luke struggles to learn of friendship, sacrifice, duty and of choice. With the fates of many in his hands, Luke's actions could ultimately save the world or bring about its very destruction.
overview_zh: 《深淵傳說》是一款廣受好評的 PlayStation 2 電腦娛樂系統角色扮演遊戲，現已針對 Nintendo 3DS 系統進行了更新。即將推出的遊戲提供完整的 3D 支援，並使用雙螢幕讓玩家更接近動作。 《深淵傳說》講述了盧克·馮·法布林（Luke fon Fabre）的故事，他是一個貴族家庭的唯一繼承人，突然被推入外面的世界，開始了一場史詩般的冒險。盧克天真且被多年的孤立所寵壞，他努力學習友誼、犧牲、責任和選擇。盧克掌握著許多人的命運，他的行動最終可能會拯救世界，也可能導致世界毀滅。

title_en: Tales of the World - Reve Unitia
title_jp: Tales of the World - Reve Unitia
overview_en: The game takes place in a dream world known as Revalia, fuelled by the dreams of its inhabitants. The Rufres tribe maintains balance in the world by fighting the Vuul, manifestations of darkness that dwell in the hearts of Revalia's inhabitants. Normally, people known as Dreamcatchers fight against these Vuul, but they have somehow mysteriously disappeared. Desperate, the Rufres decide to summon people from what is known as the Awakened World to fight the Vuul. As a result, characters from various Tales games in the series appear without any knowledge of their own worlds to fight the Vuul. The game's story is split in to the perspectives of a member of the Rufres tribe, Terun, and a Dreamcatcher, Nahato.
overview_zh: 遊戲發生在一個名為 Revalia 的夢幻世界，其居民的夢想推動著這個世界。魯弗雷斯部落透過對抗居住在雷瓦利亞居民心中的黑暗化身烏爾（Vuul）來維持世界平衡。通常，被稱為「捕夢者」的人會與這些 Vuul 作戰，但他們不知何故神秘地消失了。絕望之下，魯弗雷斯決定召喚來自覺醒世界的人們來對抗烏爾人。結果，該系列中各個 Tales 遊戲中的角色在對自己的世界一無所知的情況下出現，與 Vuul 作戰。遊戲的故事分為魯弗雷斯部落成員特倫和捕夢網納哈託的視角。
no_intro_name: Tales of the World - Reve Unitia (Japan)

title_jp: Tamagotchi no Doki Doki Dream Omisetchi
no_intro_name: Tamagotchi no Doki Doki Dream Omisetchi (Japan)

overview_en:
Tappingo is a new puzzle game in which you create small pictures by solving puzzles. Your goal is to solve each puzzle picture by making all the numbered blocks extend into lines of the correct length. The number on each block indicates exactly how long the line needs to be.

The game keeps track of the time taken to solve each puzzle. You can challenge your friends or yourself to set a better time! How quickly can you solve each puzzle?

-Over 100 puzzles based on different themes: hobbies, sports, computers, animals, etc.
-Time Attack mode: finish each puzzle as quickly as possible
-Two gameplay modes
-Cool art style
overview_zh:
Tappingo 是一款新的益智遊戲，您可以透過解決謎題來建立小圖片。您的目標是透過使所有編號的方塊延伸成正確長度的線來解決每個拼圖圖片。每個區塊上的數字準確地指示了線路需要多長。

遊戲會記錄解決每個謎題所需的時間。您可以挑戰您的朋友或您自己來設定更好的時間！你能多快解決每個謎題？

-超過 100 個基於不同主題的謎題：嗜好、運動、電腦、動物等。
- 時間攻擊模式：盡快完成每個謎題
- 兩種遊戲模式
-酷炫的藝術風格

overview_en: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is built around fast-moving hack-and-slash gameplay, letting players swap between its four main characters at will. From Mikey’s speed to Raph’s brute force, each brother brings a unique set of strengths and skills to battle based on their personality. Players can evolve in power over time, gaining new levels, abilities and stat points, while mighty new weapons can be crafted back at the Turtle’s Lair from raw materials collected throughout the adventure.
overview_zh: 《忍者龜》以快速移動的砍殺遊戲為核心，讓玩家可以隨意在四個主角之間切換。從米奇的速度到拉夫的蠻力，每個兄弟都根據自己的個性帶來了一套獨特的優勢和技能來戰鬥。玩家可以隨著時間的推移而增強力量，獲得新的等級、能力和統計點，而強大的新武器可以用在整個冒險過程中收集的原材料回到海龜巢穴來製作。

title_en: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Danger of the Ooze
overview_en: Stop Shredder from unleashing the power of the Super Mutagen. Play as your favorite Turtle and switch between them on the fly.
overview_zh: 阻止碎紙機釋放超級誘變劑的力量。扮演您最喜歡的海龜並在它們之間即時切換。
no_intro_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Danger of the Ooze (USA)

title_en: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Master Splinter's Training Pack
no_intro_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Master Splinter's Training Pack (USA) (En,Fr)

overview_en: With TEKKEN 3D PRIME EDITION, the most popular fighting game franchise finally arrives on Nintendo 3DS, with brand new features and exclusive gameplay modes making full use of the console's unique functionality. Additionally, the full-length 3D animated movie TEKKEN Blood Vengeance will be included with the game, the first time ever a full film has appeared on a 3DS cartridge!
overview_zh: 最受歡迎的格鬥遊戲系列《鐵拳 3D PRIME EDITION》終於登陸 Nintendo 3DS，它具有全新的功能和獨特的遊戲模式，充分利用了遊戲機的獨特功能。此外，全長 3D 動畫電影《TEKKEN Blood Vengeance》將包含在遊戲中，這是有史以​​來第一次在 3DS 卡帶上出現完整的電影！

overview_en:
In this 2D-robot combat game, you can step into the role of one of the four Tenkai Knights heroes and must stop the evil Vilius and his army of shape shifting robots from destroying planet Earth and Quarton. Power-up your hero with over 100 customisation parts and co-operate with an ally to complete missions from the Story Mode! Up to 4 Players can also compete against each other in a VS mode to find out who's the most powerful hero!

For the first time ever, relive the Tenkai Knights experience in an exciting action game offering a lot of customisation possibilities and all the fun from the Spin Master Toy line and the animated TV series!
overview_zh:
在這款 2D 機器人格鬥遊戲中，您可以扮演天海騎士四位英雄之一，必須阻止邪惡的維利烏斯和他的變形機器人軍隊摧毀地球和誇頓。使用超過 100 個自訂零件來增強你的英雄，並與盟友合作完成故事模式中的任務！最多 4 名玩家還可以在 VS 模式中相互競爭，看看誰是最強大的英雄！

有史以來第一次，在激動人心的動作遊戲中重溫天海騎士體驗，提供大量定製可能性以及 Spin Master 玩具系列和動畫電視連續劇的所有樂趣！

title_en: Terra Formars - Akaki Hoshi no Gekitou
title_jp: Terra Formars - Akaki Hoshi no Gekitou
no_intro_name: Terra Formars - Akaki Hoshi no Gekitou (Japan)

overview_en:
Terraria? What's that?

Terraria is a land of adventure! A land of mystery! A land that's yours to shape, to defend and to enjoy. Your options in Terraria are limitless, are you an action gamer with an itchy trigger finger? A master builder? A collector? An explorer? There's something for everyone here.

Dig, fight, explore, build! Nothing is impossible in this action-packed adventure game. The world is your canvas and the ground itself is your paint.

Grab your tools and go! Make weapons to fight off a variety of enemies in numerous biomes. Dig deep underground to find accessories, money, and other useful things. Gather resources to create everything you need to make the world your own. Build a house, a fort, or even a castle. People will move in to live there and perhaps even sell you different wares to assist you on your journey.

But beware, there are even more challenges awaiting you... Are you up to the task?

Key features:

- Sandbox Play
- Randomly generated worlds
- Free Content Updates
overview_zh:
泰拉瑞亞？那是什麼？

泰拉瑞亞是一片冒險之地！一片神秘的土地！這片土地由你來塑造、保衛和享受。您在泰拉瑞亞中的選擇是無限的，您是扳機手指發癢的動作遊戲玩家嗎？建築大師？收藏家？探險家？這裡有適合每個人的東西。

挖掘、戰鬥、探索、建造！在這款充滿動感的冒險遊戲中，沒有什麼是不可能的。世界是你的畫布，地面本身就是你的顏料。

帶上你的工具，出發吧！製造武器來對抗眾多生物群落中的各種敵人。深入地下尋找配件、金錢和其他有用的東西。收集資源來創造你所需要的一切，讓這個世界成為你自己的。建造一座房子、一座堡壘，甚至一座城堡。人們會搬進去住在那裡，甚至可能會賣給你不同的商品來幫助你的旅程。

但請注意，還有更多挑戰等著您…您能勝任這項任務嗎？

主要特點：

- 沙盒遊戲
- 隨機生成的世界
- 免費內容更新

overview_en:
The Nintendo 3DS Virtual Console release of Tetris was delisted from the Nintendo eShop on January 1, 2015.

A random sequence of tetrominoes (sometimes called "tetrads" in older versions)—shapes composed of four square blocks each—fall down the playing field (a rectangular vertical shaft, called the "well" or "matrix"). The objective of the game is to manipulate these tetrominoes, by moving each one sideways and rotating it by 90 degree units, with the aim of creating a horizontal line of blocks without gaps. When such a line is created, it disappears, and any block above the deleted line will fall. With every ten lines that are cleared, the game enters a new level. As the game progresses, each level causes the tetrominoes to fall faster, and the game ends when the stack of tetrominoes reaches the top of the playing field and no new tetrominoes are able to enter. In certain versions, the game can also end if the player is able to get all the way to level 15.

All of the tetrominoes are capable of single and double clears. I, J, and L are able to clear triples. Only the I tetromino has the capacity to clear four lines simultaneously, and this is referred to as a "tetris". (This may vary depending on the rotation and compensation rules of each specific Tetris implementation. For instance, in the Super Rotation System used in most recent implementations, called "Easy Spin" in Tetris Worlds, certain rare situations allow T, S and Z to 'snap' into tight spots and clear triples.)
overview_zh:
Nintendo 3DS 虛擬控制檯版本的俄羅斯方塊已於 2015 年 1 月 1 日從 Nintendo eShop 下架。

隨機排列的四格骨牌（在舊版本中有時稱為“四分體”）（每個形狀由四個方塊組成）落在運動場（一個矩形垂直軸，稱為“井”或“矩陣”）中。遊戲的目標是操縱這些四格骨牌，透過橫向移動每個四格骨牌並將其旋轉 90 度單位，目的是建立一條沒有間隙的水平線。當建立這樣的線時，它就會消失，並且刪除線上方的任何塊都會掉落。每清除十條線，遊戲就會進入一個新的關卡。隨著遊戲的進行，每個關卡都會導致四格骨牌下落得更快，當四格骨牌堆到達遊戲場地的頂部並且沒有新的四格骨牌能夠進入時，遊戲結束。在某些版本中，如果玩家能夠一路升到 15 級，遊戲也會結束。

所有四格骨牌都能夠單次和雙次清除。 I、J 和 L 能夠清除三元組。只有 I tetromino 能夠同時清除四條線，這被稱為「俄羅斯方塊」。 （這可能會有所不同，具體取決於每個特定俄羅斯方塊實現的旋轉和補償規則。例如，在最近實現中使用的超級旋轉系統中，在俄羅斯方塊世界中稱為“輕鬆旋轉”，某些罕見的情況允許 T、S 和 Z“卡入”緊點並清除三元組。）

overview_en: Tetris for Nintendo 3DS will allow fans to experience the game like never before in 3D! With over 20 eye-catching game modes, Tetris for Nintendo 3DS delivers a rich mix of both traditional and innovative ways to enjoy playing the Tetris game.
overview_zh: Nintendo 3DS 版俄羅斯方塊將讓粉絲以前所未有的 3D 體驗遊戲！ Nintendo 3DS 版俄羅斯方塊擁有 20 多種引人注目的遊戲模式，提供了傳統和創新方式的豐富組合，讓您盡享俄羅斯方塊遊戲的樂趣。

overview_en:
Tetris Ultimate is a puzzle video game developed by Ubisoft San Francisco and published by Ubisoft. Ubisoft partnered with The Tetris Company to develop the game to celebrate the 30th anniversary of the Tetris franchise Tetris Ultimate was first released in November 2014 for the Nintendo 3DS as retail game and as digital download in the Nintendo 3DS eShop. In December 2014 the game became available as a digital download for Xbox One and PlayStation 4.These versions were criticized for frame rate issues in the online modes In 2015, the game was released for PlayStation Vita.

Because of the release of Tetris Ultimate, Nintendo removed the Game Boy version of Tetris and digital download Tetris: Axis from the Nintendo 3DS eShop in December 2014. Since January 2014, Ubisoft holds the license rights for the console/handheld versions of Tetris whereas Electronic Arts retains the Tetris license for mobile platforms.
overview_zh:
Tetris Ultimate 是一款由 Ubisoft San Francisco 開發並由 Ubisoft 發行的益智電玩遊戲。育碧與俄羅斯方塊公司合作開發遊戲，以慶祝俄羅斯方塊系列誕生 30 週年。俄羅斯方塊終極版於 2014 年 11 月首次在任天堂 3DS 上發布，作為零售遊戲和任天堂 3DS eShop 中的數位下載。 2014 年 12 月，遊戲在 Xbox One 和 PlayStation 4 上提供數位下載。這些版本因線上模式中的幀速率問題而受到批評。 2015 年，該遊戲在 PlayStation Vita 上發布。

由於俄羅斯方塊終極版的發布，任天堂於 2014 年 12 月從 Nintendo 3DS eShop 中刪除了 Game Boy 版本的俄羅斯方塊和數位下載俄羅斯方塊：軸。自 2014 年 1 月起，育碧持有俄羅斯方塊的控制檯/手持版本的許可權，而藝電保留行動平臺的俄羅斯方塊許可。

overview_en: The makers of The Legend of Legacy bring the classic JRPG back to form in The Alliance Alive, a new adventure that evokes the nostalgia of the JRPG greats by offering huge world-exploration, an intertwining story of 9 protagonists, and well-designed battle mechanics. One thousand years ago, Daemons invaded the world of Humans. They subjugated Humanity and created the Great Barrier to separate the realms. The world was thrown into upheaval, and the Dark Current was born. Humanity was decimated and now Daemons rule atop a hierarchical society. However, the time for resistance has come. The world is about to change yet again...
overview_zh: 《The Legend of Legacy》的製作者在《The Alliance Alive》中將經典 JRPG 重新演繹出來，這是一款全新的冒險遊戲，透過提供宏大的世界探索、9 位主角相互交織的故事以及精心設計的戰鬥機制，喚起了 JRPG 偉人的懷舊之情。一千年前，惡魔入侵人類世界。他們征服了人類並創造了隔離各個領域的大屏障。世界陷入劇變，暗流誕生。人類遭到毀滅，現在惡魔統治著一個等級社會。然而，抵抗的時刻已經到來。世界即將再次改變…

overview_en:
The Legend of Dark Witch is a 2D platform action game.


Syega Crystals gave their powers to the people of the world, but somebody has stolen all of them...

After all the Syega crystals are missing, the world plunges into darkness. As the dark witch Zizou, you must retrieve the missing Syega Crystals.

The Legend of Dark Witch is a 2D platform action game. Zizou can learn new attacks by defeating bosses. She will need every one of those attacks if she is going to save the world.

Other Features:

A magical world beautifully depicted through in-game graphics.
Diverse levels that provide a fair challenge.
Additional bonuses that reward those who replay the game.
3 difficulty modes.
overview_zh:
《黑暗女巫傳奇》是一款2D平臺動作遊戲。


Syega Crystals 將它們的力量賦予了世界人民，但有人偷走了它們...

當所有的賽加水晶消失後，世界陷入黑暗。身為黑暗女巫 Zizou，您必須找回遺失的 Syega 水晶。

《黑暗女巫傳奇》是一款2D平臺動作遊戲。齊祖可以透過擊敗頭目來學習新的攻擊方式。如果她想拯救世界，她將需要每一次攻擊。

其他特點：

透過遊戲中的圖形精美地描繪了一個神奇的世界。
提供公平挑戰的不同層級。
獎勵那些重玩遊戲的人的額外獎金。
3種難度模式。

title_en: The Legend of Dark Witch - The Price of Desire
no_intro_name: The Legend of Dark Witch - The Price of Desire(USA)

overview_en:
With 7 different perspectives from which to experience the adventure, whose story will you unravel first?

A mysterious island emerges, prompting adventurers to head towards it in hopes of obtaining glory, treasure, and more. But what does it truly hold? Join the 7 characters in The Legend of Legacy and unravel the mystery of Avalon's past.

Explore Avalon and discover each character's motivation in traveling to the island. With 7 different perspectives from which to experience the adventure, whose story will you unravel first? Perhaps the Elementalist who uses spirits as his guide? Or will you sympathize with the frog prince, searching for more of his kind? Pick your characters wisely, as team formations and specific combat roles are crucial in battle!

The Legend of Legacy staff roster includes familiar names like character designer Tomomi Kobayashi, renowned composer Masashi Hamauzu, writer Masato Kato, game designer Kyoji Koizumi, and Masataka Matsuura. With such a legendary staff breathing life into the game, get ready to embark on the quest of a lifetime!

Also Available
The Legend of Legacy Launch Edition
The Legend of Legacy - Launch Edition includes The Legends of Legacy game for Nintendo 3DS, a 40 page hardcover Artbook, and a 10 track Masashi Hamauzu Original Soundtrack CD.
overview_zh:
有 7 個不同的視角來體驗冒險，您會先解開誰的故事？

一座神秘島嶼出現，冒險者們紛紛前往，希望獲得榮耀、寶藏等。但它真正包含的是什麼？與《The Legend of Legacy》中的 7 個角色一起，解開阿瓦隆過去的謎團。

探索阿瓦隆並發現每個角色前往島嶼的動機。有 7 個不同的視角來體驗冒險，您會先解開誰的故事？或許是以精靈為嚮導的元素使？或者你會同情青蛙王子，尋找更多他的同類嗎？明智地選擇你的角色，因為團隊編隊和特定的戰鬥角色在戰鬥中至關重要！

Legend of Legacy 的工作人員名單包括熟悉的名字，如角色設計師 Tomomi Kobayashi、著名作曲家 Masashi Hamauzu、作家 Masato Kato、遊戲設計師 Kyoji Koizumi 和 Masataka Matsuura。有了這樣一位傳奇員工為遊戲注入活力，準備好踏上一生的追求吧！

還提供
傳奇傳奇首發版
《Legend of Legacy》- 首發版包括適用於 Nintendo 3DS 的《Legends of Legacy》遊戲、一本 40 頁的精裝畫集和一張 10 首曲目 Masashi Hamauzu 原創原聲帶 CD。

overview_en:
Reunite the Triforce and send Ganon packing.


Celebrate the Nintendo eShop “8-BIT SUMMER” series with this smash-hit adventure, originally released on the NES™ console in 1987. Ganon, the King of Evil, has broken free of the Dark World and has captured Hyrule’s beloved Princess Zelda. But before she was caught, Zelda™ managed to shatter the Triforce of Wisdom and scatter its eight pieces throughout Hyrule. Begin your adventure by finding a small wooden sword in a dark cave. As you grow in stature, experience and strength, so do your weapons. Help Link™ collect the captured pieces of the Triforce, rescue the princess and thwart Ganon’s evil plans.
overview_zh: 重聚三力並派遣加農收拾行李。  最初於1987年在NES™主機上發布的這款熱門冒險遊戲，慶祝任天堂eShop「8位元夏日」系列。邪惡之王加農已經擺脫了黑暗世界，並捕獲了海魯爾心愛的塞爾達公主。但在她被抓住之前，塞爾達™設法粉碎了智慧之力，並將其八塊碎片分散在海魯爾。在黑暗的洞穴中找到一把小木劍，開始你的冒險之旅。隨著你的身材、經驗和實力的增長，你的武器也會隨之增長。幫助連結™收集捕獲的三角力量碎片，拯救公主並挫敗加農的邪惡計劃。

overview_en: Create Sims, the characters unique to The Sims franchise, with unique personalities, fulfill their desires and control their lives within a living neighborhood. Unlock new Karma Powers with Karma Points and unleash amazing effects on your Sims. As you guide your Sims through life, build relationships and experience different careers like Criminal, Athlete or Musician to unlock new items, outfits and various rewards. Share your Sims with other 3DS owners using the Nintendo StreetPass.
overview_zh: 創造模擬人生，即《模擬市民》系列中獨特的角色，具有獨特的個性，滿足他們的願望並在一個生機勃勃的社群中控制他們的生活。用業力點數解鎖新的業力力量，並為您的模擬市民釋放驚人的效果。當您引導您的模擬人生度過一生時，建立關係並體驗不同的職業，例如罪犯、運動員或音樂家，以解鎖新物品、服裝和各種獎勵。使用 Nintendo StreetPass 與其他 3DS 使用者分享您的模擬市民。

overview_en: Players take creativity by the reins and play out the stories they want to tell whether itï¿½s the single guy in the dog park picking up women or the criminal overlord and her evil cat. Across all platforms, The Sims 3 Pets players will be able to create, customize and control over a hundred different kinds of cats and dogs like the Australian Shepherd and the Maine Coon, and can breed and share them with friends providing endless possibilities to create new and exciting breeds.
overview_zh: 玩家發揮創造力，演繹出他們想要講述的故事，無論是在狗公園裡泡妞的單身漢，還是犯罪霸主和她邪惡的貓。在所有平臺上，《模擬市民 3 寵物》玩家將能夠建立、定製和控制一百多種不同種類的貓狗，例如澳大利亞牧羊犬和緬因浣熊，並且可以繁殖它們並與朋友分享，為創造新的令人興奮的品種提供了無限的可能性。

overview_en: Only released in Japan.
overview_zh: 僅在日本發行。

overview_en: Theatrhythm Final Fantasy features a hybrid of music rhythm gameplay with RPG elements. Adorably re-designed heroes from the catalogue of FINAL FANTASY titles will set out on an adventure to combat memorable villains with the rhythmic taps of the player's stylus.
overview_zh: 《最終幻想劇場節奏》融合了音樂節奏遊戲與角色扮演遊戲元素。 《最終幻想》系列中可愛的重新設計英雄將踏上冒險之旅，透過玩家的手寫筆有節奏的敲擊來對抗令人難忘的惡棍。

overview_en: A sequel to the first FINAL FANTASY rhythm action game released in 2012, THEATRHYTHM FINAL FANTASY CURTAIN CALL expands on the original in every way with new gameplay modes, over 200 songs, and 60 playable characters. Featuring music that spans the full breadth of the storied FINAL FANTASY franchise, players tap along to the memorable beats and harmonies as the adorable, stylized characters battle and quest through their worlds. The music of over 20 titles is brought together in one package, fusing together the moving scores, cinematic visuals, and role-playing elements the series is known for.
overview_zh: 作為 2012 年發布的第一款《最終幻想》節奏動作遊戲的續作，《THEATRHYTHM 最終幻想謝幕》在原作的基礎上進行了全方位的擴充套件，包括新的遊戲模式、200 多首歌曲和 60 個可玩角色。音樂涵蓋了傳奇的《最終幻想》系列的全部內容，玩家可以隨著令人難忘的節拍和和聲，可愛的風格化角色在他們的世界中戰鬥和探索。超過 20 部作品的音樂匯集在一個包中，融合了該系列聞名的動人配樂、電影視覺效果和角色扮演元素。

title_en: Thomas to Asonde Oboeru Kotoba to Kazu to ABC
title_jp: Thomas to Asonde Oboeru Kotoba to Kazu to ABC
no_intro_name: Thomas to Asonde Oboeru Kotoba to Kazu to ABC (Japan)

overview_en: Thor: The Video Game will take players through a spectacular, epic-scale original third-person adventure for which Matt Fraction, the Eisner Award-winning writer and lead Thor comic book author served as story consultant. In the game, Thor battles through the numerous worlds of Norse mythology that span realms ranging from primal worlds of fire and ice to extraordinary planets inhabited by Frost Giants and Trolls to save Asgard, the capital city of the Norse Gods. Thor must overcome monstrous foes lifted from the pages of the comics including Ulik, Ymir, and Surtur, as well as other monstrous denizens.
overview_zh: 《雷神索爾：電子遊戲》將帶領玩家經歷一場壯觀、史詩級的原創第三人稱冒險，艾斯納獎獲獎作家兼《雷神》漫畫書首席作者馬特·弗萊克遜 (Matt Fraction) 擔任故事顧問。在遊戲中，託爾在北歐神話的眾多世界中戰鬥，這些世界跨越了從火與冰的原始世界到冰霜巨人和巨魔居住的非凡星球，以拯救北歐諸神的首都阿斯加德。託爾必須戰勝漫畫中的可怕敵人，包括烏利克、尤米爾和蘇爾特爾，以及其他可怕的居民。

overview_en:
Re-do that moment. Change fate. Live on. Playing Cinema.

This is a time travelling mega title by Jiro Ishii, who has numerous adventure titles under his belt.

On a day in April 2031, a bus is hijacked in Shibuya, which is the start of terrorists’ attempt to bring down Tokyo. Five men and women stand up in order to save Tokyo. In front of them appears a girl named Mikoto, a time traveler. And that is when the wheel of fate starts to roll.

Able to travel back in time, the time travelers are entrusted with the fate of the world. Control fate with time traveling and save the world from the crisis of Tokyo falling!

Play Cinema Event, a brand-new form of entertainment that lets you create a story of your own and turns the screen of your portable console into a theatre!
overview_zh:
重做那一刻。改變命運。繼續活下去。玩電影院。

這是一款由石井次郎（Jiro Ishii）創作的時間旅行大型遊戲，他擁有眾多冒險遊戲。

2031 年 4 月的某一天，一輛巴士在澀谷被劫持，這是恐怖分子企圖摧毀東京的開始。五名男女為了拯救東京而挺身而出。在他們面前出現了一位名叫美琴的女孩，她是一位時間旅行者。那就是命運之輪開始轉動的時候。

能夠回到過去的時間旅行者被賦予了世界的命運。透過時光旅行掌控命運，從東京陷落的危機中拯救世界！

玩 Cinema Event，這是一種全新的娛樂形式，可讓您建立自己的故事，並將行動式遊戲機的螢幕變成劇院！

title_en: Tintin no Bouken - Unicorn-Gou no Himitsu
title_jp: Tintin no Bouken - Unicorn-Gou no Himitsu
no_intro_name: Tintin no Bouken - Unicorn-Gou no Himitsu (Japan)

title_jp: Tohoku Daigaku Karei Igaku Kenkyuusho - Kawashima Ryuuta Kyouju Kanshuu - Monosugoku Nou wo Kitaeru 5-Funkan no Oni Training
