title_en: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon - Shadow Wars
title_jp: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon - Shadow Wars
overview_en: Build, train, and equip the ultimate elite special ops team using the latest in high-tech weapons and gear. From the hot deserts of Kazakhstan to the towns and villages of Ukraine and the frozen lands of Siberia, you must discover and disable the secret Soviet-era "Dead Hand" bases which Russian ultranationalist Yuri Treskayev is using to build an army of drones to seize power.
overview_zh: 使用最新的高科技武器和裝備建造、訓練和裝備終極精英特種部隊。從哈薩克炎熱的沙漠到烏克蘭的城鎮和村莊，再到西伯利亞的冰凍土地，你必須發現並摧毀蘇聯時代的秘密「死亡之手」基地，俄羅斯極端民族主義者尤里·特雷斯卡耶夫正在利用該基地建立一支無人機軍隊來奪取權力。
no_intro_name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon - Shadow Wars (USA) (En,Fr,Es)

overview_en: As Sam Fisher, Third Echelon's most skilled Splinter Cell operative, you are assigned to execute a hazardous series of operations to investigate and eliminate a new source of information attacks originating in North Korea. At your disposal is a lethal array of tactics ranging from Combat Knife techniques to experimental prototype weapons skills and more-radical hand-to-hand techniques such as the Inverted Chokehold. Experience the intensity of acting as a lone operative fighting tomorrow's threats in the field and of cooperating online with a partner to accomplish crucial missions.
overview_zh: 身為山姆費雪，第三梯隊最熟練的分裂細胞特工，你被指派執行一系列危險的行動，以調查並消除源自北韓的新資訊攻擊源。您可以使用一系列致命的戰術，從戰鬥刀技術到實驗性原型武器技能以及更激進的肉搏戰技術（例如倒立掐脖子）。體驗作為一名單獨特工在現場對抗未來威脅以及與合作夥伴線上合作完成關鍵任務的強度。

overview_en: Tomodachi Life is a communication game for the 3DS in which players can convert their Miis into Tomodachis (or create new ones) and put them in a wide range of scenarios ranging from charming to utterly ridiculous. A key feature of the game is its text-to-speech tech which outputs user generated text as computerized speech in seven languages (EFIGS, Japanese and Korean).
overview_zh: Tomodachi Life 是一款 3DS 通訊遊戲，玩家可以將他們的 Miis 轉換為 Tomodachi（或建立新的），並將它們置於從迷人到完全荒謬的各種場景中。該遊戲的一個關鍵功能是其文字轉語音技術，該技術可將使用者生成的文字輸出為七種語言（EFIGS、日語和韓語）的電腦化語音。

title_en: Tongari Boushi to Mahou no Machi
title_jp: Tongari Boushi to Mahou no Machi
no_intro_name: Tongari Boushi to Mahou no Machi (Japan)

overview_en: Top Trumps NBA All Stars is a Basketball game, published by Giant Media Group, which was released in 2012.
overview_zh: 《Top Trumps NBA All Stars》是一款籃球遊戲，由巨人傳媒集團出品，於2012年發行。

overview_en: Remake of the Second game in the Tōshin Toshi series for the Nintendo 3DS.
overview_zh: 任天堂 3DS 版《Tōshin Toshi》系列第二款遊戲的重製版。

title_en: Tousouchuu - Shijou Saikyou no Hunter-tachi Kara Nigekire!
title_jp: Tousouchuu - Shijou Saikyou no Hunter-tachi Kara Nigekire!
no_intro_name: Tousouchuu - Shijou Saikyou no Hunter-tachi Kara Nigekire! (Japan)

title_en: Transformers - Dark of the Moon - Stealth Force Edition
overview_en: Action-adventure video game which was released on June 14, 2011 in North America. The Wii and the 3DS versions were very different to the Xbox 360 and PS3; there was also a DS version that was also different to the console and wii and 3DS versions. Transformers: Dark of the Moon was revealed on February 12, 2011 along the release of the trailer for the game. The PlayStation 3 and Xbox 360 versions of the game were developed by High Moon Studios who previously developed Transformers: War for Cybertron while the Wii, Nintendo DS, and Nintendo 3DS versions were developed by Behaviour Interactive. The game features a mode known as "Stealth Force" in which characters only partially transform from their vehicle mode. Weapons protrude from the vehicle form and more precise controls are available, such as strafing, airplanes also use this Stealth Force. Electronic Arts released mobile incarnations of the game for Symbian, iOS and BlackBerry.
overview_zh: 動作冒險電玩遊戲，於2011年6月14日在北美發行。 Wii 和 3DS 版本與 Xbox 360 和 PS3 有很大不同；還有一個 DS 版本，也不同於控制檯、wii 和 3DS 版本。 《變形金剛：月之黑》於 2011 年 2 月 12 日隨遊戲預告片一起發布。該遊戲的 PlayStation 3 和 Xbox 360 版本由 High Moon Studios 開發，該工作室之前曾開發過《變形金剛：塞伯坦之戰》，而 Wii、Nintendo DS 和 Nintendo 3DS 版本則由 Behaviour Interactive 開發。該遊戲具有一種稱為「隱形力量」的模式，其中角色僅部分地從其車輛模式轉變。武器從車輛形態突出，可以進行更精確的控制，例如掃射，飛機也使用這種隱形力量。 Electronic Arts 發布了該遊戲的 Symbian、iOS 和 BlackBerry 版本。
no_intro_name: Transformers - Dark of the Moon - Stealth Force Edition (USA) (En,Fr)

title_en: Transformers - Rise of the Dark Spark
overview_en: The Autobots and Decepticons battle on two fronts as war rages both on Cybertron and planet Earth in this explosive entry in the Transformers saga. This Nintendo 3DS game challenges younger gamers with strategy based gameplay and epic one-on-one 3D battles! The game alternates between two modes: strategic moves and 3D battle sequence. Included are over 50 characters from both Earth and Cybertron universes.
overview_zh: 在這部變形金剛傳奇的爆炸性作品中，汽車人和霸天虎在兩條戰線上展開戰鬥，塞伯坦和地球上的戰爭都在激烈進行。這款任天堂 3DS 遊戲透過基於策略的遊戲玩法和史詩般的一對一 3D 戰鬥來挑戰年輕玩家！遊戲在兩種模式之間交替：戰略移動和 3D 戰鬥序列。其中包括來自地球和塞伯坦宇宙的 50 多個角色。
no_intro_name: Transformers - Rise of the Dark Spark (USA) (En,Fr)

overview_en: Based on the hit animated television show produced by Hasbro Studios and currently airing on The Hub television network in the U.S., the game lets fans play as their favorite AUTOBOT characters and embark on an action-packed adventure to save the earth from the evil MEGATRON and his new secret weapon. Players step into the roles of OPTIMUS PRIME, BUMBLEBEE, ARCEE, AUTOBOT RATCHET, BULKHEAD and more as they explore unique vistas all around the world with brawler-style combat and diverse driving sequences. Along the way, gamers cultivate friendships with Jack, Miko and Raf - the human characters from the show - as Team Prime sets out to protect mankind and eliminate the DECEPTICONS once and for all.
overview_zh: 遊戲改編自孩之寶工作室製作、目前在美國 The Hub 電視網路播出的熱門動畫電視節目，讓粉絲們扮演他們最喜歡的汽車人角色，踏上一場充滿動作的冒險，從邪惡的威震天和他的新秘密武器手中拯救地球。玩家扮演 OPTIMUS PRIME、BUMBLEBEE、ARCEE、汽車人棘輪車、BULKHEAD 等角色，透過格鬥風格的戰鬥和多樣化的駕駛場景探索世界各地的獨特景觀。在此過程中，玩家與劇中的人類角色 Jack、Miko 和 Raf 建立了友誼，Team Prime 著手保護人類並一勞永逸地消滅霸天虎。

overview_en: Join Hello Kitty and her friends for a Happy party and have some fun! Get together and enjoy their many activities, including shopping, cooking, dress making, dressing up and dancing all in the cute and lovable style that has made the Hello Kitty franchise a hit all around the world.
overview_zh: 與 Hello Kitty 和她的朋友們一起參加快樂派對，玩得開心！齊聚一堂，享受他們的眾多活動，包括購物、烹飪、製作服裝、裝扮和跳舞，所有這些都以可愛可愛的風格進行，正是這種風格使 Hello Kitty 特許經營權風靡全球。

overview_en: Turbo: Super Stunt Squad is a high-velocity action game featuring the super-charged crew of characters from the upcoming film. Each playable character has their own signature street style and tricked-out skills which will come in handy when showing-off and earning respect with jumps, drifts, slides, flips and other super-cool stunt moves. Expert skills will also prove useful to earn power-ups, customize your character, win competitive challenges and discover shortcuts in the dynamic larger-than-life environments of Turbo’s world
overview_zh: Turbo: Super Stunt Squad 是一款高速動作遊戲，擁有即將上映的電影中充滿活力的角色團隊。每個可玩角色都有自己標誌性的街頭風格和酷炫的技能，當他們透過跳躍、漂移、滑行、翻轉和其他超酷的特技動作炫耀並贏得尊重時，這些技能會派上用場。事實證明，專業技能對於獲得能力提升、自訂角色、贏得競爭性挑戰以及在 Turbo 世界充滿活力的傳奇環境中發現捷徑也很有用

overview_en: Ultimate NES Remix brings the rapid-fire challenges and mashups from NES Remix to 3DS! Included are a selection of special challenges from 16 of Nintendo’s finest 8-bit games. Regional online leaderboards will let players see how they stack up against others in their area, and Championship Mode offers a series of challenges from three different games.
overview_zh: Ultimate NES Remix 將 NES Remix 的快速挑戰和混搭帶到了 3DS！其中包括來自 16 款任天堂最好的 8 位元遊戲的精選特殊挑戰。區域線上排行榜將讓玩家看到他們在自己的區域中與其他人的競爭情況，冠軍模式提供了來自三種不同遊戲的一系列挑戰。

title_en: Ushimitsu Monstruo - Linze to Mahou no Rhythm
title_jp: Ushimitsu Monstruo - Linze to Mahou no Rhythm
no_intro_name: Ushimitsu Monstruo - Linze to Mahou no Rhythm (Japan)

overview_en: Viking Invasion 2 is a capable tower defense game that doesn’t do much to improve on an unbroken formula; with an intense difficulty curve and emphasis on replayability, you’re sure to get plenty of hours out of this purchase. While it may not have enough to draw strangers to the genre in, fans of games like this will definitely find something to enjoy here.
overview_zh: 《Viking Invasion 2》是一款功能強大的塔防遊戲，但在未打破的公式上並沒有做太多改進；憑藉強烈的難度曲線和對可重玩性的重視，您一定會從這次購買中獲得足夠的時間。雖然它可能不足以吸引陌生人接觸該型別，但這類遊戲的粉絲肯定會在這裡找到一些喜歡的東西。

overview_en: WWE All Stars will deliver one of the greatest rosters ever assembled in a wrestling-centric videogame. Renowned WWE Legends will align with today's most prominent Superstars, inviting players to generate fantasy matches and ultimately determine the greatest competitors of all time. In addition, each Legend and Superstar will boast a distinctive and highly stylized appearance, adding to the overall atmosphere and intrepid attitude exuding from the on-screen action.
overview_zh: 《WWE 全明星》將帶來一款以摔角為中心的電子遊戲中有史以來最偉大的陣容之一。著名的 WWE 傳奇將與當今最著名的超級巨星合作，邀請玩家進行夢幻比賽並最終決定有史以來最偉大的競爭對手。此外，每位傳奇人物和超級巨星都將擁有獨特且高度風格化的外觀，增添了整體氛圍和銀幕動作中散發出的勇敢態度。

title_en: Wagamama Fashion - GirlsMode - Yokubari Sengen! Tokimeki Up!
title_jp: Wagamama Fashion - GirlsMode - Yokubari Sengen! Tokimeki Up!
no_intro_name: Wagamama Fashion - GirlsMode - Yokubari Sengen! Tokimeki Up! (Japan) (Rev 3)

title_en: Wan Nyan Doubutsu Byouin - Pet no Oisha-san ni Narou!
title_jp: Wan Nyan Doubutsu Byouin - Pet no Oisha-san ni Narou!
no_intro_name: Wan Nyan Doubutsu Byouin - Pet no Oisha-san ni Narou! (Japan)

title_en: Wan Nyan Doubutsu Byouin - Suteki na Juui-san ni Narou!
title_jp: Wan Nyan Doubutsu Byouin - Suteki na Juui-san ni Narou!
no_intro_name: Wan Nyan Doubutsu Byouin - Suteki na Juui-san ni Narou! (Japan)

overview_en: The infamous schemer, Wario, is back! Play his brand-new microgame collection, where you'll have seconds to complete 300 different microgames. Better think fast to succeed! You'll use the touchscreen, tilt the system, push buttons, and rock the mic as you laugh through fully voiced stories featuring new and classic characters!
overview_zh: 臭名昭著的陰謀家瓦利歐回來了！玩他全新的微型遊戲合集，您將有幾秒鐘的時間完成 300 個不同的微型遊戲。最好快速思考才能成功！您將使用觸控螢幕、傾斜系統、按鈕和搖晃麥克風，一邊笑一邊欣賞新角色和經典角色的全配音故事！

overview_en: Groove along to the beats of the hammer falls, tapping your Nintendo 3DS Touch Screen to the rhythm in order to forge your shop's weapons. The higher your CHAIN, the stronger and sharper the weapon will turn out. Any blacksmith worth his steel also knows that you have to strike while the iron is hot. Make sure to watch the weapon's temperature, which will affect its critical hit rate, durability, and special properties.
overview_zh: 跟著錘子落下的節奏，按照節奏敲擊你的 Nintendo 3DS 觸控屏，以鍛造你商店的武器。你的鏈條越高，武器就越強大、越鋒利。任何稱職的鐵匠都知道，必須趁熱打鐵。請務必注意武器的溫度，這會影響其暴擊率、耐用性和特殊屬性。

overview_en:
Join the Winx Club in their newest adventure Winx Club: Saving Alfea! In order to throw the perfect party, the girls must run, jump and fly their way through their home worlds to gather all of the finishing touches for the schools anniversary. But their return is anything but welcoming. Thanks to her new Siphonix Talisman, Selina has unleashed hordes of creatures from within the Legendarium. Its up to the Winx to battle Selinas creatures and discover how to destroy her all-powerful Talisman, all while making sure the schools celebration isnt ruined!

Play as Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa in both their human and fairy forms to collect party supplies and save Alfea from Selinas dark magic! The Legendarium monsters must be stopped in this side-scrolling puzzle/adventure game, and the only way to do that is by working as a team!

Strategically use each girls powers to collect the items needed to break the Talisman and assure the party preparations are finished in time! Work your way through 32 unique repayable levels to help the Winx Club save Alfea!

Features:
-Play as Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha Tecna and Musa in both their fairy and human forms!
-Challenge yourself by completing 32 repayable puzzle levels!
-Get immersed in the story of the Winx and learn how to use teamwork to conquer even the most difficult situations!
-Jump, Evade, and use puzzle solving skills to adventure in human form!
-Transform to float and fight against minions of the Legendarium when in fairy form!
-Unlock new level hubs by collecting party items and defeating creatures of the Legendarium, driving them out of each world!
-Make your Winx girls more powerful by gathering the hidden Dragon Flame Sparkles!
-Find the Hidden Collectibles to unlock secret items!
overview_zh:
加入 Winx Club 的最新冒險 Winx Club：拯救 Alfea！為了舉辦一場完美的派對，女孩們必須跑、跳、飛，穿過她們的家鄉，為學校週年紀念日收集所有的收尾工作。但他們的迴歸一點也不受歡迎。憑藉她的新虹吸護身符，塞琳娜從傳奇館中釋放了成群的生物。仙靈們要與賽琳娜的生物戰鬥，並找出如何摧毀她全能的護身符，同時確保學校的慶祝活動不會被破壞！

扮演人類和精靈形態的 Bloom、Stella、Flora、Aisha、Tecna 和 Musa，收集派對用品並從 Selinas 的黑魔法手中拯救 Alfea！在這款橫向捲軸解謎/冒險遊戲中，必須阻止傳奇怪物，而做到這一點的唯一方法就是團隊合作！

策略性地利用每個女孩的力量來收集打破護身符所需的物品，並確保派對準備工作及時完成！努力闖過 32 個獨特的可重玩關卡，幫助仙靈俱樂部拯救阿爾菲！

特點：
- 扮演 Bloom、Stella、Flora、Aisha Tecna 和 Musa 的仙女和人類形態！
- 完成 32 個可重複的謎題關卡，挑戰自己！
- 沉浸在 Winx 的故事中，學習如何利用團隊合作來克服最困難的情況！
-跳躍、躲避，並利用解謎技巧以人類形態進行冒險！
- 變身為漂浮並以仙女形態與傳說中的小兵作戰！
- 透過收集派對物品並擊敗傳奇館的生物來解鎖新的關卡中心，將它們趕出每個世界！
- 收集隱藏的龍焰火花，讓你的仙靈女孩變得更強大！
- 找到隱藏的收藏品來解鎖秘密物品！

overview_en: Wipeout 2 will offer updated, outrageous course designs across all platforms with obstacles and effects taken straight from the show’s summer and winter seasons. Players must navigate around snow, ice, foam, and fan-favorite obstacles like the Sucker Punch Wall and Big Balls; which are making their triumphant returns alongside more than 50 others. Extended gameplay on all systems encourages even more interaction and participation with family and friends. Once again, all the wild and crazy action is narrated by the show’s hosts John Anderson and John Henson.
overview_zh: 《Wipeout 2》將在所有平臺上提供更新的、令人震驚的賽道設計，其中的障礙物和效果直接取自該劇的夏季和冬季。玩家必須繞過雪、冰、泡沫和粉絲最喜歡的障礙物，如美少女特技牆和大球；他們與其他 50 多家企業一起凱旋歸來。所有系統上的擴充套件遊戲玩法鼓勵與家人和朋友進行更多互動和參與。所有瘋狂的動作再次由節目主持人約翰安德森和約翰漢森講述。

overview_en: Wipeout 3 gets gamers back on their favorite insane obstacle course game show, complete with updated features, even more wacky characters, and all the epic wipeouts players can handle.
overview_zh: 《Wipeout 3》讓玩家重返他們最喜歡的瘋狂障礙遊戲節目，其中包含更新的功能、更古怪的角色以及玩家可以應對的所有史詩般的消滅。

overview_en: WORD WIZARD 3D Is a collection of classic word games. The player is invited to create, compose and find words in addictive and absorbing gameplay. Levels of difficulty naturally increase as the players advance through the game making it suitable for all ages.
overview_zh: WORD WIZARD 3D 是一款經典文字遊戲合輯。玩家被邀請在令人上癮且引人入勝的遊戲中創作、創作和尋找單字。隨著玩家在遊戲中前進，難度自然會增加，使其適合所有年齡層。

title_en: World Soccer Winning Eleven 2014 - Aoki Samurai no Chousen
title_jp: World Soccer Winning Eleven 2014 - Aoki Samurai no Chousen
no_intro_name: World Soccer Winning Eleven 2014 - Aoki Samurai no Chousen (Japan)

overview_en: Xenoblade Chronicles 3D 3DS - A remake of the well-received Xenoblade Chronicles for Wii is launching exclusively for New Nintendo 3DS XL. The new version offers 3D visuals and allows players to view the maps and character stats on the bottom screen. An additional bonus mode lets players view 3D models of the characters and listen to music tracks from the game. This game only works in the newer 3DS XL SKU?s, REDSRAAA and REDSVAAA
overview_zh: Xenoblade Chronicles 3D 3DS - 廣受好評的 Xenoblade Chronicles Wii 重製版現已專為新任天堂 3DS XL 推出。新版本提供 3D 視覺效果，讓玩家在底部螢幕上檢視地圖和角色統計資料。額外的獎勵模式可以讓玩家檢視角色的 3D 模型並聆聽遊戲中的音樂。遊戲僅適用於較新的 3DS XL SKU、REDSRAAA 和 REDSVAAA

overview_en:
Xeodrifter is the story of an interstellar drifter traveling the stars on a simple mission of exploration. We join our nomad as he embarks on the investigation of a small cluster of four planets in the omega sector, after a collision with a rogue asteroid damaged his warp core.

Blast your way through alien landscapes, seek out valuable secrets, and defeat ancient guardians to unlock powers from a legendary supreme culture in this exciting journey of mystery and adventure.
overview_zh:
《Xeodrifter》講述了一位星際漂流者在星際中旅行，執行簡單的探索任務的故事。在與一顆流氓小行星相撞並損壞了他的曲速核心後，我們加入了我們的遊牧者，開始對歐米茄星區的一個由四顆行星組成的小星團進行調查。

在這個令人興奮的神秘和冒險之旅中，在外星景觀中殺出一條血路，尋找寶貴的秘密，並擊敗古代守護者，釋放傳奇至高文化的力量。

title_en: Yakari - The Mystery of Four Seasons
overview_en: Few outside of the French-speaking world may be aware of Yakari, but in Belgium and France he's made a big splash. A young Native American boy with the power to communicate with animals, he's the eponymous hero of a 1973 comic book which has spawned almost 40 sequels, two French cartoons and even an award-winning German musical that has been running for the last three years - and now, after four decades, he's starring in his first video game exclusively on 3DS. It's a shame, then, that Yakari: The Mystery of Four-Seasons doesn't live up to the series' reputation.
overview_zh: 在法語世界之外，可能很少有人知道 Yakari，但他在比利時和法國引起了巨大的轟動。他是一位擁有與動物溝通能力的年輕美國原住民男孩，是 1973 年漫畫書中的同名英雄，該漫畫已衍生出近 40 部續集、兩部法國動畫片，甚至還有一部在過去三年裡一直上演的獲獎德國音樂劇 - 如今，四十年後，他主演了他的第一款 3DS 獨家影片遊戲。那麼，令人遺憾的是，《夜燈：四季之謎》並沒有辜負系列的聲譽。
no_intro_name: Yakari - The Mystery of Four Seasons (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)

overview_en: YO-KAI WATCH centers on a boy who gets a special watch that lets him befriend and help mischievous Yo-kai* and later summon them to fight other Yo-kai. Players can overcome challenges and help various characters solve everyday problems with the help of Yo-kai friends. These eccentric Yo-kai resemble anything from inanimate objects to mythical creatures.
overview_zh: YO-KAI WATCH centers on a boy who gets a special watch that lets him befriend and help mischievous Yo-kai* and later summon them to fight other Yo-kai.玩家可以在妖怪朋友的幫助下克服挑戰並幫助各種角色解決日常問題。這些古怪的妖怪類似於從無生命物體到神話生物的任何東西。

overview_en: Much like its predecessor, Yo-kai Watch 2 is an open world role-playing video game, where the player is given control of player character Nathan Adams, or alternatively, Katie Forester. Players navigate around the open world using the Nintendo 3DS' touchscreen to find and befriend various Yo-kai, which are scattered across the overworld. Players befriend Yo-kai by giving them a food that they like before beginning battle, and after defeating the Yo-kai it approaches the player character and gives them its Yo-kai Medal, allowing it to be summoned at will. A new feature in battles is using the touch screen to find a particular sweetspot on an enemy Yo-kai to increase the likelihood of befriending it at the end of the battle, or other sweetspots for extra damage, extra money, or extra experience. Yo-kai can also be acquired through an in game Crank-a-kai (Gasha Machine) by collecting in-game coins or using Play Coins. Certain Yo-kai are necessary for completing the game's main quest, and special rare Yo-kai are acquired through various subquests. Yo-kai have the capability to evolve into more powerful versions of themselves if they reach a certain level, or they can evolve by combining with particular items or other Yo-kai. The Yo-kai are divided amongst eight different classes, each with their own strengths and weaknesses. There are also Legendary Yo-kai that can only be obtained by collecting a particular set of Yo-kai listed in the Yo-kai Medallium, a compendium of the different Yo-kai the player has encountered or befriended. When the player encounters a Yo-kai, he enters into battle with it using six Yo-kai that the player has befriended previously. The touchscreen is used during battles to rotate amongst the player's Yo-kai in battle at will. It is also used either to clear up status effects on the player's Yo-kai or to charge up the Yo-kai's Soultimate abilities. While the original Yo-kai Watch featured nearly 250 Yo-kai, Yo-Kai Watch 2 features nearly 450, including several that were featured as bosses in the original game.
overview_zh: 與前作非常相似，《妖怪手錶 2》是一款開放世界角色扮演影片遊戲，玩家可以控制玩家角色內森·亞當斯 (Nathan Adams)，或者凱蒂·福雷斯特 (Katie Forester)。玩家使用任天堂 3DS 的觸控螢幕在開放世界中導航，尋找分散在世界各地的各種妖怪並與他們交朋友。玩家在開始戰鬥之前透過給妖怪他們喜歡的食物來與妖怪交朋友，在擊敗妖怪後，它會接近玩家角色並給他們妖怪勳章，允許它隨意召喚。戰鬥中的一項新功能是使用觸控螢幕找到敵人妖怪的特定甜蜜點，以增加在戰鬥結束時與它成為朋友的可能性，或找到其他甜蜜點以獲得額外傷害、額外金錢或額外經驗。妖怪也可以透過遊戲中的 Crank-a-kai（扭蛋機）透過收集遊戲內硬幣或使用 Play Coins 來獲得。某些妖怪是完成遊戲主線任務所必需的，特殊的稀有妖怪是透過各種子任務獲得的。如果達到某個水平，妖怪就有能力進化成更強大的版本，或者可以透過與特定物品或其他妖怪結合來進化。妖怪分為八個不同的類別，每個類別都有自己的優點和缺點。還有傳奇妖怪，只能透過收集妖怪獎章中列出的一組特定妖怪來獲得，妖怪獎章是玩家遇到或結交的不同妖怪的綱要。當玩家遇到妖怪時，他會使用玩家之前認識的六隻妖怪與其進行戰鬥。戰鬥時使用觸控螢幕可以隨意輪換玩家的妖怪進行戰鬥。它也可以用來清除玩家妖怪的狀態效果或為妖怪的靈魂能力充電。最初的《妖怪手錶》中有近 250 個妖怪，而《妖怪手錶 2》中有近 450 個妖怪，其中包括一些在原版遊戲中扮演 Boss 的角色。

overview_en:
Find, befriend, and battle more than 350 new and returning Yo-kai. Hop on a train to seek out new towns and new Yo-kai. Teaming up with the heroic cat, Hovernyan, travel back in time to save Springdale, and witness the origin of the Yo-kai Watch!

As the cause of all of life's troubles, Yo-kai are hiding everywhere! Explore the seaside town of San Fantastico or the sleepy village of Harrisville in search of new Yo-kai to befriend. Then time travel 60 years into the past with a new hero - Hovernyan - to ensure the Yo-kai Watch Model Zero is created and your timeline is preserved! For the first time, battle friends* online or via local wireless to earn rewards for the main adventure.
overview_zh:
尋找超過 350 名新的和回歸的妖怪，與他們交朋友並與之戰鬥。跳上火車去尋找新的城鎮和新的妖怪。與英雄貓 Hovernyan 合作，穿越時空拯救斯普林代爾，見證妖怪手錶的起源！

作為生活中所有煩惱的根源，妖怪無所不在！探索海濱小鎮 San Fantastico 或沉睡的 Harrisville 村莊，尋找新的妖怪來結交。然後與新英雄 Hovernyan 一起穿越到 60 年前，以確保妖怪手錶模型零號被建立並保留您的時間線！第一次，線上上或透過本地無線與朋友*戰鬥，以獲得主要冒險的獎勵。

overview_en:
Get wicked and complete the ultimate YO-KAI WATCH experience.

The strange but friendly troublemakers, Yo-kai, are back in a time-traveling adventure, and this time their mysterious world is packed with exclusive quests, Wicked Yo-kai to befriend, new areas to explore, and a revamped Blasters action co-op mode* featuring new bosses.

As the cause of life's troubles, Yo-kai are hiding everywhere! Explore the seaside town San Fantastico and the sleepy village Harrisville in search of these mischievous beings. Then travel 60 years into the past with Hovernyan to ensure the Yo-kai Watch Model Zero is created and your timeline is preserved! Battle online or via local wireless to earn in-game rewards for your adventure. Or take control of a Yo-kai in Psychic Blasters, a revamped 4-player action mode! If you own the YO-KAI WATCH 2: Bony Spirits or YO-KAI WATCH 2: Fleshy Souls game, you can transfer save data from your Nintendo 3DS family system to YO-KAI WATCH 2: Psychic Specters and pick up where you left off. Prepare yourself for the deepest and most immersive Yo-kai experience yet!

* Embark on an epic adventure in Springdale with more than 350 Yo-kai to discover and befriend
* Assemble and summon your team of 6 Yo-kai from your Yo-kai Watch to battle troublemaking Yo-kai, solve people's problems, and fight to end a civil war between competing Yo-kai factions
* Travel back in time to discover the origin of the Yo-kai Watch and meet Classic Yo-kai from 60 years ago
* For the first time, befriend Yo-kai from the Wicked Tribe as well as Boss Yo-kai and other Yo-kai exclusive to this ultimate version
* Discover exclusive quests, such as the secret pasts of Darknyan, Dame Dedtime, and Whisper
* Hop on the Hexpress train and explore new locations, including a Yo-kai amusement park, hot springs, and kabuki theater
* Team up in an expanded version of the Yo-kai Watch Blasters local co-op mode, with powerful new bosses to defeat
* Challenge your friend's team over the Internet or local wireless in 2-player multiplayer battles
* Transfer game data from YO-KAI WATCH 2: Bony Spirits or YO-KAI WATCH 2: Fleshy Souls to YO-KAI WATCH 2: Psychic Specters and play from where you left off
* Connect with YO-KAI WATCH 2: Bony Spirits or YO-KAI WATCH 2: Fleshy Souls to YO-KAI WATCH 2: Psychic Specters to unlock exclusive dungeons, stronger bosses, and special gleaming Yo-kai
overview_zh:
變得邪惡並完成終極妖怪手錶體驗。

奇怪但友好的麻煩製造者妖怪又回到了時間旅行冒險中，這一次他們的神秘世界充滿了獨特的任務、與邪惡的妖怪交朋友、新的探索領域，以及以新老闆為特色的改進的爆破手動作合作模式*。

作為生活煩惱的根源，妖怪無所不在！探索海濱小鎮聖幻想曲和沈睡的哈里斯維爾村莊，尋找這些頑皮的生物。然後與 Hovernyan 一起穿越到 60 年前，確保製作出妖怪手錶模型零並保留您的時間線！線上上或透過本地無線戰鬥，為您的冒險贏得遊戲內獎勵。或在 Psychic Blasters 中控制妖怪，這是一種改進的 4 人動作模式！如果您擁有《YO-KAI WATCH 2：Bony Spirits》或《YO-KAI WATCH 2：Fleshy Souls》遊戲，您可以將儲存資料從您的 Nintendo 3DS 系列系統傳輸到《YO-KAI WATCH 2：Psychic Specters》並從上次中斷的地方繼續。準備好迎接迄今為止最深入、最身臨其境的妖怪體驗吧！

* 在斯普林代爾踏上史詩般的冒險之旅，與超過 350 只妖怪一起發現並結交朋友
* 從妖怪手錶中集結並召喚由 6 名妖怪組成的隊伍，與製造麻煩的妖怪戰鬥，解決人們的問題，並為結束妖怪派系之間的內戰而戰
* 穿越時空，探索妖怪手錶的起源，認識 60 年前的經典妖怪
* 首次與邪惡部落的妖怪以及 Boss 妖怪以及此終極版本獨有的其他妖怪成為朋友
* 探索獨家任務，例如達克尼亞、戴泰姆夫人和耳語的秘密過去
* 搭乘 Hexpress 列車探索新地點，包括妖怪遊樂園、溫泉和歌舞伎劇院
* 在 Yo-kai Watch Blasters 本地合作模式的擴充套件版本中組隊，擊敗強大的新頭目
* 在 2 人多人遊戲戰鬥中透過網路或本地無線挑戰您朋友的團隊
* 將遊戲資料從 YO-KAI WATCH 2: Bony Spirits 或 YO-KAI WATCH 2: Fleshy Souls 轉移到 YO-KAI WATCH 2: Psychic Specters 並從上次中斷的地方開始遊戲
* 連線《YO-KAI WATCH 2: Bony Spirits》或《YO-KAI WATCH 2: Fleshy Souls》到《YO-KAI WATCH 2: Psychic Specters》，解鎖專屬地下城、更強大的頭目和特殊的閃閃發光的妖怪

overview_en:
Mischievous beings known as Yo-kai are everywhere, and it’s up to Nate and Hailey Anne to befriend, battle, and solve problems with them.

Follow two parallel stories and unravel the mysteries behind strange sightings while meeting over 600 Yo-kai and using the new 3x3 grid battle system to strategically dish out or dodge attacks.

More Yo-kai, more mysteries! ’Merican Yo-kai have made their way to YO-KAI WATCH 3 and they’re rootin’ tootin’ troublemakers. Speaking of troublemakers, in BBQ, zombies rise from their graves and Nate must free the town during Zombie Night. If you’re too afraid of zombies, you can always find treasure by exploring randomly generated dungeons and discover the truth about the mysterious ruins hidden all across the continent with the Yo-kai Blasters T group.
overview_zh:
被稱為「妖怪」的淘氣生物無所不在，內特和海莉安妮需要與他們交朋友、戰鬥並解決問題。

跟隨兩個平行的故事，解開奇怪目擊事件背後的謎團，同時會見 600 多個妖怪，並使用新的 3x3 網格戰鬥系統戰略性地發起或躲避攻擊。

更多妖怪，更多謎團！ “美國妖怪已經進入 YO-KAI WATCH 3，他們是麻煩製造者。說到麻煩製造者，在《燒烤》中，殭屍從墳墓中復活，內特必須在“殭屍之夜”期間解放小鎮。如果您太害怕殭屍，您總可以透過探索隨機生成的地下城來尋找寶藏，並與妖怪爆破者 T 小組一起發現隱藏在整個大陸的神秘遺蹟的真相。

title_en: Yo-Kai Watch Blasters - Red Cat Corps
overview_en: Take down enemy Yo-kai and Big Bosses using skills and Soultimate Moves with up to 3 other friends. As you tackle missions, befriend new Yo-kai to amplify your team's awesomeness. Train with Sgt. Burly to become the strongest Blasters team there is! As you complete missions, gather Oni Orbs and items to level up or forge equipment to power up your team. Some missions, bosses, and Yo-kai are exclusive to each version. Trade Yo-kai between versions to collect them all! You can befriend all friend Yo-kai from all versions of the YO-KAI WATCH 2 game, boss Yo-kai, plus the all-new Usapyon, Blizzie, and more. Link save data with a version of YO-KAI WATCH 2 to befriend special Yo-kai. Uncover new sides to the story as well as new Yo-kai, bosses, and missions with a post-launch software update.
overview_zh: 與最多 3 位其他好友一起使用技能和靈魂招式打倒敵方妖怪和大頭目。當你完成任務時，與新妖怪成為朋友，以增強你的團隊的威力。與中士一起訓練。身材魁梧，成為最強的衝擊波隊！當你完成任務時，收集鬼球和物品來升級或鍛造裝備來增強你的團隊。有些任務、頭目和妖怪是每個版本獨有的。在不同版本之間交易妖怪以收集全部妖怪！您可以與 YO-KAI WATCH 2 遊戲所有版本中的所有妖怪朋友、Boss Yo-kai，以及全新的 Usapyon、Blizzie 等成為朋友。將儲存資料與 YO-KAI WATCH 2 版本連結起來，與特殊的妖怪交朋友。透過發布後的軟體更新來發現故事的新側面以及新的妖怪、頭目和任務。
no_intro_name: Yo-Kai Watch Blasters - Red Cat Corps (USA)

title_en: Yo-Kai Watch Blasters - White Dog Squad
overview_en: Take down enemy Yo-kai and Big Bosses using skills and Soultimate Moves with up to 3 other friends*. As you tackle missions, befriend new Yo-kai to amplify your team's awesomeness. Train with Sgt. Burly to become the strongest Blasters team there is! As you complete missions, gather Oni Orbs and items to level up or forge equipment to power up your team. Some missions, bosses, and Yo-kai are exclusive to each version. Trade Yo-kai between versions to collect them all! You can befriend all friend Yo-kai from all versions of the YO-KAI WATCH 2 game, boss Yo-kai, plus the all-new Usapyon, Blizzie, and more. Link save data with a version of YO-KAI WATCH 2 to befriend special Yo-kai. Uncover new sides to the story as well as new Yo-kai, bosses, and missions with a post-launch software update.
overview_zh: 與最多 3 位其他好友*一起使用技能和靈魂招式打倒敵方妖怪和大頭目。當你完成任務時，與新妖怪成為朋友，以增強你的團隊的威力。與中士一起訓練。身材魁梧，成為最強的衝擊波隊！當你完成任務時，收集鬼球和物品來升級或鍛造裝備來增強你的團隊。有些任務、頭目和妖怪是每個版本獨有的。在不同版本之間交易妖怪以收集全部妖怪！您可以與 YO-KAI WATCH 2 遊戲所有版本中的所有妖怪朋友、Boss Yo-kai，以及全新的 Usapyon、Blizzie 等成為朋友。將儲存資料與 YO-KAI WATCH 2 版本連結起來，與特殊的妖怪交朋友。透過發布後的軟體更新來發現故事的新側面以及新的妖怪、頭目和任務。
no_intro_name: Yo-Kai Watch Blasters - White Dog Squad (USA)

overview_en: Yoshi and Baby Mario are back in Yoshi’s New Island, the third installment in the beloved franchise. The series’ fun game-play mechanics such as Yoshi’s Flutter Jump, Ground Pound and Egg Throw return, but now Yoshi knows a ton of new tricks too. Yoshi gets to bash and thrash his environment by throwing around Mega Eggdozers and Metal Eggdozers. Yoshi also can transform into a variety of objects, such as a jackhammer or a submarine, both of which can be manipulated using the Nintendo 3DS gyro controls. A certain type of star even transforms him into Super Yoshi, giving him the ability to fly through the sky or run along walls and ceilings. Players who are having trouble completing a level might see the appearance of Flutter Wings, which let Yoshi fly through the air.
overview_zh: 耀西和小馬裡奧回到了耀西的新島，這是備受喜愛的系列的第三部分。該系列有趣的遊戲機制，如耀西的顫動跳躍、地面重擊和雞蛋投擲回歸，但現在耀西也知道了許多新技巧。耀西透過投擲巨型推蛋器和金屬推蛋器來猛烈打擊他的環境。耀西也可以變身為各種物體，例如手提鑽或潛水艇，這兩種物體都可以使用任天堂 3DS 陀螺儀控制進行操縱。某種型別的星星甚至可以把他變成超級耀西，讓他能夠飛過天空或沿著牆壁和天花板奔跑。無法完成關卡的玩家可能會看到撲翼之翼的出現，它可以讓耀西在空中飛行。

title_en: Youkai Watch Busters 2 - Hihou Densetsu Banbarayaa - Magnum
title_jp: Youkai Watch Busters 2 - Hihou Densetsu Banbarayaa - Magnum
no_intro_name: Youkai Watch Busters 2 - Hihou Densetsu Banbarayaa - Magnum (Japan)

title_en: Youkai Watch Busters 2 - Hihou Densetsu Banbarayaa - Sword
title_jp: Youkai Watch Busters 2 - Hihou Densetsu Banbarayaa - Sword
no_intro_name: Youkai Watch Busters 2 - Hihou Densetsu Banbarayaa - Sword (Japan)

overview_en: Based on WB's animated series airing on Cartoon Network, Young Justice: Legacy is an Action RPG where players control multiple characters in a squad created from 12 possible team members to explore, fight, gather experience, and level up. It will feature both solo and multiplayer missions that follow an epic plotline spanning many locations all across the DC Comics world of Earth-16.
overview_zh: 《少年正義聯盟：遺產》以 WB 在卡通頻道上播出的動畫系列為基礎，是一款動作角色扮演遊戲，玩家可以控制由 12 名可能的團隊成員組成的小隊中的多個角色進行探索、戰鬥、收集經驗和升級。它將包含單人和多人任務，遵循跨越 DC 漫畫地球 16 世界許多地點的史詩情節。

title_en: Yowamushi Pedal - Ashita e no High Cadence
title_jp: Yowamushi Pedal - Ashita e no High Cadence
no_intro_name: Yowamushi Pedal - Ashita e no High Cadence (Japan)

title_en: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters - Saikyo Card Battle
title_jp: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters - Saikyo Card Battle
overview_en:
Yu-Gi-Oh! Saikyou Card Battle will launch for 3DS in Japan as a free-to-play download title on July 6, Konami announced.

The game puts players in control of a protagonist character as he battles against various rival duelists, including a large number of game original characters, as well as legendary duelists like Joey, Yami Yugi, and Kaiba.
overview_zh:
遊戲王哦！ Konami 宣佈，《Saikyou Card Battle》將於 7 月 6 日在日本推出 3DS 免費下載遊戲。

遊戲中，玩家控制主角與各種對手決鬥者戰鬥，其中包括大量遊戲原創角色，以及喬伊、黑暗遊戲和海馬等傳奇決鬥者。
no_intro_name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters - Saikyo Card Battle (Japan)

overview_en: In Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal World Duel Carnival, relive the story of the “World Duel Carnival” from the first season of the Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal animated series! Play as yourself or one of eleven playable characters from the series, like Yuma, Astral, Tori, Shark and more, each with their own storyline and earn an invite to the World Duel Carnival where you can battle with more than 40 Duelists from the TV show! Players can enjoy a Story Mode and a Free Duel Mode where they can play with more than 5,700 cards from the official Yu-Gi-Oh! trading card game Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal World Duel Carnival is the first Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal video game and the first Yu-Gi-Oh! video game to be released on the Nintendo 3DS.
overview_zh: 在《遊戲王》中！ Zexal世界決鬥嘉年華，重溫遊戲王第一季「世界決鬥嘉年華」的故事！澤克薩爾動畫系列！扮演您自己或該系列中的 11 個可玩角色之一，例如 Yuma、Astral、Tori、Shark 等，每個角色都有自己的故事情節，並獲得參加世界決鬥嘉年華的邀請，在那裡您可以與電視節目中的 40 多名決鬥者戰鬥！玩家可以享受故事模式和自由決鬥模式，在其中可以使用官方遊戲王中的 5,700 多張卡牌！集換式卡牌遊戲遊戲王！ Zexal 世界決鬥嘉年華是第一位遊戲王！ Zexal 電子遊戲和第一款遊戲王！影片遊戲將在任天堂 3DS 上發布。

overview_en:
Cut down entire legions of enemies as fan-favorite Legend of Zelda characters using powerful moves as Hyrule Warriors comes to the Nintendo 3DS system. Control multiple characters to enhance your strategies and enjoy new story elements with playable characters from The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker, such as Tetra, King Daphnes, and more.

War rages as the delicate balance of the Triforce is disrupted. The kingdom of Hyrule is once again being torn apart by a dark power, this time lead by Sorceress Cia. Now it's up to the legendary hero Link to face hordes of enemies and find the missing Princess Zelda. Advance the story to unlock new playable characters, each with unique moves and weapon types. Collect Rupees and other useful items to upgrade weapons and craft badges, which you can use to bolster each warrior's abilities.

Battle the fiercest Legend of Zelda enemies across Hyrule's most famous locales
Play as fan-favorite characters like Tetra, Skull Kid, and the King Daphnes for the first time in the series!
New characters and story elements based on The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker
New character-switching feature lets you change and command characters on the fly
Includes a download code for a Nintendo 3DS HOME theme of Hyrule Warriors Legends**
Includes a download code that allows you to play as Linkle, Tetra, Toon Link, Skull Kid, and King Daphnes in the Hyrule Warriors game for the Wii U console** (Hyrule Warriors Legends game and Wii U console sold separately)
Contains content from the original the Hyrule Warriors game, released on the Wii U console
Game is only playable in 3D with a New Nintendo 3DS or New Nintendo 3DS XL system.
overview_zh:
在 Nintendo 3DS 系統中，海拉魯無雙 (Hyrule Warriors) 登場，扮演深受粉絲喜愛的《薩爾達傳說》角色，使用強大的招式消滅大批敵人。控制多個角色來增強你的策略，並透過《薩爾達傳說：風之杖》中的可玩角色（例如 Tetra、King Daphnes 等）享受新的故事元素。

三角力量的微妙平衡被破壞，戰爭愈演愈烈。海拉魯王國再次被黑暗力量撕裂，這次由女巫西亞領導。現在，傳奇英雄林克需要面對成群的敵人並找到失蹤的薩爾達公主。推動故事發展，解鎖新的可玩角色，每個角色都有獨特的動作和武器型別。收集盧比和其他有用的物品來升級武器和製作徽章，您可以用它們來增強每個戰士的能力。

在海拉爾最著名的地點與最兇猛的《薩爾達傳說》敵人作戰
在系列中首次扮演粉絲最喜愛的角色，如 Tetra、骷髏小子和達芙妮國王！
基於《薩爾達傳說：風之杖》的新角色與故事元素
新的角色切換功能可讓您即時變更和命令角色
包括 Hyrule Warriors Legends 的 Nintendo 3DS HOME 主題的下載程式碼**
包含下載程式碼，可讓您在 Wii U 主機的 Hyrule Warriors 遊戲中扮演 Linkle、Tetra、Toon Link、Skull Kid 和 King Daphnes**（Hyrule Warriors Legends 遊戲和 Wii U 主機單獨出售）
包含在 Wii U 主機上發布的原版《海拉魯無雙》遊戲的內容
遊戲只能在 New Nintendo 3DS 或 New Nintendo 3DS XL 系統上以 3D 模式運作。

title_en: Zelda no Densetsu - Kamigami no Triforce 2
title_jp: Zelda no Densetsu - Kamigami no Triforce 2
overview_en: Following the events of A Link to the Past, the royal family of Hyrule elected to split the triforce to stop evil from rising again. This had the effect of returning each part to its elected owner. One part returned to the deceased demon king Ganon, one part stayed with the Royal family, and a third part took its rightful place in the heart of the hero eternal.
overview_zh: 在《眾神的三角力量》事件發生後，海拉魯王室選擇分裂三角力量，以阻止邪惡再次崛起。這具有將每個部件歸還給其選定所有者的效果。一部分回到了已故的魔王加農身邊，一部分留在了王室，第三部分在永恆英雄的心中佔據了應有的位置。
no_intro_name: Zelda no Densetsu - Kamigami no Triforce 2 (Japan)

title_en: Zelda no Densetsu - Mujura no Kamen 3D
title_jp: Zelda no Densetsu - Mujura no Kamen 3D
no_intro_name: Zelda no Densetsu - Mujura no Kamen 3D (Japan) (Rev 1)

title_en: Zelda no Densetsu - Toki no Ocarina 3D
title_jp: Zelda no Densetsu - Toki no Ocarina 3D
no_intro_name: Zelda no Densetsu - Toki no Ocarina 3D (Japan)

overview_en:
The Legend of Zelda: Tri Force Heroes is an action-adventure game developed by Nintendo EPD and Grezzo and published by Nintendo for the Nintendo 3DS. The second original Nintendo 3DS entry in The Legend of Zelda series after A Link Between Worlds, this game is the third instalment in the franchise to prominently feature a multiplayer campaign after Four Swords and Four Swords Adventures, albeit this time with only three players as opposed to four, wireless and online connectivity as opposed to the prior games' use of link cables, and a stronger emphasis on cooperation rather than competition.

The story follows the same incarnation of Link from the aforementioned A Link Between Worlds, who this time is called forth along with two other Links by the fashion-obsessed kingdom of Hytopia to lift a curse placed on their princess, Styla, from the evil Drablands Witch.

Tri Force Heroes was released worldwide in October 2015 and received generally mixed reviews from critics. While the game's presentation, soundtrack and multiplayer were praised, many reviewers criticized the game's single-player mode and its online functionality and matchmaking features. The game has sold over 1.36 million copies worldwide as of December 2020.
overview_zh:
《薩爾達傳說：三角力量英雄》是一款由 Nintendo EPD 和 Grezzo 開發並由任天堂針對 Nintendo 3DS 發行的動作冒險遊戲。該遊戲是《薩爾達傳說》系列繼《天之鍊》之後的第二款任天堂 3DS 原創遊戲，也是繼《四劍》和《四劍冒險》之後該系列中第三部以多人戰役為特色的遊戲，儘管這次只有三名玩家而不是四名玩家，無線和線上連線而不是之前遊戲使用的連線電纜，並且更加強調合作而不是競爭。

故事沿用了前面提到的《世界的連結》中的林克化身，這一次，他與另外兩個林克一起被痴迷於時尚的海託皮亞王國召喚，以解除邪惡的德拉蘭女巫對他們的公主斯蒂拉的詛咒。

《三角力量英雄》於 2015 年 10 月在全球發行，評論家的評價褒貶不一。雖然遊戲的演示、配樂和多人遊戲受到稱讚，但許多評論家批評了遊戲的單人模式及其線上功能和配對功能。截至 2020 年 12 月，該遊戲在全球的銷量已超過 136 萬份。

overview_en:
You thought you'd defeated the Nonary Game, but now it's back, and more deadly than ever. It'll take cunning, skill, and more than a little luck to escape alive, but do you really have a choice?

IDO agents working in California report that preliminary findings indicate the exceedingly dangerous Japanese adventure game known as "Zennin Shiboudesu" has somehow crossed the Pacific. Attempts were made to contain it, but some carriers seem to have escaped the quarantine and are now at large.
overview_zh:
你以為你已經打敗了九元遊戲，但現在它又回來了，而且比以往任何時候都更加致命。要活著逃脫，需要狡猾、技巧和一點運氣，但你真的有選擇嗎？

在加州工作的 IDO 特工報告說，初步調查結果表明，極其危險的日本冒險遊戲「Zennin Shiboudesu」已經以某種方式穿越了太平洋。人們曾試圖遏制它，但一些攜帶者似乎已經逃脫了隔離，目前在逃。

overview_en: Zero Time Dilemma is the third entry in the acclaimed Zero Escape series. The mysterious Zero traps 9 participants within an underground shelter, dividing them equally between 3 wards that are connected to an elevator shaft in the middle. The only way out passing through a locked X-Door to access the elevator. Six passwords are required to unlock the door, and each password is revealed only after a participant dies. Zeros Decision Game will offer teams the opportunity to kill other participants through a variety of means to obtain the necessary passwords so they may escape December 31, 2028. Nevada desert. Nine people have been living and performing experiments for the past five days in the Dcom facility. On the sixth day, they discover they are trapped in confinement rooms, an unfamiliar black bracelet strapped to their left wrists. A mysterious figure in a mask appears before them, demanding that they play the Decision Game. The lives of you, me, and the human race hang in the balance. Transported to a shelter underground, they are divided into 3 teams and left in separate wards. Which team will manage to stay alive? The fate of all mankind rests on their decision!
overview_zh: 《零時困境》是廣受好評的《零時逃脫》系列的第三部作品。神秘的「零」將 9 名參與者困在地下避難所內，將他們平均分為 3 個病房，這些病房與中間的電梯井相連。唯一的出路是透過上鎖的 X 門進入電梯。需要六個密碼才能開啟門，每個密碼只有在參與者死亡後才會被揭露。 Zeros Decision Game將為團隊提供透過各種手段殺死其他參與者的機會，以獲得必要的密碼，以便他們可以逃離2028年12月31日的內華達沙漠。在過去五天裡，九個人一直在 Dcom 設施中生活和進行實驗。第六天，他們發現自己被困在禁閉室裡，左手腕上戴著一個陌生的黑色手鐲。一個戴著面具的神秘人物出現在他們面前，要求他們玩決策遊戲。你、我和人類的生命都懸而未決。他們被運送到地下避難所，被分成3組，並被分別安置在不同的病房裡。哪一隊能夠存活下來？全人類的命運取決於他們的決定！

overview_en: Zoo Keeper 3D is a Puzzle game, developed and published by Robot, which was released in Japan in 2012.
overview_zh: Zoo Keeper 3D是一款益智遊戲，由Robot開發和發行，於2012年在日本發行。

overview_en: Zoo Resort is the first 3D zoo simulation game, offering players an incredibly realistic and life-like zoo and management experience. It's up to you to build a world-class zoo destination, including choosing your animals from over 100 options, deciding where to set up their habitats and entertaining visitors with your animals' talents. Plus, watch and almost touch the animals as they come alive in 3D to show off their personality and skills.
overview_zh: Zoo Resort 是首款 3D 動物園模擬遊戲，為玩家提供極其逼真、栩栩如生的動物園和管理體驗。您可以建造一個世界級的動物園目的地，包括從 100 多種選擇中選擇您的動物，決定在哪裡建立它們的棲息地，並利用您的動物的才能來娛樂遊客。此外，還可以觀看並觸控動物，因為它們以 3D 形式栩栩如生，展示它們的個性和技能。

title_en: Zyuden Sentai Kyouryuger - Game de Gaburincho!!
title_jp: Zyuden Sentai Kyouryuger - Game de Gaburincho!!
no_intro_name: Zyuden Sentai Kyouryuger - Game de Gaburincho!! (Japan)
